=== TRENUTNI KOD: 5/30/2026, 5:30:58 PM ===



=== app/components/AppShell.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
4	import { LayoutDashboard, Settings, Menu, X, User, MonitorSmartphone, Sun, Crown, Palette, Cpu, AlignJustify } from 'lucide-react';
5	import { useAppStore } from '../store/useAppStore';
6	import { Toaster } from 'sonner';
7	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
8	
9	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
10	
11	export default function AppShell({ children, user, activeModule = "home", onModuleChange, accentColor, dynamicModules = [] }) {
12	    const { initSettings, setTheme, setLayout } = useAppStore();
13	    const [isSettingsOpen, setIsSettingsOpen] = useState(false);
14	    const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false); 
15	    const [appBranding, setAppBranding] = useState({ name: 'SmartERP', logo: '' });
16	
17	    const [localLayout, setLocalLayout] = useState('sidebar'); 
18	    const [localTheme, setLocalTheme] = useState('industrial'); 
19	    const [isLoaded, setIsLoaded] = useState(false);
20	
21	    useEffect(() => {
22	        const fetchGlobalBranding = async () => {
23	            let nameToUse = localStorage.getItem('saas_app_name') || 'SmartERP';
24	            let logoToUse = localStorage.getItem('saas_app_logo') || '';
25	            
26	            try {
27	                // 🟢 PRISILNO VADI LOGO IZ BAZE KAKO BI PREGAZIO STARU MEMORIJU
28	                const { data: bData } = await supabase.from('brending').select('*');
29	                if (bData && bData.length > 0) {
30	                    let logoObj = bData.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('GLAVNI MENI / SIDEBAR (GORE LIJEVO)'));
31	                    if (!logoObj) logoObj = bData[0]; // Ako nema tačne lokacije, uzmi prvi logo
32	                    
33	                    if (logoObj && logoObj.url_slike) {
34	                        logoToUse = logoObj.url_slike;
35	                        localStorage.setItem('saas_app_logo', logoToUse);
36	                    }
37	                }
38	                const { data: fData } = await supabase.from('postavke_firme').select('app_name').eq('id', 1).maybeSingle();
39	                if (fData && fData.app_name) {
40	                    nameToUse = fData.app_name;
41	                    localStorage.setItem('saas_app_name', nameToUse);
42	                }
43	            } catch(e) {}
44	
45	            setAppBranding({ name: nameToUse, logo: logoToUse });
46	        };
47	        
48	        fetchGlobalBranding(); 
49	        window.addEventListener('saas_updated', fetchGlobalBranding);
50	
51	        const savedLayout = localStorage.getItem('erp_device_layout');
52	        if (savedLayout) setLocalLayout(savedLayout);
53	        
54	        const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('erp_device_theme');
55	        if (savedTheme) setLocalTheme(savedTheme);
56	
57	        setIsLoaded(true);
58	
59	        return () => window.removeEventListener('saas_updated', fetchGlobalBranding);
60	    }, []);
61	
62	    const changeLayout = (noviLayout) => {
63	        setLocalLayout(noviLayout);
64	        localStorage.setItem('erp_device_layout', noviLayout);
65	        setLayout(noviLayout); 
66	    };
67	
68	    const changeTheme = (novaTema) => {
69	        setLocalTheme(novaTema);
70	        localStorage.setItem('erp_device_theme', novaTema);
71	        setTheme(novaTema);
72	    };
73	
74	    useEffect(() => { initSettings(user?.ime_prezime || 'Korisnik'); }, [user, initSettings]);
75	
76	    useEffect(() => {
77	        const handlePopState = (e) => { if (activeModule !== 'home') onModuleChange('home'); };
78	        window.addEventListener('popstate', handlePopState);
79	        return () => window.removeEventListener('popstate', handlePopState);
80	    }, [activeModule, onModuleChange]);
81	
82	    useEffect(() => {
83	        if (activeModule !== 'home' && !window.history.state?.modulOtvoren) {
84	            window.history.pushState({ modulOtvoren: true }, '');
85	        }
86	    }, [activeModule]);
87	
88	    const hasPermission = (modulId) => {
89	        if (!user) return false;
90	        if (user.uloga === 'superadmin' || user.uloga === 'admin') return true;
91	        if (modulId === 'home') return true; 
92	
93	        if (modulId === 'planiranje') {
94	            return (user.dozvole || []).includes('Planiranje Proizvodnje') || (user.dozvole || []).includes('Planiranje (Samo Pregled)');
95	        }
96	        
97	        const mapaDozvola = {
98	            'prijem': 'Prijem trupaca', 'prorez': 'Prorez (Trupci)', 'pilana': 'Pilana (Izlaz)', 'dorada': 'Dorada (Ulaz/Izlaz)',
99	            'lager': 'Lager Paketa', 'ponude': 'Ponude', 'radni_nalozi': 'Radni Nalozi', 'otpremnice': 'Otpremnice i Izdatnice', 
100	            'racuni': 'Računi', 'blagajna': 'Blagajna (Keš)', 'toranj': 'Kontrolni Toranj', 'analitika': 'Analitika',
101	            'podesavanja': 'Podešavanja', 'kiosk': 'Prijava na Rad', 'hr': 'HR Dashboard', 'reklamacije': 'Reklamacije i Povrati'
102	        };
103	        
104	        return (user.dozvole || []).includes(mapaDozvola[modulId]);
105	    };
106	
107	    const renderIcon = (ikona, size = 18) => {
108	        if (ikona === 'LayoutDashboard') return <LayoutDashboard size={size}/>;
109	        if (ikona === 'Settings') return <Settings size={size}/>;
110	        return <span style={{ fontSize: `${size}px` }}>{ikona}</span>;
111	    };
112	
113	    const visibleMenuItems = dynamicModules.filter(item => hasPermission(item.id));
114	
115	    const renderLogoDisplay = (mobile = false) => (
116	        <div className={`flex items-center gap-3 ${mobile ? 'flex-shrink-0' : 'mb-10 px-2 mt-4'}`}>
117	            {appBranding.logo ? (
118	                <img src={appBranding.logo} alt="ERP Logo" className={`${mobile ? 'h-7' : 'h-12'} object-contain`} crossOrigin="anonymous" />
119	            ) : (
120	                <>
121	                    <div className={`${mobile ? 'w-6 h-6 text-xs' : 'w-8 h-8 text-base'} rounded-lg bg-theme-accent flex items-center justify-center font-black text-white`}>
122	                        {appBranding.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
123	                    </div>
124	                    <h1 className={`${mobile ? 'text-xs hidden sm:block' : 'text-xl'} font-black tracking-widest text-theme-text`}>
125	                        {appBranding.name}
126	                    </h1>
127	                </>
128	            )}
129	        </div>
130	    );
131	
132	    const renderMenuContent = () => (
133	        <>
134	            <button onClick={() => { onModuleChange('home'); setMobileMenuOpen(false); }} className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase transition-all text-xs tracking-widest ${activeModule === 'home' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-glow' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-panel hover:text-theme-text'}`}>
135	                <LayoutDashboard size={18} /> POČETNA
136	            </button>
137	            {visibleMenuItems.map(item => (
138	                <button key={item.id} onClick={() => { onModuleChange(item.id); setMobileMenuOpen(false); }} className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase transition-all text-xs tracking-widest ${activeModule === item.id ? 'text-white shadow-glow' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-panel hover:text-theme-text'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: activeModule === item.id ? (item.hex_boja || 'var(--theme-accent)') : '' }}>
139	                    {item.slika_url ? <img src={item.slika_url} className="w-5 h-5 object-contain" alt={item.naziv}/> : renderIcon(item.ikona, 18)} {item.naziv}
140	                </button>
141	            ))}
142	        </>
143	    );
144	
145	    const renderSettingsPanel = () => (
146	        <AnimatePresence>
147	            {isSettingsOpen && (
148	                <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 50 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, x: 50 }} className="fixed top-0 right-0 h-full w-80 bg-theme-card border-l border-theme-border shadow-2xl z-[5000] p-6 flex flex-col backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)]">
149	                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-8 border-b border-theme-border pb-4">
150	                        <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-theme-text uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2"><Settings size={20}/> Postavke uređaja</h2>
151	                        <button onClick={() => setIsSettingsOpen(false)} className="text-theme-muted hover:text-red-500 transition-colors"><X size={24}/></button>
152	                    </div>
153	                    <div className="space-y-6 flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
154	                        <p className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest text-center border-b border-theme-border pb-3">Ove postavke se pamte samo na ovom uređaju.</p>
155	                        <div>
156	                            <h3 className="text-[10px] font-black text-theme-muted mb-3 uppercase tracking-widest">Tema / Boje</h3>
157	                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
158	                                <button onClick={() => changeTheme('industrial')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localTheme==='industrial' ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-400 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><Cpu size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Industrial</span></button>
159	                                <button onClick={() => changeTheme('aurora')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localTheme==='aurora' ? 'bg-purple-600 border-purple-400 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><Palette size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Aurora Glass</span></button>
160	                                <button onClick={() => changeTheme('light')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localTheme==='light' ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><Sun size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Clinical Light</span></button>
161	                                <button onClick={() => changeTheme('executive')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localTheme==='executive' ? 'bg-yellow-700 border-yellow-500 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><Crown size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Executive Gold</span></button>
162	                            </div>
163	                        </div>
164	                        <div>
165	                            <h3 className="text-[10px] font-black text-theme-muted mb-3 uppercase tracking-widest mt-6">Izgled Ekrana</h3>
166	                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
167	                                <button onClick={() => changeLayout('sidebar')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localLayout==='sidebar' ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><MonitorSmartphone size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Sidebar</span></button>
168	                                <button onClick={() => changeLayout('topnav')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localLayout==='topnav' ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><AlignJustify size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Top Nav</span></button>
169	                                <button onClick={() => changeLayout('bento')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localLayout==='bento' ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><Menu size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-center">Bento</span></button>
170	                                <button onClick={() => changeLayout('kiosk')} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 ${localLayout==='kiosk' ? 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text'}`}><LayoutDashboard size={24}/> <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Kiosk</span></button>
171	                            </div>
172	                        </div>
173	                    </div>
174	                </motion.div>
175	            )}
176	        </AnimatePresence>
177	    );
178	
179	    const renderSidebarLayout = () => (
180	        <div className="flex w-full min-h-screen relative">
181	            <div className="md:hidden fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-theme-card border-b border-theme-border flex items-center justify-between px-4 z-40 backdrop-blur-md">
182	                <button onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(true)} className="p-2 bg-theme-panel text-theme-text rounded-xl border border-theme-border"><Menu size={20}/></button>
183	                {renderLogoDisplay(true)}
184	                <button onClick={() => setIsSettingsOpen(true)} className="p-2 bg-theme-panel text-theme-text rounded-xl border border-theme-border"><Settings size={20}/></button>
185	            </div>
186	
187	            <motion.aside initial={{ x: -100, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ x: 0, opacity: 1 }} className="w-64 fixed h-screen bg-theme-card border-r border-theme-border flex flex-col p-4 backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] z-40 hidden md:flex">
188	                {renderLogoDisplay()}
189	                <nav className="flex flex-col gap-2 flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pr-2">
190	                    {renderMenuContent()}
191	                </nav>
192	                <div className="border-t border-theme-border pt-4 mt-auto">
193	                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 mb-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
194	                        <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-theme-accent flex items-center justify-center text-white font-black"><User size={16}/></div>
195	                        <div className="text-left"><p className="text-[9px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black tracking-widest">Prijavljen</p><p className="text-xs text-theme-text font-black truncate max-w-[140px]">{user?.ime_prezime || 'Korisnik'}</p></div>
196	                    </div>
197	                    <button onClick={() => setIsSettingsOpen(true)} className="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 p-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-theme-text hover:bg-theme-accent hover:text-white transition-all text-xs font-black uppercase border border-theme-border"><Settings size={16}/> Postavke uređaja</button>
198	                </div>
199	            </motion.aside>
200	
201	            <AnimatePresence>
202	                {mobileMenuOpen && (
203	                    <>
204	                        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)} className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-[9000] md:hidden" />
205	                        <motion.div initial={{ x: '-100%' }} animate={{ x: 0 }} exit={{ x: '-100%' }} transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }} className="fixed top-0 left-0 bottom-0 w-[80%] max-w-[300px] bg-theme-card border-r border-theme-border z-[9001] p-4 flex flex-col md:hidden shadow-2xl">
206	                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6 border-b border-theme-border pb-4">
207	                                {renderLogoDisplay(true)}
208	                                <button onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)} className="p-2 bg-theme-panel rounded-lg text-theme-muted hover:text-white border border-theme-border"><X size={20}/></button>
209	                            </div>
210	                            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 mb-6 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
211	                                <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-theme-accent flex items-center justify-center text-white font-black"><User size={16}/></div>
212	                                <div className="text-left"><p className="text-[9px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black tracking-widest">Prijavljen</p><p className="text-xs text-theme-text font-black truncate max-w-[150px]">{user?.ime_prezime || 'Korisnik'}</p></div>
213	                            </div>
214	                            <nav className="flex flex-col gap-2 flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pb-10">
215	                                {renderMenuContent()}
216	                            </nav>
217	                        </motion.div>
218	                    </>
219	                )}
220	            </AnimatePresence>
221	
222	            <main className="flex-1 md:ml-64 pt-20 md:pt-8 p-4 md:p-8 min-h-screen relative z-10 w-full overflow-x-hidden">{children}</main>
223	        </div>
224	    );
225	
226	    const renderTopNavLayout = () => (
227	        <div className="flex flex-col w-full min-h-screen relative">
228	            <motion.header initial={{ y: -60, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} className="h-16 w-full bg-theme-card border-b border-theme-border px-4 flex items-center justify-between sticky top-0 z-40 backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] shadow-sm">
229	                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 w-full justify-between md:w-auto md:justify-start">
230	                    <button onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(true)} className="md:hidden p-2.5 bg-theme-panel text-theme-text rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform"><Menu size={20}/></button>
231	                    {renderLogoDisplay(true)}
232	                    <div className="md:hidden flex items-center gap-2">
233	                         <button onClick={() => setIsSettingsOpen(true)} className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-muted hover:text-white hover:bg-theme-accent transition-all shadow-sm"><Settings size={18}/></button>
234	                    </div>
235	                </div>
236	                
237	                <nav className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1 flex-1 justify-center px-4 overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar">
238	                    <button onClick={() => onModuleChange('home')} className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg font-bold uppercase transition-all text-[10px] tracking-widest whitespace-nowrap flex-shrink-0 ${activeModule === 'home' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-panel hover:text-theme-text'}`}>
239	                        <LayoutDashboard size={13} /> POČETNA
240	                    </button>
241	                    {visibleMenuItems.map(item => (
242	                        <button key={item.id} onClick={() => onModuleChange(item.id)} className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg font-bold uppercase transition-all text-[10px] tracking-widest whitespace-nowrap flex-shrink-0 ${activeModule === item.id ? 'text-white' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-panel hover:text-theme-text'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: activeModule === item.id ? (item.hex_boja || 'var(--theme-accent)') : '' }}>
243	                            {item.slika_url ? <img src={item.slika_url} className="w-3 h-3 object-contain" alt={item.naziv}/> : renderIcon(item.ikona, 13)} {item.naziv}
244	                        </button>
245	                    ))}
246	                </nav>
247	                
248	                <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
249	                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-theme-panel rounded-lg border border-theme-border shadow-sm">
250	                        <div className="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-theme-accent flex items-center justify-center text-white"><User size={11}/></div>
251	                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-theme-text uppercase tracking-widest truncate max-w-[100px]">{user?.ime_prezime || 'Korisnik'}</span>
252	                    </div>
253	                    <button onClick={() => setIsSettingsOpen(true)} className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-muted hover:text-white hover:bg-theme-accent transition-all shadow-sm"><Settings size={18}/></button>
254	                </div>
255	            </motion.header>
256	
257	            <AnimatePresence>
258	                {mobileMenuOpen && (
259	                    <>
260	                        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)} className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-[9000] md:hidden" />
261	                        <motion.div initial={{ x: '-100%' }} animate={{ x: 0 }} exit={{ x: '-100%' }} transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }} className="fixed top-0 left-0 bottom-0 w-[80%] max-w-[300px] bg-theme-card border-r border-theme-border z-[9001] p-4 flex flex-col md:hidden shadow-2xl">

281	
282	    const renderBentoLayout = () => (
283	        <div className="flex flex-col w-full min-h-screen relative pb-24">
284	            <main className="flex-1 p-4 md:p-8 relative z-10 w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto">{children}</main>
285	            <motion.div initial={{ y: 100, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} className="fixed bottom-4 left-0 right-0 mx-auto w-fit max-w-[95vw] overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar bg-theme-card border border-theme-accent/50 p-2 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] z-50 flex items-center gap-2 backdrop-blur-2xl">

'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-glow scale-105' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-panel hover:text-theme-text'}`}>

288	                </button>
289	                {visibleMenuItems.map(item => (
290	                    <button key={item.id} onClick={() => onModuleChange(item.id)} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase transition-all text-xs tracking-widest ${activeModule === item.id ? 'text-white shadow-glow scale-105' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-panel hover:text-theme-text'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: activeModule === item.id ? (item.hex_boja || 'var(--theme-accent)') : '' }}>
291	                        {item.slika_url ? <img src={item.slika_url} className="w-5 h-5 object-contain" alt={item.naziv}/> : renderIcon(item.ikona, 18)} <span className="hidden sm:inline">{item.naziv}</span>
292	                    </button>
293	                ))}
294	                <div className="w-px h-8 bg-theme-border mx-2"></div>
295	                <button onClick={() => setIsSettingsOpen(true)} className="p-4 rounded-2xl text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-panel hover:text-theme-text transition-all"><Settings size={20}/></button>
296	            </motion.div>
297	        </div>
298	    );
299	
300	    const renderKioskLayout = () => (
301	        <div className="flex flex-col w-full min-h-screen relative">
302	            <motion.header initial={{ y: -50, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} className="h-20 w-full bg-theme-card border-b border-theme-border px-6 flex items-center justify-between sticky top-0 z-40 backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] shadow-sm">
303	                {renderLogoDisplay(true)}
304	                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 sm:gap-4 overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar pb-1">
305	                    <button onClick={() => onModuleChange('home')} className={`px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-black uppercase transition-all text-xs tracking-widest border whitespace-nowrap ${activeModule === 'home' ? 'bg-theme-accent border-theme-accent text-white shadow-glow' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text hidden sm:block'}`}>
306	                        POČETNA
307	                    </button>
308	                    {visibleMenuItems.map(item => (
309	                        <button key={item.id} onClick={() => onModuleChange(item.id)} className={`px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-black uppercase transition-all text-xs tracking-widest border whitespace-nowrap flex items-center gap-2 ${activeModule === item.id ? 'text-white shadow-glow border-transparent' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-theme-text hidden sm:flex'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: activeModule === item.id ? (item.hex_boja || 'var(--theme-accent)') : '' }}>
310	                            {item.slika_url ? <img src={item.slika_url} className="w-4 h-4 object-contain" alt={item.naziv}/> : renderIcon(item.ikona, 14)} {item.naziv}
311	                        </button>
312	                    ))}
313	                    <div className="h-8 w-px bg-theme-border mx-2"></div>
314	                    <button onClick={() => setIsSettingsOpen(true)} className="w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text hover:bg-theme-accent hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"><Settings size={20}/></button>
315	                </div>
316	            </motion.header>
317	            <main className="flex-1 p-2 sm:p-6 relative z-10 w-full overflow-x-hidden">{children}</main>
318	        </div>
319	    );
320	
321	    if (!isLoaded) return <div className="min-h-screen bg-theme-main flex items-center justify-center"><div className="animate-pulse text-slate-500 font-bold tracking-widest uppercase">Učitavam interfejs...</div></div>;
322	
323	    return (
324	        <div style={accentColor ? { '--theme-accent': accentColor } : {}} className="w-full min-h-screen bg-theme-main text-theme-text transition-colors duration-300 relative font-sans">
325	            <div className="hidden md:block">
326	                {localLayout === 'sidebar' && renderSidebarLayout()}
327	                {localLayout === 'kiosk' && renderKioskLayout()}
328	                {localLayout === 'bento' && renderBentoLayout()}
329	                {localLayout === 'topnav' && renderTopNavLayout()}
330	            </div>
331	            
332	            <div className="md:hidden">
333	                {renderTopNavLayout()}
334	            </div>
335	            
336	            <Toaster theme={localTheme === 'light' ? 'light' : 'dark'} richColors position="top-right" expand={true}/>
337	            
338	            {renderSettingsPanel()}
339	        </div>
340	    );
341	}

=== app/components/DnevnikMasine.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	
5	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
6	
7	export default function DnevnikMasine({ modul, header, user }) {
8	    const [logovi, setLogovi] = useState([]);
9	    const t = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
10	    const [form, setForm] = useState({ vrijeme_od: t, vrijeme_do: '', zastoj_min: '', napomena: '' });
11	
12	    useEffect(() => { loadLogove(); }, [header]);
13	
14	    const loadLogove = async () => {
15	        if(!header || !header.datum || !header.masina) return;
16	        const { data } = await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').select('*').eq('datum', header.datum).eq('masina', header.masina).eq('modul', modul).order('vrijeme_od', { ascending: false });
17	        if (data) setLogovi(data);
18	    };
19	
20	    const snimiZastojIliRad = async () => {
21	        if (!form.vrijeme_od) return alert("Vrijeme početka je obavezno!");
22	        const payload = {
23	            datum: header.datum, masina: header.masina, modul: modul,
24	            vrijeme_od: form.vrijeme_od, vrijeme_do: form.vrijeme_do || null,
25	            zastoj_min: parseInt(form.zastoj_min) || 0, napomena: form.napomena, snimio: user.ime_prezime
26	        };
27	        const { error } = await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').insert([payload]);
28	        if (error) return alert("Greška: " + error.message);
29	        setForm({ vrijeme_od: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }), vrijeme_do: '', zastoj_min: '', napomena: '' });
30	        loadLogove();
31	    };
32	
33	    const obrisiLog = async (id) => {
34	        if(window.confirm("Obrisati ovaj zapis?")) {
35	            await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').delete().eq('id', id);
36	            loadLogove();
37	        }
38	    };
39	
40	    return (
41	        <div className="bg-theme-card p-6 rounded-box border border-slate-700 shadow-2xl space-y-4 mt-6">
42	            <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-xs">⚙️ EVIDENCIJA RADA I ZASTOJA MAŠINE</h3>
43	            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-3 bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border items-end">
44	                <div>
45	                    <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1">Početak</label>
46	                    <input type="time" value={form.vrijeme_od} onChange={e => setForm({...form, vrijeme_od: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-3 bg-theme-main rounded-xl text-xs text-white border border-slate-700 outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
47	                </div>
48	                <div>
49	                    <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1">Završetak</label>
50	                    <input type="time" value={form.vrijeme_do} onChange={e => setForm({...form, vrijeme_do: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-3 bg-theme-main rounded-xl text-xs text-white border border-slate-700 outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
51	                </div>
52	                <div>
53	                    <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1">Zastoj (Minuta)</label>
54	                    <input type="number" value={form.zastoj_min} onChange={e => setForm({...form, zastoj_min: e.target.value})} placeholder="0" className="w-full p-3 bg-red-900/20 rounded-xl text-xs text-red-400 font-black border border-red-500/50 outline-none" />
55	                </div>
56	                <div className="col-span-2 md:col-span-1">
57	                    <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1">Napomena / Razlog</label>
58	                    <input type="text" value={form.napomena} onChange={e => setForm({...form, napomena: e.target.value})} placeholder="Održavanje, kvar..." className="w-full p-3 bg-theme-main rounded-xl text-xs text-white border border-slate-700 outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
59	                </div>
60	                <button onClick={snimiZastojIliRad} className="w-full py-3 bg-amber-600 text-white font-black rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase shadow-lg hover:bg-amber-500">➕ Dodaj</button>
61	            </div>
62	            <div className="space-y-2 mt-4">
63	                {logovi.length === 0 && <p className="text-center text-slate-500 text-[10px] uppercase">Nema unesenih zastoja za danas.</p>}
64	                {logovi.map(l => (
65	                    <div key={l.id} className="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-slate-700 rounded-xl">
66	                        <div>
67	                            <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black">
68	                                <span className="text-emerald-400">{l.vrijeme_od}</span> - {l.vrijeme_do ? <span className="text-amber-400">{l.vrijeme_do}</span> : <span className="text-slate-500">...</span>}
69	                            </p>
70	                            <p className="text-white text-xs font-bold mt-1">{l.napomena || 'Nema napomene'}</p>
71	                        </div>
72	                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
73	                            {l.zastoj_min > 0 && <span className="text-red-400 text-xs font-black bg-red-900/30 px-2 py-1 rounded border border-red-500/30">Zastoj: {l.zastoj_min} min</span>}
74	                            <button onClick={() => obrisiLog(l.id)} className="text-red-500 font-black hover:bg-slate-700 p-2 rounded">✕</button>
75	                        </div>
76	                    </div>
77	                ))}
78	            </div>
79	        </div>
80	    );
81	}

=== app/components/MasterHeader.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	
5	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
6	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
7	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
8	
9	export default function MasterHeader({ header, setHeader, onExit, user, hideMasina, modulIme, saas }) {
10	    const [masine, setMasine] = useState([]);
11	    const [sviRadnici, setSviRadnici] = useState([]);
12	    const [aktivniRadnici, setAktivniRadnici] = useState([]);
13	    const [otvorenTab, setOtvorenTab] = useState(false);
14	    const [noviRadnik, setNoviRadnik] = useState('');
15	
16	    const currentUser = user?.ime_prezime ? user : JSON.parse(typeof window !== 'undefined' ? localStorage.getItem('smart_timber_user') || '{}' : '{}');
17	
18	    useEffect(() => {
19	        const fetchMasine = async () => {
20	            const { data } = await supabase.from('masine').select('naziv, dozvoljeni_moduli').order('naziv');
21	            if (data) {
22	                const filtrirane = data.filter(m => {
23	                    if (!modulIme) return true; 
24	                    if (!m.dozvoljeni_moduli) return true; 
25	                    return m.dozvoljeni_moduli.toLowerCase().includes(modulIme.toLowerCase());
26	                });
27	                setMasine(filtrirane.map(m => m.naziv));
28	            }
29	        };
30	
31	        const fetchRadnici = async () => {
32	            const { data } = await supabase.from('radnici').select('ime_prezime').order('ime_prezime');
33	            setSviRadnici(data ? data.map(r => r.ime_prezime) : []);
34	        };
35	
36	        fetchMasine();
37	        fetchRadnici();
38	    }, [modulIme]); 
39	
40	    const ucitajAktivne = async () => {
41	        if (!header?.masina) return;
42	        const { data } = await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').select('*').eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
43	        setAktivniRadnici(data || []);
44	    };
45	
46	    useEffect(() => { ucitajAktivne(); }, [header?.masina]);
47	
48	    useEffect(() => {
49	        const handleRefresh = () => ucitajAktivne();
50	        window.addEventListener('radnici_updated', handleRefresh);
51	        return () => window.removeEventListener('radnici_updated', handleRefresh);
52	    }, [header?.masina]);
53	
54	    const dodajRadnika = async () => {
55	        if(!header?.masina) return alert("Odaberi mašinu prvo!");
56	        if(!noviRadnik) return;
57	        await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').insert([{ radnik_ime: noviRadnik, masina_naziv: header.masina, vrijeme_prijave: new Date().toISOString(), uloga: 'pomocni' }]);
58	        setNoviRadnik('');
59	        ucitajAktivne();
60	        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('radnici_updated')); 
61	    };
62	
63	    const odjaviRadnika = async (ime) => {
64	        await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('radnik_ime', ime).eq('masina_naziv', header?.masina).is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
65	        ucitajAktivne();
66	        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('radnici_updated'));
67	    };
68	
69	    return (
70	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 w-full mb-6">
71	            <div className={`flex flex-wrap lg:flex-nowrap justify-between items-center bg-theme-card p-3 lg:p-4 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] border border-theme-border shadow-glow backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] gap-4 relative z-[100] ${saas?.isEditMode ? 'ring-2 ring-amber-500' : ''}`}>
72	                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
73	                    <button onClick={onExit} className="bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-[10px] px-4 py-3 rounded-xl uppercase text-theme-text font-black hover:bg-red-500 hover:border-red-500 transition-all shadow-md">← Meni</button>
74	                    {modulIme && (
75	                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-theme-panel/50 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-theme-border/50">
76	                            <span className="text-theme-accent font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-xs hidden sm:block">Modul: {modulIme}</span>
77	                            {/* GLOBALNA LIVE LAMPICA */}
78	                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 ml-2 border-l border-theme-border/50 pl-3" title="Sistem je uživo povezan sa bazom">
79	                                <span className="relative flex h-2.5 w-2.5">
80	                                    <span className="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-emerald-400 opacity-75"></span>
81	                                    <span className="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2.5 w-2.5 bg-emerald-500"></span>
82	                                </span>
83	                                <span className="text-[9px] text-emerald-500 font-black uppercase tracking-widest hidden md:block">Live</span>
84	                            </div>
85	                        </div>
86	                    )}
87	                </div>
88	                
89	                {header && (
90	                    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-2 lg:gap-3 flex-1 lg:flex-none">
91	                        <input type="date" value={header.datum || ''} onChange={e => setHeader({...header, datum: e.target.value})} className="!p-3 text-xs font-black cursor-pointer w-full sm:w-auto bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent" />
92	                        
93	                        {!hideMasina && (
94	                            <>
95	                                <select 
96	                                    value={header.masina || ''} 
97	                                    onChange={e => { setHeader({...header, masina: e.target.value}); localStorage.setItem('last_masina', e.target.value); }} 
98	                                    className={`!p-3 text-xs cursor-pointer font-black uppercase tracking-wider w-full sm:w-auto min-w-[160px] bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent ${!header.masina ? '!bg-red-900/30 !border-red-500 !text-red-400 animate-pulse' : ''}`}
99	                                >
100	                                    <option value="">Odaberi mašinu...</option>
101	                                    {masine.map(m => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
102	                                </select>
103	
104	                                {header.masina && (
105	                                    <button onClick={() => setOtvorenTab(!otvorenTab)} className="w-full sm:w-auto min-w-[140px] !p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-accent text-theme-accent text-xs uppercase font-black rounded-xl hover:bg-theme-accent hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
106	                                        👷 RADNICI ({aktivniRadnici.length})
107	                                    </button>
108	                                )}
109	                            </>
110	                        )}
111	                    </div>
112	                )}
113	
114	                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 justify-center lg:justify-end w-full lg:w-auto">
115	                    {(currentUser?.uloga === 'superadmin' || currentUser?.uloga === 'admin') && saas && (
116	                        <div className="flex gap-2">
117	                            {saas.isEditMode ? (
118	                                <>
119	                                    <button onClick={saas.odustani} className="px-3 py-3 bg-red-900/40 text-red-400 border border-red-500/50 rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white transition-all">✕ Odustani</button>
120	                                    <button onClick={saas.spasiDizajn} className="px-3 py-3 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-all">💾 Spasi</button>
121	                                </>
122	                            ) : (
123	                                <button onClick={saas.pokreniEdit} className="px-3 py-3 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase hover:bg-amber-500 hover:text-white transition-all">✏️ Uredi Dizajn</button>
124	                            )}
125	                        </div>
126	                    )}
127	
128	                    <div className="bg-theme-panel px-4 py-2 rounded-xl border border-theme-border flex flex-col items-end shadow-inner w-full sm:w-auto">
129	                        <span className="text-[9px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black">Prijavljen:</span>
130	                        <span className="text-xs text-theme-text font-bold whitespace-nowrap">{currentUser?.ime_prezime || 'Korisnik'}</span>
131	                    </div>
132	                </div>
133	            </div>
134	
135	            {otvorenTab && header?.masina && !hideMasina && (
136	                <div className="bg-theme-panel p-5 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] border border-theme-accent shadow-glow animate-in slide-in-from-top-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-start md:items-center relative z-40 mt-1 backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)]">
137	                    <div className="flex-1 flex gap-2 w-full">
138	                        <select value={noviRadnik} onChange={e=>setNoviRadnik(e.target.value)} className="flex-1 !p-3 bg-theme-card border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none font-bold">
139	                            <option value="">Odaberi dodatnog radnika iz baze...</option>
140	                            {sviRadnici.map(r => <option key={r} value={r}>{r}</option>)}
141	                        </select>
142	                        <button onClick={dodajRadnika} className="bg-theme-accent px-6 py-3 rounded-xl text-white font-black text-[10px] uppercase hover:opacity-80 shadow-lg transition-all border border-theme-accent">➕ Dodaj</button>
143	                    </div>
144	                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 flex-1 w-full items-center mt-2 md:mt-0">
145	                        <span className="text-[10px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black mr-2">Trenutno na mašini:</span>
146	                        {aktivniRadnici.length === 0 && <span className="text-xs text-theme-muted italic">Niko nije prijavljen...</span>}
147	                        {aktivniRadnici.map(r => (
148	                            <div key={r.id} className="bg-theme-panel border border-theme-accent text-theme-accent px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black uppercase flex items-center gap-2 shadow-md">
149	                                {r.radnik_ime} <span className="opacity-50 lowercase ml-1">({r.uloga})</span> 
150	                                <button onClick={() => odjaviRadnika(r.radnik_ime)} className="hover:text-red-400 text-red-500 ml-2 text-xs transition-all font-black">✕</button>
151	                            </div>
152	                        ))}
153	                    </div>
154	                </div>
155	            )}
156	        </div>
157	    );
158	}

=== app/components/MasterSearch.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
3	
4	export default function MasterSearch({ data = [], value, onSelect, placeholder = "Pronađi...", poljaZaPretragu = ['id', 'naziv'], renderItem, onScanClick }) {
5	    const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
6	    const [search, setSearch] = useState(value || '');
7	    const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState(0);
8	    const wrapperRef = useRef(null);
9	    const inputRef = useRef(null);
10	
11	    // Sinhronizacija vanjske vrijednosti
12	    useEffect(() => { setSearch(value || ''); }, [value]);
13	    
14	    // Resetuj selekciju na početak kad god se promijeni tekst
15	    useEffect(() => { setSelectedIndex(0); }, [search]);
16	
17	    // Zatvori dropdown ako se klikne van njega
18	    useEffect(() => {
19	        function handleClickOutside(event) { 
20	            if (wrapperRef.current && !wrapperRef.current.contains(event.target)) setOpen(false); 
21	        }
22	        document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside); 
23	        return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
24	    }, []);
25	
26	    const safeSearch = (search || '').toString().toUpperCase().trim();
27	    
28	    // Pametno filtriranje
29	    const filtered = data.filter(item => {
30	        if (!safeSearch) return true; // Ako je prazno, prikaži sve opcije
31	        return poljaZaPretragu.some(polje => {
32	            const val = item[polje];
33	            if (!val) return false;
34	            return val.toString().toUpperCase().includes(safeSearch);
35	        });
36	    });
37	
38	    const selectItem = (item) => {
39	        // Ažuriraj lokalni state ODMAH zbog brzine UI-ja
40	        setSearch(item[poljaZaPretragu[0]]);
41	        setOpen(false);
42	        if (onSelect) onSelect(item);
43	        inputRef.current?.blur(); // Skloni fokus da dropdown nestane
44	    };
45	
46	    const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
47	        if (!open) { 
48	            if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === 'Enter') setOpen(true); 
49	            return; 
50	        }
51	        
52	        if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { 
53	            e.preventDefault(); 
54	            setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev < filtered.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : prev)); 
55	        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') { 
56	            e.preventDefault(); 
57	            setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : 0)); 
58	        } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
59	            e.preventDefault();
60	            if (filtered.length > 0) {
61	                selectItem(filtered[selectedIndex]);
62	            } else { 
63	                setOpen(false); 
64	            }
65	        } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
66	            setOpen(false);
67	        }
68	    };
69	
70	    return (
71	        <div ref={wrapperRef} className="relative font-black w-full flex bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl overflow-visible focus-within:border-theme-accent transition-all shadow-inner min-h-[45px]">
72	            <input 
73	                ref={inputRef}
74	                value={search} 
75	                onFocus={() => setOpen(true)} 
76	                onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
77	                onKeyDown={handleKeyDown} 
78	                onChange={e => { setSearch(e.target.value.toUpperCase()); setOpen(true); }} 
79	                placeholder={placeholder} 
80	                className="flex-1 px-4 bg-transparent text-sm text-theme-text outline-none uppercase font-black tracking-widest relative z-10 min-w-0" 
81	                autoComplete="off"
82	            />
83	            {onScanClick && (
84	                <button onClick={onScanClick} className="px-5 bg-theme-accent/20 text-theme-accent text-lg hover:bg-theme-accent hover:text-white transition-all border-l border-theme-accent/30 relative z-10 shrink-0">📷</button>
85	            )}
86	            
87	            {/* Prikazuje se dropdown čim se fokusira, čak i ako je prazno */}
88	            {open && (
89	                <div className="absolute top-full left-0 z-[9999] w-full mt-2 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border shadow-2xl rounded-xl max-h-60 overflow-y-auto text-left custom-scrollbar">
90	                    {filtered.length === 0 && <div className="p-4 text-xs text-theme-muted text-center italic">Nema rezultata...</div>}
91	                    
92	                    {filtered.map((item, index) => (
93	                        <div 
94	                            key={index} 
95	                            // OBAVEZNO: onMouseDown umjesto onClick garantuje momentalnu reakciju!
96	                            onMouseDown={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); selectItem(item); }} 
97	                            onMouseEnter={() => setSelectedIndex(index)} 
98	                            className={`p-3 border-b border-theme-border cursor-pointer transition-colors ${index === selectedIndex ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white' : 'hover:bg-slate-800 text-theme-text'}`}
99	                        >
100	                            {renderItem ? renderItem(item) : <span className="font-black text-xs uppercase">{item[poljaZaPretragu[0]]}</span>}
101	                        </div>
102	                    ))}
103	                </div>
104	            )}
105	        </div>
106	    );
107	}

=== app/components/PametniDialog.jsx ===
1	import React from 'react';
2	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
3	
4	export default function PametniDialog({ isOpen, tip = 'info', naslov, poruka, onConfirm, onCancel, confirmText = 'POTVRDI', cancelText = 'ZATVORI' }) {
5	    if (!isOpen) return null;
6	
7	    const config = {
8	        greska: { ikona: '🛑', boja: 'red', border: 'border-red-500', bg: 'bg-red-900/20', text: 'text-red-400', shadow: 'shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(239,68,68,0.3)]' },
9	        upozorenje: { ikona: '⚠️', boja: 'amber', border: 'border-amber-500', bg: 'bg-amber-900/20', text: 'text-amber-400', shadow: 'shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]' },
10	        uspjeh: { ikona: '✅', boja: 'emerald', border: 'border-emerald-500', bg: 'bg-emerald-900/20', text: 'text-emerald-400', shadow: 'shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]' },
11	        info: { ikona: 'ℹ️', boja: 'blue', border: 'border-blue-500', bg: 'bg-blue-900/20', text: 'text-blue-400', shadow: 'shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)]' }
12	    };
13	
14	    const c = config[tip] || config.info;
15	
16	    return (
17	        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] bg-[#090e17]/90 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
18	            <motion.div initial={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }} exit={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }} className={`bg-theme-card border-2 ${c.border} p-8 rounded-[2rem] ${c.shadow} max-w-lg w-full text-center`}>
19	                <span className="text-6xl mb-4 block animate-bounce">{c.ikona}</span>
20	                <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-theme-text uppercase mb-2 tracking-widest">{naslov}</h2>
21	                <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm mb-8 whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed">{poruka}</p>
22	                
23	                <div className="flex gap-4 flex-col md:flex-row justify-center">
24	                    {onCancel && (
25	                        <button onClick={onCancel} className="flex-1 py-4 bg-theme-panel text-slate-300 rounded-xl uppercase font-black hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all border border-slate-600">
26	                            ✕ {cancelText}
27	                        </button>
28	                    )}
29	                    {onConfirm && (
30	                        <button onClick={onConfirm} className={`flex-1 py-4 bg-${c.boja}-600 text-white rounded-xl uppercase font-black shadow-lg hover:bg-${c.boja}-500 transition-all`}>
31	                            {confirmText}
32	                        </button>
33	                    )}
34	                </div>
35	            </motion.div>
36	        </div>
37	    );
38	}

=== app/components/PilanaIzvjestaj.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	
3	import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
4	import { PieChart, Pie, Cell, BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts';
5	
6	export default function PilanaIzvjestaj({ data, datum, lokacija, smjena }) {
7	  const tamnoPlava = "#25254A";
8	  const limetaZelena = "#9EC642";
9	  const sivaOtpad = "#94a3b8";
10	  const PALETA = [limetaZelena, '#3b82f6', '#8b5cf6', '#f59e0b', '#06b6d4', '#ec4899'];
11	
12	  const [logoUrl, setLogoUrl] = useState('');
13	
14	  useEffect(() => {
15	    try {
16	      const brending = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('erp_brending') || '[]');
17	      const logoObj = brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Svi PDF Dokumenti')) || 
18	                      brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Glavni Meni (Dashboard Vrh)'));
19	      if (logoObj && logoObj.url_slike) setLogoUrl(logoObj.url_slike);
20	    } catch (e) {}
21	  }, []);
22	
23	  if (!data || !data.kpi) return <div className="text-center p-10 font-bold text-slate-500">Učitavam podatke za izvještaj...</div>;
24	
25	  const grupisaniIzlaz = useMemo(() => {
26	    const groups = {};
27	    (data.glavna_tabela || []).forEach(p => {
28	      const vrsta = p.naziv_proizvoda || 'Ostalo';
29	      if (!groups[vrsta]) groups[vrsta] = { items: [], totalM3: 0, totalKom: 0 };
30	      groups[vrsta].items.push(p);
31	      groups[vrsta].totalM3 += parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
32	      groups[vrsta].totalKom += parseFloat(p.kolicina_ulaz || 0);
33	    });
34	    return groups;
35	  }, [data.glavna_tabela]);
36	
37	  const yieldPieData = useMemo(() => {
38	    const ulaz = parseFloat(data.kpi.ulaz_m3 || 0);
39	    const izlaz = parseFloat(data.kpi.izlaz_m3 || 0);
40	    const otpad = Math.max(0, ulaz - izlaz);
41	    
42	    const chartData = (data.izlaz_struktura || []).map(item => ({
43	      name: item.name,
44	      value: parseFloat(item.m3),
45	      proc: ulaz > 0 ? ((item.m3 / ulaz) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0
46	    }));
47	    
48	    if (otpad > 0) chartData.push({ name: 'Otpad / Piljevina', value: otpad, proc: ulaz > 0 ? ((otpad / ulaz) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0, isWaste: true });
49	    return chartData;
50	  }, [data]);
51	
52	  const mixPieData = useMemo(() => {
53	    const izlaz = parseFloat(data.kpi.izlaz_m3 || 0);
54	    return (data.izlaz_struktura || []).map(item => ({
55	      name: item.name,
56	      value: parseFloat(item.m3),
57	      proc: izlaz > 0 ? ((item.m3 / izlaz) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0
58	    }));
59	  }, [data]);
60	
61	  const formatDatum = (iso) => {
62	    if(!iso) return '';
63	    const [y, m, d] = iso.split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`;
64	  };
65	
66	  const renderCustomLegend = (props) => {
67	    const { payload } = props;
68	    return (
69	      <ul className="text-[8px] flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-1.5 mt-2 leading-tight">
70	        {payload.map((entry, index) => (
71	          <li key={`item-${index}`} className="flex items-center font-bold">
72	            <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full inline-block mr-1" style={{ backgroundColor: entry.color }}></span>
73	            {entry.value}: {entry.payload.proc}%
74	          </li>
75	        ))}
76	      </ul>
77	    );
78	  };
79	
80	  return (
81	    <>
82	      {/* MAGIJA: CSS koji izoluje samo ovaj izvještaj prilikom printanja! */}
83	      <style>{`
84	        @media print {
85	          body * { visibility: hidden; }
86	          .print-izolacija, .print-izolacija * { visibility: visible; }
87	          .print-izolacija { 
88	            position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 100%; 
89	            margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; box-shadow: none !important;
90	          }
91	          @page { size: A4 portrait; margin: 10mm; }
92	        }
93	      `}</style>
94	
95	      <div className="print-izolacija bg-white text-black p-6 mx-auto max-w-[210mm] min-h-[297mm] shadow-2xl relative font-sans flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ WebkitPrintColorAdjust: 'exact', printColorAdjust: 'exact' }}>
96	        
97	        <div>
98	          {/* 1. HEADER */}
99	          <div className="flex justify-between items-start border-b-2 pb-3 mb-4" style={{ borderColor: tamnoPlava }}>
100	            <div className="w-48 h-20 flex items-center justify-start">
101	              {logoUrl ? <img src={logoUrl} alt="Logo" className="max-h-full max-w-full object-contain" /> : <span className="text-gray-400 font-bold border-2 border-dashed p-4 text-xs">[ TTM LOGO ]</span>}
102	            </div>
103	            <div className="text-right text-[11px] leading-relaxed max-w-[60%]">
104	              <p><strong>Datum:</strong> {formatDatum(datum)} | <strong>Lokacija:</strong> {lokacija === 'SVE' ? 'Sve lokacije' : lokacija}</p>
105	              <p><strong>Smjena:</strong> {smjena === 'SVE' ? 'Sve smjene (00-24h)' : smjena}</p>
106	              <p className="text-[10px] mt-1 text-slate-600"><strong>Posada na pilani:</strong> {data.posada || 'Nije evidentirano'}</p>
107	            </div>
108	          </div>
109	
110	          {/* 2. KPI DASHBOARD */}
111	          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-6">
112	            <div className="p-2.5 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `3px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
113	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">ISKORIŠTENJE<br/>(Yield)</h3>
114	              <p className="text-xl font-black text-white my-1">{data.kpi.yield_proc} %</p>
115	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>(Izlaz / Ulaz)</p>
116	            </div>
117	            <div className="p-2.5 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `3px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
118	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">BRZINA<br/>REZANJA</h3>
119	              <p className="text-xl font-black text-white my-1">{(data.kpi.ulaz_m3 / 8).toFixed(1)} <span className="text-xs">m³/h</span></p>
120	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>(Trupci / 8h smjena)</p>
121	            </div>
122	            <div className="p-2.5 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `3px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
123	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">UKUPNO<br/>TRUPACA</h3>
124	              <p className="text-xl font-black text-white my-1">{data.kpi.ulaz_m3} <span className="text-xs">m³</span></p>
125	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>(Ulazna Sirovina)</p>
126	            </div>
127	            <div className="p-2.5 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `3px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
128	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">UKUPNI<br/>VOLUMEN</h3>
129	              <p className="text-xl font-black text-white my-1">{data.kpi.izlaz_m3} <span className="text-xs">m³</span></p>
130	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>(Svi gotovi paketi)</p>
131	            </div>
132	          </div>
133	
134	          {/* 3. TABELE SA PODACIMA */}
135	          <div className="grid grid-cols-12 gap-6 mb-6">
136	            <div className="col-span-5">
137	              <h3 className="font-bold text-white text-[11px] p-1.5 px-2 mb-2" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, WebkitPrintColorAdjust: 'exact', printColorAdjust: 'exact' }}>LOG INPUT (Ulaz Trupaca)</h3>
138	              <table className="w-full text-[10px] text-left border-collapse">
139	                <thead><tr className="border-b-2 border-gray-400"><th className="p-1.5 font-bold">Dužina (m)</th><th className="p-1.5 font-bold">Kom</th><th className="p-1.5 font-bold">m³</th></tr></thead>
140	                <tbody>
141	                  {data.trupci_duzine.length === 0 && <tr><td colSpan="3" className="p-2 text-center text-gray-400 italic">Nema unosa.</td></tr>}
142	                  {data.trupci_duzine.map((t, idx) => (<tr key={idx} className="border-b border-gray-200"><td className="p-1.5">{t.duzina}</td><td className="p-1.5">{t.kom}</td><td className="p-1.5 font-bold">{t.m3}</td></tr>))}
143	                  <tr className="font-black bg-gray-100 border-t-2 border-gray-400"><td className="p-1.5">UKUPNO:</td><td className="p-1.5">{data.kpi.ulaz_kom}</td><td className="p-1.5">{data.kpi.ulaz_m3}</td></tr>
144	                </tbody>
145	              </table>
146	            </div>
147	            <div className="col-span-7">
148	              <h3 className="font-bold text-white text-[11px] p-1.5 px-2 mb-2" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, WebkitPrintColorAdjust: 'exact', printColorAdjust: 'exact' }}>PRODUCT OUTPUT (Izlaz Gotove Robe)</h3>
149	              <div className="max-h-[300px] overflow-y-auto print:max-h-none print:overflow-visible">

163	                </table>
164	              </div>
165	            </div>
166	          </div>
167

173	              <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '140px' }}>

176	                </ResponsiveContainer>
177	              </div>
178	            </div>
179	            <div className="border border-gray-200 p-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded bg-white">
180	              <h4 className="text-[9px] font-bold mb-1 text-center">Učešće proizvoda u prorezu (%)</h4>
181	              <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '140px' }}>
182	                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
183	                  <PieChart><Pie data={mixPieData} outerRadius={50} dataKey="value" stroke="#fff" strokeWidth={2} isAnimationActive={false}>{mixPieData.map((entry, index) => (<Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={PALETA[index % PALETA.length]} />))}</Pie><Tooltip formatter={(value) => `${value} m³`} /><Legend content={renderCustomLegend} /></PieChart>
184	                </ResponsiveContainer>
185	              </div>
186	            </div>
187	            <div className="border border-gray-200 p-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded bg-white">
188	              <h4 className="text-[9px] font-bold mb-1 text-center">Prosječni dnevni učinak po mjesecima (m³)</h4>
189	              <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '140px' }}>
190	                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
191	                  <BarChart data={data.trend_godisnji} margin={{ top: 5, right: 0, left: -25, bottom: 0 }}>
192	                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} />
193	                    <XAxis dataKey="name" fontSize={7} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} interval={1} />
194	                    <YAxis fontSize={8} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
195	                    <Tooltip formatter={(value) => `${value} m³`} />
196	                    <Legend wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: '8px' }} />
197	                    <Bar dataKey="Pilana" name="Prosjek Pilane" fill={tamnoPlava} radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]} isAnimationActive={false} />
198	                    <Bar dataKey="Brentista" name={`${data.glavni_brentista || 'Brentista'} (Prosjek)`} fill={limetaZelena} radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]} isAnimationActive={false} />
199	                  </BarChart>
200	                </ResponsiveContainer>
201	              </div>
202	            </div>
203	          </div>
204	        </div>
205	
206	        {/* 5. ZASTOJI I NAPOMENE (DNO STRANICE) */}
207	        <div className="mt-6 pt-4 border-t-2 border-dashed border-gray-300">
208	           <h3 className="font-bold text-black text-[11px] mb-2">DNEVNIK MAŠINE (Zastoji i napomene):</h3>
209	           {(!data.zastoji || data.zastoji.length === 0) ? (
210	              <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 italic">Nije bilo evidentiranih zastoja u odabranom periodu.</p>
211	           ) : (
212	              <ul className="text-[9px] space-y-1">
213	                {data.zastoji.map((z, i) => (
214	                  <li key={i} className="flex gap-2">
215	                    <span className="font-bold text-gray-700 w-24">{z.vrijeme_od} - {z.vrijeme_do || '...'}</span>
216	                    {z.zastoj_min > 0 && <span className="font-black text-red-600 bg-red-100 px-1 rounded" style={{ WebkitPrintColorAdjust: 'exact', printColorAdjust: 'exact' }}>Zastoj: {z.zastoj_min} min</span>}
217	                    <span className="text-gray-800">- {z.napomena || 'Nema napomene'} (Prijavio: {z.snimio})</span>
218	                  </li>
219	                ))}
220	              </ul>
221	           )}
222	        </div>
223	        
224	        {/* Print dugme - automatski se skriva pri printanju */}
225	        <div className="mt-8 text-center print:hidden">
226	          <button onClick={() => window.print()} className="px-6 py-2.5 text-white font-bold rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:opacity-90" style={{ backgroundColor: limetaZelena }}>
227	            🖨️ Isprintaj Dnevni Izvještaj
228	          </button>
229	        </div>
230	      </div>
231	    </>
232	  );
233	}

=== app/components/PilanaPeriodIzvjestaj.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	
3	import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
4	import { PieChart, Pie, Cell, BarChart, Bar, LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts';
5	
6	export default function PilanaPeriodIzvjestaj({ data, datumOd, datumDo, lokacija, brentistaFilter }) {
7	  const tamnoPlava = "#25254A";
8	  const limetaZelena = "#9EC642";
9	  const sivaOtpad = "#94a3b8";
10	  const PALETA = [limetaZelena, '#3b82f6', '#8b5cf6', '#f59e0b', '#06b6d4', '#ec4899'];
11	
12	  const [logoUrl, setLogoUrl] = useState('');
13	
14	  // Učitavanje logotipa iz memorije
15	  useEffect(() => {
16	    try {
17	      const brending = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('erp_brending') || '[]');
18	      const logoObj = brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Svi PDF Dokumenti')) || 
19	                      brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Glavni Meni (Dashboard Vrh)'));
20	      if (logoObj && logoObj.url_slike) setLogoUrl(logoObj.url_slike);
21	    } catch (e) {}
22	  }, []);
23	
24	  if (!data || !data.kpi) return <div className="text-center p-10 font-bold text-slate-500">Učitavam periodične podatke...</div>;
25	
26	  const formatDatum = (iso) => {
27	    if(!iso) return '';
28	    const [y, m, d] = iso.split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`;
29	  };
30	
31	  const renderCustomLegend = (props) => {
32	    const { payload } = props;
33	    return (
34	      <ul className="text-[8px] flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-1.5 mt-2 leading-tight">
35	        {payload.map((entry, index) => (
36	          <li key={`item-${index}`} className="flex items-center font-bold">
37	            <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full inline-block mr-1" style={{ backgroundColor: entry.color, WebkitPrintColorAdjust: 'exact', printColorAdjust: 'exact' }}></span>
38	            {entry.value}: {entry.payload.proc}%
39	          </li>
40	        ))}
41	      </ul>
42	    );
43	  };
44	
45	  const kpi = data.kpi || { ulaz_m3: 0, izlaz_m3: 0, yield_proc: 0, dnevni_prosjek: 0 };
46	  const ulazStruktura = data.ulaz_struktura || [];
47	  const izlazStruktura = data.izlaz_struktura || [];
48	  const leaderboard = data.leaderboard || [];
49	  const dinamika = data.dinamika || [];
50	  const zastojiChart = data.zastoji_analiza || [];
51	
52	  return (
53	    <>
54	      {/* MAGIJA: CSS koji izoluje samo ovaj izvještaj prilikom printanja! */}
55	      <style>{`
56	        @media print {
57	          body * { visibility: hidden; }
58	          .print-izolacija, .print-izolacija * { visibility: visible; }
59	          .print-izolacija { 
60	            position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 100%; 
61	            margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; box-shadow: none !important;
62	          }
63	          @page { size: A4 portrait; margin: 10mm; }
64	        }
65	      `}</style>
66	
67	      <div className="print-izolacija bg-white text-black p-6 mx-auto max-w-[210mm] min-h-[297mm] shadow-2xl relative font-sans flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ WebkitPrintColorAdjust: 'exact', printColorAdjust: 'exact' }}>
68	        
69	        <div>
70	          {/* 1. HEADER */}
71	          <div className="flex justify-between items-start border-b-2 pb-3 mb-4" style={{ borderColor: tamnoPlava }}>
72	            <div className="w-48 h-20 flex items-center justify-start">
73	              {logoUrl ? <img src={logoUrl} alt="Logo" className="max-h-full max-w-full object-contain" /> : <span className="text-gray-400 font-bold border-2 border-dashed p-4 text-xs">[ TTM LOGO ]</span>}
74	            </div>
75	            <div className="text-right text-[11px] leading-relaxed max-w-[60%]">
76	              <h1 className="text-[14px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-1" style={{ color: tamnoPlava }}>Menadžerski Izvještaj Pilane</h1>
77	              <p><strong>Period:</strong> {formatDatum(datumOd)} - {formatDatum(datumDo)}</p>
78	              <p><strong>Filter Brentiste:</strong> {brentistaFilter || 'SVI'} | <strong>Lokacija:</strong> {lokacija === 'SVE' ? 'Sve lokacije' : lokacija}</p>
79	            </div>
80	          </div>
81	
82	          {/* 2. KPI DASHBOARD (4 Kartice) */}
83	          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-6">
84	            <div className="p-3 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `4px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
85	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">PROSJEČNI<br/>YIELD</h3>
86	              <p className="text-2xl font-black text-white my-1">{kpi.yield_proc} %</p>
87	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>Iskorištenje materijala</p>
88	            </div>
89	            <div className="p-3 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `4px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
90	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">UKUPNO<br/>TRUPACA</h3>
91	              <p className="text-2xl font-black text-white my-1">{kpi.ulaz_m3} <span className="text-xs">m³</span></p>
92	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>Ulazna Sirovina</p>
93	            </div>
94	            <div className="p-3 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `4px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
95	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">GOTOVA<br/>ROBA</h3>

97	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>Svi proizvedeni paketi</p>
98	            </div>
99	            <div className="p-3 rounded shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between" style={{ backgroundColor: tamnoPlava, borderBottom: `4px solid ${limetaZelena}` }}>
100	              <h3 className="text-[9px] text-gray-300 font-bold leading-tight">DNEVNI<br/>PROSJEK</h3>

102	              <p className="text-[8px]" style={{ color: limetaZelena }}>Dinamika prerade</p>

125	              <table className="w-full text-[10px] text-left border-collapse">

131	                  ))}
132	                  <tr className="font-black bg-gray-100 border-t-2 border-gray-400"><td className="p-1.5">UKUPNO IZLAZ:</td><td className="p-1.5 text-right">{kpi.izlaz_m3}</td><td className="p-1.5 text-right">100%</td></tr>

134	              </table>
135	            </div>
136	          </div>
137

140	          <div className="space-y-2 mb-6">

142	            {leaderboard.map((radnik, idx) => (

148	                    <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-500 mt-0.5">Udio u proizvodnji pilane: <strong className="text-gray-700">{radnik.udio_firme}%</strong></p>

154	                </div>

161	          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 h-48">
162	            
163	            {/* Dinamika (Line Chart) */}
164	            <div className="border border-gray-200 p-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded bg-white">
165	              <h4 className="text-[9px] font-bold mb-1 text-center text-gray-600">Dinamika Proizvodnje (m³ / dan)</h4>
166	              <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }}>
167	                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
168	                  <LineChart data={dinamika} margin={{ top: 5, right: 5, left: -25, bottom: 0 }}>
169	                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} />
170	                    <XAxis dataKey="dan" fontSize={7} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} interval="preserveStartEnd" />
171	                    <YAxis fontSize={8} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
172	                    <Tooltip formatter={(value) => `${value} m³`} />
173	                    <Line type="monotone" dataKey="m3" stroke={tamnoPlava} strokeWidth={2} dot={{ r: 2, fill: limetaZelena }} isAnimationActive={false} />
174	                  </LineChart>
175	                </ResponsiveContainer>
176	              </div>
177	            </div>
178	
179	            {/* Mix Proizvoda (Donut) */}
180	            <div className="border border-gray-200 p-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded bg-white">
181	              <h4 className="text-[9px] font-bold mb-1 text-center text-gray-600">Mix Proizvoda (Udio Kategorija)</h4>
182	              <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }}>
183	                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
184	                  <PieChart>
185	                    <Pie data={izlazStruktura} innerRadius={30} outerRadius={50} dataKey="value" stroke="#fff" strokeWidth={2} isAnimationActive={false}>
186	                      {izlazStruktura.map((entry, index) => (<Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={PALETA[index % PALETA.length]} />))}
187	                    </Pie>
188	                    <Tooltip formatter={(value) => `${value} m³`} />
189	                    <Legend content={renderCustomLegend} />
190	                  </PieChart>
191	                </ResponsiveContainer>
192	              </div>
193	            </div>
194	
195	            {/* Zastoji (Bar Chart) */}
196	            <div className="border border-gray-200 p-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded bg-white">
197	              <h4 className="text-[9px] font-bold mb-1 text-center text-gray-600">Analiza Zastoja (Izgubljene minute)</h4>
198	              <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }}>
199	                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
200	                  <BarChart data={zastojiChart} margin={{ top: 5, right: 5, left: -25, bottom: 0 }} layout="vertical">
201	                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" horizontal={false} />
202	                    <XAxis type="number" fontSize={7} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
203	                    <YAxis dataKey="razlog" type="category" fontSize={7} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} width={50} />
204	                    <Tooltip formatter={(value) => `${value} min`} />
205	                    <Bar dataKey="minute" fill="#ef4444" radius={[0, 4, 4, 0]} isAnimationActive={false} barSize={15} />
206	                  </BarChart>
207	                </ResponsiveContainer>
208	              </div>
209	            </div>
210	          </div>
211	
212	        </div>
213	
214	        {/* FOOTER (Napomena i Potpis) */}
215	        <div className="mt-8 pt-4 border-t border-gray-300 text-[10px] flex justify-between items-end">
216	          <div className="w-[60%] text-gray-600">
217	             <strong>Napomene menadžmenta:</strong> 
218	             <p className="mt-1 border-b border-dotted border-gray-400 h-4"></p>
219	             <p className="mt-1 border-b border-dotted border-gray-400 h-4"></p>
220	          </div>
