=== app/components/ScannerOverlay.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { Html5QrcodeScanner } from 'html5-qrcode';
4	
5	export default function ScannerOverlay({ onScan, onClose }) {
6	    useEffect(() => {
7	        const config = { 
8	            fps: 10, 
9	            qrbox: { width: 250, height: 250 },
10	            rememberLastUsedCamera: true,
11	            videoConstraints: { facingMode: "environment" }
12	        };
13	        const sc = new Html5QrcodeScanner("global-reader", config, false);
14	        sc.render(onScan, () => {});
15	        return () => sc.clear();
16	    }, [onScan]);
17	
18	    return (
19	        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-black/95 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 backdrop-blur-md animate-in fade-in duration-300 overflow-y-auto">
20	            <h3 className="text-white font-black mb-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs">Kamera aktivna</h3>
21	            <div id="global-reader" className="w-full max-w-md bg-theme-card rounded-box border-4 border-blue-500 overflow-hidden shadow-2xl [&_select]:bg-theme-panel [&_select]:text-white [&_select]:p-2 [&_select]:rounded-lg [&_select]:mb-2 [&_select]:w-full [&_button]:bg-blue-600 [&_button]:text-white [&_button]:p-2 [&_button]:rounded-lg"></div>
22	            <button onClick={onClose} className="mt-10 px-12 py-4 bg-red-600 text-white font-black rounded-2xl uppercase shadow-lg hover:bg-red-500">Odustani</button>
23	        </div>
24	    );
25	}

=== app/components/SearchableInput.jsx ===
1	import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
2	
3	export default function SearchableInput({ value, onChange, list = [], placeholder = "Pronađi..." }) {
4	    const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
5	    const [search, setSearch] = useState(value || '');
6	    const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState(0); 
7	    const wrapperRef = useRef(null);
8	
9	    // Sinhronizacija vanjske vrijednosti
10	    useEffect(() => { setSearch(value || ''); }, [value]);
11	    
12	    // Resetuj selekciju na početak kad god se promijeni tekst
13	    useEffect(() => { setSelectedIndex(0); }, [search]); 
14	
15	    // Zatvori dropdown ako se klikne van njega
16	    useEffect(() => {
17	        function handleClickOutside(event) {
18	            if (wrapperRef.current && !wrapperRef.current.contains(event.target)) setOpen(false);
19	        }
20	        document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
21	        return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
22	    }, []);
23	
24	    // Filtriranje liste
25	    const filtered = list.filter(item => 
26	        (item || '').toString().toUpperCase().includes((search || '').toString().toUpperCase())
27	    );
28	
29	    // Upravljanje strelicama i Enter tipkom
30	    const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
31	        if (!open) {
32	            // Ako je zatvoreno, na strelicu dole otvori
33	            if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') setOpen(true);
34	            return;
35	        }
36	        
37	        if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
38	            e.preventDefault();
39	            setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev < filtered.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : prev));
40	        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
41	            e.preventDefault();
42	            setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : 0));
43	        } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
44	            e.preventDefault();
45	            if (filtered.length > 0) {
46	                selectItem(filtered[selectedIndex]);
47	            }
48	        } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
49	            setOpen(false);
50	        }
51	    };
52	
53	    const selectItem = (item) => {
54	        onChange(item);
55	        setSearch(item);
56	        setOpen(false);
57	    };
58	
59	    return (
60	        <div ref={wrapperRef} className="relative w-full h-full">
61	            <input
62	                value={search}
63	                onChange={e => { setSearch(e.target.value); setOpen(true); onChange(e.target.value); }}
64	                onFocus={() => setOpen(true)}
65	                onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
66	                placeholder={placeholder}
67	                className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-transparent text-xs text-white outline-none font-black uppercase"
68	            />
69	            
70	            {open && filtered.length > 0 && (
71	                <div className="absolute z-[100] w-full mt-1 bg-theme-panel border border-slate-700 rounded-xl shadow-2xl max-h-60 overflow-y-auto text-left custom-scrollbar">
72	                    {filtered.map((item, index) => (
73	                        <div 
74	                            key={index} 
75	                            onClick={() => selectItem(item)} 
76	                            onMouseEnter={() => setSelectedIndex(index)} // Prati miša ako neko ipak koristi miša
77	                            className={`p-3 border-b border-slate-700 cursor-pointer text-xs font-black uppercase transition-colors ${index === selectedIndex ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-700'}`}
78	                        >
79	                            {item}
80	                        </div>
81	                    ))}
82	                </div>
83	            )}
84	        </div>
85	    );
86	}

=== app/components/SmartSearchableInput.jsx ===
1	import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
2	
3	export default function SmartSearchableInput({ value, onChange, list = [], storageKey = null, placeholder = "Pronađi..." }) {
4	    const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
5	    const [search, setSearch] = useState(value || '');
6	    const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState(0); // NOVO: Pamti koja je stavka selektovana strelicama
7	    const wrapperRef = useRef(null);
8	
9	    useEffect(() => { setSearch(value || ''); }, [value]);
10	    
11	    // Kad god se promijeni tekst pretrage, vrati selekciju na prvu stavku (index 0)
12	    useEffect(() => { setSelectedIndex(0); }, [search]); 
13	
14	    useEffect(() => {
15	        function handleClickOutside(event) {
16	            if (wrapperRef.current && !wrapperRef.current.contains(event.target)) setOpen(false);
17	        }
18	        document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
19	        return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
20	    }, []);
21	
22	    const history = storageKey && typeof window !== 'undefined' ? JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(storageKey) || '[]') : [];
23	    const combinedList = [...new Set([...history, ...list])];
24	    const filtered = combinedList.filter(item => (item || '').toString().toUpperCase().includes((search || '').toString().toUpperCase()));
25	
26	    // NOVO: Upravljanje tastaturom
27	    const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
28	        if (!open) {
29	            if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') setOpen(true);
30	            return;
31	        }
32	        if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
33	            e.preventDefault();
34	            setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev < filtered.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : prev));
35	        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
36	            e.preventDefault();
37	            setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : 0));
38	        } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
39	            e.preventDefault();
40	            if (filtered.length > 0) {
41	                selectItem(filtered[selectedIndex]);
42	            }
43	        } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
44	            setOpen(false);
45	        }
46	    };
47	
48	    const selectItem = (item) => {
49	        onChange(item);
50	        setSearch(item);
51	        setOpen(false);
52	        if (storageKey && typeof window !== 'undefined') {
53	            const newHist = [item, ...history.filter(i => i !== item)].slice(0, 5);
54	            localStorage.setItem(storageKey, JSON.stringify(newHist));
55	        }
56	    };
57	
58	    return (
59	        <div ref={wrapperRef} className="relative w-full h-full">
60	            <input
61	                value={search}
62	                onChange={e => { setSearch(e.target.value); setOpen(true); onChange(e.target.value); }}
63	                onFocus={() => setOpen(true)}
64	                onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
65	                placeholder={placeholder}
66	                className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-transparent text-xs text-white outline-none font-black uppercase"
67	            />
68	            {open && filtered.length > 0 && (
69	                <div className="absolute z-[100] w-full mt-1 bg-theme-panel border border-slate-700 rounded-xl shadow-2xl max-h-60 overflow-y-auto text-left custom-scrollbar">
70	                    {filtered.map((item, index) => (
71	                        <div 
72	                            key={index} 
73	                            onClick={() => selectItem(item)} 
74	                            onMouseEnter={() => setSelectedIndex(index)} // Prati i miša
75	                            className={`p-3 border-b border-slate-700 cursor-pointer text-xs font-black uppercase transition-colors ${index === selectedIndex ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-700'}`}
76	                        >
77	                            {item}
78	                        </div>
79	                    ))}
80	                </div>
81	            )}
82	        </div>
83	    );
84	}

1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';

5	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');

12	    const [messages, setMessages] = useState([

14	    ]);

16	    const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false);
17

21	        chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
22	    }, [messages]);

24	    // FUNKCIJA ZA DOHVAĆANJE CIJELE BAZE (BEZ OGRANIČENJA DATUMA)
25	    const fetchCijelaBaza = async () => {
26	        try {
27	            // 🟢 HIRURŠKI DODATO: Povlačimo i Reklamacije, Naloge i Otpremnice kako bi AI znao apsolutno sve
28	            const [trupciRes, paketiRes, racuniRes, blagajnaRes, radniciRes, katalogRes, reklamacijeRes, naloziRes, otpremniceRes] = await Promise.all([
29	                supabase.from('trupci').select('*'),
30	                supabase.from('paketi').select('*'),
31	                supabase.from('racuni').select('*'),

36	                supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('*'),
37	                supabase.from('otpremnice').select('*')
38	            ]);
39	
40	            // Pakujemo sve u jedan ogroman JSON objekat
41	            const kompletnaBaza = {
42	                informacija: "Ovo je kompletan ispis (dump) baze podataka ERP sistema kompanije.",
43	                tabela_trupci: trupciRes.data || [],
44	                tabela_paketi_proizvodnja: paketiRes.data || [],
45	                tabela_izdati_racuni: racuniRes.data || [],
46	                tabela_blagajna_troskovi: blagajnaRes.data || [],
47	                tabela_radnici: radniciRes.data || [],
48	                tabela_katalog_artikala: katalogRes.data || [],

50	                tabela_radni_nalozi: naloziRes.data || [],
51	                tabela_otpremnice: otpremniceRes.data || []
52	            };
53	
54	            return JSON.stringify(kompletnaBaza);
55	        } catch (error) {
56	            console.error("Greška pri čitanju baze:", error);
57	            return JSON.stringify({ greska: "Došlo je do greške pri čitanju baze podataka." });
58	        }
59	    };
60	
61	    const posaljiPoruku = async () => {
62	        if (!input.trim()) return;
63	
64	        const userText = input.trim();
65	        setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'user', text: userText }]);
66	        setInput('');
67	        setIsTyping(true);
68	
69	        try {
70	            // 1. Čitamo cijelu bazu
71	            const dbDump = await fetchCijelaBaza();
72	            
73	            // 2. Pripremamo prompt sa striktnim uputama
74	            const prompt = `
75	            Ti si ekspertni poslovni i finansijski AI analitičar za pilanu i drvnu industriju.
76	            Ispod ti je proslijeđen KOMPLETAN JSON DUMP cijele ERP baze podataka klijenta.

79	            Slobodno navedi konkretne nazive proizvoda, šifre, imena radnika, datume, sume novca, kao i statuse reklamacija koje pronađeš u podacima.
80	            
81	            PODACI IZ BAZE:
82	            ${dbDump}
83	
84	            PITANJE KORISNIKA:
85	            ${userText}
86

88	            - Odgovaraj isključivo na bosanskom jeziku.
89	            - Budi direktan, profesionalan i precizan.
90	            - Koristi markdown za formatiranje (podebljaj bitne brojeve, koristi liste nabrajanja).
91	            `;
92	
93	            // 3. Poziv prema Gemini API-ju (Koristimo model gemini-2.5-flash)
94	            const response = await fetch(`https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/${ODABRANI_MODEL}:generateContent?key=${GEMINI_API_KEY}`, {
95	                method: 'POST',
96	                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
97	                body: JSON.stringify({ 
98	                    contents: [{ parts: [{ text: prompt }] }], 
99	                    generationConfig: { temperature: 0.1 } // Vrlo niska temperatura (0.1) osigurava da AI ne izmišlja podatke, već strogo čita iz baze
100	                })
101	            });
102	
103	            if (!response.ok) {
104	                const errText = await response.text();
105	                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${errText}`);
106	            }
107	
108	            const data = await response.json();
109	            const aiOdgovor = data.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text;
110	
111	            setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'ai', text: aiOdgovor }]);
112	
113	        } catch (error) {
114	            setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'ai', text: `❌ **Greška:** Nije moguće analizirati podatke u ovom trenutku. Detalji: ${error.message}` }]);
115	        }
116	        
117	        setIsTyping(false);
118	    };
119	
120	    const renderMarkdown = (text) => {
121	        const lines = text.split('\n');
122	        return lines.map((line, index) => {
123	            let formattedLine = line.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
124	            if (formattedLine.trim().startsWith('* ')) return <li key={index} className="ml-4 list-disc" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: formattedLine.substring(2) }} />;
125	            if (formattedLine.trim() === '') return <br key={index} />;
126	            return <p key={index} className="mb-1" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: formattedLine }} />;
127	        });
128	    };
129	
130	    const bojaAkcenta = saas?.ui?.boja_akcenta || '#3b82f6';
131	
132	    return (
133	        <div className="relative max-w-4xl mx-auto h-[750px] flex flex-col bg-theme-card rounded-box border border-slate-700 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden animate-in zoom-in-95">
134	            
135	            <div className="p-5 border-b border-theme-border flex justify-between items-center bg-theme-card z-10 shrink-0">
136	                <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
137	                    <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-theme-card border border-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner">🤖</div>
138	                    <div>
139	                        <h3 className="text-white font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-sm">TTM AI Kontrolor</h3>
140	                        <p className="text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-bold flex items-center gap-1">
141	                            <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 inline-block animate-pulse"></span> 
142	                            Puni pristup bazi | Model: {ODABRANI_MODEL}
143	                        </p>
144	                    </div>
145	                </div>
146	            </div>
147	
148	            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-6 bg-theme-main custom-scrollbar">
149	                {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
150	                    <div key={idx} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
151	                        <div className={`max-w-[85%] md:max-w-[75%] p-5 rounded-2xl shadow-md ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'bg-theme-panel text-white rounded-tr-sm border border-slate-700' : 'bg-theme-card text-slate-200 rounded-tl-sm border border-blue-500/20'}`}>
152	                            {msg.role === 'ai' && <div className="text-[10px] text-blue-400 font-black mb-2 uppercase tracking-widest border-b border-slate-700/50 pb-1">AI Asistent</div>}
153	                            <div className="text-sm font-medium leading-relaxed">{msg.role === 'user' ? msg.text : renderMarkdown(msg.text)}</div>
154	                        </div>
155	                    </div>
156	                ))}
157	                
158	                {isTyping && (
159	                    <div className="flex justify-start">
160	                        <div className="max-w-[75%] p-5 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm bg-theme-card border border-blue-500/20 flex items-center gap-2">
161	                            <span className="text-xs text-blue-400 font-bold ml-2 animate-pulse">Čitam cijelu bazu podataka i analiziram...</span>
162	                        </div>
163	                    </div>
164	                )}
165	                <div ref={chatEndRef} />
166	            </div>
167	
168	            <div className="p-4 bg-theme-card border-t border-theme-border shrink-0">
169	                <div className="relative flex items-center">
170	                    <input 
171	                        type="text" 
172	                        value={input} 
173	                        onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)} 
174	                        onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') posaljiPoruku(); }} 
175	                        placeholder="Pitaj nešto, npr: Koliko smo imali odobrenih reklamacija ovog mjeseca?" 
176	                        disabled={isTyping}

182	                        className="absolute right-2 top-2 bottom-2 px-5 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 disabled:bg-slate-700 text-white rounded-xl font-black transition-all"
183	                        style={{ backgroundColor: input.trim() ? bojaAkcenta : '' }}
184	                    >➤</button>
185	                </div>
186	            </div>
187	            
188	        </div>
189	    );

=== app/components/TabDoradaAnalitika.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import { AreaChart, Area, BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Legend, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts';
5	import { Card, Metric, Text, Title } from '@tremor/react';
6	import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';
7	import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
8	
9	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
10	
11	const PALETA = ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b', '#8b5cf6', '#ec4899', '#06b6d4', '#f43f5e'];
12	
13	const imaSirovinu = (val) => {
14	    if (!val) return false;
15	    if (Array.isArray(val) && val.length > 0) return true;
16	    if (typeof val === 'string') return val.replace(/[{}"[\]\s]/g, '').length > 0;
17	    return false;
18	};
19	
20	const getSirovineNiz = (val) => {
21	    if (!val) return [];
22	    if (Array.isArray(val)) return val;
23	    if (typeof val === 'string') return val.replace(/[{}"[\]]/g, '').split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
24	    return [];
25	};
26	
27	const formatDatum = (iso) => {
28	    if(!iso) return '';
29	    const [y, m, d] = iso.split('T')[0].split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`;
30	};
31	
32	export default function TabDoradaAnalitika({ datumOd, datumDo, masinaFilter, saas, header }) {
33	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
34	    const [data, setData] = useState(null);
35	    const [radnikFilter, setRadnikFilter] = useState('SVI');
36	    const [isGeneratingPDF, setIsGeneratingPDF] = useState(false);
37	    
38	    const [logoUrl, setLogoUrl] = useState('');
39	    const [imeFirme, setImeFirme] = useState('SMART TIMBER');
40	
41	    useEffect(() => {
42	        const logo = localStorage.getItem('saas_app_logo');
43	        if(logo) setLogoUrl(logo);
44	    }, []);
45	
46	    useEffect(() => { ucitajDoradaAnalitiku(); }, [datumOd, datumDo, masinaFilter, radnikFilter]);
47	
48	    const ucitajDoradaAnalitiku = async () => {
49	        setLoading(true);
50	        try {
51	            const d60 = new Date(new Date(datumOd).getTime() - 60 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
52	            const d30 = new Date(new Date(datumOd).getTime() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
53	
54	            const [paketiRes, zastojiRes] = await Promise.all([
55	                supabase.from('paketi').select('*').gte('datum_yyyy_mm', d60), 
56	                supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').select('*').gte('datum', datumOd).lte('datum', datumDo).eq('modul', 'Dorada')
57	            ]);
58	
59	            const sviPaketiBaza = paketiRes.data || [];
60	            const sviDanDorada = sviPaketiBaza.filter(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm >= datumOd && p.datum_yyyy_mm <= datumDo && imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids) && (masinaFilter === 'SVE' || p.masina === masinaFilter));
61	            const dostupniRadnici = [...new Set(sviDanDorada.map(p => p.snimio_korisnik).filter(Boolean))];
62	
63	            const danDorada = sviDanDorada.filter(p => radnikFilter === 'SVI' || p.snimio_korisnik === radnikFilter);
64	            const danZastoji = (zastojiRes.data || []).filter(z => (masinaFilter === 'SVE' || z.masina === masinaFilter) && (radnikFilter === 'SVI' || z.snimio?.includes(radnikFilter)));
65	
66	            let totalUlazM3 = 0; let totalIzlazM3 = 0;
67	            const operacijeMap = {}; const yieldPoProizvodu = {}; const traceBlokovi = [];
68	
69	            danDorada.forEach(p => {
70	                const izlaz = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
71	                let stvarniUlazM3 = 0;
72	                const idsSirovine = getSirovineNiz(p.ai_sirovina_ids);
73	                let sirovineTekst = [];
74	
75	                if (idsSirovine.length > 0) {
76	                    idsSirovine.forEach(id => {
77	                        const orig = sviPaketiBaza.find(r => r.paket_id === id);
78	                        if (orig) {
79	                            stvarniUlazM3 += parseFloat(orig.kolicina_final || 0);
80	                            sirovineTekst.push(`P. ${orig.paket_id}`);
81	                        } else {
82	                            sirovineTekst.push(`P. ${id}`);
83	                        }
84	                    });
85	                }
86	                
87	                if (stvarniUlazM3 === 0) stvarniUlazM3 = izlaz * 1.05; 
88	                totalUlazM3 += stvarniUlazM3; totalIzlazM3 += izlaz;
89	
90	                const operacije = p.oznake && Array.isArray(p.oznake) && p.oznake.length > 0 ? p.oznake : ['Dorada'];
91	                operacije.forEach(o => { operacijeMap[o] = (operacijeMap[o] || 0) + izlaz; });
92	
93	                const naziv = p.naziv_proizvoda || 'Nepoznato';
94	                if (!yieldPoProizvodu[naziv]) yieldPoProizvodu[naziv] = { u: 0, i: 0 };
95	                yieldPoProizvodu[naziv].u += stvarniUlazM3; yieldPoProizvodu[naziv].i += izlaz;
96	
97	                traceBlokovi.push({
98	                    out_id: p.paket_id, out_naziv: naziv, out_dim: `${p.debljina}x${p.sirina}x${p.duzina}`,
99	                    out_m3: izlaz.toFixed(3), in_m3: stvarniUlazM3.toFixed(3), kalo_m3: Math.max(0, stvarniUlazM3 - izlaz).toFixed(3),
100	                    in_ids: sirovineTekst.join(', '), operacije: operacije.join(', '), radnik: p.snimio_korisnik, rn: p.broj_veze || '-'
101	                });
102	            });
103	
104	            const chartDoradaYield = Object.keys(yieldPoProizvodu).map(naziv => ({
105	                name: naziv, Yield: yieldPoProizvodu[naziv].u > 0 ? parseFloat(((yieldPoProizvodu[naziv].i / yieldPoProizvodu[naziv].u) * 100).toFixed(1)) : 0,
106	            })).sort((a,b) => b.Yield - a.Yield).slice(0, 8);
107	
108	            const grafikonOperacija = Object.keys(operacijeMap).map(k => ({ name: k, value: parseFloat(operacijeMap[k].toFixed(2)) })).sort((a,b)=>b.value-a.value);
109	
110	            const trendDaniMap = {};
111	            const dDanas = new Date(datumDo);
112	            for (let i = 29; i >= 0; i--) {
113	                const d = new Date(dDanas.getTime() - i * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
114	                const iso = d.toISOString().split('T')[0];
115	                trendDaniMap[iso] = { dan: `${d.getDate()}.${d.getMonth()+1}`, doradaM3: 0 };
116	            }
117	
118	            const radnikZaTrend = radnikFilter !== 'SVI' ? radnikFilter : (dostupniRadnici[0] || 'Svi');
119	
120	            sviPaketiBaza.filter(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm >= d30 && p.datum_yyyy_mm <= datumDo && imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids)).forEach(p => {
121	                const iso = p.datum_yyyy_mm;
122	                if(trendDaniMap[iso] && (radnikFilter === 'SVI' || p.snimio_korisnik === radnikZaTrend)) {
123	                    trendDaniMap[iso].doradaM3 += parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
124	                }
125	            });
126	
127	            const trendChartData = Object.values(trendDaniMap).map(d => ({ dan: d.dan, M3: parseFloat(d.doradaM3.toFixed(2)) }));
128	            const ukupnoZastojMin = danZastoji.reduce((sum, z) => sum + (parseInt(z.zastoj_min) || 0), 0);
129	
130	            setData({
131	                kpi: { 
132	                    ulazM3: totalUlazM3.toFixed(2), izlazM3: totalIzlazM3.toFixed(2), kaloM3: Math.max(0, totalUlazM3 - totalIzlazM3).toFixed(2), 
133	                    yieldProcenat: totalUlazM3 > 0 ? ((totalIzlazM3 / totalUlazM3) * 100).toFixed(1) : "0.0", ukupnoZastojMin
134	                },
135	                grafikonOperacija, yieldChart: chartDoradaYield, trendChartData, trace_blokovi: traceBlokovi.sort((a,b) => b.out_m3 - a.out_m3), zastoji: danZastoji,
136	                smjenaInfo: { sviRadnici: dostupniRadnici, glavniRadnik: radnikZaTrend }
137	            });
138	            setLoading(false);
139	        } catch (error) { setLoading(false); }
140	    };
141	
142	    const generisiUltimativniPDF = async (nazivModula, nazivKoloneFolder) => {
143	        setIsGeneratingPDF(true);
144	        try {
145	            // 1. RENDERIRANJE (Slikanje ekrana)
146	            const pdfElement = document.getElementById('savrseni-pdf-dokument');
147	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '1';
148	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '9999';
149	            pdfElement.style.left = '0px';
150	            const canvas = await html2canvas(pdfElement, { scale: 2, useCORS: true, logging: false });
151	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '0';
152	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '-1';
153	            pdfElement.style.left = '-10000px';
154	
155	            const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
156	            const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
157	            const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
158	            const pdfHeight = (canvas.height * pdfWidth) / canvas.width;
159	            pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
160	            const pdfBlob = pdf.output('blob');
161	
162	            // 2. LOGIKA ZA PERIOD (Ime fajla)
163	            // Ako su datumi isti, piše jedan datum, ako su različiti piše OD-DO
164	            const formatiranoOd = datumOd ? formatDatum(datumOd).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
165	            const formatiranoDo = datumDo ? formatDatum(datumDo).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
166	            const periodStr = formatiranoOd === formatiranoDo ? formatiranoOd : `${formatiranoOd}_do_${formatiranoDo}`;
167	            
168	            // 3. DOHVATANJE PUTANJE IZ POSTAVKI
169	            const { data: postavke } = await supabase.from('postavke_izvjestaja').select(nazivKoloneFolder).eq('id', 1).maybeSingle();
170	            const cistFolder = (postavke?.[nazivKoloneFolder] || 'Ostalo').replace(/\//g, '---');
171	            const timestamp = new Date().getTime();
172	            
173	            // Finalno ime za Make.com: FOLDER___MODUL_PERIOD_ID.pdf
174	            const fileName = `${cistFolder}___${nazivModula}_${periodStr}_${timestamp}.pdf`;
175	
176	            // =========================================================
177	            // UBRZANJE: PRVO DAJEMO FAJL KORISNIKU
178	            // =========================================================
179	            pdf.save(`${nazivModula}_${periodStr}.pdf`);
180	            window.open(URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob), '_blank');
181	            
182	            // =========================================================
183	            // ONDA ŠALJEMO U POZADINI U SUPABASE
184	            // =========================================================
185	            const { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage
186	                .from('izvjestaji_buffer')
187	                .upload(fileName, pdfBlob, { contentType: 'application/pdf', upsert: true });
188	
189	            if (uploadError) {
190	                console.error("Greška pri slanju u Cloud:", uploadError);
191	            } else {
192	                console.log("🚀 Poslano u arhivu u pozadini.");
193	            }
194	            
195	        } catch (error) {
196	            console.error("Greška:", error);
197	            alert("Greška prilikom generisanja PDF-a.");
198	        } finally {
199	            setIsGeneratingPDF(false);
200	        }
201	    };
202	
203	    if (loading) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-blue-500 animate-pulse font-black text-xl uppercase tracking-widest">Analiziram doradu...</div>;
204	    if (!data) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-slate-500 font-bold">Nema podataka.</div>;
205	
206	    return (
207	        <div className="w-full relative">
208	            <div className="space-y-6 text-slate-200">
209	                <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-lg">
210	                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
211	                        <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Filtriraj po Operateru:</span>
212	                        <select value={radnikFilter} onChange={e => setRadnikFilter(e.target.value)} className="bg-theme-panel text-blue-400 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-black outline-none border border-slate-700 uppercase tracking-widest cursor-pointer">
213	                            <option value="SVI">SVI ZAPOSLENI</option>
214	                            {data.smjenaInfo.sviRadnici.map(r => <option key={r} value={r}>{r}</option>)}
215	                        </select>
216	                    </div>
217	                    {/* OVDJE JE NOVI ONCLICK */}
218	                    <button onClick={() => generisiUltimativniPDF('Izvjestaj_Dorade', 'folder_dorada')} disabled={isGeneratingPDF} className={`${isGeneratingPDF ? 'bg-slate-600' : 'bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500'} text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-black uppercase shadow-lg transition-all`}>
219	                        {isGeneratingPDF ? '⌛ Generisanje...' : '🖨️ Isprintaj PDF'}
220	                    </button>
221	                </div>
222	
223	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-3">
224	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="blue" className="bg-theme-card">
225	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Ulaz Sirovina</Text>
226	                        <Metric className="text-white text-xl mt-1">{data.kpi.ulazM3} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
227	                    </Card>
228	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="emerald" className="bg-theme-card">
229	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Izlaz Gotove Robe</Text>
230	                        <Metric className="text-emerald-400 text-xl mt-1">{data.kpi.izlazM3} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
231	                    </Card>
232	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="amber" className="bg-theme-card">
233	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Efikasnost Konverzije</Text>
234	                        <Metric className="text-amber-400 text-xl mt-1">{data.kpi.yieldProcenat} <span className="text-sm">%</span></Metric>
235	                    </Card>

237	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Stvarni Kalo</Text>
238	                        <Metric className="text-rose-400 text-xl mt-1">{data.kpi.kaloM3} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
239	                    </Card>
240	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="red" className="bg-theme-card">
241	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Zastoji u smjeni</Text>
242	                        <Metric className="text-red-400 text-xl mt-1">{data.kpi.ukupnoZastojMin} <span className="text-sm">min</span></Metric>
243	                    </Card>
244	                </div>
245	
246	                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
247	                    <Card className="bg-theme-card h-[300px]">
248	                        <Title className="text-slate-300 font-black text-[10px] uppercase mb-2 text-center">Prinos (Yield %) po obrađenom artiklu</Title>
249	                        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="85%">
250	                            <BarChart data={data.yieldChart} margin={{ top: 10, right: 10, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}>
251	                                <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="#cbd5e1" />
252	                                <XAxis dataKey="name" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
253	                                <YAxis stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} unit="%" />
254	                                <Tooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border:'none', borderRadius:'12px', color:'#fff'}} cursor={{fill: '#1e293b'}} />
255	                                <Bar isAnimationActive={false} dataKey="Yield" fill={saas?.ui?.boja_akcenta_dorada || '#3b82f6'} radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
256	                            </BarChart>
257	                        </ResponsiveContainer>
258	                    </Card>
259	
260	                    <Card className="bg-theme-card h-[300px]">
261	                        <Title className="text-slate-300 font-black text-[10px] uppercase mb-2 text-center">Raspodjela Operacija (m³)</Title>
262	                        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="85%">
263	                            <PieChart>

265	                                    {data.grafikonOperacija.map((e, i) => <Cell key={`c-${i}`} fill={PALETA[i % PALETA.length]} />)}

406	                                    <td style={{ padding: '4px 0', textAlign: 'center' }}>{tb.in_m3} <span style={{ color: '#f43f5e', fontSize: '7px' }}>Kalo: {tb.kalo_m3}</span></td>
407	                                    <td style={{ padding: '4px 0', color: '#475569' }}>{tb.in_ids}</td>
408	                                    <td style={{ padding: '4px 0', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>{tb.operacije}</td>
409	                                </tr>
410	                            ))}
