420	                        ) : (
421	                            <ul style={{ margin: 0, paddingLeft: '15px', fontSize: '9px', color: '#0f172a' }}>
422	                                {data.zastoji.map(z => (
423	                                    <li key={z.id} style={{ marginBottom: '4px' }}>
424	                                        <strong>{z.vrijeme_od} - {z.vrijeme_do || '...'}</strong> 
425	                                        {z.zastoj_min > 0 && <span style={{ color: '#ef4444', fontWeight: '900', margin: '0 6px' }}>({z.zastoj_min}m)</span>}
426	                                        <span>{z.napomena || 'Nema opisa'}</span>
427	                                    </li>
428	                                ))}
429	                            </ul>
430	                        )}
431	                    </div>
432	                    
433	                    <div style={{ width: '35%', textAlign: 'right', fontSize: '9px', color: '#475569' }}>
434	                        <div style={{ textTransform: 'uppercase', color: '#0f172a', fontWeight: '900', borderBottom: '1px solid #cbd5e1', paddingBottom: '4px', marginBottom: '6px' }}>Detalji Smjene</div>
435	                        <p style={{ margin: '0 0 4px 0' }}>Vrijeme rada: <strong style={{ color: '#0f172a' }}>{data.smjenaInfo.start} - {data.smjenaInfo.end}</strong></p>
436	                        <p style={{ margin: '0 0 4px 0' }}>Operateri: <strong style={{ color: '#0f172a' }}>{data.smjenaInfo.sviRadnici.join(', ') || 'Nema'}</strong></p>
437	                        
438	                        <div style={{ marginTop: '30px', paddingTop: '10px', borderTop: '1px solid #0f172a', textAlign: 'center', fontWeight: '900', color: '#0f172a', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>
439	                            Potpis Rukovodioca
440	                        </div>
441	                    </div>
442	                </div>
443	            </div>
444	        </div>
445	    );
446	}

=== app/components/TabFinansijeAnalitika.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Legend, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts';
5	import { Card, Metric, Text, Title } from '@tremor/react';
6	import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';
7	import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
8	
9	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
10	const formatDatum = (iso) => { if(!iso) return ''; const [y, m, d] = iso.split('T')[0].split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`; };
11	
12	export default function TabFinansijeAnalitika({ datumOd, datumDo, saas, header }) {
13	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
14	    const [data, setData] = useState(null);
15	    const [isGeneratingPDF, setIsGeneratingPDF] = useState(false);
16	    const [logoUrl, setLogoUrl] = useState('');
17	    const [imeFirme, setImeFirme] = useState('SMART TIMBER');
18	
19	    useEffect(() => { const logo = localStorage.getItem('saas_app_logo'); if(logo) setLogoUrl(logo); }, []);
20	    useEffect(() => { ucitajObrazacProizvodnje(); }, [datumOd, datumDo]);
21	
22	    const ucitajObrazacProizvodnje = async () => {
23	        setLoading(true);
24	        try {
25	            // 🟢 DODATO: Povlačenje odobrenih reklamacija za odabrani period
26	            const [prorezRes, paketiRes, masineRes, radniciRes, katalogRes, reklamacijeRes] = await Promise.all([
27	                supabase.from('prorez_log').select('*').gte('datum', datumOd).lte('datum', datumDo),
28	                supabase.from('paketi').select('*').gte('datum_yyyy_mm', datumOd).lte('datum_yyyy_mm', datumDo),
29	                supabase.from('masine').select('*'),
30	                supabase.from('radnici').select('*'),
31	                supabase.from('katalog_proizvoda').select('*'),
32	                supabase.from('reklamacije').select('*').eq('status', 'ODOBRENO').gte('created_at', datumOd).lte('created_at', datumDo + 'T23:59:59')
33	            ]);
34	
35	            const logovi = prorezRes.data || [];
36	            const paketi = paketiRes.data || [];
37	            const masineDB = masineRes.data || [];
38	            const radniciDB = radniciRes.data || [];
39	            const katalogDB = katalogRes.data || [];
40	            const reklamacijeDB = reklamacijeRes.data || [];
41	
42	            let ukupnaVrijednostRobe = 0;
43	            const proizvodnjaTabelaMap = {};
44	
45	            paketi.forEach(p => {
46	                const m3 = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
47	                const kat = katalogDB.find(k => k.sifra === p.naziv_proizvoda || k.naziv === p.naziv_proizvoda);
48	                let cijenaBaza = kat ? parseFloat(kat.cijena || 0) : 0;
49	                
50	                let izracunataVr = 0;
51	                if(kat && kat.default_jedinica !== 'm3' && kat.default_jedinica !== 'M3') {
52	                    const v = parseFloat(p.debljina)||1; const s = parseFloat(p.sirina)||1; const d = parseFloat(p.duzina)||1;
53	                    const vol1kom = (v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100);
54	                    izracunataVr = vol1kom > 0 ? (m3 / vol1kom) * cijenaBaza : 0;
55	                } else {
56	                    izracunataVr = m3 * cijenaBaza;
57	                }
58	                ukupnaVrijednostRobe += izracunataVr;
59	
60	                const kljuc = p.naziv_proizvoda || 'Nepoznato';
61	                if(!proizvodnjaTabelaMap[kljuc]) proizvodnjaTabelaMap[kljuc] = { naziv: kljuc, m3: 0, vrijednost: 0, cijenaPrikaz: `${cijenaBaza} KM/${kat?.default_jedinica || 'm³'}` };
62	                proizvodnjaTabelaMap[kljuc].m3 += m3;
63	                proizvodnjaTabelaMap[kljuc].vrijednost += izracunataVr;
64	            });
65	
66	            let ukupniTrosakPrerade = 0;
67	            const tabelaTroskova = [];
68	
69	            const trupacIds = logovi.map(l => l.trupac_id);
70	            let trosakSirovine = 0;
71	            let zapreminaSirovine = 0;
72	
73	            if (trupacIds.length > 0) {
74	                const { data: trupciData } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('id, zapremina, kontrolna_zapremina, nabavna_vrijednost').in('id', trupacIds);
75	                if (trupciData) {
76	                    trupciData.forEach(t => {
77	                        trosakSirovine += parseFloat(t.nabavna_vrijednost || 0);
78	                        zapreminaSirovine += parseFloat(t.kontrolna_zapremina || t.zapremina || 0);
79	                    });
80	                }
81	            }
82	
83	            if (trosakSirovine > 0) {
84	                ukupniTrosakPrerade += trosakSirovine;
85	                tabelaTroskova.push({ tip: '1_Sirovina', naziv: 'Sirovina (Zaduženje trupaca)', kolicina: `${zapreminaSirovine.toFixed(2)} m³`, cijena: '-', ukupno: trosakSirovine });
86	            }
87	
88	            const masineTrosakMap = {};
89	            paketi.forEach(p => {
90	                const masinaNaziv = p.masina;
91	                if(!masinaNaziv) return;
92	                if(!masineTrosakMap[masinaNaziv]) masineTrosakMap[masinaNaziv] = 0;
93	                masineTrosakMap[masinaNaziv] += parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
94	            });
95	
96	            Object.keys(masineTrosakMap).forEach(mNaziv => {
97	                const masina = masineDB.find(m => m.naziv === mNaziv);
98	                const cijenaM3 = masina ? parseFloat(masina.cijena_m3 || 0) : 0;
99	                const m3Ucinak = masineTrosakMap[mNaziv];
100	                const trosak = m3Ucinak * cijenaM3;
101	                
102	                ukupniTrosakPrerade += trosak;
103	                if(trosak > 0 || m3Ucinak > 0) {
104	                    tabelaTroskova.push({ tip: '2_Mašina', naziv: mNaziv, kolicina: `${m3Ucinak.toFixed(2)} m³`, cijena: `${cijenaM3} KM/m³`, ukupno: trosak });
105	                }
106	            });
107	
108	            const radniciDnevniceMap = {}; 
109	            logovi.forEach(l => {
110	                if(l.brentista) radniciDnevniceMap[l.brentista] = (radniciDnevniceMap[l.brentista]||new Set()).add(l.datum);
111	                if(l.viljuskarista) radniciDnevniceMap[l.viljuskarista] = (radniciDnevniceMap[l.viljuskarista]||new Set()).add(l.datum);
112	            });
113	            paketi.forEach(p => {
114	                if(p.snimio_korisnik) radniciDnevniceMap[p.snimio_korisnik] = (radniciDnevniceMap[p.snimio_korisnik]||new Set()).add(p.datum_yyyy_mm);
115	            });
116	
117	            let ukupnoSatiRadnika = 0; let ukupnoTrosakRadnika = 0;
118	            Object.keys(radniciDnevniceMap).forEach(rIme => {
119	                const radnik = radniciDB.find(r => r.ime_prezime === rIme);
120	                const sati = radniciDnevniceMap[rIme].size * 8; 
121	                ukupnoSatiRadnika += sati;
122	                ukupnoTrosakRadnika += (sati * (radnik ? parseFloat(radnik.bruto_satnica || 0) : 0));
123	            });
124	
125	            if (ukupnoTrosakRadnika > 0) {
126	                ukupniTrosakPrerade += ukupnoTrosakRadnika;
127	                tabelaTroskova.push({ tip: '3_Radnici', naziv: `Zaposleni (${Object.keys(radniciDnevniceMap).length})`, kolicina: `${ukupnoSatiRadnika} sati`, cijena: `-`, ukupno: ukupnoTrosakRadnika });
128	            }
129	
130	            // 🟢 DODATO: MATEMATIKA FINANSIJSKOG GUBITKA ZBOG REKLAMACIJA
131	            let finansijskiGubitakReklamacija = 0;
132	            reklamacijeDB.forEach(rek => {
133	                const kat = katalogDB.find(k => k.sifra === rek.naziv_proizvoda || k.naziv === rek.naziv_proizvoda);
134	                let cijenaBaza = kat ? parseFloat(kat.cijena || 0) : 0;
135	                let m3 = parseFloat(rek.kolicina || 0);
136	
137	                let izracunataVrijednostGubitka = 0;
138	                if(kat && kat.default_jedinica !== 'm3' && kat.default_jedinica !== 'M3') {
139	                    // Ako se proizvod inače cijeni po komadu, moramo pretvoriti kubike nazad u komade da bismo pomnožili sa cijenom komada
140	                    const v = parseFloat(kat.visina)||1; const s = parseFloat(kat.sirina)||1; const d = parseFloat(kat.duzina)||1;
141	                    // Pretvaramo dimenzije u metre na osnovu sigurnosti
142	                    let vol1kom = (v/1000) * (s/1000) * (d/1000); 
143	                    if (d < 1000) vol1kom = (v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100);
144	
145	                    izracunataVrijednostGubitka = vol1kom > 0 ? (m3 / vol1kom) * cijenaBaza : 0;
146	                } else {
147	                    izracunataVrijednostGubitka = m3 * cijenaBaza;
148	                }
149	                finansijskiGubitakReklamacija += izracunataVrijednostGubitka;
150	            });
151	
152	            // Čisti profit sada uključuje i obijanje gubitka od reklamacija
153	            const brutoProfit = ukupnaVrijednostRobe - ukupniTrosakPrerade - finansijskiGubitakReklamacija;
154	
155	            setData({
156	                kpi: { 
157	                    vrijednostRobe: ukupnaVrijednostRobe.toFixed(2), 
158	                    trosakPrerade: ukupniTrosakPrerade.toFixed(2), 
159	                    dodataVrijednost: brutoProfit.toFixed(2),
160	                    gubitakReklamacije: finansijskiGubitakReklamacija.toFixed(2) // 🟢 Novi podatak
161	                },
162	                tabelaProizvodnje: Object.values(proizvodnjaTabelaMap).sort((a,b) => b.vrijednost - a.vrijednost),
163	                tabelaTroskova: tabelaTroskova.sort((a, b) => a.tip.localeCompare(b.tip)),
164	                grafikonFinansija: [
165	                    { name: 'Vrijednost Robe', Iznos: parseFloat(ukupnaVrijednostRobe.toFixed(2)) },
166	                    { name: 'Totalni Trošak', Iznos: parseFloat(ukupniTrosakPrerade.toFixed(2)) },
167	                    { name: 'Gubitak (Reklamacije)', Iznos: parseFloat(finansijskiGubitakReklamacija.toFixed(2)) }, // 🟢 Nova traka u grafu
168	                    { name: 'Čisti Profit', Iznos: parseFloat(brutoProfit.toFixed(2)) }
169	                ]
170	            });
171	            setLoading(false);
172	        } catch (error) { setLoading(false); }
173	    };
174	
175	    const generisiUltimativniPDF = async (nazivModula, nazivKoloneFolder) => {
176	        setIsGeneratingPDF(true);
177	        try {
178	            const pdfElement = document.getElementById('savrseni-pdf-dokument');
179	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '1';
180	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '9999';
181	            pdfElement.style.left = '0px';
182	            const canvas = await html2canvas(pdfElement, { scale: 2, useCORS: true, logging: false });
183	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '0';
184	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '-1';
185	            pdfElement.style.left = '-10000px';
186	
187	            const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
188	            const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
189	            const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
190	            const pdfHeight = (canvas.height * pdfWidth) / canvas.width;
191	            pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
192	            const pdfBlob = pdf.output('blob');
193	
194	            const formatiranoOd = datumOd ? formatDatum(datumOd).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
195	            const formatiranoDo = datumDo ? formatDatum(datumDo).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
196	            const periodStr = formatiranoOd === formatiranoDo ? formatiranoOd : `${formatiranoOd}_do_${formatiranoDo}`;
197	            
198	            const { data: postavke } = await supabase.from('postavke_izvjestaja').select(nazivKoloneFolder).eq('id', 1).maybeSingle();
199	            const cistFolder = (postavke?.[nazivKoloneFolder] || 'Ostalo').replace(/\//g, '---');
200	            const timestamp = new Date().getTime();
201	            
202	            const fileName = `${cistFolder}___${nazivModula}_${periodStr}_${timestamp}.pdf`;
203	
204	            pdf.save(`${nazivModula}_${periodStr}.pdf`);
205	            window.open(URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob), '_blank');
206	            
207	            const { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage.from('izvjestaji_buffer').upload(fileName, pdfBlob, { contentType: 'application/pdf', upsert: true });
208	            if (uploadError) console.error("Greška pri slanju u Cloud:", uploadError);
209	            
210	        } catch (error) {
211	            alert("Greška prilikom generisanja PDF-a.");
212	        } finally {
213	            setIsGeneratingPDF(false);
214	        }
215	    };
216	
217	    if (loading) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-emerald-500 animate-pulse font-black text-xl uppercase tracking-widest">Slažem finansije...</div>;
218	    if (!data) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-slate-500 font-bold">Nema podataka.</div>;
219	
220	    const marzaBojaText = parseFloat(data.kpi.dodataVrijednost) >= 0 ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-red-500';
221	    const marzaBojaPDF = parseFloat(data.kpi.dodataVrijednost) >= 0 ? '#10b981' : '#ef4444';
222	
223	    return (
224	        <div className="w-full relative text-slate-200">
225	            <div className="space-y-6">
226	                <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-lg">
227	                    <div>
228	                        <h3 className="text-emerald-500 font-black uppercase text-sm tracking-widest">Finansijska Analitika</h3>
229	                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">Pregled prodajne vrijednosti i svih troškova (uključujući nabavku trupaca i gubitke).</p>
230	                    </div>
231	                    <button onClick={() => generisiUltimativniPDF('Izvjestaj_Finansije', 'folder_finansije')} disabled={isGeneratingPDF} className={`${isGeneratingPDF ? 'bg-slate-600' : 'bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500'} text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-black uppercase shadow-lg transition-all`}>
232	                        {isGeneratingPDF ? '⌛ Generisanje...' : '🖨️ Isprintaj PDF'}
233	                    </button>
234	                </div>
235	
236	                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
237	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="blue" className="bg-theme-card">
238	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Tržišna Vrijednost Robe</Text>
239	                        <Metric className="text-white mt-1 text-2xl">{parseFloat(data.kpi.vrijednostRobe).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} <span className="text-sm">KM</span></Metric>
240	                    </Card>
241	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="rose" className="bg-theme-card">
242	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Trošak (Sirovina + Prerada)</Text>
243	                        <Metric className="text-rose-400 mt-1 text-2xl">- {parseFloat(data.kpi.trosakPrerade).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} <span className="text-sm">KM</span></Metric>
244	                    </Card>
245	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="orange" className="bg-theme-card border-orange-500/30">
246	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Udar od Reklamacija (Gubitak)</Text>
247	                        <Metric className="text-orange-400 mt-1 text-2xl">- {parseFloat(data.kpi.gubitakReklamacije).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} <span className="text-sm">KM</span></Metric>
248	                    </Card>
249	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="emerald" className="bg-theme-card">
250	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Čisti Profit</Text>
251	                        <Metric className={`${marzaBojaText} mt-1 text-2xl`}>{parseFloat(data.kpi.dodataVrijednost).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} <span className="text-sm">KM</span></Metric>
252	                    </Card>
253	                </div>
254	
255	                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6">
256	                    <Card className="bg-theme-card border-none p-0 overflow-hidden">
257	                        <div className="p-4 border-b border-slate-700">
258	                            <Title className="text-slate-300 font-black text-[10px] uppercase">1. Vrijednost Proizvedene Robe</Title>
259	                        </div>
260	                        <table className="w-full text-left text-[10px]">
261	                            <thead className="bg-theme-card text-slate-500 uppercase font-black border-b border-slate-700">
262	                                <tr><th className="w-[45%] py-2 pl-4">Proizvod / Vrsta</th><th className="w-[15%] py-2 text-center">m³</th><th className="w-[20%] py-2 text-center">Cijena (Baza)</th><th className="w-[20%] py-2 pr-4 text-right">Ukupno (KM)</th></tr>
263	                            </thead>
264	                            <tbody className="text-white font-bold">
265	                                {data.tabelaProizvodnje.map((p, i) => (
266	                                    <tr key={i} className="border-b border-theme-border/50">
267	                                        <td className="py-2 pl-4 text-blue-400 uppercase">{p.naziv}</td><td className="py-2 text-center">{p.m3.toFixed(3)}</td><td className="py-2 text-center text-slate-400">{p.cijenaPrikaz}</td><td className="py-2 pr-4 text-right text-emerald-400 font-black text-[11px]">{p.vrijednost.toLocaleString('bs-BA')}</td>
268	                                    </tr>
269	                                ))}
270	                            </tbody>
271	                        </table>
272	                    </Card>
273	
274	                    <Card className="bg-theme-card border-none p-0 overflow-hidden">
275	                        <div className="p-4 border-b border-slate-700">
276	                            <Title className="text-slate-300 font-black text-[10px] uppercase">2. Troškovi (Sirovina + Rad + Mašine)</Title>
277	                        </div>
278	                        <table className="w-full text-left text-[10px]">
279	                            <thead className="bg-theme-card text-slate-500 uppercase font-black border-b border-slate-700">
280	                                <tr><th className="w-[45%] py-2 pl-4">Resurs</th><th className="w-[15%] py-2 text-center">Učinak</th><th className="w-[20%] py-2 text-center">Jed. Cijena</th><th className="w-[20%] py-2 pr-4 text-right">Trošak (KM)</th></tr>
281	                            </thead>
282	                            <tbody className="text-white font-bold">
283	                                {data.tabelaTroskova.map((t, i) => (
284	                                    <tr key={i} className="border-b border-theme-border/50">
285	                                        <td className="py-2 pl-4 uppercase">{t.naziv}</td><td className="py-2 text-center text-slate-300">{t.kolicina}</td><td className="py-2 text-center text-slate-400">{t.cijena}</td><td className="py-2 pr-4 text-right text-rose-400 font-black text-[11px]">- {t.ukupno.toLocaleString('bs-BA')}</td>
286	                                    </tr>
287	                                ))}
288	                            </tbody>
289	                        </table>
290	                    </Card>
291	
292	                    <Card className="bg-theme-card h-[300px] flex flex-col">
293	                        <Title className="text-slate-300 font-black text-[10px] uppercase mb-4 text-center">Sveukupni Finansijski Rezultat (KM)</Title>
294	                        <div className="flex-1 flex justify-center items-center w-full">
295	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
296	                                <BarChart data={data.grafikonFinansija} margin={{ top: 10, right: 10, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}>
297	                                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="#cbd5e1" />
298	                                    <XAxis dataKey="name" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
299	                                    <YAxis stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} tickFormatter={v => `${v/1000}k`} />
300	                                    <Tooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border:'none', borderRadius:'8px', color:'#fff'}} cursor={{fill: '#1e293b'}} formatter={(v) => `${v.toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM`} />
301	                                    <Bar isAnimationActive={false} dataKey="Iznos" radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} barSize={40}>
302	                                        {data.grafikonFinansija.map((entry, index) => {
303	                                            let boja = '#f59e0b';
304	                                            if (entry.name === 'Totalni Trošak') boja = '#ef4444';
305	                                            if (entry.name === 'Gubitak (Reklamacije)') boja = '#f97316';
306	                                            if (entry.name === 'Čisti Profit') boja = '#10b981';
307	                                            return <Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={boja} />;
308	                                        })}
309	                                    </Bar>
310	                                </BarChart>
311	                            </ResponsiveContainer>
312	                        </div>
313	                    </Card>
314	                </div>
315	            </div>
316	
317	            {/* NEVIDLJIVI PDF KONTEJNER */}
318	            <div id="savrseni-pdf-dokument" style={{ position: 'absolute', top: '-10000px', left: 0, width: '210mm', minHeight: '297mm', backgroundColor: 'white', color: '#0f172a', padding: '12mm', boxSizing: 'border-box', fontFamily: 'sans-serif' }}>
319	                <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-end', borderBottom: '2px solid #0f172a', paddingBottom: '10px', marginBottom: '15px' }}>
320	                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '15px' }}>
321	                        {logoUrl ? <img src={logoUrl} style={{ maxHeight: '50px', maxWidth: '200px', objectFit: 'contain' }} alt="Logo" crossOrigin="anonymous" /> : <h1 style={{ fontSize: '24px', fontWeight: '900', margin: 0, color: '#0f172a' }}>{imeFirme}</h1>}
322	                        <div style={{ borderLeft: '2px solid #cbd5e1', paddingLeft: '15px' }}>
323	                            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '18px', fontWeight: '900', margin: 0, textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '1px', color: '#0f172a' }}>Finansijski Obračun</h2>
324	                            <p style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: '#475569', margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>Vrijednost robe, troškovi i profit</p>
325	                        </div>
326	                    </div>
327	                    <div style={{ textAlign: 'right', fontSize: '10px', fontWeight: '900', textTransform: 'uppercase', color: '#0f172a' }}>
328	                        <p style={{ margin: '0 0 4px 0' }}>Mjesto: <span style={{ fontWeight: 'normal' }}>{header?.mjesto || 'Fabrika'}</span></p>
329	                        <p style={{ margin: 0 }}>Period: <span style={{ fontWeight: 'normal' }}>{formatDatum(datumOd)} {datumOd !== datumDo ? `- ${formatDatum(datumDo)}` : ''}</span></p>
330	                    </div>
331	                </div>
332	
333	                <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: '15px' }}>
334	                    {[
335	                        { title: 'Tržišna Vrijednost Robe', val: parseFloat(data.kpi.vrijednostRobe).toLocaleString('bs-BA'), unit: 'KM', color: '#3b82f6' },
336	                        { title: 'Trošak (Sirovina + Prerada)', val: `- ${parseFloat(data.kpi.trosakPrerade).toLocaleString('bs-BA')}`, unit: 'KM', color: '#ef4444' },
337	                        { title: 'Gubitak Reklamacija', val: `- ${parseFloat(data.kpi.gubitakReklamacije).toLocaleString('bs-BA')}`, unit: 'KM', color: '#f97316' },
338	                        { title: 'Čisti Profit', val: parseFloat(data.kpi.dodataVrijednost).toLocaleString('bs-BA'), unit: 'KM', color: marzaBojaPDF }
339	                    ].map((kpi, i) => (
340	                        <div key={i} style={{ width: '23%', border: '1px solid #cbd5e1', borderRadius: '6px', padding: '10px', borderTop: `4px solid ${kpi.color}` }}>
341	                            <div style={{ fontSize: '9px', color: '#475569', fontWeight: 'bold', textTransform: 'uppercase', marginBottom: '6px' }}>{kpi.title}</div>
342	                            <div style={{ fontSize: '15px', fontWeight: '900', color: '#0f172a' }}>{kpi.val} <span style={{ fontSize: '9px', fontWeight: 'normal' }}>{kpi.unit}</span></div>
343	                        </div>
344	                    ))}
345	                </div>
346	
347	                <div style={{ width: '100%', marginBottom: '20px', border: '1px solid #cbd5e1', borderRadius: '6px', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
348	                    <div style={{ padding: '8px 12px', borderBottom: '1px solid #cbd5e1', backgroundColor: '#f8fafc', fontWeight: '900', fontSize: '10px', textTransform: 'uppercase', color: '#0f172a' }}>1. Vrijednost Proizvedene Robe</div>
349	                    <table style={{ width: '100%', fontSize: '10px', borderCollapse: 'collapse', color: '#0f172a' }}>
350	                        <thead style={{ backgroundColor: '#f1f5f9' }}>
351	                            <tr style={{ color: '#475569', borderBottom: '1px solid #cbd5e1' }}>
352	                                <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '6px 12px' }}>Proizvod / Vrsta</th><th style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: '6px 12px' }}>m³</th><th style={{ textAlign: 'right', padding: '6px 12px' }}>Ukupno (KM)</th>
353	                            </tr>
354	                        </thead>
355	                        <tbody>
356	                            {data.tabelaProizvodnje.map((k, i) => (
357	                                <tr key={i} style={{ borderBottom: '1px solid #e2e8f0' }}>
358	                                    <td style={{ padding: '6px 12px', fontWeight: 'bold', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>{k.naziv}</td>
359	                                    <td style={{ padding: '6px 12px', textAlign: 'center', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{k.m3.toFixed(3)}</td>
360	                                    <td style={{ padding: '6px 12px', textAlign: 'right', fontWeight: '900' }}>{k.vrijednost.toLocaleString('bs-BA')}</td>
361	                                </tr>
362	                            ))}
363	                        </tbody>
364	                    </table>
365	                </div>
366	
367	                <div style={{ width: '100%', marginBottom: '20px', border: '1px solid #cbd5e1', borderRadius: '6px', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
368	                    <div style={{ padding: '8px 12px', borderBottom: '1px solid #cbd5e1', backgroundColor: '#f8fafc', fontWeight: '900', fontSize: '10px', textTransform: 'uppercase', color: '#0f172a' }}>2. Troškovi (Sirovina + Radnici + Mašine)</div>
369	                    <table style={{ width: '100%', fontSize: '10px', borderCollapse: 'collapse', color: '#0f172a' }}>
370	                        <thead style={{ backgroundColor: '#f1f5f9' }}>
371	                            <tr style={{ color: '#475569', borderBottom: '1px solid #cbd5e1' }}>
372	                                <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '6px 12px' }}>Resurs</th><th style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: '6px 12px' }}>Učinak</th><th style={{ textAlign: 'right', padding: '6px 12px' }}>Trošak (KM)</th>
373	                            </tr>
374	                        </thead>
375	                        <tbody>
376	                            {data.tabelaTroskova.map((t, i) => (
377	                                <tr key={i} style={{ borderBottom: '1px solid #e2e8f0' }}>
378	                                    <td style={{ padding: '6px 12px', fontWeight: 'bold', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>{t.naziv}</td>
379	                                    <td style={{ padding: '6px 12px', textAlign: 'center', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#475569' }}>{t.kolicina}</td>
380	                                    <td style={{ padding: '6px 12px', textAlign: 'right', fontWeight: '900', color: '#ef4444' }}>- {t.ukupno.toLocaleString('bs-BA')}</td>
381	                                </tr>
382	                            ))}
383	                        </tbody>
384	                    </table>
385	                </div>
386	
387	                <div style={{ border: '1px solid #cbd5e1', borderRadius: '6px', padding: '10px' }}>
388	                    <div style={{ fontSize: '9px', color: '#0f172a', fontWeight: '900', textTransform: 'uppercase', textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: '10px' }}>Sveukupni Finansijski Rezultat (KM)</div>
389	                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyItems: 'center' }}>
390	                        <BarChart width={600} height={200} data={data.grafikonFinansija} margin={{ top: 10, right: 10, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}>
391	                            <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="#cbd5e1" />
392	                            <XAxis dataKey="name" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={8} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
393	                            <YAxis stroke="#64748b" fontSize={8} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} tickFormatter={v => `${v/1000}k`} />
394	                            <Bar isAnimationActive={false} dataKey="Iznos" radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} barSize={50}>
395	                                {data.grafikonFinansija.map((entry, index) => {
396	                                    let boja = '#f59e0b';
397	                                    if (entry.name === 'Totalni Trošak') boja = '#ef4444';
398	                                    if (entry.name === 'Gubitak (Reklamacije)') boja = '#f97316';
399	                                    if (entry.name === 'Čisti Profit') boja = '#10b981';
400	                                    return <Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={boja} />;
401	                                })}
402	                            </Bar>
403	                        </BarChart>
404	                    </div>
405	                </div>
406	                
407	                <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', borderTop: '2px solid #1e293b', paddingTop: '15px', marginTop: '20px', pageBreakInside: 'avoid' }}>
408	                    <div style={{ width: '60%', fontSize: '8px', color: '#475569' }}>Dokument generisan iz SmartTimber ERP softvera - {new Date().toLocaleString('bs-BA')}</div>
409	                    <div style={{ width: '35%', textAlign: 'center', fontSize: '9px', color: '#475569' }}><div style={{ paddingTop: '10px', borderTop: '1px solid #1e293b', fontWeight: '900', color: '#0f172a', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>Direktor / Vlasnik</div></div>
410	                </div>
411	            </div>
412	        </div>
413	    );
414	}

=== app/components/TabProrezAnalitika.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import { LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Legend, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts';
5	import { Card, Metric, Text, Title } from '@tremor/react';
6	import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';
7	import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
8	
9	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
10	
11	const PALETA = ['#10b981', '#3b82f6', '#f59e0b', '#8b5cf6', '#ec4899', '#06b6d4', '#f43f5e'];
12	
13	const imaSirovinu = (val) => {
14	    if (!val) return false;
15	    if (Array.isArray(val) && val.length > 0) return true;
16	    if (typeof val === 'string') return val.replace(/[{}"[\]\s]/g, '').length > 0;
17	    return false;
18	};
19	
20	const formatDatum = (iso) => {
21	    if(!iso) return '';
22	    const [y, m, d] = iso.split('T')[0].split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`;
23	};
24	
25	export default function TabProrezAnalitika({ datumOd, datumDo, masinaFilter, saas, header }) {
26	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
27	    const [data, setData] = useState(null);
28	    const [brentistaFilter, setBrentistaFilter] = useState('SVI');
29	    const [isGeneratingPDF, setIsGeneratingPDF] = useState(false);
30	    
31	    const [logoUrl, setLogoUrl] = useState('');
32	    const [imeFirme, setImeFirme] = useState('SMART TIMBER');
33	
34	    useEffect(() => {
35	        // Pouzdano povlačenje logotipa
36	        const logo = localStorage.getItem('saas_app_logo');
37	        if(logo) setLogoUrl(logo);
38	    }, []);
39	
40	    useEffect(() => { ucitajDubokuAnalitiku(); }, [datumOd, datumDo, masinaFilter, brentistaFilter]);
41	
42	    const ucitajDubokuAnalitiku = async () => {
43	        setLoading(true);
44	        try {
45	            const d30 = new Date(new Date(datumOd).getTime() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
46	
47	            const { data: logResData } = await supabase.from('prorez_log').select('*').gte('datum', d30).lte('datum', datumDo);
48	            const trupacIds = [...new Set((logResData || []).map(l => l.trupac_id).filter(Boolean))];
49	            
50	            let trupciResData = [];
51	            if (trupacIds.length > 0) {
52	                for (let i = 0; i < trupacIds.length; i += 500) {
53	                    const chunk = trupacIds.slice(i, i + 500);
54	                    const { data: tData } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').in('id', chunk);
55	                    if (tData) trupciResData = [...trupciResData, ...tData];
56	                }
57	            }
58	
59	            const [paketiRes, zastojiRes] = await Promise.all([
60	                supabase.from('paketi').select('*').gte('datum_yyyy_mm', d30).lte('datum_yyyy_mm', datumDo),
61	                supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').select('*').gte('datum', datumOd).lte('datum', datumDo).eq('modul', 'Prorez')
62	            ]);
63	
64	            const paketiResData = paketiRes.data || [];
65	            const zastojiResData = zastojiRes.data || [];
66	
67	            const sviDanLogovi = (logResData || []).filter(l => l.datum >= datumOd && l.datum <= datumDo && (masinaFilter === 'SVE' || l.masina === masinaFilter));
68	            const sviDanPaketi = paketiResData.filter(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm >= datumOd && p.datum_yyyy_mm <= datumDo && (masinaFilter === 'SVE' || p.masina === masinaFilter) && !imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids));
69	            
70	            const dostupniBrentiste = [...new Set([...sviDanLogovi.map(l => l.brentista), ...sviDanPaketi.map(p => p.brentista)].filter(Boolean))];
71	            const danLogovi = sviDanLogovi.filter(l => brentistaFilter === 'SVI' || l.brentista === brentistaFilter);
72	            const danPaketi = sviDanPaketi.filter(p => brentistaFilter === 'SVI' || p.brentista === brentistaFilter);
73	            const danZastoji = zastojiResData.filter(z => (masinaFilter === 'SVE' || z.masina === masinaFilter) && (brentistaFilter === 'SVI' || z.snimio?.includes(brentistaFilter)));
74	
75	            let ulazM3 = 0; let ulazKom = 0; let sumTotalPrecnik = 0;
76	            const trupciMap = {};
77	
78	            danLogovi.forEach(l => {
79	                const t = trupciResData.find(tr => tr.id === l.trupac_id);
80	                if (t) {
81	                    const m3 = parseFloat(t.zapremina || 0); const precnik = parseFloat(t.promjer || 0); const duzina = parseFloat(t.duzina || 0).toFixed(1);
82	                    ulazM3 += m3; ulazKom += 1; sumTotalPrecnik += precnik;
83	                    if(!trupciMap[duzina]) trupciMap[duzina] = { duzina, kom: 0, m3: 0, sumPrecnik: 0 };
84	                    trupciMap[duzina].kom += 1; trupciMap[duzina].m3 += m3; trupciMap[duzina].sumPrecnik += precnik;
85	                }
86	            });
87	
88	            const trupciStruktura = Object.values(trupciMap).map(t => ({ ...t, avgPrecnik: (t.sumPrecnik / t.kom).toFixed(1) })).sort((a,b) => parseFloat(b.duzina) - parseFloat(a.duzina));
89	            const prosjecanPrecnikGlavni = ulazKom > 0 ? (sumTotalPrecnik / ulazKom).toFixed(1) : 0;
90	
91	            let izlazM3 = 0; const proizvodiMap = {};
92	
93	            danPaketi.forEach(p => {
94	                const vol = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
95	                izlazM3 += vol;
96	                const kljuc = p.naziv_proizvoda || 'Nepoznato';
97	                if(!proizvodiMap[kljuc]) proizvodiMap[kljuc] = { naziv: kljuc, m3: 0, kom: 0, paketi: [] };
98	                proizvodiMap[kljuc].m3 += vol;
99	                if ((p.jm || 'kom').toLowerCase() === 'kom') proizvodiMap[kljuc].kom += parseFloat(p.kolicina_ulaz || 0);
100	                proizvodiMap[kljuc].paketi.push(p);
101	            });
102	
103	            const proizvodiStruktura = Object.values(proizvodiMap).sort((a,b) => b.m3 - a.m3);
104	            const grafikonProizvoda = proizvodiStruktura.map(p => ({ name: p.naziv, value: parseFloat(p.m3.toFixed(2)) }));
105	            const yieldProcenat = ulazM3 > 0 ? ((izlazM3 / ulazM3) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0;
106	
107	            const svaVremena = [...danLogovi.map(l => l.vrijeme_unosa), ...danPaketi.map(p => p.vrijeme_tekst)].filter(Boolean).sort();
108	            let smjenaStart = 'N/A'; let smjenaEnd = 'N/A';
109	            if (svaVremena.length > 0) { smjenaStart = svaVremena[0].substring(0, 5); smjenaEnd = svaVremena[svaVremena.length - 1].substring(0, 5); }
110	
111	            const sviViljuskaristi = [...new Set([...danLogovi.map(l => l.viljuskarista), ...danPaketi.map(p => p.viljuskarista)].filter(Boolean))].join(', ');
112	            const sviPomocni = [...new Set(danPaketi.map(p => p.radnici_pilana).filter(Boolean))].join(', ');
113	            const ukupnoZastojMin = danZastoji.reduce((sum, z) => sum + (parseInt(z.zastoj_min) || 0), 0);
114	            const efektivnoSati = Math.max(0.1, 8 - (ukupnoZastojMin / 60)); 
115	            const m3PoSatu = ulazM3 > 0 ? (ulazM3 / efektivnoSati).toFixed(2) : "0.00";
116	
117	            const trendDaniMap = {}; const dDanas = new Date(datumDo);
118	            for (let i = 29; i >= 0; i--) {
119	                const d = new Date(dDanas.getTime() - i * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
120	                const iso = d.toISOString().split('T')[0];
121	                trendDaniMap[iso] = { dan: `${d.getDate()}.${d.getMonth()+1}`, pilanaUlaz: 0, pilanaIzlaz: 0, brentistaUlaz: 0, brentistaIzlaz: 0 };
122	            }
123	            const targetBrentista = brentistaFilter !== 'SVI' ? brentistaFilter : (dostupniBrentiste[0] || 'Svi radnici');
124	
125	            (logResData || []).forEach(l => {
126	                if(trendDaniMap[l.datum]) {
127	                    const t = trupciResData.find(tr => tr.id === l.trupac_id);
128	                    if(t) {
129	                        const m3 = parseFloat(t.zapremina || 0);
130	                        trendDaniMap[l.datum].pilanaUlaz += m3;
131	                        if(l.brentista === targetBrentista || brentistaFilter === 'SVI') trendDaniMap[l.datum].brentistaUlaz += m3;
132	                    }
133	                }
134	            });
135	
136	            paketiResData.filter(p => !imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids)).forEach(p => {
137	                if(trendDaniMap[p.datum_yyyy_mm]) {
138	                    const m3 = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
139	                    trendDaniMap[p.datum_yyyy_mm].pilanaIzlaz += m3;
140	                    if(p.brentista === targetBrentista || brentistaFilter === 'SVI') trendDaniMap[p.datum_yyyy_mm].brentistaIzlaz += m3;
141	                }
142	            });
143	
144	            const trendChartData = Object.values(trendDaniMap).map(d => ({
145	                dan: d.dan,
146	                PilanaYield: d.pilanaUlaz > 0 ? parseFloat(((d.pilanaIzlaz / d.pilanaUlaz) * 100).toFixed(1)) : 0,
147	                BrentistaYield: d.brentistaUlaz > 0 ? parseFloat(((d.brentistaIzlaz / d.brentistaUlaz) * 100).toFixed(1)) : 0,
148	            }));
149	
150	            setData({
151	                kpi: { ulazM3: ulazM3.toFixed(2), ulazKom, prosjecanPrecnik: prosjecanPrecnikGlavni, izlazM3: izlazM3.toFixed(2), yieldProcenat, m3PoSatu, ukupnoZastojMin },
152	                trupciStruktura, proizvodiStruktura, grafikonProizvoda, trendChartData, zastoji: danZastoji,
153	                smjenaInfo: { sviBrentiste: dostupniBrentiste, viljuskaristi: sviViljuskaristi, pomocniRadnici: sviPomocni, start: smjenaStart, end: smjenaEnd, glavniBrentista: targetBrentista }
154	            });
155	            setLoading(false);
156	        } catch (error) { setLoading(false); }
157	    };
158	
159	    const generisiUltimativniPDF = async (nazivModula, nazivKoloneFolder) => {
160	        setIsGeneratingPDF(true);
161	        try {
162	            // 1. RENDERIRANJE (Slikanje ekrana)
163	            const pdfElement = document.getElementById('savrseni-pdf-dokument');
164	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '1';
165	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '9999';
166	            pdfElement.style.left = '0px';
167	            const canvas = await html2canvas(pdfElement, { scale: 2, useCORS: true, logging: false });
168	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '0';
169	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '-1';
170	            pdfElement.style.left = '-10000px';
171	
172	            const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
173	            const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
174	            const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
175	            const pdfHeight = (canvas.height * pdfWidth) / canvas.width;
176	            pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
177	            const pdfBlob = pdf.output('blob');
178	
179	            // 2. LOGIKA ZA PERIOD (Ime fajla)
180	            // Ako su datumi isti, piše jedan datum, ako su različiti piše OD-DO
181	            const formatiranoOd = datumOd ? formatDatum(datumOd).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
182	            const formatiranoDo = datumDo ? formatDatum(datumDo).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
183	            const periodStr = formatiranoOd === formatiranoDo ? formatiranoOd : `${formatiranoOd}_do_${formatiranoDo}`;
184	            
185	            // 3. DOHVATANJE PUTANJE IZ POSTAVKI
186	            const { data: postavke } = await supabase.from('postavke_izvjestaja').select(nazivKoloneFolder).eq('id', 1).maybeSingle();
187	            const cistFolder = (postavke?.[nazivKoloneFolder] || 'Ostalo').replace(/\//g, '---');
188	            const timestamp = new Date().getTime();
189	            
190	            // Finalno ime za Make.com: FOLDER___MODUL_PERIOD_ID.pdf
191	            const fileName = `${cistFolder}___${nazivModula}_${periodStr}_${timestamp}.pdf`;
192	
193	            // =========================================================
194	            // UBRZANJE: PRVO DAJEMO FAJL KORISNIKU
195	            // =========================================================
196	            pdf.save(`${nazivModula}_${periodStr}.pdf`);
197	            window.open(URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob), '_blank');
198	            
199	            // =========================================================
200	            // ONDA ŠALJEMO U POZADINI U SUPABASE
201	            // =========================================================
202	            const { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage
203	                .from('izvjestaji_buffer')
204	                .upload(fileName, pdfBlob, { contentType: 'application/pdf', upsert: true });
205	
206	            if (uploadError) {
207	                console.error("Greška pri slanju u Cloud:", uploadError);
208	            } else {
209	                console.log("🚀 Poslano u arhivu u pozadini.");
210	            }
211	            
212	        } catch (error) {
213	            console.error("Greška:", error);
214	            alert("Greška prilikom generisanja PDF-a.");
215	        } finally {
216	            setIsGeneratingPDF(false);
217	        }
218	    };
219	
220	    if (loading) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-emerald-500 animate-pulse font-black text-xl uppercase tracking-widest">Slažem podatke...</div>;
221	    if (!data) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-slate-500 font-bold">Nema podataka.</div>;
222	
223	    return (
224	        <div className="w-full relative text-slate-200">
225	            <div className="space-y-6">
226	                <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-lg">
227	                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
228	                        <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Filtriraj po Brentisti:</span>
229	                        <select value={brentistaFilter} onChange={e => setBrentistaFilter(e.target.value)} className="bg-theme-panel text-emerald-400 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-black outline-none border border-slate-700 uppercase tracking-widest cursor-pointer">
230	                            <option value="SVI">SVI ZAPOSLENI</option>
231	                            {data.smjenaInfo.sviBrentiste.map(b => <option key={b} value={b}>{b}</option>)}
232	                        </select>
233	                    </div>
234	                    {/* OVDJE JE NOVI ONCLICK */}
235	                    <button onClick={() => generisiUltimativniPDF('Izvjestaj_Proreza', 'folder_prorez')} disabled={isGeneratingPDF} className={`${isGeneratingPDF ? 'bg-slate-600' : 'bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500'} text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-black uppercase shadow-lg transition-all`}>
236	                        {isGeneratingPDF ? '⌛ Generisanje...' : '🖨️ Isprintaj PDF'}
237	                    </button>
238	                </div>
239	
240	                {/* SVE OSTALO OSTAJE ISTO ZA EKRAN */}
241	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-3">
242	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="emerald" className="bg-theme-card">
243	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Izrezano Trupaca</Text>
244	                        <Metric className="text-white text-xl mt-1">{data.kpi.ulazM3} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
245	                    </Card>
246	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="blue" className="bg-theme-card">
247	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Proizvedeno (Izlaz)</Text>
248	                        <Metric className="text-white text-xl mt-1">{data.kpi.izlazM3} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
249	                    </Card>
250	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="amber" className="bg-theme-card">
251	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Iskorištenost (Yield)</Text>

495	                        <div style={{ marginTop: '30px', paddingTop: '10px', borderTop: '1px solid #0f172a', textAlign: 'center', fontWeight: '900', color: '#0f172a', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>

497	                        </div>
498	                    </div>
499	                </div>
500	            </div>
501	        </div>
502	    );
503	}

=== app/components/TabUkupnoAnalitika.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Legend, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts';
5	import { Card, Metric, Text, Title } from '@tremor/react';
6	import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';
7	import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
8	
9	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
10	const PALETA = ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b', '#8b5cf6', '#ec4899', '#06b6d4'];
11	
12	const formatDatum = (iso) => { if(!iso) return ''; const [y, m, d] = iso.split('T')[0].split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`; };
13	const imaSirovinu = (val) => { if (!val) return false; if (Array.isArray(val) && val.length > 0) return true; if (typeof val === 'string') return val.replace(/[{}"[\]\s]/g, '').length > 0; return false; };
14	
15	export default function TabUkupnoAnalitika({ datumOd, datumDo, saas, header }) {
16	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
17	    const [data, setData] = useState(null);
18	    const [isGeneratingPDF, setIsGeneratingPDF] = useState(false);
19	    const [logoUrl, setLogoUrl] = useState('');
20	    const [imeFirme, setImeFirme] = useState('SMART TIMBER');
21	
22	    useEffect(() => {
23	        const logo = localStorage.getItem('saas_app_logo');
24	        if(logo) setLogoUrl(logo);
25	    }, []);
26	
27	    useEffect(() => { ucitajUkupnuAnalitiku(); }, [datumOd, datumDo]);
28	
29	    const ucitajUkupnuAnalitiku = async () => {
30	        setLoading(true);
31	        try {
32	            const [trupciRes, prorezRes, paketiRes] = await Promise.all([
33	                // 🟢 ZADRŽANA SVA LOGIKA: Povlačimo trupce od početka za tačan bilans zaliha
34	                supabase.from('trupci').select('*').gte('datum_prijema', '2020-01-01'),
35	                supabase.from('prorez_log').select('*').gte('datum', datumOd).lte('datum', datumDo),
36	                supabase.from('paketi').select('*').gte('datum_yyyy_mm', datumOd).lte('datum_yyyy_mm', datumDo)
37	            ]);
38	
39	            const logovi = prorezRes.data || [];
40	            const paketi = paketiRes.data || [];
41	            const trupciDB = trupciRes.data || [];
42	
43	            let ulazTrupciM3 = 0; const iskoristeniTrupci = new Set();
44	            logovi.forEach(l => {
45	                if(!iskoristeniTrupci.has(l.trupac_id)) {
46	                    iskoristeniTrupci.add(l.trupac_id);
47	                    const t = trupciDB.find(tr => tr.id === l.trupac_id);
48	                    if(t) ulazTrupciM3 += parseFloat(t.zapremina || 0);
49	                }
50	            });
51	
52	            // 🟢 DODATO: Racunamo koliko je prijavljeno kala na placu (krojenje) za odabrani period
53	            let kaloKrojenjeM3 = 0;
54	            trupciDB.forEach(t => {
55	                if (t.klasa === 'KALO/OGRJEV' && t.datum_prijema >= datumOd && t.datum_prijema <= datumDo) {
56	                    kaloKrojenjeM3 += parseFloat(t.zapremina || 0);
57	                }
58	            });
59	
60	            let pilanaIzlazM3 = 0; let doradaIzlazM3 = 0; let doradaUlazSirovineM3 = 0;
61	            const proizvodiMap = {};
62	
63	            paketi.forEach(p => {
64	                const m3 = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
65	                const isDorada = imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids);
66	
67	                if (isDorada) { doradaIzlazM3 += m3; doradaUlazSirovineM3 += parseFloat(p.kolicina_ulaz || m3); } 
68	                else { pilanaIzlazM3 += m3; }
69	
70	                const naziv = p.naziv_proizvoda || 'Ostalo';
71	                proizvodiMap[naziv] = (proizvodiMap[naziv] || 0) + m3;
72	            });
73	
74	            const pilanaKaloM3 = Math.max(0, ulazTrupciM3 - pilanaIzlazM3);
75	            const doradaKaloM3 = Math.max(0, doradaUlazSirovineM3 - doradaIzlazM3);
76	            const ukupanIzlazGOTOVE_ROBE = pilanaIzlazM3 + doradaIzlazM3;
77	
78	            const grafikonTokMaterijala = [
79	                { name: 'Sirovina (Ulaz)', M3: parseFloat(ulazTrupciM3.toFixed(2)) },
80	                { name: 'Proizvedeno (Izlaz)', M3: parseFloat(ukupanIzlazGOTOVE_ROBE.toFixed(2)) },
81	                { name: 'Otpad od Rezova', M3: parseFloat((pilanaKaloM3 + doradaKaloM3).toFixed(2)) },
82	                { name: 'Kalo (Krojenje)', M3: parseFloat(kaloKrojenjeM3.toFixed(2)) } // 🟢 Dodano na grafikon
83	            ];
84	
85	            const grafikonProizvoda = Object.keys(proizvodiMap).map(k => ({ name: k, value: parseFloat(proizvodiMap[k].toFixed(2)) })).sort((a,b) => b.value - a.value).slice(0,10);
86	
87	            setData({
88	                kpi: {
89	                    ulazTrupci: ulazTrupciM3.toFixed(2), izlazGotoveRobe: ukupanIzlazGOTOVE_ROBE.toFixed(2),
90	                    ukupnoKalo: (pilanaKaloM3 + doradaKaloM3).toFixed(2), 
91	                    iskoristenost: ulazTrupciM3 > 0 ? ((ukupanIzlazGOTOVE_ROBE / ulazTrupciM3) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0,
92	                    kaloKrojenje: kaloKrojenjeM3.toFixed(2)
93	                },
94	                grafikonTokMaterijala, grafikonProizvoda,
95	                tabelaProizvodnje: Object.keys(proizvodiMap).map(k => ({ naziv: k, m3: proizvodiMap[k] })).sort((a,b) => b.m3 - a.m3)
96	            });
97	            setLoading(false);
98	
99	        } catch (error) { setLoading(false); }
100	    };
101	
102	    const generisiUltimativniPDF = async (nazivModula, nazivKoloneFolder) => {
103	        setIsGeneratingPDF(true);
104	        try {
105	            const pdfElement = document.getElementById('savrseni-pdf-dokument');
106	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '1';
107	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '9999';
108	            pdfElement.style.left = '0px';
109	            const canvas = await html2canvas(pdfElement, { scale: 2, useCORS: true, logging: false });
110	            pdfElement.style.opacity = '0';
111	            pdfElement.style.zIndex = '-1';
112	            pdfElement.style.left = '-10000px';
113	
114	            const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
115	            const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
116	            const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
117	            const pdfHeight = (canvas.height * pdfWidth) / canvas.width;
118	            pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
119	            const pdfBlob = pdf.output('blob');
120	
121	            const formatiranoOd = datumOd ? formatDatum(datumOd).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
122	            const formatiranoDo = datumDo ? formatDatum(datumDo).replace(/\./g, '') : '';
123	            const periodStr = formatiranoOd === formatiranoDo ? formatiranoOd : `${formatiranoOd}_do_${formatiranoDo}`;
124	            
125	            const { data: postavke } = await supabase.from('postavke_izvjestaja').select(nazivKoloneFolder).eq('id', 1).maybeSingle();
126	            const cistFolder = (postavke?.[nazivKoloneFolder] || 'Ostalo').replace(/\//g, '---');
127	            const timestamp = new Date().getTime();
128	            
129	            const fileName = `${cistFolder}___${nazivModula}_${periodStr}_${timestamp}.pdf`;
130	
131	            pdf.save(`${nazivModula}_${periodStr}.pdf`);
132	            window.open(URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob), '_blank');
133	            
134	            const { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage
135	                .from('izvjestaji_buffer')
136	                .upload(fileName, pdfBlob, { contentType: 'application/pdf', upsert: true });
137	
138	            if (uploadError) {
139	                console.error("Greška pri slanju u Cloud:", uploadError);
140	            } else {
141	                console.log("🚀 Poslano u arhivu u pozadini.");
142	            }
143	            
144	        } catch (error) {
145	            console.error("Greška:", error);
146	            alert("Greška prilikom generisanja PDF-a.");
147	        } finally {
148	            setIsGeneratingPDF(false);
149	        }
150	    };
151	
152	    if (loading) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-indigo-500 animate-pulse font-black text-xl uppercase tracking-widest">Sastavljam analitiku...</div>;
153	    if (!data) return <div className="p-20 text-center text-slate-500 font-bold">Nema podataka.</div>;
154	
155	    return (
156	        <div className="w-full relative text-slate-200">
157	            <div className="space-y-6">
158	                <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-lg">
159	                    <div>
160	                        <h3 className="text-blue-400 font-black uppercase text-sm tracking-widest">Analitika Materijala (Kubici)</h3>
161	                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">Prikaz ulaza sirovine, izlaza robe i stvarnog kala u proizvodnji.</p>
162	                    </div>
163	                    <button onClick={() => generisiUltimativniPDF('Analitika_Materijala', 'folder_ukupno')} disabled={isGeneratingPDF} className={`${isGeneratingPDF ? 'bg-slate-600' : 'bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500'} text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-black uppercase shadow-lg transition-all`}>
164	                        {isGeneratingPDF ? '⌛ Generisanje...' : '🖨️ Isprintaj PDF'}
165	                    </button>
166	                </div>
167	
168	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
169	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="blue" className="bg-theme-card">
170	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Ulaz Sirovine (Trupci)</Text>
171	                        <Metric className="text-white mt-1 text-xl">{data.kpi.ulazTrupci} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
172	                    </Card>
173	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="emerald" className="bg-theme-card">
174	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Ukupno Proizvedeno</Text>
175	                        <Metric className="text-emerald-400 mt-1 text-xl">{data.kpi.izlazGotoveRobe} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
176	                    </Card>
177	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="amber" className="bg-theme-card">
178	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Efikasnost Fabrike (Yield)</Text>
179	                        <Metric className="text-amber-400 mt-1 text-xl">{data.kpi.iskoristenost} <span className="text-sm">%</span></Metric>
180	                    </Card>
181	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="rose" className="bg-theme-card">
182	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Stvarni Otpad (Rezovi)</Text>
183	                        <Metric className="text-rose-400 mt-1 text-xl">{data.kpi.ukupnoKalo} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
184	                    </Card>
185	                    <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="orange" className="bg-theme-card border-orange-500/30">
186	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 font-bold text-[9px] uppercase">Kalo od krojenja</Text>
187	                        <Metric className="text-orange-400 mt-1 text-xl">{data.kpi.kaloKrojenje} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></Metric>
188	                    </Card>
189	                </div>
190	
191	                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
192	                    <Card className="bg-theme-card h-[300px] flex flex-col">
193	                        <Title className="text-slate-300 font-black text-[10px] uppercase mb-4 text-center">Bilans Materijala (Ulaz / Izlaz / Kalo)</Title>
194	                        <div className="flex-1 flex justify-center items-center w-full">
195	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
196	                                <BarChart data={data.grafikonTokMaterijala} margin={{ top: 10, right: 10, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}>
197	                                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="#cbd5e1" />
198	                                    <XAxis dataKey="name" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
199	                                    <YAxis stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
200	                                    <Tooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border:'none', borderRadius:'8px', color:'#fff'}} cursor={{fill: '#1e293b'}} formatter={(v) => `${v} m³`} />
201	                                    <Bar isAnimationActive={false} dataKey="M3" radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} barSize={40}>
202	                                        {data.grafikonTokMaterijala.map((entry, index) => {
203	                                            let boja = '#10b981';
204	                                            if (entry.name === 'Otpad od Rezova') boja = '#ef4444';
205	                                            if (entry.name === 'Sirovina (Ulaz)') boja = '#3b82f6';

216	                        <Title className="text-slate-300 font-black text-[10px] uppercase mb-4 text-center">Učešće Gotovih Proizvoda (m³)</Title>

218	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">

222	                                    </Pie>

224	                                    <Legend wrapperStyle={{fontSize:'9px', fontWeight:'bold', color: '#fff'}} />

235	                width: '210mm', minHeight: '297mm',

301	                </div>
302

304	                    <div style={{ padding: '8px 12px', borderBottom: '1px solid #cbd5e1', backgroundColor: '#f8fafc', fontWeight: '900', fontSize: '10px', textTransform: 'uppercase', color: '#0f172a' }}>Lista Proizvedene Robe</div>

316	                                </tr>
317	                            ))}
318	                        </tbody>
319	                    </table>
320	                </div>
321	
322	                <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', borderTop: '2px solid #1e293b', paddingTop: '15px', marginTop: '20px' }}>
323	                    <div style={{ width: '60%', fontSize: '8px', color: '#475569' }}>
324	                        Dokument generisan iz SmartTimber ERP softvera - {new Date().toLocaleString('bs-BA')}
325	                    </div>

327	                        <div style={{ paddingTop: '10px', borderTop: '1px solid #1e293b', fontWeight: '900', color: '#0f172a', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>
328	                            Direktor / Vlasnik
329	                        </div>
330	                    </div>
331	                </div>
332	            </div>
333	        </div>
334	    );
335	}

=== app/components/WorkerModal.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import SearchableInput from './SearchableInput';
5	import ScannerOverlay from './ScannerOverlay';
6	
7	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
8	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
9	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
10	
11	export default function WorkerModal({ masina, onClose }) {
12	    const [workers, setWorkers] = useState([]);
13	    const [allRadnici, setAllRadnici] = useState([]);
14	    const [scanCode, setScanCode] = useState('');
15	    const [isScanningWorkers, setIsScanningWorkers] = useState(false);
16	    
17	    useEffect(() => { loadWorkers(); loadAllRadnici(); }, [masina]);
18	
19	    const loadWorkers = async () => { 
20	        const { data } = await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').select('*').eq('masina_naziv', masina).is('vrijeme_odjave', null); 
21	        setWorkers(data || []); 
22	    };
23	    
24	    const loadAllRadnici = async () => { 
25	        const { data } = await supabase.from('radnici').select('ime_prezime').order('ime_prezime'); 
26	        setAllRadnici(data ? data.map(r => r.ime_prezime) : []); 
27	    };
28	
29	    const handleWorkerAction = async (imeRadnika) => {
30	        if(!imeRadnika) return;
31	        const ime = imeRadnika.trim();
32	        const vecTu = workers.find(w => w.radnik_ime.toLowerCase() === ime.toLowerCase());
33	        
34	        if (vecTu) {
35	            await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('id', vecTu.id);
36	        } else {
37	            const { data: aktivanDrugdje } = await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').select('*').ilike('radnik_ime', ime).is('vrijeme_odjave', null).maybeSingle();
38	            if (aktivanDrugdje) {
39	                if (window.confirm(`Radnik ${ime} je već aktivan na: ${aktivanDrugdje.masina_naziv}. Prebaciti ga ovdje?`)) {
40	                    await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('id', aktivanDrugdje.id);
41	                    await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').insert([{ radnik_ime: ime, masina_naziv: masina }]);
42	                }
43	            } else {
44	                await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').insert([{ radnik_ime: ime, masina_naziv: masina }]);
45	            }
46	        }
47	        setScanCode(''); loadWorkers();
48	    };
49	
50	    return (
51	        <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full bg-theme-main p-6 rounded-box border border-blue-500 shadow-2xl z-50 animate-in zoom-in-95">
52	            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
53	                <div>
54	                    <h3 className="text-blue-500 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase font-black">Prijava na mašinu</h3>
55	                    <p className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase">{masina}</p>
56	                </div>
57	                <button onClick={onClose} className="text-slate-500 text-xl font-black hover:text-red-500 transition-all">✕</button>
58	            </div>
59	
60	            <div className="flex gap-2 mb-6 items-end relative z-50">
61	                <div className="flex-1">
62	                    <SearchableInput label="Ime ili QR Radnika" value={scanCode} onChange={v => setScanCode(v)} list={allRadnici} />
63	                </div>
64	                <button onClick={() => handleWorkerAction(scanCode)} className="bg-blue-600 px-6 rounded-xl font-black text-white h-[46px] mb-[2px] hover:bg-blue-500 shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all">OK</button>
65	                <button onClick={() => setIsScanningWorkers(true)} className="bg-amber-600 px-4 rounded-xl font-black text-white h-[46px] mb-[2px] hover:bg-amber-500 shadow-lg">📷</button>
66	            </div>
67	
68	            <div className="border-t border-slate-700 pt-4 relative z-0">
69	                <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-3 font-black">Trenutno rade na mašini ({workers.length}):</span>
70	                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto pr-2">
71	                    {workers.length === 0 && <span className="text-xs text-slate-600 font-bold italic">Nema prijavljenih radnika.</span>}
72	                    {workers.map(w => (
73	                        <div key={w.id} className="bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30 pl-4 pr-1 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] flex items-center gap-3 font-bold shadow-lg animate-in fade-in">
74	                            <div>
75	                                <span>{w.radnik_ime}</span>
76	                                <span className="text-[8px] opacity-60 ml-2 italic">od {new Date(w.vrijeme_prijave).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}</span>
77	                            </div>
78	                            <button onClick={() => handleWorkerAction(w.radnik_ime)} className="bg-red-900/50 text-red-500 w-6 h-6 rounded-full hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white transition-all font-black flex items-center justify-center" title="Odjavi radnika">✕</button>
79	                        </div>
80	                    ))}
81	                </div>
82	            </div>
83	            
84	            {isScanningWorkers && <ScannerOverlay onScan={(text) => { handleWorkerAction(text); setIsScanningWorkers(false); }} onClose={() => setIsScanningWorkers(false)} />}
85	        </div>
86	    );
87	}
