=== app/modules/AnalitikaModule.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import { Flex } from '@tremor/react';
5	import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Settings } from 'lucide-react';
6	import { useSaaS } from '../utils/useSaaS';
7	
8	import TabProrezAnalitika from '../components/TabProrezAnalitika';
9	import TabDoradaAnalitika from '../components/TabDoradaAnalitika';
10	import TabFinansijeAnalitika from '../components/TabFinansijeAnalitika';
11	import TabAiAnalitika from '../components/TabAiAnalitika';
12	import TabUkupnoAnalitika from '../components/TabUkupnoAnalitika';
13	
14	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
15	
16	export default function AnalitikaModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
17	    
18	    const saas = useSaaS('analitika_glavna', {
19	        boja_pozadine: '#090e17',
20	        boja_kartice: '#1e293b',
21	        boja_akcenta: '#10b981'
22	    });
23	
24	    const danasnjiDatum = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
25	    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('prorez'); 
26	    
27	    const [tipDatuma, setTipDatuma] = useState('dan'); 
28	    const [datumOd, setDatumOd] = useState(danasnjiDatum);
29	    const [datumDo, setDatumDo] = useState(danasnjiDatum);
30	    const [isPeriodic, setIsPeriodic] = useState(false);
31	    
32	    const [masinaFilter, setMasinaFilter] = useState('SVE');
33	    const [sveMasineIzBaze, setSveMasineIzBaze] = useState([]);
34	
35	    useEffect(() => {
36	        supabase.from('masine').select('naziv, dozvoljeni_moduli').then(({data}) => {
37	            if(data) setSveMasineIzBaze(data);
38	        });
39	    }, []);
40	
41	    const dostupneMasine = useMemo(() => {
42	        const filtrirane = sveMasineIzBaze.filter(m => {
43	            if (!m.dozvoljeni_moduli) return true; 
44	            const dozvole = m.dozvoljeni_moduli.toLowerCase();
45	            
46	            if (activeTab === 'prorez') return dozvole.includes('pilana') || dozvole.includes('prorez');
47	            if (activeTab === 'dorada') return dozvole.includes('dorada');
48	            return true;
49	        });
50	
51	        const nazivi = filtrirane.map(m => m.naziv);
52	        if (masinaFilter !== 'SVE' && !nazivi.includes(masinaFilter)) {
53	            setMasinaFilter('SVE');
54	        }
55	
56	        return nazivi;
57	    }, [activeTab, sveMasineIzBaze]);
58	
59	    const setBrziDatum = (tip) => {
60	        const danas = new Date();
61	        setTipDatuma('period'); setIsPeriodic(true);
62	        if (tip === '7d') { setDatumOd(new Date(danas.getTime() - 6*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0]); setDatumDo(danasnjiDatum); } 
63	        else if (tip === 'mjesec') { setDatumOd(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth(), 1).toISOString().split('T')[0]); setDatumDo(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth() + 1, 0).toISOString().split('T')[0]); } 
64	        else if (tip === 'prosli_mjesec') { setDatumOd(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth() - 1, 1).toISOString().split('T')[0]); setDatumDo(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth(), 0).toISOString().split('T')[0]); }
65	    };
66	
67	    const shiftDate = (n) => { const d = new Date(datumOd); d.setDate(d.getDate()+n); const iso = d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; setDatumOd(iso); setDatumDo(iso); };
68	
69	    return (
70	        <div className="min-h-screen p-4 md:p-8 pb-24 font-sans transition-colors duration-500" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_pozadine }}>
71	            
72	            <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto flex flex-col lg:flex-row justify-between items-center p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-xl mb-6 gap-4 border print:hidden" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice, borderColor: '#1e293b' }}>
73	                
74	                <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-4 md:gap-6 w-full lg:w-auto overflow-x-auto">
75	                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
76	                        <button onClick={onExit} className="bg-theme-panel text-slate-400 hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-theme-text px-4 h-10 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase transition-all shadow-md shrink-0">← Meni</button>
77	                    </div>
78	                    
79	                    <nav className="flex gap-2 bg-black/20 p-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/5 overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap shadow-inner">
80	                        {['prorez', 'dorada', 'ukupno', 'finansije', 'ai kontrolor'].map(t => (
81	                            <button key={t} onClick={() => setActiveTab(t)} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-bold uppercase transition-all ${activeTab === t ? 'text-theme-text shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-theme-text hover:bg-white/5'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: activeTab === t ? saas.ui.boja_akcenta : 'transparent' }}>
82	                                {t}
83	                            </button>
84	                        ))}
85	                    </nav>
86	                </div>
87	                
88	                <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-4 w-full lg:w-auto justify-end">
89	                    
90	                    {(activeTab === 'prorez' || activeTab === 'dorada') && (
91	                       <select value={masinaFilter} onChange={e => setMasinaFilter(e.target.value)} className="bg-black/20 text-slate-300 p-2 h-10 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold border border-white/5 outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 shadow-inner uppercase tracking-widest [&>option]:bg-theme-card [&>option]:text-theme-text">
92	                       <option value="SVE">SVE MAŠINE</option>
93	                       {dostupneMasine.map(m => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
94	                   </select>
95	                    )}
96	
97	                    <Flex className="bg-black/20 p-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/5 gap-1 shadow-inner w-full md:w-auto">
98	                        <button onClick={() => { setTipDatuma('dan'); setIsPeriodic(false); setDatumDo(datumOd); }} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase transition-all ${!isPeriodic?'bg-slate-700 text-theme-text':'text-slate-500 hover:text-theme-text'}`}>Dan</button>
99	                        <button onClick={() => { setTipDatuma('period'); setIsPeriodic(true); }} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase transition-all ${isPeriodic?'bg-slate-700 text-theme-text':'text-slate-500 hover:text-theme-text'}`}>Period</button>
100	                    </Flex>
101	        
102	                    <Flex className="bg-black/20 p-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/5 gap-2 shadow-inner w-full md:w-auto flex-wrap">
103	                        {!isPeriodic ? (
104	                            <>
105	                                <button onClick={()=>shiftDate(-1)} className="w-8 h-8 bg-theme-panel rounded hover:bg-slate-600 font-black text-theme-text flex items-center justify-center transition-all"><ChevronLeft size={16}/></button>
106	                                <div className="flex items-center justify-center bg-theme-card px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-theme-border h-8">
107	                                    <input type="date" value={datumOd} onChange={e=>{setDatumOd(e.target.value); setDatumDo(e.target.value);}} style={{ colorScheme: 'dark' }} className="bg-transparent text-slate-300 font-bold text-xs md:text-sm tracking-widest outline-none cursor-pointer uppercase" />
108	                                </div>
109	                                <button onClick={()=>shiftDate(1)} className="w-8 h-8 bg-theme-panel rounded hover:bg-slate-600 font-black text-theme-text flex items-center justify-center transition-all"><ChevronRight size={16}/></button>
110	                            </>
111	                        ) : (
112	                            <>
113	                                <input type="date" value={datumOd} onChange={e=>setDatumOd(e.target.value)} style={{ colorScheme: 'dark' }} className="bg-theme-card border border-theme-border text-slate-300 font-bold text-xs p-1.5 rounded h-8 outline-none" />
114	                                <span className="text-slate-600 font-black">-</span>
115	                                <input type="date" value={datumDo} onChange={e=>setDatumDo(e.target.value)} style={{ colorScheme: 'dark' }} className="bg-theme-card border border-theme-border text-slate-300 font-bold text-xs p-1.5 rounded h-8 outline-none" />
116	                                <div className="flex gap-1 ml-2 border-l border-theme-border pl-2">
117	                                    <button onClick={()=>setBrziDatum('7d')} className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-theme-panel hover:bg-theme-accent hover:text-theme-text rounded text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-slate-300 transition-colors">7 Dana</button>
118	                                    <button onClick={()=>setBrziDatum('mjesec')} className="px-2 py-1.5 bg-theme-panel hover:bg-theme-accent hover:text-theme-text rounded text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-slate-300 transition-colors">Ovaj Mj</button>
119	                                </div>
120	                            </>
121	                        )}
122	                    </Flex>
123	
124	                    {user?.uloga === 'superadmin' && (
125	                        <button onClick={saas.pokreniEdit} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase hover:bg-amber-500 hover:text-theme-text transition-all">
126	                            <Settings size={14} /> UI
127	                        </button>
128	                    )}
129	                </div>
130	            </div>
131	
132	            {saas.isEditMode && (
133	                <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto mb-6 bg-amber-900/20 p-6 rounded-box flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-center justify-between border-2 border-amber-500/50 shadow-2xl">
134	                    <div>
135	                        <h2 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-lg tracking-widest">SaaS Boje Analitike</h2>
136	                        <p className="text-amber-200/70 text-xs mt-1 font-bold">Podesite globalne boje menija i kartica.</p>
137	                    </div>
138	                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
139	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black flex items-center gap-2">Pozadina: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_pozadine} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_pozadine: e.target.value})} className="w-8 h-8 rounded cursor-pointer border-none bg-transparent" /></label>
140	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black flex items-center gap-2">Boja Akcenta: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_akcenta} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_akcenta: e.target.value})} className="w-8 h-8 rounded cursor-pointer border-none bg-transparent" /></label>
141	                    </div>
142	                    <div className="flex gap-2">

144	                        <button onClick={saas.spasiDizajn} className="px-6 py-3 bg-emerald-600 text-theme-text rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.4)] hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-all">💾 Spasi Dizajn</button>
145	                    </div>

151	                <TabProrezAnalitika datumOd={datumOd} datumDo={datumDo} masinaFilter={masinaFilter} saas={saas} header={header} />
152	                 )}

159	                {activeTab === 'finansije' && (

161	                )}
162	                {activeTab === 'ai kontrolor' && (
163	                <TabAiAnalitika saas={saas} />
164	                )}
165	            </div>
166	
167	        </div>
168	    );
169	}

=== app/modules/BlagajnaModule.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import MasterHeader from '../components/MasterHeader';
5	import MasterSearch from '../components/MasterSearch';
6	import PametniDialog from '../components/PametniDialog';
7	import { printDokument } from '../utils/printHelpers';
8	import { useSaaS } from '../utils/useSaaS';
9	
10	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
11	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
12	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
13	
14	export default function BlagajnaModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
15	    const loggedUser = JSON.parse(typeof window !== 'undefined' ? localStorage.getItem('smart_timber_user') || '{}' : '{}');
16	
17	    // SaaS God Mode Integracija
18	    const saas = useSaaS('blagajna_modul', {
19	        boja_kartice: '#1e293b',
20	        boja_slova: '#ffffff',
21	        velicina_naslova: '16',
22	        naslov_glavni: '💵 BLAGAJNA I FINANSIJE'
23	    });
24	
25	    const [tab, setTab] = useState('unos');
26	    const [sveTransakcije, setSveTransakcije] = useState([]); 
27	    const [kategorije, setKategorije] = useState([]);
28	    const [masine, setMasine] = useState([]);
29	    const [radnici, setRadnici] = useState([]);
30	
31	    // PAMETNI DIJALOZI
32	    const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ isOpen: false });
33	    const prikaziDialog = (opcije) => setDialog({ isOpen: true, confirmText: 'POTVRDI', cancelText: 'ZATVORI', ...opcije });
34	    const zatvoriDialog = () => setDialog({ isOpen: false });
35	
36	    const generisiID = () => `KASA-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000)}`;
37	
38	    const formatirajDatum = (isoString) => {
39	        if(!isoString) return '';
40	        if(isoString.includes('.')) return isoString; 
41	        const [y, m, d] = isoString.split('T')[0].split('-');
42	        return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`;
43	    };
44	
45	    const [sviDokumenti, setSviDokumenti] = useState([]);
46	    const [skenDetalji, setSkenDetalji] = useState(null); 
47	    const [prikazDokumenta, setPrikazDokumenta] = useState(null);
48	
49	    const [form, setForm] = useState({
50	        id: generisiID(), tip: 'ULAZ', kategorija: '', iznos: '', opis: '',
51	        racun_id: '', masina_naziv: '', radnik_ime: '', datum: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
52	    });
53	
54	    const [skener, setSkener] = useState('');
55	
56	    useEffect(() => { load(); }, []); 
57	
58	    const load = async () => {
59	        const { data: kat } = await supabase.from('blagajna_kategorije').select('*');
60	        setKategorije(kat || []);
61	        if (kat && kat.length > 0 && !form.kategorija) {
62	            setForm(f => ({ ...f, kategorija: kat.find(k => k.tip === f.tip)?.naziv || '' }));
63	        }
64	
65	        const { data: rn } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('id, kupac_naziv, status').neq('status', 'ZAVRŠENO');
66	        const { data: otp } = await supabase.from('otpremnice').select('id, kupac_naziv, status').neq('status', 'ISPORUČENO');
67	        const { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('id, kupac_naziv, status').in('status', ['POTVRĐENA', 'REALIZOVANA ✅']);
68	        const { data: rac } = await supabase.from('racuni').select('id, kupac_naziv, status').neq('status', 'NAPLAĆENO');
69	        
70	        setSviDokumenti([
71	            ...(rac || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, kupac: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Račun' })),
72	            ...(pon || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, kupac: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Ponuda' })),
73	            ...(rn || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, kupac: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Radni Nalog' })),
74	            ...(otp || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, kupac: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Otpremnica' }))
75	        ]);
76	
77	        const { data: b } = await supabase.from('blagajna').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
78	        setSveTransakcije(b || []);
79	
80	        const { data: m } = await supabase.from('masine').select('naziv'); setMasine(m || []);
81	        const { data: rad } = await supabase.from('radnici').select('ime_prezime'); setRadnici(rad || []);
82	    };
83	
84	    const zapisiU_Log = async (akcija, detalji) => {
85	        await supabase.from('sistem_audit_log').insert([{ korisnik: loggedUser.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat', akcija, detalji }]);
86	    };
87	
88	    const otvoriDokument = async (docId) => {
89	        if(!docId) return;
90	        if(docId.startsWith('RAC-')) {
91	            const {data} = await supabase.from('racuni').select('*').eq('id', docId).maybeSingle();
92	            if(data) setPrikazDokumenta({ tip: 'RAČUN', data }); else prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: 'Dokument nije pronađen u bazi.', onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
93	        } else if(docId.startsWith('PON-')) {
94	            const {data} = await supabase.from('ponude').select('*').eq('id', docId).maybeSingle();
95	            if(data) setPrikazDokumenta({ tip: 'PONUDA', data }); else prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: 'Dokument nije pronađen u bazi.', onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
96	        } else {
97	            prikaziDialog({ tip: 'info', naslov: 'Informacija', poruka: "Sistem za sada može prikazati samo Račune i Ponude direktno iz blagajne.", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
98	        }
99	    };
100	
101	    const handleTipChange = (noviTip) => {
102	        const defKat = kategorije.find(k => k.tip === noviTip)?.naziv || '';
103	        setForm({ ...form, tip: noviTip, kategorija: defKat, racun_id: '', masina_naziv: '', radnik_ime: '', iznos: '', opis: '' });
104	        setSkenDetalji(null);
105	    };
106	
107	    const izvrsiSkeniranje = async (trazeniBroj) => {
108	        const val = trazeniBroj.trim();
109	        if (!val) return;
110	        setSkenDetalji(null); 
111	
112	        let glavnaVeza = null; let ukupnoZaPlatiti = 0; let kupac = ''; let tipSkenera = '';
113	
114	        let { data: rac } = await supabase.from('racuni').select('id, ukupno_sa_pdv, kupac_naziv').eq('id', val).maybeSingle();
115	        if (rac) { glavnaVeza = rac.id; ukupnoZaPlatiti = rac.ukupno_sa_pdv; kupac = rac.kupac_naziv; tipSkenera = 'RAČUN'; }
116	
117	        if (!glavnaVeza) {
118	            let { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('id, ukupno_sa_pdv, kupac_naziv').eq('id', val).maybeSingle();
119	            if (pon) { glavnaVeza = pon.id; ukupnoZaPlatiti = pon.ukupno_sa_pdv; kupac = pon.kupac_naziv; tipSkenera = 'PONUDA'; }
120	        }
121	
122	        if (!glavnaVeza) {
123	            let { data: rn } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('broj_ponude').eq('id', val).maybeSingle();
124	            if (rn && rn.broj_ponude) {
125	                let { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('id, ukupno_sa_pdv, kupac_naziv').eq('id', rn.broj_ponude).maybeSingle();
126	                if (pon) { glavnaVeza = pon.id; ukupnoZaPlatiti = pon.ukupno_sa_pdv; kupac = pon.kupac_naziv; tipSkenera = 'RADNI NALOG'; }
127	            }
128	        }
129	
130	        if (!glavnaVeza) {
131	            let { data: otp } = await supabase.from('otpremnice').select('broj_veze').eq('id', val).maybeSingle();
132	            if (otp && otp.broj_veze) {
133	                let veza = otp.broj_veze;
134	                let { data: rn } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('broj_ponude').eq('id', veza).maybeSingle();
135	                if (rn && rn.broj_ponude) veza = rn.broj_ponude;
136	                let { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('id, ukupno_sa_pdv, kupac_naziv').eq('id', veza).maybeSingle();
137	                if (pon) { glavnaVeza = pon.id; ukupnoZaPlatiti = pon.ukupno_sa_pdv; kupac = pon.kupac_naziv; tipSkenera = 'OTPREMNICA'; }
138	            }
139	        }
140	
141	        if (ukupnoZaPlatiti > 0) {
142	            const vecUplaceno = sveTransakcije.filter(t => t.racun_id === glavnaVeza && t.tip === 'ULAZ').reduce((a, b) => a + parseFloat(b.iznos), 0);
143	            let preostalo = (ukupnoZaPlatiti - vecUplaceno).toFixed(2);
144	            
145	            setSkenDetalji({ tip: tipSkenera, skenirano: val, glavna_veza: glavnaVeza, kupac, ukupno: ukupnoZaPlatiti, placeno: vecUplaceno, preostalo });
146	
147	            if (preostalo <= 0) {
148	                setSkener(''); 
149	                return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Plaćeno', poruka: `✅ Dugovanje nula! Ovaj dokument je već u potpunosti isplaćen.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
150	            }
151	
152	            setForm({
153	                ...form, tip: 'ULAZ', 
154	                kategorija: kategorije.find(k=>k.naziv.includes('Račun') || k.naziv.includes('Avans'))?.naziv || kategorije[0]?.naziv,
155	                iznos: preostalo, racun_id: glavnaVeza, 
156	                opis: `Naplata po skeniranom: ${tipSkenera} (${val})`
157	            });
158	            setSkener(''); 
159	        } else {
160	            prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Nije pronađeno', poruka: `❌ Sistem nije uspio pronaći finansijski trag za dokument: ${val}.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
161	        }
162	    };
163	
164	    const snimiTransakciju = async () => {
165	        if (!form.iznos || parseFloat(form.iznos) <= 0) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fali iznos', poruka: "Unesite ispravan iznos!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
166	        if (!form.kategorija) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fali kategorija', poruka: "Odaberite kategoriju!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
167	
168	        const payload = {
169	            id: form.id, tip: form.tip, kategorija: form.kategorija,
170	            iznos: parseFloat(form.iznos), opis: form.opis || null,
171	            racun_id: form.racun_id || null, masina_naziv: form.masina_naziv || null,
172	            radnik_ime: form.radnik_ime || null, datum: form.datum,
173	            vrijeme_tekst: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE'),
174	            snimio_korisnik: loggedUser.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat'
175	        };
176	
177	        const { error } = await supabase.from('blagajna').insert([payload]);
178	        if (error) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Baza Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
179	
180	        if (payload.tip === 'ULAZ' && payload.racun_id && payload.racun_id.startsWith('RAC-')) {
181	            const {data: r} = await supabase.from('racuni').select('ukupno_sa_pdv').eq('id', payload.racun_id).maybeSingle();
182	            if (r) {
183	                const sveUplate = sveTransakcije.filter(t => t.racun_id === payload.racun_id).reduce((a,b)=>a+parseFloat(b.iznos), 0) + payload.iznos;
184	                if (sveUplate >= r.ukupno_sa_pdv) {
185	                    await supabase.from('racuni').update({ status: 'NAPLAĆENO' }).eq('id', payload.racun_id);
186	                } else {
187	                    await supabase.from('racuni').update({ status: 'DJELOMIČNO PLAĆENO' }).eq('id', payload.racun_id);
188	                }
189	            }
190	        }
191	
192	        await zapisiU_Log('KASA_UNOS', `Upisan ${payload.tip} od ${payload.iznos} KM u blagajnu (${payload.kategorija}).`);
193	        
194	        prikaziDialog({
195	            tip: 'uspjeh',
196	            naslov: 'Proknjiženo!',
197	            poruka: "Transakcija je uspješno snimljena u blagajnu.\nDa li želite isprintati Potvrdu o Uplati/Isplati?",
198	            confirmText: '🖨️ DA, ŠTAMPAJ',
199	            cancelText: '✕ NE',
200	            onConfirm: () => { printPotvrda(payload); zatvoriDialog(); setTab('pregled'); },
201	            onCancel: () => { zatvoriDialog(); setTab('pregled'); }
202	        });
203	        
204	        setForm({ ...form, id: generisiID(), iznos: '', opis: '', racun_id: '', masina_naziv: '', radnik_ime: '' });
205	        setSkenDetalji(null);
206	        load(); 
207	    };
208	
209	    const obrisiTransakciju = async (t) => {
210	        prikaziDialog({
211	            tip: 'upozorenje',
212	            naslov: 'Brisanje Transakcije',
213	            poruka: `Da li ste sigurni da želite OBRISATI ovu transakciju od ${t.iznos} KM?\nUkoliko je greška u unosu uplaćenog računa, napravite STORNIRANJE umjesto brisanja.`,
214	            confirmText: '🗑️ OBRIŠI',
215	            cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
216	            onConfirm: async () => {
217	                await supabase.from('blagajna').delete().eq('id', t.id);
218	                await zapisiU_Log('KASA_BRISANJE', `Obrisana transakcija ${t.id} od ${t.iznos} KM (${t.kategorija}).`);
219	                load();
220	                zatvoriDialog();
221	            },
222	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
223	        });
224	    };
225	
226	    const printPotvrda = (t) => {
227	        const title = t.tip === 'ULAZ' ? 'POTVRDA O UPLATI' : 'POTVRDA O ISPLATI';
228	        const color = t.tip === 'ULAZ' ? '#10b981' : '#ef4444';
229	        
230	        const html = `
231	            <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; padding: 40px; color: #1e293b; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; border: 2px solid ${color}; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 50px;">
232	                <div style="text-align: center; border-bottom: 2px dashed #cbd5e1; padding-bottom: 20px; margin-bottom: 30px;">
233	                    <h1 style="color: ${color}; margin: 0; font-size: 28px;">${title}</h1>
234	                    <p style="color: #64748b; font-weight: bold; margin-top: 5px;">Broj: ${t.id}</p>
235	                </div>
236	                <table style="width: 100%; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 40px; line-height: 2;">
237	                    <tr><td style="color:#64748b; width:40%;">Datum i Vrijeme:</td><td style="font-weight:bold;">${formatirajDatum(t.datum)} u ${t.vrijeme_tekst}</td></tr>
238	                    <tr><td style="color:#64748b;">Kategorija:</td><td style="font-weight:bold;">${t.kategorija}</td></tr>
239	                    ${t.racun_id ? `<tr><td style="color:#64748b;">Vezni Dokument:</td><td style="font-weight:bold;">${t.racun_id}</td></tr>` : ''}
240	                    ${t.radnik_ime ? `<tr><td style="color:#64748b;">Zaposlenik:</td><td style="font-weight:bold;">${t.radnik_ime}</td></tr>` : ''}
241	                    <tr><td style="color:#64748b; vertical-align: top;">Opis / Svrha:</td><td style="font-weight:bold; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 10px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 8px;">${t.opis || '-'}</td></tr>
242	                </table>
243	                <div style="background: ${color}20; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid ${color}; margin-bottom: 50px;">
244	                    <span style="font-size: 14px; color: #475569; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold; display: block; margin-bottom: 5px;">Iznos transakcije</span>
245	                    <span style="font-size: 36px; font-weight: 900; color: ${color};">${parseFloat(t.iznos).toFixed(2)} KM</span>
246	                </div>
247	                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; text-align: center; margin-top: 60px;">
248	                    <div style="width: 40%;"><div style="border-bottom: 1px solid #94a3b8; height: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px;"></div><span style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold;">Blagajnik ( ${t.snimio_korisnik} )</span></div>
249	                    <div style="width: 40%;"><div style="border-bottom: 1px solid #94a3b8; height: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px;"></div><span style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold;">Uplatilac / Primalac</span></div>
250	                </div>
251	            </div>
252	        `;
253	        printDokument(title, t.id, formatirajDatum(t.datum), html, color);
254	    };
255	
256	    const aktivniDatum = header?.datum || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
257	    const prikazaneTransakcije = sveTransakcije.filter(t => t.datum === aktivniDatum);
258	    
259	    const periodUlaz = prikazaneTransakcije.filter(t => t.tip === 'ULAZ').reduce((acc, t) => acc + parseFloat(t.iznos), 0);
260	    const periodIzlaz = prikazaneTransakcije.filter(t => t.tip === 'IZLAZ').reduce((acc, t) => acc + parseFloat(t.iznos), 0);
261	    const periodPromet = periodUlaz - periodIzlaz;
262	    
263	    const apsolutnoStanjeKase = sveTransakcije.filter(t => t.tip === 'ULAZ').reduce((a,b)=>a+parseFloat(b.iznos),0) - sveTransakcije.filter(t => t.tip === 'IZLAZ').reduce((a,b)=>a+parseFloat(b.iznos),0);
264	
265	    const unikatneKatUlaz = [...new Set(prikazaneTransakcije.filter(t => t.tip === 'ULAZ').map(t => t.kategorija))];
266	    const unikatneKatIzlaz = [...new Set(prikazaneTransakcije.filter(t => t.tip === 'IZLAZ').map(t => t.kategorija))];
267	
268	    return (
269	        <div className="p-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_slova }}>
270	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
271	            
272	            {prikazDokumenta && (
273	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-[#090e17]/90 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-sm animate-in fade-in">
274	                    <div className="bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] border-2 border-emerald-500 p-8 rounded-box shadow-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
275	                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-theme-border pb-4 mb-4">
276	                            <div>
277	                                <h3 className="text-emerald-400 font-black uppercase text-xs">Detalji: {prikazDokumenta.tip}</h3>
278	                                <p className="text-theme-text text-xl font-black mt-1">{prikazDokumenta.data.id}</p>
279	                            </div>
280	                            <button onClick={() => setPrikazDokumenta(null)} className="text-red-400 bg-theme-panel hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-theme-text px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-black uppercase transition-all shadow-lg">✕ Zatvori</button>
281	                        </div>
282	                        <div className="space-y-4">
283	                            <div className="bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
284	                                <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black">Kupac</p>
285	                                <p className="text-theme-text font-black text-lg">{prikazDokumenta.data.kupac_naziv}</p>
286	                            </div>
287	                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
288	                                <div className="bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
289	                                    <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black">Datum</p>
290	                                    <p className="text-theme-text font-bold">{formatirajDatum(prikazDokumenta.data.datum)}</p>
291	                                </div>
292	                                <div className="bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
293	                                    <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black">Status</p>
294	                                    <p className={`font-black uppercase ${prikazDokumenta.data.status.includes('NAPLAĆENO') || prikazDokumenta.data.status.includes('POTVRĐ') ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-red-400'}`}>{prikazDokumenta.data.status}</p>
295	                                </div>
296	                            </div>
297	
298	                            {prikazDokumenta.data.stavke_jsonb && (
299	                                <div className="mt-4">
300	                                    <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black mb-2">Stavke na dokumentu:</p>
301	                                    <div className="bg-theme-card border border-theme-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner">
302	                                        <table className="w-full text-xs text-left">
303	                                            <thead className="bg-theme-panel text-slate-400">
304	                                                <tr><th className="p-3">Šifra i Proizvod</th><th className="p-3 text-center">Količina</th><th className="p-3 text-right">Ukupno</th></tr>
305	                                            </thead>
306	                                            <tbody className="text-theme-text">
307	                                                {prikazDokumenta.data.stavke_jsonb.map((s,i) => (
308	                                                    <tr key={i} className="border-t border-theme-border hover:bg-theme-panel/50 transition-colors">
309	                                                        <td className="p-3 font-bold">{s.sifra} <span className="text-slate-400 font-normal ml-1 block mt-1">{s.naziv}</span></td>
310	                                                        <td className="p-3 text-center text-theme-accent font-bold">{s.kolicina_obracun} {s.jm_obracun}</td>
311	                                                        <td className="p-3 text-right font-black text-emerald-400">{s.ukupno?.toFixed(2)}</td>
312	                                                    </tr>
313	                                                ))}
314	                                            </tbody>
315	                                        </table>
316	                                    </div>
317	                                </div>
318	                            )}
319	
320	                            <div className="bg-emerald-900/20 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-500/30 text-center mt-6 shadow-inner">
321	                                <p className="text-[10px] text-emerald-400 uppercase font-black">Ukupno za naplatu</p>
322	                                <p className="text-3xl text-theme-text font-black">{prikazDokumenta.data.ukupno_sa_pdv} {prikazDokumenta.data.valuta || 'KM'}</p>
323	                            </div>
324	                        </div>
325	                    </div>
326	                </div>
327	            )}
328	
329	            {saas.isEditMode && (
330	                <div className="bg-black/60 p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-amber-500/50 mb-6 shadow-2xl">
331	                    <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-sm mb-4">God Mode - Kontrole Dizajna</h3>
332	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
333	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja Pozadine (Kartice): <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_kartice} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_kartice: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
334	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja SVIH slova: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_slova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_slova: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
335	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Veličina naslova (px): <input type="number" value={saas.ui.velicina_naslova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, velicina_naslova: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 font-mono rounded" /></label>
336	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black md:col-span-3">Glavni Naslov: <input type="text" value={saas.ui.naslov_glavni} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, naslov_glavni: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 rounded" /></label>
337	                    </div>
338	                </div>
339	            )}
340	
341	            {tab === 'analitika' || tab === 'pregled' ? (
342	                <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-emerald-500" user={user} hideMasina={true} modulIme="blagajna" saas={saas} />
343	            ) : (
344	                <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-4 rounded-box border border-emerald-500/30 shadow-lg" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
345	                    <button onClick={onExit} className="bg-theme-panel text-[10px] px-4 py-2 rounded-xl uppercase font-black hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all">← Meni</button>
346	                    <h2 className="text-emerald-400 font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-xs" style={{ fontSize: `${saas.ui.velicina_naslova}px` }}>{saas.ui.naslov_glavni}</h2>
347	                    <div className="w-20"></div>
348	                </div>
349	            )}
350	
351	            <div className="flex bg-theme-panel p-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
352	                <button onClick={() => setTab('unos')} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all ${tab === 'unos' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-theme-text'}`}>
353	                    ➕ Unos u Kasu
354	                </button>
355	                <button onClick={() => setTab('pregled')} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all ${tab === 'pregled' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-theme-text'}`}>
356	                    📋 Dnevnik Kase
357	                </button>
358	                <button onClick={() => setTab('analitika')} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all ${tab === 'analitika' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-theme-text'}`}>
359	                    📊 Analiza Troškova
360	                </button>
361	            </div>
362	
363	            {tab === 'unos' && (
364	                <div className="space-y-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto animate-in slide-in-from-left">
365	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border border-blue-500/50 p-6 rounded-box flex gap-3 items-center shadow-2xl relative z-[60]" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
366	                        <div className="text-2xl hidden md:block">📷</div>
367	                        <div className="flex-1 relative overflow-visible">
368	                            <label className="text-[10px] text-theme-accent uppercase font-black block mb-2 ml-2">Pametni sken (Učitaj PONUDU, RN ili RAČUN za naplatu)</label>
369	                            
370	                            {/* ZAMJENA: Koristimo MasterSearch umjesto onog ručnog koda */}
371	                            <MasterSearch 
372	                                data={sviDokumenti} 
373	                                poljaZaPretragu={['id', 'kupac']} 
374	                                value={skener}
375	                                onSelect={(doc) => izvrsiSkeniranje(doc.id)} 
376	                                placeholder="Skeniraj ili ukucaj broj..."
377	                                renderItem={(item) => (
378	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center w-full">
379	                                        <div><span className="text-theme-text font-black">{item.id}</span> <span className="text-[10px] text-blue-300 ml-2 uppercase font-bold">{item.tip}</span></div>

381	                                    </div>
382	                                )}

'bg-emerald-900/30 border-emerald-500 text-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]' : 'bg-theme-card border-theme-border text-slate-600 hover:border-emerald-900 hover:text-emerald-500'}`}>+ ULAZ NOVCA</button>

417	                                    {kategorije.filter(k=>k.tip===form.tip).map(k => <option key={k.id} value={k.naziv}>{k.naziv}</option>)}

436	                                        onSelect={(doc) => { setForm({...form, racun_id: doc.id}); izvrsiSkeniranje(doc.id); }}

492	                                <select onChange={(e) => setHeader({...header, blagajnaFilterKat: e.target.value})} className="bg-theme-card text-xs text-theme-text p-3.5 rounded-xl border border-theme-border outline-none font-bold uppercase flex-1 shadow-inner focus:border-blue-500 cursor-pointer">

566	                                if (suma === 0) return null;
567	                                return (

572	                                )

574	                        </div>
575	                    </div>

579	                        <div className="space-y-3">
580	                            {masine.every(m => prikazaneTransakcije.filter(t => t.masina_naziv === m.naziv).reduce((a, t) => a + parseFloat(t.iznos), 0) === 0) && <p className="text-slate-500 text-xs p-4 bg-theme-card rounded-xl border border-theme-border text-center">Nema troškova mašina.</p>}
581	                            {masine.map(m => {

583	                                if (trosakMasine === 0) return null;
584	                                return (

587	                                        <span className="text-amber-400 font-black font-mono tracking-widest bg-amber-900/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg border border-amber-500/20">- {trosakMasine.toFixed(2)} KM</span>
588	                                    </div>
589	                                )
590	                            })}
591	                        </div>
592	                    </div>

594	                    <div className="bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-box border border-blue-500/30 shadow-2xl" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
595	                        <h3 className="text-theme-accent font-black uppercase text-xs mb-4">👷 Isplate Radnicima na dan: {formatirajDatum(aktivniDatum)}</h3>
596	                        <div className="space-y-3">
597	                            {radnici.every(r => prikazaneTransakcije.filter(t => t.radnik_ime === r.ime_prezime).reduce((a, t) => a + parseFloat(t.iznos), 0) === 0) && <p className="text-slate-500 text-xs p-4 bg-theme-card rounded-xl border border-theme-border text-center">Nema isplata radnicima.</p>}
598	                            {radnici.map(r => {
599	                                const radnikIsplate = prikazaneTransakcije.filter(t => t.radnik_ime === r.ime_prezime).reduce((a, t) => a + parseFloat(t.iznos), 0);
600	                                if (radnikIsplate === 0) return null;
601	                                return (
602	                                    <div key={r.ime_prezime} className="bg-theme-card p-4 rounded-xl border border-theme-border flex justify-between items-center shadow-md">
603	                                        <span className="text-theme-text text-sm font-bold">{r.ime_prezime}</span>
604	                                        <span className="text-theme-accent font-black font-mono tracking-widest bg-blue-900/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg border border-blue-500/20">{radnikIsplate.toFixed(2)} KM</span>
605	                                    </div>
606	                                )
607	                            })}
608	                        </div>
609	                    </div>
610	                </div>
611	            )}
612	        </div>
613	    );
614	}

11	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
12	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
13	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
14	
15	const imaSirovinu = (val) => {
16	    if (!val) return false;
17	    if (Array.isArray(val) && val.length > 0) return true;
18	    if (typeof val === 'string') {
19	        const clean = val.replace(/[{}"[\]\s]/g, '');
20	        return clean.length > 0;
21	    }
22	    return false;
23	};
24	
25	export default function DashboardModule({ user, onExit }) {
26	    
27	    const saas = useSaaS('dashboard_analitika', {
28	        boja_pozadine: '#090e17',
29	        boja_kartice: '#111827',
30	        boja_akcenta_pilana: '#10b981', 
31	        boja_akcenta_dorada: '#3b82f6', 
32	        boja_akcenta_finansije: '#f59e0b', 
33	    });
34	
35	    // OVA FUNKCIJA SPREMA TEKST TEK KADA KLIKNEŠ VAN POLJA ILI PRITISNEŠ ENTER
36	    const spremiIzmjenu = (storageKey, novaVrijednost) => {
37	        localStorage.setItem(storageKey, novaVrijednost);
38	        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('saas_updated')); // Osvježi AppShell meni i logo odmah
39	    };
40	
41	    const customSpasiDizajn = () => {
42	        saas.spasiDizajn();
43	        setTimeout(() => alert("✅ Postavke dizajna su uspješno spremljene!"), 300);
44	    };
45	
46	    const danasnjiDatum = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
47	    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('pilana');
48	    const [tipDatuma, setTipDatuma] = useState('dan'); 
49	    const [datumOd, setDatumOd] = useState(danasnjiDatum);
50	    const [datumDo, setDatumDo] = useState(danasnjiDatum);
51	    const [isPeriodic, setIsPeriodic] = useState(false);
52	    
53	    const [dostupnaMjesta, setDostupnaMjesta] = useState([]);
54	    const [filterMjesto, setFilterMjesto] = useState('SVE');
55	    const [filterSmjena, setFilterSmjena] = useState('SVE');
56	  
57	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
58	  
59	    const [pilanaData, setPilanaData] = useState({ kpi: { ulaz_m3: 0, ulaz_kom: 0, avg_d: 0, izlaz_m3: 0, yield_proc: 0, trend_7d_proc: 0, trend_30d_proc: 0 }, trupci_duzine: [], izlaz_struktura: [], ucinak_brentista: [], trend_7d: [], trend_30d: [], glavna_tabela: [], zastoji: [], posada: '', trend_godisnji: [] });
60	    const [doradaData, setDoradaData] = useState({ kpi: { ulaz_m3: 0, izlaz_m3: 0, kalo_m3: 0, yield_proc: 0, trend_7d_proc: 0, operacije_count: 0 }, operacije: [], trend_7d: [], trace_blokovi: [], yieldChart: [] });
61	    const [finansijeKPI, setFinansijeKPI] = useState({ ukupnoFakturisano: 0, naplacenoGotovina: 0, naplacenoVirman: 0, nenaplacenoDug: 0, ocekivaniPDV: 0 });
62	    const [strukturaNaplate, setStrukturaNaplate] = useState([]);
63	    const [topDuznici, setTopDuznici] = useState([]);
64	
65	    useEffect(() => { ucitajAnalitiku(); }, [datumOd, datumDo, isPeriodic, filterMjesto, filterSmjena]);
66	  
67	    const setBrziDatum = (tip) => {
68	      const danas = new Date();
69	      setTipDatuma('period'); setIsPeriodic(true);
70	      if (tip === '7d') { setDatumOd(new Date(danas.getTime() - 6*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0]); setDatumDo(danasnjiDatum); } 
71	      else if (tip === 'mjesec') { setDatumOd(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth(), 1).toISOString().split('T')[0]); setDatumDo(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth() + 1, 0).toISOString().split('T')[0]); } 
72	      else if (tip === 'prosli_mjesec') { setDatumOd(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth() - 1, 1).toISOString().split('T')[0]); setDatumDo(new Date(danas.getFullYear(), danas.getMonth(), 0).toISOString().split('T')[0]); }
73	    };
74	  
75	    const shiftDate = (n) => { const d = new Date(datumOd); d.setDate(d.getDate()+n); const iso = d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; setDatumOd(iso); setDatumDo(iso); };
76	  
77	    const provjeriSmjenu = (vrijemeStr) => {
78	        if (filterSmjena === 'SVE' || !vrijemeStr) return true;
79	        const hour = parseInt(vrijemeStr.substring(0, 2));
80	        if (filterSmjena === '1' && hour >= 7 && hour < 15) return true;
81	        if (filterSmjena === '2' && hour >= 15 && hour < 23) return true;
82	        if (filterSmjena === '3' && (hour >= 23 || hour < 7)) return true;
83	        return false;
84	    };
85	  
86	    const ucitajAnalitiku = async () => {
87	      setLoading(true);
88	      try {
89	        const d60 = new Date(new Date(datumOd).getTime() - 60*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
90	        const d395 = new Date(new Date(datumOd).getTime() - 395*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
91	        
92	        const [tRes, pRes, plRes, dnRes, p395Res, racRes] = await Promise.all([
93	          supabase.from('trupci').select('*').gte('datum_prijema', d60).lte('datum_prijema', datumDo),
94	          supabase.from('paketi').select('*').gte('datum_yyyy_mm', d60).lte('datum_yyyy_mm', datumDo),
95	          supabase.from('prorez_log').select('*').gte('datum', d60).lte('datum', datumDo),
96	          supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').select('*').gte('datum', datumOd).lte('datum', datumDo),
97	          supabase.from('paketi').select('datum_yyyy_mm, kolicina_final, ai_sirovina_ids, brentista').gte('datum_yyyy_mm', d395).lte('datum_yyyy_mm', datumDo),
98	          supabase.from('racuni').select('*').gte('datum', datumOd).lte('datum', datumDo),
99	        ]);
100	
101	        const svaMjesta = [...new Set([...(plRes.data || []).map(x => x.mjesto), ...(pRes.data || []).map(x => x.mjesto)])].filter(Boolean);
102	        if (svaMjesta.length > 0) setDostupnaMjesta(svaMjesta);
103	
104	        // 1. PILANA
105	        const logSve = plRes.data?.filter(pl => pl.datum >= datumOd && pl.datum <= datumDo && (filterMjesto === 'SVE' || pl.mjesto === filterMjesto) && provjeriSmjenu(pl.vrijeme_unosa)) || [];
106	        const paketiSvi = pRes.data?.filter(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm >= datumOd && p.datum_yyyy_mm <= datumDo && !imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids) && (filterMjesto === 'SVE' || p.mjesto === filterMjesto) && provjeriSmjenu(p.vrijeme_tekst)) || [];
107	
108	        let p_ulaz_m3 = 0; let p_ulaz_kom = 0;
109	        const duzineMap = {}; const radniciStats = {};
110	
111	        logSve.forEach(log => {
112	            const trupac = tRes.data?.find(t => t.id === log.trupac_id);
113	            if (trupac) {
114	                const m3 = parseFloat(trupac.zapremina || 0);
115	                p_ulaz_m3 += m3; p_ulaz_kom++;
116	                const d = parseFloat(trupac.duzina || 0).toFixed(1);
117	                duzineMap[d] = (duzineMap[d] || { kom: 0, m3: 0 });
118	                duzineMap[d].kom++; duzineMap[d].m3 += parseFloat(m3.toFixed(2));
119	                const b = log.brentista || 'Nepoznat';
120	                if (!radniciStats[b]) radniciStats[b] = { ime: b, ulaz_m3: 0, izlaz_m3: 0 };
121	                radniciStats[b].ulaz_m3 += m3;
122	            }
123	        });
124	
125	        let p_izlaz_m3 = 0;
126	        const izlazStrukturaMap = {}; const dinamikaMap = {}; const ulazStrukturaMap = {};
127	
128	        logSve.forEach(log => {
129	            const trupac = tRes.data?.find(t => t.id === log.trupac_id);
130	            if (trupac) {
131	               const vrsta = trupac.vrsta || 'Ostalo';
132	               ulazStrukturaMap[vrsta] = (ulazStrukturaMap[vrsta] || { kom: 0, m3: 0 });
133	               ulazStrukturaMap[vrsta].kom++; ulazStrukturaMap[vrsta].m3 += parseFloat(trupac.zapremina || 0);
134	            }
135	        });
136	
137	        paketiSvi.forEach(p => {
138	            const m3 = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
139	            p_izlaz_m3 += m3;
140	            izlazStrukturaMap[p.naziv_proizvoda] = (izlazStrukturaMap[p.naziv_proizvoda] || 0) + m3;
141	            dinamikaMap[p.datum_yyyy_mm] = (dinamikaMap[p.datum_yyyy_mm] || 0) + m3;
142	            const b = p.brentista || 'Nepoznat';
143	            if (radniciStats[b]) radniciStats[b].izlaz_m3 += m3;
144	        });
145	
146	        const leaderboard = Object.values(radniciStats).map(r => ({
147	            ...r, izlaz_m3: r.izlaz_m3.toFixed(2),
148	            yield_proc: r.ulaz_m3 > 0 ? ((r.izlaz_m3 / r.ulaz_m3) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0,
149	            udio_firme: p_izlaz_m3 > 0 ? ((r.izlaz_m3 / p_izlaz_m3) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0
150	        })).sort((a, b) => b.izlaz_m3 - a.izlaz_m3);
151	
152	        const zastojiMap = {};
153	        (dnRes.data || []).filter(d => (d.modul === 'Prorez' || d.modul === 'Pilana') && (filterMjesto === 'SVE' || d.masina?.includes(filterMjesto)))
154	        .forEach(z => { const r = z.napomena || 'Ostalo'; zastojiMap[r] = (zastojiMap[r] || 0) + (parseInt(z.zastoj_min) || 0); });
155	        const zastojiAnaliza = Object.keys(zastojiMap).map(r => ({ razlog: r, minute: zastojiMap[r] })).sort((a,b) => b.minute - a.minute).slice(0, 5);
156	
157	        const dinamikaChart = Object.keys(dinamikaMap).sort().map(d => ({ dan: d.substring(8, 10) + '.' + d.substring(5, 7), m3: parseFloat(dinamikaMap[d].toFixed(2)) }));
158	        const ulazStrukturaArr = Object.keys(ulazStrukturaMap).map(k => ({ vrsta: k, kom: ulazStrukturaMap[k].kom, m3: parseFloat(ulazStrukturaMap[k].m3.toFixed(2)) })).sort((a,b) => b.m3 - a.m3);
159	        const ukupniIzlazStruktura = Object.keys(izlazStrukturaMap).map(k => ({ name: k, value: parseFloat(izlazStrukturaMap[k].toFixed(2)), proc: p_izlaz_m3 > 0 ? ((izlazStrukturaMap[k] / p_izlaz_m3) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0 }));
160	        const brojDana = isPeriodic ? (new Set(paketiSvi.map(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm)).size || 1) : 1;
161	        const glavniBrentista = Object.keys(radniciStats).sort((a,b) => radniciStats[b].izlaz_m3 - radniciStats[a].izlaz_m3)[0] || 'Nepoznat';
162	        
163	        const trend_godisnji = [];
164	        const imenaMjeseci = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'Maj', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Avg', 'Sep', 'Okt', 'Nov', 'Dec'];
165	        const odabraniDatumObj = new Date(datumOd);
166	
167	        for (let i = 12; i >= 0; i--) {
168	            const d = new Date(odabraniDatumObj.getFullYear(), odabraniDatumObj.getMonth() - i, 1);
169	            const targetMj = `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
170	            const paketiUMjesecu = (p395Res.data || []).filter(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm?.startsWith(targetMj) && !imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids));
171	            const paketiBrentiste = paketiUMjesecu.filter(p => p.brentista === glavniBrentista);
172	            const ukupnoPilana = paketiUMjesecu.reduce((s, p) => s + parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0), 0);
173	            const ukupnoBrentista = paketiBrentiste.reduce((s, p) => s + parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0), 0);
174	            const radniDaniPilana = new Set(paketiUMjesecu.map(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm)).size || 1;
175	            const radniDaniBrentista = new Set(paketiBrentiste.map(p => p.datum_yyyy_mm)).size || 1;
176	
177	            trend_godisnji.push({ name: `${imenaMjeseci[d.getMonth()]} ${String(d.getFullYear()).substring(2)}`, Pilana: parseFloat((ukupnoPilana / radniDaniPilana).toFixed(1)), Brentista: parseFloat((ukupnoBrentista / radniDaniBrentista).toFixed(1)) });
178	        }
179	
180	        setPilanaData({
181	            kpi: { ulaz_m3: p_ulaz_m3.toFixed(2), ulaz_kom: p_ulaz_kom, izlaz_m3: p_izlaz_m3.toFixed(2), yield_proc: p_ulaz_m3 > 0 ? ((p_izlaz_m3 / p_ulaz_m3) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0, dnevni_prosjek: (p_izlaz_m3 / brojDana).toFixed(1) },
182	            trupci_duzine: Object.keys(duzineMap).map(d => ({ duzina: d, kom: duzineMap[d].kom, m3: duzineMap[d].m3.toFixed(2) })).sort((a,b)=>b.duzina-a.duzina),
183	            izlaz_struktura: ukupniIzlazStruktura, ulaz_struktura: ulazStrukturaArr,
184	            glavna_tabela: paketiSvi.sort((a,b) => new Date(b.created_at) - new Date(a.created_at)),
185	            leaderboard, zastoji: dnRes.data || [], zastoji_analiza: zastojiAnaliza, dinamika: dinamikaChart,
186	            posada: leaderboard.map(l => l.ime).join(', '), trend_godisnji: trend_godisnji, glavni_brentista: glavniBrentista
187	        });
188	
189	        // 2. DORADA 
190	        const paketiDoradaTrenutno = pRes.data?.filter(p => {
191	          if (p.datum_yyyy_mm < datumOd || p.datum_yyyy_mm > datumDo) return false;
192	          if (!imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids)) return false; 
193	          if (filterMjesto !== 'SVE' && p.mjesto !== filterMjesto) return false;
194	          if (!provjeriSmjenu(p.vrijeme_tekst)) return false;
195	          return true;
196	        }) || [];
197	  
198	        let d_ulaz_m3 = 0; let d_izlaz_m3 = 0; const operacijeMap = {}; const traceBlokovi = [];
199	        const globalProductYieldMap = {}; 
200	        const svaDorada60d = pRes.data?.filter(p => imaSirovinu(p.ai_sirovina_ids)) || [];
201	        
202	        svaDorada60d.forEach(p => { 
203	            const u = parseFloat(p.kolicina_ulaz || p.kolicina_final || 0); 
204	            const i = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0); 
205	            if(!globalProductYieldMap[p.naziv_proizvoda]) globalProductYieldMap[p.naziv_proizvoda] = { u: 0, i: 0 }; 
206	            globalProductYieldMap[p.naziv_proizvoda].u += u; 
207	            globalProductYieldMap[p.naziv_proizvoda].i += i; 
208	        });
209	  
210	        paketiDoradaTrenutno.forEach(p => {
211	            const izlaz = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0); 
212	            const ulaz = parseFloat(p.kolicina_ulaz || izlaz); 
213	            d_izlaz_m3 += izlaz; d_ulaz_m3 += ulaz;
214	            if(p.oznake && Array.isArray(p.oznake)) p.oznake.forEach(o => { operacijeMap[o] = (operacijeMap[o] || 0) + izlaz; });
215	  
216	            let sirovineTekst = []; 
217	            const stringIds = typeof p.ai_sirovina_ids === 'string' ? p.ai_sirovina_ids : '';
218	            const idsSirovine = stringIds.replace(/[{}"[\]]/g, '').split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
219	            
220	            if (idsSirovine.length > 0) {
221	                idsSirovine.forEach(id => {
222	                    const orig = pRes.data?.find(r => r.paket_id === id);
223	                    if (orig) { const ostalo = parseFloat(orig.kolicina_final || 0); sirovineTekst.push(`Paket ${orig.paket_id} (${orig.naziv_proizvoda} ${orig.debljina}x${orig.sirina}x${orig.duzina}) ${ostalo > 0 ? `| Preostalo: ${ostalo}m³` : '| Utrošen'}`); } else sirovineTekst.push(`Paket ${id}`);
224	                });
225	            }
226	  
227	            const currYield = ulaz > 0 ? ((izlaz / ulaz) * 100).toFixed(1) : 100;
228	            const avg60d = globalProductYieldMap[p.naziv_proizvoda]?.u > 0 ? ((globalProductYieldMap[p.naziv_proizvoda].i / globalProductYieldMap[p.naziv_proizvoda].u) * 100).toFixed(1) : '-';
229	            const brzinaM3h = (paketiDoradaTrenutno.reduce((s, dPkg) => s + parseFloat(dPkg.kolicina_final||0), 0) / 8).toFixed(2);
230	  
231	            traceBlokovi.push({ out_id: p.paket_id, out_naziv: p.naziv_proizvoda, out_dim: `${p.debljina}x${p.sirina}x${p.duzina}`, out_m3: izlaz.toFixed(2), in_m3: ulaz.toFixed(2), in_ids: sirovineTekst.join(' \n '), operacije: p.oznake ? p.oznake.join(', ') : 'Prerada', yield: currYield, avg_60d: avg60d, brzina: brzinaM3h, radnik: p.snimio_korisnik, vrijeme: p.vrijeme_tekst, masina: p.masina || '-' });
232	        });
233	
234	        const chartDoradaYield = Object.keys(globalProductYieldMap).map(naziv => ({
235	            name: naziv,
236	            Yield: ((globalProductYieldMap[naziv].i / globalProductYieldMap[naziv].u) * 100).toFixed(1)
237	        })).filter(x => x.Yield > 0).sort((a,b) => b.Yield - a.Yield).slice(0, 10);
238	  
239	        setDoradaData({ 
240	            kpi: { ulaz_m3: d_ulaz_m3.toFixed(2), izlaz_m3: d_izlaz_m3.toFixed(2), kalo_m3: (d_ulaz_m3 - d_izlaz_m3).toFixed(2), yield_proc: d_ulaz_m3 > 0 ? ((d_izlaz_m3 / d_ulaz_m3) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0, operacije_count: paketiDoradaTrenutno.length }, 
241	            operacije: Object.keys(operacijeMap).map(k => ({ name: k, value: parseFloat(operacijeMap[k].toFixed(2)) })).sort((a,b)=>b.value-a.value), 
242	            yieldChart: chartDoradaYield,
243	            trace_blokovi: traceBlokovi.sort((a,b) => b.out_m3 - a.out_m3) 
244	        });
245	
246	        // 3. FINANSIJE
247	        const racuni = racRes.data || [];
248	        let fGotovina = 0; let fVirman = 0; let fDug = 0; let fPdv = 0;
249	        let kupciDugovanja = {};
250	
251	        racuni.forEach(r => {
252	            fPdv += (r.ukupno_sa_pdv - r.ukupno_bez_pdv);
253	            if (r.status.includes('NAPLAĆENO')) {
254	                if (r.nacin_placanja === 'Gotovina') fGotovina += r.ukupno_sa_pdv;
255	                else fVirman += r.ukupno_sa_pdv;
256	            } else {
257	                fDug += r.ukupno_sa_pdv;
258	                kupciDugovanja[r.kupac_naziv] = (kupciDugovanja[r.kupac_naziv] || 0) + r.ukupno_sa_pdv;
259	            }
260	        });
261	
262	        setFinansijeKPI({ ukupnoFakturisano: fGotovina + fVirman + fDug, naplacenoGotovina: fGotovina, naplacenoVirman: fVirman, nenaplacenoDug: fDug, ocekivaniPDV: fPdv });
263	        setTopDuznici(Object.keys(kupciDugovanja).map(k => ({ name: k, dug: parseFloat(kupciDugovanja[k].toFixed(2)) })).sort((a,b) => b.dug - a.dug).slice(0,5));
264	        setStrukturaNaplate([ { name: 'Gotovina (Kasa)', value: parseFloat(fGotovina.toFixed(2)) }, { name: 'Virman (Banka)', value: parseFloat(fVirman.toFixed(2)) }, { name: 'Nenaplaćeno (Dug)', value: parseFloat(fDug.toFixed(2)) } ]);
265	
266	      } catch (e) { console.error("Greška u analitici:", e); }
267	      setLoading(false);
268	    };
269	
270	    const COLORS = ['#10b981', '#3b82f6', '#f59e0b', '#ef4444', '#8b5cf6', '#06b6d4'];
271	  
272	    return (
273	      <div className="min-h-screen text-slate-300 font-sans p-4 md:p-8 pb-24 print:bg-white print:p-0 transition-colors duration-500" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_pozadine }}>
274	        
275	        {/* GLAVNI HEADER */}
276	        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-xl mb-6 gap-4 border transition-colors duration-500 print:hidden" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice, borderColor: saas.isEditMode ? saas.ui.boja_akcenta_pilana : '#1e293b' }}>
277	          <div className="flex items-center gap-6 overflow-x-auto">
278	            <h1 className="text-theme-text font-black text-2xl tracking-tighter hidden md:block">Analitika<span style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_akcenta_pilana }}>.Pro</span></h1>
279	            <nav className="flex gap-2 bg-black/20 p-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/5 overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap shadow-inner">
280	              {['pilana', 'dorada', 'finansije'].map(t => (
281	                <button key={t} onClick={() => setActiveTab(t)} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-bold uppercase transition-all ${activeTab === t ? 'text-theme-text shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-theme-text hover:bg-white/5'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: activeTab === t ? (t === 'pilana' ? saas.ui.boja_akcenta_pilana : t === 'dorada' ? saas.ui.boja_akcenta_dorada : saas.ui.boja_akcenta_finansije) : 'transparent' }}>
282	                    {t}
283	                </button>
284	              ))}
285	            </nav>
286	          </div>
287	  
288	          <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-4">
289	            <Flex className="bg-black/20 p-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/5 gap-1 w-full md:w-auto justify-center shadow-inner">
290	              <button onClick={() => { setTipDatuma('dan'); setIsPeriodic(false); setDatumDo(datumOd); }} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase transition-all ${!isPeriodic?'bg-slate-700 text-theme-text':'text-slate-500 hover:text-theme-text'}`}>Dnevni</button>
291	              <button onClick={() => { setTipDatuma('period'); setIsPeriodic(true); }} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase transition-all ${isPeriodic?'bg-slate-700 text-theme-text':'text-slate-500 hover:text-theme-text'}`}>Period</button>
292	            </Flex>
293	  
294	            <Flex className="bg-black/20 p-1.5 rounded-xl border border-white/5 gap-2 w-full md:w-auto justify-center flex-wrap shadow-inner">
295	              {!isPeriodic ? (
296	                <>
297	                  <button onClick={()=>shiftDate(-1)} className="w-8 h-8 bg-theme-panel rounded hover:bg-slate-600 font-black text-theme-text flex items-center justify-center transition-all"><ChevronLeft size={16}/></button>
298	                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center bg-theme-card px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-theme-border h-8 hover:border-slate-500 transition-all">
299	                    <input type="date" value={datumOd} onChange={e=>{setDatumOd(e.target.value); setDatumDo(e.target.value);}} className="bg-transparent text-slate-300 font-bold text-sm tracking-widest outline-none cursor-pointer uppercase [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:cursor-pointer [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:invert" />
300	                  </div>
301	                  <button onClick={()=>shiftDate(1)} className="w-8 h-8 bg-theme-panel rounded hover:bg-slate-600 font-black text-theme-text flex items-center justify-center transition-all"><ChevronRight size={16}/></button>
302	                </>
303	              ) : (
304	                <>
305	                  <div className="flex items-center bg-theme-card rounded border border-theme-border px-2 hover:border-slate-500 transition-all">
306	                    <input type="date" value={datumOd} onChange={e=>setDatumOd(e.target.value)} className="bg-transparent text-slate-300 font-bold text-xs tracking-widest outline-none cursor-pointer h-8 uppercase [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:cursor-pointer [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:invert" />
307	                  </div>
308	                  <span className="text-slate-600 font-black">-</span>
309	                  <div className="flex items-center bg-theme-card rounded border border-theme-border px-2 hover:border-slate-500 transition-all">
310	                    <input type="date" value={datumDo} onChange={e=>setDatumDo(e.target.value)} className="bg-transparent text-slate-300 font-bold text-xs tracking-widest outline-none cursor-pointer h-8 uppercase [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:cursor-pointer [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:invert" />
311	                  </div>
312	                  <div className="flex gap-1 ml-2 border-l border-theme-border pl-2 items-center">
313	                    <button onClick={()=>setBrziDatum('7d')} className="px-2 py-1.5 h-8 bg-theme-panel hover:bg-slate-600 hover:text-theme-text rounded text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-slate-300 transition-colors shadow">7 Dana</button>
314	                    <button onClick={()=>setBrziDatum('mjesec')} className="px-2 py-1.5 h-8 bg-theme-panel hover:bg-slate-600 hover:text-theme-text rounded text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-slate-300 transition-colors shadow">Ovaj Mj</button>
315	                  </div>
316	                </>
317	              )}
318	            </Flex>
319	
320	            {user?.uloga === 'superadmin' && (
321	                saas.isEditMode ? (
322	                    <div className="flex gap-2">
323	                        <button onClick={saas.odustani} className="px-3 py-2 bg-red-900/40 text-red-400 border border-red-500/50 rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-theme-text transition-all shadow-md">✕ Odustani</button>
324	                        <button onClick={customSpasiDizajn} className="px-3 py-2 bg-emerald-600 text-theme-text rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.4)] hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-all">💾 Spasi Dizajn</button>
325	                    </div>
326	                ) : (
327	                    <button onClick={saas.pokreniEdit} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase hover:bg-amber-500 hover:text-theme-text transition-all shadow-md">
328	                        <Settings size={14} /> Uredi Izgled
329	                    </button>
330	                )
331	            )}
332	            <button onClick={onExit} className="bg-theme-panel text-slate-400 hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-theme-text px-5 h-10 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase border border-theme-border transition-all shadow-md">Izlaz</button>
333	          </div>
334	        </div>
335	
336	        {/* --- SAAS EDITOR OVERLAY (DODAT LOGO + POPRAVLJEN FOKUS ZA IMENA MODULA) --- */}
337	        {saas.isEditMode && (
338	            <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto mb-6 bg-black/40 p-6 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-6 border border-amber-500/30 shadow-2xl">
339	                
340	                <div className="flex gap-4">
341	                    <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black flex items-center gap-2">Boja Pozadine: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_pozadine} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_pozadine: e.target.value})} className="w-8 h-8 cursor-pointer rounded border-none bg-transparent" /></label>
342	                    <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black flex items-center gap-2">Boja Kartica: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_kartice} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_kartice: e.target.value})} className="w-8 h-8 cursor-pointer rounded border-none bg-transparent" /></label>
343	                    <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black flex items-center gap-2">Akcent Pilana: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_akcenta_pilana} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_akcenta_pilana: e.target.value})} className="w-8 h-8 cursor-pointer rounded border-none bg-transparent" /></label>
344	                    <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black flex items-center gap-2">Akcent Dorada: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_akcenta_dorada} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_akcenta_dorada: e.target.value})} className="w-8 h-8 cursor-pointer rounded border-none bg-transparent" /></label>
345	                    <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black flex items-center gap-2">Akcent Finansije: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_akcenta_finansije} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_akcenta_finansije: e.target.value})} className="w-8 h-8 cursor-pointer rounded border-none bg-transparent" /></label>
346	                </div>
347	
348	                {/* NOVO: OPĆE POSTAVKE APLIKACIJE (LOGO I IME) */}
349	                <div className="border-t border-amber-500/20 pt-4">
350	                    <h4 className="text-xs text-amber-500 font-black mb-4">BRENDIRANJE APLIKACIJE (HEADER / MENI)</h4>
351	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
352	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Naziv Aplikacije (Tekst Logo)
353	                            <input 
354	                                defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_app_name') || 'SmartERP'} 
355	                                onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_app_name', e.target.value)} 
356	                                onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_app_name', e.target.value)}}
357	                                className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500 transition-colors shadow-inner" 
358	                            />
359	                        </label>
360	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">URL Logotipa (Slika) - Ostaviti prazno za tekst
361	                            <input 
362	                                defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_app_logo') || ''} 
363	                                onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_app_logo', e.target.value)} 
364	                                onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_app_logo', e.target.value)}}
365	                                placeholder="https://..."
366	                                className="p-3 rounded-lg bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500 transition-colors shadow-inner" 
367	                            />
368	                        </label>
369	                    </div>
370	                </div>
371	
372	                <div className="border-t border-amber-500/20 pt-4">
373	                    <h4 className="text-xs text-amber-500 font-black mb-4">IZMJENA NAZIVA MODULA U BOČNOM MENIJU</h4>
374	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
375	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Početna (Analitika)
376	                            <input defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_dashboard_analitika_naslov') || 'Početna'} onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_dashboard_analitika_naslov', e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_dashboard_analitika_naslov', e.target.value)}} className="p-2 rounded bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
377	                        </label>
378	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Prijem Trupaca
379	                            <input defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_prijem_trupaca_naslov') || 'Prijem'} onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_prijem_trupaca_naslov', e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_prijem_trupaca_naslov', e.target.value)}} className="p-2 rounded bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
380	                        </label>
381	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Prorez
382	                            <input defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_prorez_trupaca_naslov') || 'Prorez'} onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_prorez_trupaca_naslov', e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_prorez_trupaca_naslov', e.target.value)}} className="p-2 rounded bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
383	                        </label>
384	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Pilana (Izlaz)
385	                            <input defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_pilana_izlaz_naslov') || 'Pilana'} onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_pilana_izlaz_naslov', e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_pilana_izlaz_naslov', e.target.value)}} className="p-2 rounded bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
386	                        </label>
387	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Dorada
