389	                        </label>
390	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Lager
391	                            <input defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_lager_paketa_naslov') || 'Lager'} onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_lager_paketa_naslov', e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_lager_paketa_naslov', e.target.value)}} className="p-2 rounded bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
392	                        </label>
393	                        <label className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase">Kontrolni Toranj
394	                            <input defaultValue={localStorage.getItem('saas_kontrolni_toranj_naslov') || 'Kontrola'} onBlur={e => spremiIzmjenu('saas_kontrolni_toranj_naslov', e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => {if(e.key === 'Enter') spremiIzmjenu('saas_kontrolni_toranj_naslov', e.target.value)}} className="p-2 rounded bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
395	                        </label>
396	                    </div>
397	                </div>
398	            </div>
399	        )}
400	
401	        {(activeTab === 'pilana' || activeTab === 'dorada') && (
402	            <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto flex gap-4 mb-6 print:hidden">
403	               <div className="flex flex-col">
404	                   <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-bold ml-1 mb-1">Lokacija / Mjesto</span>
405	                   <select value={filterMjesto} onChange={e => setFilterMjesto(e.target.value)} className="text-theme-text p-3 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold border border-theme-border outline-none shadow-inner bg-theme-panel" >
406	                       <option value="SVE">Sva Mjesta</option>
407	                       {dostupnaMjesta.map(m => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
408	                   </select>
409	               </div>
410	               <div className="flex flex-col">
411	                   <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-bold ml-1 mb-1">Smjena (Vrijeme)</span>
412	                   <select value={filterSmjena} onChange={e => setFilterSmjena(e.target.value)} className="text-theme-text p-3 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold border border-theme-border outline-none shadow-inner bg-theme-panel" >
413	                       <option value="SVE">Sve Smjene (00-24h)</option>
414	                       <option value="1">1. Smjena (07-15h)</option>
415	                       <option value="2">2. Smjena (15-23h)</option>
416	                       <option value="3">3. Smjena (23-07h)</option>
417	                   </select>
418	               </div>
419	            </div>
420	        )}
421	  
422	        {loading ? ( <div className="text-center p-20 animate-pulse text-theme-text font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-xl">Dekodiranje Baze Podataka...</div> ) : (
423	          <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto space-y-6">
424	            
425	            {activeTab === 'pilana' && (
426	              <div className="animate-in fade-in space-y-6">
427	                 {isPeriodic ? (
428	                    <PilanaPeriodIzvjestaj data={pilanaData} datumOd={datumOd} datumDo={datumDo} lokacija={filterMjesto} brentistaFilter="SVI" />
429	                 ) : (
430	                    <PilanaIzvjestaj data={pilanaData} datum={datumOd} lokacija={filterMjesto} smjena={filterSmjena} />
431	                 )}
432	              </div>
433	            )}
434	
435	            {activeTab === 'dorada' && (
436	                <div className="animate-in fade-in space-y-6">
437	                    <Grid numItemsMd={2} numItemsLg={4} className="gap-6">
438	                        <Card decoration="top" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice, decorationColor: saas.ui.boja_akcenta_dorada }}>
439	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Ulaz Sirovina</Text>
440	                            <Metric className="text-theme-text">{doradaData.kpi.ulaz_m3} m³</Metric>
441	                            <Text className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-2">Zapremina primljenih paketa</Text>
442	                        </Card>
443	                        <Card decoration="top" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice, decorationColor: saas.ui.boja_akcenta_dorada }}>
444	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Izlaz Gotove Robe</Text>
445	                            <Metric className="text-theme-text">{doradaData.kpi.izlaz_m3} m³</Metric>
446	                            <Text className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-2">Novi paketi nakon dorade</Text>
447	                        </Card>
448	                        <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="red" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" >
449	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Stvarni Kalo (Otpad)</Text>
450	                            <Metric className="text-red-400">{doradaData.kpi.kalo_m3} m³</Metric>
451	                            <Text className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-2">Gubitak pri obradi</Text>
452	                        </Card>
453	                        <Card decoration="top" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice, decorationColor: saas.ui.boja_akcenta_dorada }}>
454	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Efikasnost Konverzije (Yield)</Text>
455	                            <Metric className="text-theme-text">{doradaData.kpi.yield_proc} %</Metric>
456	                            <Badge color="blue" className="mt-2">Evidentirano operacija: {doradaData.kpi.operacije_count}</Badge>
457	                        </Card>
458	                    </Grid>
459	
460	                    <Grid numItemsMd={1} numItemsLg={2} className="gap-6">
461	                        <Card className="border-theme-border shadow-xl h-[400px]" >
462	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black mb-6">Prinos (Yield %) po proizvedenom artiklu</Text>
463	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="85%">
464	                                <BarChart data={doradaData.yieldChart} margin={{ top: 0, right: 0, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}>
465	                                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#334155" vertical={false} />
466	                                    <XAxis dataKey="name" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={10} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
467	                                    <YAxis stroke="#64748b" fontSize={10} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} unit="%" />
468	                                    <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#1e293b', borderColor: '#334155', borderRadius: '10px'}} itemStyle={{color: '#fff'}} />
469	                                    <Bar dataKey="Yield" fill={saas.ui.boja_akcenta_dorada} radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
470	                                </BarChart>
471	                            </ResponsiveContainer>
472	                        </Card>
473	
474	                        <Card className="border-theme-border shadow-xl h-[400px]" >
475	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black mb-2">Raspodjela Operacija (m³ prerađeno kroz oznake)</Text>
476	                            {doradaData.operacije.length === 0 ? (
477	                                <div className="h-full flex items-center justify-center text-slate-500 text-sm">Nema zabilježenih specifičnih operacija (okrajčivanje, kraćenje...)</div>
478	                            ) : (
479	                                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="90%">

482	                                            {doradaData.operacije.map((entry, index) => (<Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={COLORS[index % COLORS.length]} />))}
483	                                        </Pie>
484	                                        <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#1e293b', borderColor: '#334155', borderRadius: '10px'}} formatter={(value) => `${value} m³`} />
485	                                        <Legend wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: '10px', paddingTop: '20px' }} />
486	                                    </PieChart>

488	                            )}
489	                        </Card>
490	                    </Grid>
491	
492	                    <Card className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" >
493	                        <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black mb-4">Forenzička Sljedivost (Traceability) - Odakle je proizvod nastao</Text>
494	                        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
495	                            <table className="w-full text-left text-[11px]">
496	                                <thead className="bg-black/20 text-slate-400 uppercase font-black">
497	                                    <tr>
498	                                        <th className="p-3 rounded-tl-lg">Novi Paket (Izlaz)</th>
499	                                        <th className="p-3 text-center">Final m³</th>
500	                                        <th className="p-3 text-center border-l border-theme-border">Ulaz m³</th>
501	                                        <th className="p-3">Korištena Sirovina (Paketi ulaza)</th>
502	                                        <th className="p-3 text-center border-l border-theme-border">Yield</th>
503	                                        <th className="p-3">Operacije</th>

505	                                    </tr>

507	                                <tbody className="text-slate-200">
508	                                    {doradaData.trace_blokovi.length === 0 && <tr><td colSpan="7" className="p-4 text-center italic text-slate-500">Nema podataka o doradi.</td></tr>}
509	                                    {doradaData.trace_blokovi.map((tb, i) => (
510	                                        <tr key={i} className="border-b border-theme-border/50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">

514	                                            </td>
515	                                            <td className="p-3 text-center font-black text-emerald-400 text-sm bg-emerald-900/10">{tb.out_m3}</td>
516	                                            <td className="p-3 text-center font-bold text-red-400 bg-red-900/10 border-l border-theme-border/50">{tb.in_m3}</td>
517	                                            <td className="p-3 whitespace-pre-line text-[9px] text-slate-400 font-mono leading-relaxed">{tb.in_ids}</td>
518	                                            <td className="p-3 text-center font-black border-l border-theme-border/50" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_akcenta_dorada }}>{tb.yield}%</td>
519	                                            <td className="p-3 text-[9px] uppercase font-bold text-slate-300">{tb.operacije}</td>
520	                                            <td className="p-3 text-[9px] text-slate-400">{tb.radnik}<br/>{tb.vrijeme}</td>
521	                                        </tr>
522	                                    ))}
523	                                </tbody>
524	                            </table>
525	                        </div>
526	                    </Card>
527	                </div>
528	            )}
529	
530	            {activeTab === 'finansije' && (
531	                <div className="animate-in fade-in space-y-6">
532	                    <Grid numItemsMd={2} numItemsLg={4} className="gap-6">
533	                        <Card decoration="top" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice, decorationColor: saas.ui.boja_akcenta_finansije }}>
534	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Ukupno Fakturisano</Text>
535	                            <Metric className="text-theme-text">{parseFloat(finansijeKPI.ukupnoFakturisano).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM</Metric>
536	                            <Text className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-2">Izdati računi u periodu</Text>
537	                        </Card>
538	                        <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="emerald" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" >
539	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Naplaćeno (Gotovina + Virman)</Text>
540	                            <Metric className="text-emerald-400">{(parseFloat(finansijeKPI.naplacenoGotovina) + parseFloat(finansijeKPI.naplacenoVirman)).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM</Metric>
541	                            <Text className="text-slate-500 text-[10px] mt-2 uppercase font-bold">Gotovina: {finansijeKPI.naplacenoGotovina} | Virman: {finansijeKPI.naplacenoVirman}</Text>
542	                        </Card>
543	                        <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="red" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" >
544	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Nenaplaćena Potraživanja</Text>
545	                            <Metric className="text-red-400">{parseFloat(finansijeKPI.nenaplacenoDug).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM</Metric>
546	                            <Text className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-2">Otvoreni dug kupaca</Text>
547	                        </Card>
548	                        <Card decoration="top" decorationColor="purple" className="border-theme-border shadow-xl" >
549	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">Obračunati PDV (17%)</Text>
550	                            <Metric className="text-theme-accent">{parseFloat(finansijeKPI.ocekivaniPDV).toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM</Metric>
551	                            <Text className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-2">Obaveza prema državi</Text>
552	                        </Card>
553	                    </Grid>
554	
555	                    <Grid numItemsMd={1} numItemsLg={2} className="gap-6">
556	                        <Card className="border-theme-border shadow-xl h-[400px]" >
557	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black mb-2">Struktura realizacije i potraživanja</Text>
558	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="90%">
559	                                <PieChart>
560	                                    <Pie data={strukturaNaplate} innerRadius={70} outerRadius={110} paddingAngle={5} dataKey="value" stroke="none">
561	                                        <Cell fill="#10b981" /> 
562	                                        <Cell fill="#3b82f6" /> 
563	                                        <Cell fill="#ef4444" /> 
564	                                    </Pie>
565	                                    <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#1e293b', borderColor: '#334155', borderRadius: '10px'}} formatter={(value) => `${value.toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM`} />

567	                                </PieChart>
568	                            </ResponsiveContainer>
569	                        </Card>
570	
571	                        <Card className="border-theme-border shadow-xl h-[400px]" >
572	                            <Text className="text-slate-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black mb-6">Top 5 Dužnika (Otvoreni Saldo)</Text>
573	                            {topDuznici.length === 0 ? (
574	                                <div className="h-full flex items-center justify-center text-emerald-500 font-bold text-sm">Nema otvorenih dugovanja u ovom periodu ✅</div>
575	                            ) : (
576	                                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="85%">
577	                                    <BarChart data={topDuznici} layout="vertical" margin={{ top: 0, right: 20, left: 40, bottom: 0 }}>
578	                                        <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#334155" horizontal={false} />
579	                                        <XAxis type="number" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={10} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
580	                                        <YAxis dataKey="name" type="category" stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} width={100} />
581	                                        <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#1e293b', borderColor: '#334155', borderRadius: '10px'}} formatter={(value) => `${value.toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM`} />
582	                                        <Bar dataKey="dug" fill="#ef4444" radius={[0, 4, 4, 0]} barSize={20} />
583	                                    </BarChart>
584	                                </ResponsiveContainer>
585	                            )}
586	                        </Card>
587	                    </Grid>
588	                </div>
589	            )}
590	          </div>
591	        )}
592	      </div>
593	    );
594	}

1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

11	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co';
12	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';

15	function DimBox({ label, val, set, disabled, inputRef, onKeyDown }) {
16	    return (
17	        <div className={`bg-theme-panel p-3 rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner font-bold text-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center focus-within:border-emerald-500 transition-colors ${disabled ? 'opacity-50' : ''}`}>
18	            <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest">{label}</span>
19	            <input ref={inputRef} onKeyDown={onKeyDown} type="number" value={val} onChange={e => set(e.target.value)} disabled={disabled} className="w-full bg-transparent text-theme-text font-black outline-none text-xl md:text-2xl text-center [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none" placeholder="0" />
20	        </div>
21	    );
22	}

24	function SaaS_DnevnikMasine({ modul, header, user, saas, updatePolje, toggleVelicina, spremiDimenzije, handleDragStart, handleDragEnter, handleDrop }) {
25	    const [logovi, setLogovi] = useState([]);
26	    const t = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
27	    const [form, setForm] = useState({ vrijeme_od: t, vrijeme_do: '', zastoj_min: '', napomena: '' });
28	
29	    useEffect(() => { loadLogove(); }, [header]);
30	    const loadLogove = async () => {
31	        if(!header || !header.datum || !header.masina) return;
32	        const { data } = await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').select('*').eq('datum', header.datum).eq('masina', header.masina).eq('modul', modul).order('vrijeme_od', { ascending: false });
33	        if (data) setLogovi(data);
34	    };
35	    const snimiZastojIliRad = async () => {
36	        if (!form.vrijeme_od) return alert("Vrijeme početka je obavezno!");
37	        const payload = {
38	            datum: header.datum, masina: header.masina, modul: modul,
39	            vrijeme_od: form.vrijeme_od, vrijeme_do: form.vrijeme_do || null,
40	            zastoj_min: parseInt(form.zastoj_min) || 0, napomena: form.napomena, snimio: user.ime_prezime
41	        };
42	        const { error } = await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').insert([payload]);
43	        if (error) return alert("Greška: " + error.message);
44	        setForm({ vrijeme_od: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }), vrijeme_do: '', zastoj_min: '', napomena: '' });
45	        loadLogove();
46	    };
47	
48	    const obrisiLog = async (id) => {
49	        if(window.confirm("Obrisati ovaj zapis?")) { await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').delete().eq('id', id); loadLogove(); }
50	    };
51	
52	    const renderDnevnikPolje = (polje) => {
53	        if (polje.id === 'pocetak') return <input type="time" value={form.vrijeme_od} onChange={e => setForm({...form, vrijeme_od: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />;
54	        if (polje.id === 'kraj') return <input type="time" value={form.vrijeme_do} onChange={e => setForm({...form, vrijeme_do: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />;
55	        if (polje.id === 'zastoj') return <input type="number" value={form.zastoj_min} onChange={e => setForm({...form, zastoj_min: e.target.value})} placeholder="0" className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-red-900/20 rounded-xl text-xs text-red-400 font-black border border-red-500/50 outline-none" />;
56	        if (polje.id === 'napomena') return <input type="text" value={form.napomena} onChange={e => setForm({...form, napomena: e.target.value})} placeholder="Održavanje, kvar..." className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />;
57	        return null;
58	    };
59	
60	    return (
61	        <div className={`bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] border shadow-2xl space-y-4 mt-6 transition-all ${saas.isEditMode ? 'ring-2 ring-amber-500 border-amber-500/50' : 'border-theme-border'}`}>
62	            <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-xs">⚙️ EVIDENCIJA RADA I ZASTOJA MAŠINE</h3>
63	            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 bg-theme-panel p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-accent/40 items-start shadow-inner">
64	                {(saas.ui.polja_dnevnik || []).map((polje, index) => (
65	                    <div 
66	                        key={polje.id} 
67	                        className={`relative flex flex-col ${polje.span} transition-all ${saas.isEditMode ? 'border-2 border-dashed border-amber-500 p-2 rounded-xl bg-black/20 resize overflow-auto' : ''}`} 
68	                        style={{ maxWidth: '100%', ...(saas.isEditMode ? { minWidth: '100px', minHeight: '80px' } : {}), width: polje.customWidth || undefined, height: polje.customHeight || undefined }}
69	                        draggable={saas.isEditMode} 
70	                        onDragStart={(e) => handleDragStart(e, index, 'polja_dnevnik')} 
71	                        onDragEnter={(e) => handleDragEnter(e, index)} 
72	                        onDragEnd={() => handleDrop('polja_dnevnik')} 
73	                        onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
74	                        onMouseUp={(e) => spremiDimenzije(e, index, 'polja_dnevnik')}
75	                    >
76	                        {saas.isEditMode && (
77	                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 shrink-0">
78	                                <span className="text-[9px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black cursor-move">☰</span>
79	                                <button onClick={() => toggleVelicina(index, 'polja_dnevnik')} className="text-[8px] text-amber-500 font-black bg-amber-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded">ŠIRINA: {polje.span==='col-span-4'?'100%':polje.span==='col-span-2'?'50%':'25%'}</button>
80	                            </div>
81	                        )}
82	                        {saas.isEditMode ? (
83	                            <input value={polje.label} onChange={(e) => updatePolje(index, 'label', e.target.value, 'polja_dnevnik')} className="w-full bg-theme-card text-amber-400 p-1 mb-1 rounded border border-amber-500/50 text-[8px] uppercase font-black text-center shrink-0" placeholder="Ostavite prazno za bez naslova" />
84	                        ) : (
85	                            polje.label && <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1 shrink-0">{polje.label}</label>
86	                        )}
87	                        <div className={`flex-1 ${saas.isEditMode ? 'opacity-50 pointer-events-none' : ''}`}>{renderDnevnikPolje(polje)}</div>
88	                    </div>
89	                ))}
90	                <button onClick={snimiZastojIliRad} className={`w-full py-3 bg-amber-600 text-theme-text font-black rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase shadow-lg hover:bg-amber-500 ${saas.isEditMode ? 'opacity-50 pointer-events-none col-span-4' : 'col-span-4 md:col-span-4 mt-2'}`}>➕ Dodaj Zapis u Dnevnik</button>
91	            </div>
92	            
93	            <div className="space-y-2 mt-4">
94	                {logovi.length === 0 && <p className="text-center text-slate-500 text-[10px] uppercase">Nema unesenih zastoja za danas.</p>}
95	                {logovi.map(l => (
96	                    <div key={l.id} className="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-slate-800 border border-theme-border rounded-xl">
97	                        <div>
98	                            <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black"><span className="text-emerald-400">{l.vrijeme_od}</span> - {l.vrijeme_do ? <span className="text-amber-400">{l.vrijeme_do}</span> : <span className="text-slate-500">...</span>}</p>
99	                            <p className="text-theme-text text-xs font-bold mt-1">{l.napomena || 'Nema napomene'}</p>
100	                        </div>
101	                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
102	                            {l.zastoj_min > 0 && <span className="text-red-400 text-xs font-black bg-red-900/30 px-2 py-1 rounded border border-red-500/30">Zastoj: {l.zastoj_min} min</span>}
103	                            <button onClick={() => obrisiLog(l.id)} className="text-red-500 font-black hover:bg-slate-700 p-2 rounded">✕</button>
104	                        </div>
105	                    </div>
106	                ))}
107	            </div>
108	        </div>
109	    );
110	}

112	export default function DoradaModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
113	    
114	    useEffect(() => {
115	        const postaviMasinu = async () => {
116	            const { data } = await supabase.from('masine').select('naziv').ilike('dozvoljeni_moduli', '%Dorada%');
117	            const dozvoljene = data ? data.map(m => m.naziv) : [];
118	            const zadnja = localStorage.getItem('zadnja_masina_dorada');
119	
120	            if (!header?.masina || !dozvoljene.includes(header.masina)) {
121	                const nova = (zadnja && dozvoljene.includes(zadnja)) ? zadnja : (dozvoljene[0] || 'VIŠELISNI CIRKULAR');
122	                setHeader(prev => ({ ...prev, masina: nova }));
123	                localStorage.setItem('zadnja_masina_dorada', nova);
124	            } else if (header.masina && dozvoljene.includes(header.masina)) {
125	                localStorage.setItem('zadnja_masina_dorada', header.masina);
126	            }
127	        };
128	        postaviMasinu();
129	    }, [header?.masina]);
130	
131	    const saas = useSaaS('dorada_modul', {
132	        boja_kartice: '#1e293b',
133	        boja_slova: '#ffffff',
134	        velicina_naslova: '16',
135	        boja_teksta_ulaz: 'text-red-500',
136	        boja_teksta_izlaz: 'text-emerald-500',
137	        naslov_ulaz: 'SKENIRAJ ULAZNI PAKET (SIROVINA)',
138	        naslov_izlaz: 'QR IZLAZNOG PAKETA (GOTOVO)',
139	        polja_radnici: [
140	            { id: 'operater', label: '👨‍🔧 ODGOVORNI RADNIK (ZA MAŠINOM)', span: 'col-span-1' },
141	            { id: 'viljuskarista', label: '🚜 VILJUŠKARISTA', span: 'col-span-1' }
142	        ],
143	        polja_dnevnik: [
144	            { id: 'pocetak', label: 'POČETAK', span: 'col-span-1' },
145	            { id: 'kraj', label: 'ZAVRŠETAK', span: 'col-span-1' },
146	            { id: 'zastoj', label: 'ZASTOJ (MINUTA)', span: 'col-span-1' },
147	            { id: 'napomena', label: 'NAPOMENA / RAZLOG', span: 'col-span-1', customWidth: '100%', span: 'col-span-4' }
148	        ]
149	    });
150	    const dragItem = useRef(null);
151	    const dragOverItem = useRef(null);
152	
153	    const handleDragStart = (e, index, lista) => { dragItem.current = { index, lista }; };
154	    const handleDragEnter = (e, index) => { dragOverItem.current = index; };
155	    const handleDrop = (listaIme) => {
156	        if(!dragItem.current || dragOverItem.current === null || dragItem.current.lista !== listaIme) return;
157	        const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme];
158	        const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista];
159	        const premjesteniItem = novaLista[dragItem.current.index];
160	        novaLista.splice(dragItem.current.index, 1);
161	        novaLista.splice(dragOverItem.current, 0, premjesteniItem);
162	        dragItem.current = null; dragOverItem.current = null;
163	        saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista});
164	    };
165	    const updatePolje = (index, key, val, listaIme) => {
166	        const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme];
167	        const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista];
168	        novaLista[index][key] = val;
169	        saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista});
170	    };
171	    const toggleVelicinaPolja = (index, listaIme) => {
172	        const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme];
173	        const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista];
174	        const trenutno = novaLista[index].span;
175	        novaLista[index].span = trenutno === 'col-span-1' ? 'col-span-2' : (trenutno === 'col-span-2' ? 'col-span-4' : 'col-span-1');
176	        saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista});
177	    };
178	    const spremiDimenzije = (e, index, listaIme) => {
179	        if (!saas.isEditMode) return;
180	        const w = e.currentTarget.style.width;
181	        const h = e.currentTarget.style.height;
182	        if (w || h) {
183	            const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme];
184	            const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista];
185	            if (w) novaLista[index].customWidth = w;
186	            if (h) novaLista[index].customHeight = h;
187	            saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista});
188	        }
189	    };
190	
191	    const [ulazScan, setUlazScan] = useState('');
192	    const [izlazScan, setIzlazScan] = useState('');
193	    const [radniNalog, setRadniNalog] = useState('');
194	    const [tipNaloga, setTipNaloga] = useState('');
195	    const [rnStavke, setRnStavke] = useState([]);
196	    
197	    const [katalog, setKatalog] = useState([]);
198	    const [aktivniNalozi, setAktivniNalozi] = useState([]);
199	    const [activeUlazIds, setActiveUlazIds] = useState([]);
200	    const [ulazneStavke, setUlazneStavke] = useState([]); 
201	    const [predlozeniPaketi, setPredlozeniPaketi] = useState([]);
202	    
203	    const [razduziZapis, setRazduziZapis] = useState(null);
204	    const [razduziMod, setRazduziMod] = useState('potroseno'); 
205	    const [razduziKol, setRazduziKol] = useState('');
206	    const [razduziJm, setRazduziJm] = useState('kom'); 
207	
208	    const [activeIzlazIds, setActiveIzlazIds] = useState([]);
209	    const [selectedIzlazId, setSelectedIzlazId] = useState('');
210	    const [izlazPackageItems, setIzlazPackageItems] = useState([]);
211	    
212	    const [activeEditItem, setActiveEditItem] = useState(null);
213	    const [updateMode, setUpdateMode] = useState('dodaj');
214	    const [form, setForm] = useState({ naziv: '', debljina: '', sirina: '', duzina: '', kolicina_ulaz: '', jm: 'kom', rn_jm: 'm3', rn_stavka_id: null, naruceno: 0, napravljeno: 0 });
215	    const [isScanning, setIsScanning] = useState(false);
216	    const [scanTarget, setScanTarget] = useState('');
217	
218	    const [dostupneOznake, setDostupneOznake] = useState([]); 
219	    const [odabraneOznake, setOdabraneOznake] = useState([]);
220	    const izlazTimerRef = useRef(null);
221	    const ulazTimerRef = useRef(null);
222	
223	    // PAMETNI DIJALOZI
224	    const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ isOpen: false });
225	    const prikaziDialog = (opcije) => setDialog({ isOpen: true, confirmText: 'POTVRDI', cancelText: 'ZATVORI', ...opcije });
226	    const zatvoriDialog = () => setDialog({ isOpen: false });
227	
228	    const [operater, setOperater] = useState('');
229	    const [viljuskarista, setViljuskarista] = useState('');
230	    const [radniciList, setRadniciList] = useState([]);
231	
232	    const dimRefs = {
233	        debljina: useRef(null),
234	        sirina: useRef(null),
235	        duzina: useRef(null),
236	        kolicina: useRef(null)
237	    };
238	
239	    const handleDimEnter = (e, nextRef) => {
240	        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
241	            e.preventDefault();
242	            nextRef?.current?.focus();
243	        }
244	    };
245	
246	    const handleOperaterChange = async (novoIme) => {
247	        if (header?.masina) {
248	            await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).eq('uloga', 'operater_dorada').is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
249	            if (novoIme) await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').insert([{ radnik_ime: novoIme, masina_naziv: header.masina, vrijeme_prijave: new Date().toISOString(), uloga: 'operater_dorada' }]);
250	            window.dispatchEvent(new Event('radnici_updated'));
251	        }
252	        setOperater(novoIme); localStorage.setItem('dorada_operater', novoIme);
253	    };
254	    const handleViljuskaristaChange = async (novoIme) => {
255	        if (header?.masina) {
256	            await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).eq('uloga', 'viljuskarista_dorada').is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
257	            if (novoIme) await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').insert([{ radnik_ime: novoIme, masina_naziv: header.masina, vrijeme_prijave: new Date().toISOString(), uloga: 'viljuskarista_dorada' }]);
258	            window.dispatchEvent(new Event('radnici_updated'));
259	        }
260	        setViljuskarista(novoIme); localStorage.setItem('dorada_viljuskarista', novoIme);
261	    };
262	
263	    useEffect(() => {
264	        supabase.from('radnici').select('ime_prezime').then(({data}) => setRadniciList(data ? data.map(r=>({naziv: r.ime_prezime})) : []));
265	        supabase.from('katalog_proizvoda').select('*').then(({data}) => setKatalog(data || []));
266	        supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('id, kupac_naziv, status, tip_naloga, stavke_jsonb, tehnologija_jsonb').neq('status', 'ZAVRŠENO').then(({data}) => setAktivniNalozi(data || []));
267	        ucitajSveZapoocetePakete();
268	    }, [header?.masina]);
269	
270	    const ucitajSveZapoocetePakete = async () => {
271	        if (!header?.masina) { setActiveIzlazIds([]); return; }
272	        const { data } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('paket_id').is('closed_at', null).eq('masina', header.masina);
273	        if (data && data.length > 0) {
274	            const jedinstveniPaketi = [...new Set(data.map(p => p.paket_id))];
275	            setActiveIzlazIds(jedinstveniPaketi);
276	        } else {
277	            setActiveIzlazIds([]);
278	        }
279	    };
280	
281	    useEffect(() => {
282	        const fetchMasinaAtribute = async () => {
283	            if (!header?.masina) return;
284	            const { data } = await supabase.from('masine').select('atributi_paketa').eq('naziv', header.masina).maybeSingle();
285	            setDostupneOznake(data?.atributi_paketa || []);
286	            setOdabraneOznake([]); 
287	        };
288	        fetchMasinaAtribute();
289	
290	        const ucitajDezurneRadnike = async () => {
291	            if (!header?.masina) return;
292	            const { data } = await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').select('radnik_ime, uloga').eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
293	            if (data) {
294	                const o = data.find(r => r.uloga === 'operater_dorada');
295	                const v = data.find(r => r.uloga === 'viljuskarista_dorada');
296	                if (o) { setOperater(o.radnik_ime); localStorage.setItem('dorada_operater', o.radnik_ime); }
297	                if (v) { setViljuskarista(v.radnik_ime); localStorage.setItem('dorada_viljuskarista', v.radnik_ime); }
298	            }
299	        };
300	        ucitajDezurneRadnike();
301	    }, [header?.masina]);
302	
303	    useEffect(() => {
304	        const fetchSve = async () => {
305	            if (!header?.masina) return;
306	            
307	            const { data: paks } = await supabase.from('paketi')
308	                .select('*')
309	                .gt('kolicina_final', 0)
310	                .is('closed_at', null)
311	                .neq('masina', header.masina)
312	                .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
313	                .limit(100);
314	                
315	            const { data: techData } = await supabase.from('tehnologija_katalog').select('finalna_sifra, faze_jsonb');
316	
317	            let validni = paks || [];
318	
319	            if (radniNalog && tipNaloga === 'FAZNI') {
320	                validni = validni.filter(p => p.broj_veze === radniNalog);
321	                validni = validni.filter(p => {
322	                    const katItem = katalog.find(k => k.naziv === p.naziv_proizvoda);
323	                    if (!katItem) return true; 
324	                    
325	                    const bom = techData?.find(t => t.finalna_sifra === katItem.sifra);
326	                    if (!bom || !bom.faze_jsonb) return true; 
327	                    
328	                    const currIdx = bom.faze_jsonb.findIndex(f => f.masina.toUpperCase() === header.masina.toUpperCase());
329	                    if (currIdx > 0) {
330	                        const prevMasina = bom.faze_jsonb[currIdx - 1].masina.toUpperCase();
331	                        return p.masina?.toUpperCase() === prevMasina;
332	                    }
333	                    return true;
334	                });
335	            }
336	
337	            setPredlozeniPaketi(validni);
338	        };
339	        fetchSve();
340	    }, [header?.masina, radniNalog, tipNaloga, katalog]);
341	
342	    const handleNalogSelect = async (val) => {
343	        if(!val) {
344	            setRadniNalog('');
345	            setTipNaloga(''); setRnStavke([]); setPredlozeniPaketi([]); ucitajSveZapoocetePakete();
346	            return;
347	        }
348	        setRadniNalog(val);
349	        const {data} = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('*').eq('id', val.toUpperCase()).maybeSingle();
350	        if (data) {
351	            setTipNaloga(data.tip_naloga || '');
352	            const ucitaneStavke = data.stavke_jsonb || data.stavke || [];
353	            const tehnologija = data.tehnologija_jsonb || {};
354	            const isFazni = data.tip_naloga === 'FAZNI';
355	            let mapiraneStavke = [];
356	
357	            if (ucitaneStavke.length > 0) {
358	                ucitaneStavke.forEach(s => {
359	                    const katItem = katalog.find(k => k.sifra === s.sifra) || {};
360	                    let dimenzije = katItem.sifra ? `${katItem.visina || '-'}x${katItem.sirina || '-'}x${katItem.duzina || '-'}` : 'Nema u katalogu';
361	                    let naruceno = parseFloat(s.kolicina_obracun || s.kolicina || 0);
362	                    let jm = s.jm_obracun || s.jm_unos || 'm3';
363	                    let oznake = []; let napravljeno = 0; let skica = null;
364	
365	                    if (isFazni) {
366	                        const fazaZaOvuMasinu = (tehnologija[s.id] || []).find(f => f.masina?.toUpperCase() === header.masina?.toUpperCase());
367	                        if (!fazaZaOvuMasinu) return; 
368	
369	                        dimenzije = fazaZaOvuMasinu.dimenzija || dimenzije;
370	                        naruceno = parseFloat(fazaZaOvuMasinu.kolicina || 0);
371	                        jm = fazaZaOvuMasinu.jm || jm;
372	                        oznake = fazaZaOvuMasinu.oznake || [];
373	                        napravljeno = parseFloat(s.napravljeno_po_fazama?.[header.masina] || 0);
374	                        skica = fazaZaOvuMasinu.skica_url || fazaZaOvuMasinu.dokument_url || s.skica_url || s.dokument_url;
375	                    } else {
376	                        napravljeno = parseFloat(s.napravljeno || 0);
377	                        skica = s.skica_url || s.dokument_url;
378	                    }
379	
380	                    const v = parseFloat(katItem.visina) || 0; const sir = parseFloat(katItem.sirina) || 0; const d = parseFloat(katItem.duzina) || 0;
381	                    const vol1kom = (v > 0 && sir > 0 && d > 0) ? (v/100) * (sir/100) * (d/100) : 0;
382	
383	                    mapiraneStavke.push({
384	                        id: s.id, sifra_proizvoda: s.sifra, naziv_proizvoda: s.naziv, jm: jm, naruceno: naruceno, 
385	                        napravljeno: napravljeno, dimenzije: dimenzije, vol1kom: vol1kom, predlozene_oznake: oznake,
386	                        isFazni: isFazni, skica_url: skica 
387	                    });
388	                });
389	                
390	                if(mapiraneStavke.length === 0 && isFazni) {
391	                    prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Nema Faza', poruka: `Ovaj nalog ne sadrži stavke predviđene za mašinu: ${header.masina}`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
392	                }
393	                setRnStavke(mapiraneStavke);
394	            } else { prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: `Nalog ${val} nema stavki!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog }); setRnStavke([]); setTipNaloga(''); }
395	        } else { prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: `Nalog ${val} ne postoji!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog }); setRnStavke([]); setTipNaloga(''); }
396	    };
397	
398	    const handleStavkaSelect = async (stavka) => {
399	        let deb = '', sir = '', duz = '';
400	        if (stavka.isFazni && stavka.dimenzije && stavka.dimenzije !== 'Nema u katalogu') {
401	            const parts = stavka.dimenzije.split(/x|\*/i);
402	            if (parts.length >= 3) { deb = parts[0].trim(); sir = parts[1].trim(); duz = parts[2].trim(); }
403	        } else {
404	            const {data: kat} = await supabase.from('katalog_proizvoda').select('*').eq('sifra', stavka.sifra_proizvoda).maybeSingle();
405	            deb = kat?.visina||''; sir = kat?.sirina||''; duz = kat?.duzina||'';
406	        }
407	
408	        setForm({ 
409	            ...form, 
410	            naziv: stavka.naziv_proizvoda, 
411	            debljina: deb, sirina: sir, duzina: duz, 
412	            jm: 'kom', rn_jm: stavka.jm, rn_stavka_id: stavka.id, 
413	            naruceno: parseFloat(stavka.naruceno).toFixed(4), 
414	            napravljeno: parseFloat(stavka.napravljeno || 0).toFixed(4) 
415	        });
416	        if (stavka.predlozene_oznake && stavka.predlozene_oznake.length > 0) {
417	            setOdabraneOznake(stavka.predlozene_oznake);
418	        } else {
419	            setOdabraneOznake([]);
420	        }
421	        dimRefs.debljina.current?.focus();
422	    };
423	
424	    const processUlaz = async (val) => {
425	        let id = val.toUpperCase().trim();
426	        
427	        const { data: checkR } = await supabase.from('paketi')
428	            .select('paket_id')
429	            .eq('paket_id', `${id}-R`)
430	            .gt('kolicina_final', 0)
431	            .maybeSingle();
432	            
433	        if (checkR) {
434	            id = `${id}-R`; 
435	        }
436	
437	        if (activeUlazIds.includes(id)) { setUlazScan(''); return; }
438	        
439	        const { data, error } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('*').eq('paket_id', id).gt('kolicina_final', 0);
440	        if (error) { prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Baza Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog }); setUlazScan(''); return; }
441	
442	        if (data && data.length > 0) { 
443	            const paket = data[0];
444	            setActiveUlazIds(prev => [...prev, id]); 
445	            setUlazneStavke(prev => [...prev, ...data]);
446	            setUlazScan(''); 
447	
448	            if (id.endsWith('-R')) {
449	                 setTimeout(() => alert(`⚠️ PAŽNJA: Ovaj paket (${id}) je VRAĆENA REKLAMACIJA!`), 500);
450	            }
451	
452	            if (paket.broj_veze && !radniNalog) {
453	                prikaziDialog({
454	                    tip: 'info', naslov: 'Vezani Nalog',
455	                    poruka: `Skenirani paket pripada Radnom Nalogu: ${paket.broj_veze}\nŽelite li automatski učitati taj nalog na mašinu?`,
456	                    confirmText: '✅ DA, UČITAJ', cancelText: '✕ NE',
457	                    onConfirm: () => { handleNalogSelect(paket.broj_veze); zatvoriDialog(); },
458	                    onCancel: zatvoriDialog
459	                });
460	            }
461	        } else { 
462	            prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Paket ne postoji', poruka: `ULAZNI paket ${id} ne postoji u bazi, ili je njegova količina nula (potrošen)!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
463	            setUlazScan(''); 
464	        }
465	    };
466	
467	    const handleUlazInput = (val, isEnter = false) => {
468	        setUlazScan(val);
469	        if(ulazTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(ulazTimerRef.current);
470	        if(!val) return;
471	        if (isEnter) processUlaz(val);
472	        else ulazTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => processUlaz(val), 2000);
473	    };
474	
475	    const potvrdiRazduzivanje = async () => {
476	        if (!razduziKol || isNaN(razduziKol)) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fali Količina', poruka: "Unesite ispravnu količinu!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
477	        const unos = parseFloat(razduziKol.toString().replace(',', '.'));
478	        if (unos < 0) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: "Količina ne može biti negativna!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
479	        const v = parseFloat(razduziZapis.debljina) || 1; const s = parseFloat(razduziZapis.sirina) || 1; const d = parseFloat(razduziZapis.duzina) || 1;
480	        let unosM3 = unos;
481	        if (razduziJm === 'kom') unosM3 = unos * (v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100);
482	        else if (razduziJm === 'm2') unosM3 = unos * (v/100);
483	        else if (razduziJm === 'm1') unosM3 = unos * (v/100) * (s/100);
484	
485	        let preostalo = 0;
486	        const trenutnoNaStanju = parseFloat(razduziZapis.kolicina_final);
487	        if (razduziMod === 'potroseno') preostalo = trenutnoNaStanju - unosM3;
488	        else if (razduziMod === 'ostalo') preostalo = unosM3;
489	        if (preostalo < 0) preostalo = 0;
490	        const novaKol = preostalo <= 0.001 ? 0 : preostalo;
491	        const izvrsiRazduzivanje = async () => {
492	            const { error } = await supabase.from('paketi').update({ kolicina_final: novaKol.toFixed(3) }).eq('id', razduziZapis.id);
493	            if (error) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Baza Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
494	            const { data } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('*').in('paket_id', activeUlazIds).gt('kolicina_final', 0);
495	            setUlazneStavke(data || []);
496	            setRazduziZapis(null); setRazduziKol('');
497	            zatvoriDialog();
498	        };
499	        if (novaKol === 0) {
500	            prikaziDialog({
501	                tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Potvrda Brisanja',
502	                poruka: `Stanje ove stavke će pasti na NULU i biće potpuno razdužena sa ulaza.\nDa li ste sigurni?`,
503	                confirmText: '✅ DA, RAZDUŽI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
504	                onConfirm: izvrsiRazduzivanje, onCancel: zatvoriDialog
505	            });
506	        } else {
507	            await izvrsiRazduzivanje();
508	        }
509	    };
510	
511	    const ukloniIzAktivnihUlaza = (paket_id) => {
512	        setActiveUlazIds(prev => prev.filter(id => id !== paket_id));
513	        setUlazneStavke(prev => prev.filter(s => s.paket_id !== paket_id));
514	    };
515	
516	    const processIzlaz = async (val) => {
517	        const id = val.toUpperCase().trim();
518	        if (!activeIzlazIds.includes(id)) {
519	            const { data: existing } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('*').eq('paket_id', id);
520	            if (existing && existing.length > 0) {
521	                const spisak = existing.map(i => `- ${i.naziv_proizvoda}: ${i.kolicina_final} ${i.jm}`).join('\n');
522	                return prikaziDialog({
523	                    tip: 'info', naslov: 'Paket Pronađen',
524	                    poruka: `📦 PAKET VEĆ POSTOJI: ${id}\n\nTrenutno sadrži:\n${spisak}\n\nDa li želite AŽURIRATI ovaj paket?`,
525	                    confirmText: '✅ AŽURIRAJ', cancelText: '✕ PONIŠTI',
526	                    onConfirm: () => { setActiveIzlazIds(p => [...p, id]); setSelectedIzlazId(id); fetchIzlaz(id); setIzlazScan(''); zatvoriDialog(); },
527	                    onCancel: () => { setIzlazScan(''); zatvoriDialog(); }
528	                });
529	            }
530	            setActiveIzlazIds(p => [...p, id]);
531	        }
532	        setSelectedIzlazId(id); fetchIzlaz(id); setIzlazScan('');
533	    };
534	    const handleIzlazInput = (val, isEnter = false) => {
535	        setIzlazScan(val);
536	        if (izlazTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(izlazTimerRef.current);
537	        if (!val) return;
538	        if (isEnter) processIzlaz(val);
539	        else izlazTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => processIzlaz(val), 2000);
540	    };
541	    const fetchIzlaz = async (pid) => { 
542	        const { data } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('*').eq('paket_id', pid);
543	        setIzlazPackageItems(data || []); 
544	        if (data && data.length > 0 && data[0].broj_veze && !radniNalog) { handleNalogSelect(data[0].broj_veze); }
545	    };
546	    const toggleOznaka = (o) => { setOdabraneOznake(prev => prev.includes(o) ? prev.filter(x => x !== o) : [...prev, o]); };
547	    
548	    const saveIzlaz = async () => {
549	        if (!selectedIzlazId) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fali Paket', poruka: "Prvo skenirajte IZLAZNI PAKET!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
550	        if (!form.kolicina_ulaz) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fali Količina', poruka: "Unesite količinu prije snimanja!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
551	        const izvrsiProcesSnimanja = async () => {
552	            const timeNow = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE');
553	            const unosKol = parseFloat(form.kolicina_ulaz);
554	            const v = parseFloat(form.debljina) || 1; const s = parseFloat(form.sirina) || 1; const d = parseFloat(form.duzina) || 1;
555	
556	            let komada = unosKol;
557	            if (form.jm === 'm3') komada = unosKol / ((v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100));
558	            else if (form.jm === 'm2') komada = unosKol / ((s/100) * (d/100));
559	            else if (form.jm === 'm1') komada = unosKol / (d/100);
560	
561	            const qtyZaPaket = parseFloat((komada * (v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100)).toFixed(3));
562	            let isNusProizvod = false; let currentRnStavka = null;
563	
564	            if (form.rn_stavka_id) {
565	                currentRnStavka = rnStavke.find(rs => rs.id === form.rn_stavka_id);
566	                if (currentRnStavka && currentRnStavka.naziv_proizvoda !== form.naziv) isNusProizvod = true; 
567	            } else if (radniNalog) { isNusProizvod = true;
568	            }
569	
570	            if (currentRnStavka && !isNusProizvod && !activeEditItem && !activeUlazIds.includes(selectedIzlazId)) {
571	                const vecNapravljeno = parseFloat(currentRnStavka.napravljeno) || 0;
572	                const naruceno = parseFloat(currentRnStavka.naruceno) || 0;
573	                
574	                let kolikoSadPravimo = komada;
575	                if (currentRnStavka.jm === 'm3') kolikoSadPravimo = qtyZaPaket;
576	                else if (currentRnStavka.jm === 'm2') kolikoSadPravimo = komada * (s/100) * (d/100);
577	                else if (currentRnStavka.jm === 'm1') kolikoSadPravimo = komada * (d/100);
578	                
579	                if ((vecNapravljeno + kolikoSadPravimo) > naruceno) {
580	                    const preostalo = naruceno - vecNapravljeno;
581	                    return prikaziDialog({
582	                        tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Prelazite Normu!',
583	                        poruka: `Za ovaj Radni Nalog je preostalo samo: ${preostalo.toFixed(3)} ${currentRnStavka.jm}.\nVi pokušavate dodati: ${kolikoSadPravimo.toFixed(3)} ${currentRnStavka.jm}.\n\nDa li ste sigurni da želite napraviti ovaj višak?`,
584	                        confirmText: '✅ DA, NAPRAVI VIŠAK', cancelText: '✕ PREKINI',
585	                        onConfirm: () => { zavrsiSnimanjeUBazu(qtyZaPaket, isNusProizvod, currentRnStavka, komada, v, s, d); zatvoriDialog(); },
586	                        onCancel: zatvoriDialog
587	                    });
588	                }
589	            }
590	            await zavrsiSnimanjeUBazu(qtyZaPaket, isNusProizvod, currentRnStavka, komada, v, s, d);
591	        };
592	
593	        if (activeUlazIds.length === 0) {
594	            prikaziDialog({
595	                tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Nema Sirovine',
596	                poruka: "Niste učitali nijedan ULAZNI paket (sirovinu). Da li sigurno želite snimiti izlaz bez porijekla?",
597	                confirmText: '✅ DA, SNIMI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
598	                onConfirm: () => { zatvoriDialog(); izvrsiProcesSnimanja(); },
599	                onCancel: zatvoriDialog
600	            });
601	        } else {
602	            await izvrsiProcesSnimanja();
603	        }
604	    };
605	
606	    const zavrsiSnimanjeUBazu = async (qtyZaPaket, isNusProizvod, currentRnStavka, komada, v, s, d) => {
607	        const timeNowFull = new Date().toISOString();
608	        const timeNow = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE');
609	        const { data: aktuelniRadnici } = await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').select('radnik_ime').eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
610	        const ostaliRadnici = aktuelniRadnici ? aktuelniRadnici.map(r => r.radnik_ime).filter(ime => ime !== operater && ime !== viljuskarista) : [];
611	        const sviRadniciPilana = [operater, viljuskarista, ...ostaliRadnici].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
612	        
613	        if (activeEditItem) {
614	            if (updateMode === 'dodaj') {
615	                await supabase.rpc('dodaj_u_paket', { p_id: activeEditItem.id, kolicina_za_dodati: qtyZaPaket });
616	            } else {
617	                await supabase.rpc('oduzmi_iz_paketa', { p_id: activeEditItem.id, kolicina_za_oduzeti: qtyZaPaket });
618	            }
619	
620	            const { error } = await supabase.from('paketi').update({ 
621	                vrijeme_tekst: timeNow, snimio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat',
622	                radnici_pilana: sviRadniciPilana, brentista: operater, viljuskarista: viljuskarista, oznake: odabraneOznake,
623	                broj_veze: radniNalog || activeEditItem.broj_veze, je_nusproizvod: activeEditItem.je_nusproizvod, masina: header.masina 
624	            }).eq('id', activeEditItem.id);
625	            if (error) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Baza Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
626	        } else {
627	            const { error } = await supabase.from('paketi').insert([{ 
628	                paket_id: selectedIzlazId, naziv_proizvoda: form.naziv, debljina: form.debljina, sirina: form.sirina, duzina: form.duzina, 
629	                kolicina_ulaz: form.kolicina_ulaz, jm: form.jm, kolicina_final: qtyZaPaket, mjesto: header.mjesto, masina: header.masina, 
630	                snimio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat', radnici_pilana: sviRadniciPilana, brentista: operater, viljuskarista: viljuskarista,
631	                vrijeme_tekst: timeNow, datum_yyyy_mm: header.datum, ai_sirovina_ids: activeUlazIds.join(','), oznake: odabraneOznake, 
632	                broj_veze: radniNalog, je_nusproizvod: isNusProizvod 
633	            }]);
634	            if (error) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Baza Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
635	            
636	            if(currentRnStavka && !isNusProizvod) {
637	                const rn_jm = form.rn_jm || 'm3'; let napravljenoZaRN = komada;
638	                if (rn_jm === 'm3') napravljenoZaRN = komada * (v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100);
639	                else if (rn_jm === 'm2') napravljenoZaRN = komada * (s/100) * (d/100);
640	                else if (rn_jm === 'm1') napravljenoZaRN = komada * (d/100);
641	
642	                const {data: rn_latest} = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('stavke_jsonb, tip_naloga').eq('id', radniNalog.toUpperCase()).maybeSingle();
643	                if (rn_latest && rn_latest.stavke_jsonb) {
644	                    const isFazni = rn_latest.tip_naloga === 'FAZNI';
645	                    const azuriraneStavke = rn_latest.stavke_jsonb.map(st => {
646	                        if (st.id === form.rn_stavka_id) {
647	                            if (isFazni) {
648	                                const trenutnoFaza = parseFloat(st.napravljeno_po_fazama?.[header.masina] || 0);
649	                                return { ...st, napravljeno_po_fazama: { ...(st.napravljeno_po_fazama || {}), [header.masina]: parseFloat((trenutnoFaza + napravljenoZaRN).toFixed(4)) } };
650	                            } else {
651	                                const novaKol = (parseFloat(st.napravljeno) || 0) + napravljenoZaRN; return { ...st, napravljeno: parseFloat(novaKol.toFixed(4)) };
652	                            }
653	                        }
654	                        return st;
655	                    });
656	                    await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').update({ stavke_jsonb: azuriraneStavke }).eq('id', radniNalog.toUpperCase());
657	                }
658	                handleNalogSelect(radniNalog);
659	                setForm(f => ({ ...f, napravljeno: (parseFloat(f.napravljeno) + napravljenoZaRN).toFixed(4) }));
660	            }
661	        }
662	        fetchIzlaz(selectedIzlazId);
663	        setForm(f => ({...f, kolicina_ulaz: ''})); setOdabraneOznake([]); setActiveEditItem(null);
664	    };
665	
666	    const obrisiStavkuIzPaketa = async (item, e) => {
667	        e.stopPropagation();
668	        prikaziDialog({
669	            tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Obriši iz paketa?',
670	            poruka: `Da li ste sigurni da želite OBRISATI stavku iz ovog paketa?\n(Napomena: Količina na Radnom Nalogu se neće automatski umanjiti!)`,
671	            confirmText: '🗑️ OBRIŠI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
672	            onConfirm: async () => { await supabase.from('paketi').delete().eq('id', item.id); fetchIzlaz(selectedIzlazId); zatvoriDialog(); },
673	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
674	        });
675	    };
676	    const zakljuciPaket = async (pid) => {
677	        if(izlazPackageItems.length === 0) {
678	            setActiveIzlazIds(p => p.filter(x => x !== pid));
679	            if (selectedIzlazId === pid) setSelectedIzlazId('');
680	            return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'info', naslov: 'Prazno', poruka: `Prazan paket ${pid} je zatvoren i oslobođen.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
681	        }
682	        prikaziDialog({
683	            tip: 'info', naslov: 'Zaključi Paket?',
684	            poruka: `ZAKLJUČITI paket ${pid}?`,
685	            confirmText: '🏁 ZAKLJUČI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
686	            onConfirm: async () => {
687	                await supabase.from('paketi').update({ closed_at: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('paket_id', pid);
688	                
689	                setActiveIzlazIds(p => p.filter(x => x !== pid));
690	                if (selectedIzlazId === pid) { setSelectedIzlazId(''); setIzlazPackageItems([]); }
691	                zatvoriDialog();
692	
693	                prikaziDialog({
694	                    tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Uspješno Zaključeno!',
695	                    poruka: `Paket uspješno zaključen!\n\nŽelite li odmah isprintati A5 deklaraciju za ovaj paket?`,
696	                    confirmText: '🖨️ DA, ŠTAMPAJ', cancelText: '✕ NE',
697	                    onConfirm: () => {
698	                        const stavkaNaloga = rnStavke.find(s => s.naziv_proizvoda === izlazPackageItems[0]?.naziv_proizvoda);
699	                        if (stavkaNaloga && stavkaNaloga.isFazni) {
700	                            supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('tehnologija_jsonb').eq('id', radniNalog).single().then(({data: rnDb}) => {
701	                                const teh = rnDb?.tehnologija_jsonb?.[stavkaNaloga.id] || [];
702	                                printFaznaDeklaracijaPaketa(pid, izlazPackageItems, radniNalog, header.masina, teh);
703	                            });
704	                        } else { printDeklaracijaPaketa(pid, izlazPackageItems, radniNalog); }
705	                        zatvoriDialog();
706	                    },
707	                    onCancel: zatvoriDialog
708	                });
709	            },
710	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
711	        });
712	    };
713	
714	    const otkaziPaket = (pid) => {
715	        prikaziDialog({
716	            tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Ukloniti paket?',
717	            poruka: `Ukloniti paket ${pid} sa ekrana? (Ostat će u bazi kao Započet)`,
718	            confirmText: '🗑️ UKLONI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
719	            onConfirm: () => { setActiveIzlazIds(p => p.filter(x => x !== pid)); if(selectedIzlazId === pid) setSelectedIzlazId(''); zatvoriDialog(); },
720	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
721	        });
722	    };
723	
724	    const ulazM3 = useMemo(() => ulazneStavke.reduce((sum, p) => sum + parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0), 0).toFixed(3), [ulazneStavke]);
725	    const izlazM3 = useMemo(() => izlazPackageItems.reduce((sum, p) => sum + parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0), 0).toFixed(3), [izlazPackageItems]);
726	    const livePreracunM3 = useMemo(() => {
727	        if(!razduziKol || isNaN(razduziKol) || !razduziZapis) return 0;
728	        const unos = parseFloat(razduziKol);
729	        const v = parseFloat(razduziZapis.debljina) || 1; const s = parseFloat(razduziZapis.sirina) || 1; const d = parseFloat(razduziZapis.duzina) || 1;
730	        if (razduziJm === 'kom') return unos * (v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100); if (razduziJm === 'm2') return unos * (v/100); if (razduziJm === 'm1') return unos * (v/100) * (s/100); return unos;
731	    }, [razduziKol, razduziJm, razduziZapis]);
732	
733	    const renderRadnikPolje = (polje) => {
734	        if (polje.id === 'operater') return <div className="h-full w-full min-w-0 bg-transparent text-theme-text font-black text-sm uppercase px-2 py-1 outline-none overflow-visible"><MasterSearch data={radniciList} poljaZaPretragu={['naziv']} value={operater} onSelect={r => handleOperaterChange(r.naziv)} placeholder="Odaberi operatera..." /></div>;
735	        if (polje.id === 'viljuskarista') return <div className="h-full w-full min-w-0 bg-transparent text-theme-text font-black text-sm uppercase px-2 py-1 outline-none overflow-visible"><MasterSearch data={radniciList} poljaZaPretragu={['naziv']} value={viljuskarista} onSelect={r => handleViljuskaristaChange(r.naziv)} placeholder="Odaberi viljuškaristu..." /></div>;
736	        return null;
737	    };
738	
739	    const sveOznakeZaPrikaz = Array.from(new Set([...dostupneOznake, ...odabraneOznake]));
740	
741	    if (!header?.masina) {
742	        return (
743	            <div className="p-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in">
744	                <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-amber-500" user={user} saas={saas} />
745	                <div className="bg-red-900/30 border-2 border-red-500 p-10 rounded-[2.5rem] text-center shadow-2xl mt-10">
746	                    <span className="text-6xl block mb-4 animate-bounce">⚠️</span>
747	                    <h2 className="text-2xl text-red-400 font-black uppercase tracking-widest">Mašina nije odabrana!</h2>
748	                </div>
749	            </div>
750	        );
751	    }
752	    
753	    return (
754	        <div className="p-4 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6 animate-in fade-in font-bold" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_slova }}>
755	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
756	            
757	            {razduziZapis && (
758	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[110] bg-black/80 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-md animate-in fade-in">
759	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border border-red-500 p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl max-w-sm w-full relative">
760	                        <button onClick={() => setRazduziZapis(null)} className="absolute top-4 right-4 bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-theme-text hover:bg-red-500 w-8 h-8 rounded-box font-black flex items-center justify-center transition-all">✕</button>
761	                        <h3 className="text-red-400 font-black uppercase text-sm mb-4 border-b border-theme-border pb-3">Razduživanje Stavke</h3>
762	                        
763	                        <div className="mb-4 text-xs text-slate-300">
764	                            <p className="mb-1">Paket: <b className="text-theme-text bg-slate-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">{razduziZapis.paket_id}</b></p>
765	                            <p className="mb-1">Proizvod: <b className="text-theme-text">{razduziZapis.naziv_proizvoda}</b></p>
766	                            <p className="mt-2 text-[10px] uppercase text-slate-500">Trenutno stanje na ulazu:</p>
767	                            <p className="text-emerald-400 font-black text-2xl drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]">{razduziZapis.kolicina_final} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></p>
768	                        </div>
769	
770	                        <div className="flex bg-slate-800 p-1 rounded-xl mb-4 border border-theme-border">
771	                            <button onClick={() => { setRazduziMod('potroseno'); setRazduziKol(''); }} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-lg text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all ${razduziMod === 'potroseno' ? 'bg-red-600 text-theme-text shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-theme-text hover:bg-slate-700'}`}>🔴 Potrošeno</button>
772	                            <button onClick={() => { setRazduziMod('ostalo'); setRazduziKol(''); }} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-lg text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all ${razduziMod === 'ostalo' ? 'bg-blue-600 text-theme-text shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-theme-text hover:bg-slate-700'}`}>🔵 Ostalo</button>
773	                        </div>
774	
775	                        <div className="mb-6">
776	                            <label className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black mb-2 block text-center">Unesi količinu i odaberi mjeru</label>
777	                            <div className="flex gap-2 w-full items-center">
778	                                <input type="number" value={razduziKol} onChange={e => setRazduziKol(e.target.value)} placeholder="0" className={`flex-1 min-w-0 p-4 bg-theme-panel border-2 rounded-2xl text-center text-2xl text-theme-text font-black outline-none transition-all shadow-inner ${razduziMod === 'potroseno' ? 'border-red-500/50 focus:border-red-400 text-red-400' : 'border-blue-500/50 focus:border-blue-400 text-blue-400'}`} />
779	                                <select value={razduziJm} onChange={e => setRazduziJm(e.target.value)} className="w-24 shrink-0 p-4 bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl text-lg text-theme-text font-black outline-none border border-theme-border focus:border-emerald-500">
780	                                    <option value="kom">kom</option><option value="m3">m³</option><option value="m2">m²</option><option value="m1">m1</option>
781	                                </select>
782	                            </div>
783	                            {razduziKol && razduziJm !== 'm3' && (
784	                                <p className="text-center text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-3 font-bold bg-slate-800 p-2 rounded-xl border border-theme-border">
785	                                    Preračunato: <span className="text-theme-text font-black text-xs">~{livePreracunM3.toFixed(3)} m³</span>
786	                                </p>
787	                            )}
788	                        </div>
789	                        <button onClick={potvrdiRazduzivanje} className="w-full py-4 bg-emerald-600 text-theme-text font-black rounded-xl text-xs uppercase shadow-lg hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-all border border-emerald-400">✅ Potvrdi i Razduži</button>
790	                    </div>
791	                </div>
792	            )}
793	
794	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-amber-500" user={user} modulIme="dorada" saas={saas} />
795	
796	            {saas.isEditMode && (
797	                <div className="bg-black/60 p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-amber-500/50 mb-6 shadow-2xl">
798	                    <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-sm mb-4">God Mode - Kontrole Dizajna</h3>
799	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
800	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja Pozadine (Kartice): <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_kartice} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_kartice: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
801	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja SVIH slova: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_slova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_slova: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
802	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Veličina naslova (px): <input type="number" value={saas.ui.velicina_naslova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, velicina_naslova: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 font-mono rounded" /></label>
803	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black md:col-span-1">Naslov Ulaza: <input type="text" value={saas.ui.naslov_ulaz} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, naslov_ulaz: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 rounded" /></label>
804	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black md:col-span-2">Naslov Izlaza: <input type="text" value={saas.ui.naslov_izlaz} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, naslov_izlaz: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 rounded" /></label>
805	                    </div>
806	                </div>
807	            )}
808	
809	            <h2 className="text-amber-500 text-center font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-xl mt-2 mb-6 drop-shadow-md">🔄 DORADA - ULAZ / IZLAZ</h2>
810	            
811	            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 bg-theme-card/60 backdrop-blur-md p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border/50 items-center justify-between shadow-lg relative z-[50]" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
812	                <div className="flex gap-4 w-full md:w-auto flex-1 flex-wrap">
813	                    {(saas.ui.polja_radnici || []).map((polje, index) => (
814	                        <div key={polje.id} className={`relative flex-1 min-w-[250px] flex items-center bg-black/40 rounded-xl border border-slate-800/50 p-2 overflow-visible transition-all ${saas.isEditMode ? 'border-dashed border-amber-500 bg-amber-900/20' : ''}`} draggable={saas.isEditMode} onDragStart={(e) => handleDragStart(e, index, 'polja_radnici')} onDragEnter={(e) => handleDragEnter(e, index)} onDragEnd={() => handleDrop('polja_radnici')} onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}>
815	                            {saas.isEditMode && (
816	                                <div className="absolute -top-3 -right-2 z-[60] flex gap-1">
817	                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 bg-theme-card px-2 py-1 rounded-box cursor-move border border-amber-500/50 shadow-lg">☰ POMICANJE</span>
818	                                </div>
819	                            )}
820	                            <div className="flex-1 flex items-center overflow-visible">
821	                                {saas.isEditMode ? (
822	                                    <input value={polje.label} onChange={(e) => updatePolje(index, 'label', e.target.value, 'polja_radnici')} className="w-24 bg-theme-card text-amber-400 p-1 rounded border border-amber-500/50 text-[8px] uppercase font-black shrink-0 mr-2" placeholder="Naslov..." />
823	                                ) : (
824	                                    polje.label && <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase mx-2 whitespace-nowrap shrink-0 w-24 overflow-hidden text-ellipsis">{polje.label}</label>
825	                                )}
826	                                <div className="flex-1 border-l border-theme-border/50 pl-2 relative overflow-visible z-[100]">
827	                                    {renderRadnikPolje(polje)}
828	                                </div>
829	                            </div>
830	                        </div>
831	                    ))}
832	                </div>
833	            </div>
834	
835	            <div className="flex flex-col xl:flex-row gap-6 items-start relative z-10">
836	                
837	                {/* LIJEVA KOLONA - ULAZ */}
838	                <div className="w-full xl:w-1/2 flex flex-col gap-6">
839	                    <div className="bg-theme-card/80 backdrop-blur-md p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] border border-red-500/30 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(239,68,68,0.05)]" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
840	                        <h3 className="text-red-500 font-black uppercase tracking-widest border-b border-red-500/20 pb-3 mb-5 flex items-center gap-2">
841	                            <span>📥</span> ULAZ - SIROVINA I NALOG
842	                        </h3>
843	
844	                        <div className="relative font-black bg-blue-900/10 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-blue-500/20 mb-6 overflow-visible">
845	                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
846	                                <label className="text-[10px] text-blue-400 uppercase font-black tracking-widest">RADNI NALOG ZA IZRADU</label>
847	                                {radniNalog && <button onClick={() => {setRadniNalog(''); setTipNaloga(''); setRnStavke([]); setPredlozeniPaketi([]); ucitajSveZapoocetePakete();}} className="text-[9px] text-red-400 hover:text-theme-text uppercase px-3 py-1 rounded bg-red-900/30 font-black border border-red-500/30">✕ Ukloni</button>}
848	                            </div>
849	                            
850	                            <MasterSearch 
851	                                data={aktivniNalozi} 
852	                                poljaZaPretragu={['id', 'kupac_naziv']} 
853	                                value={radniNalog} 
854	                                onSelect={(n) => handleNalogSelect(n.id)} 
855	                                onScanClick={() => {setScanTarget('nalog'); setIsScanning(true);}} 
856	                                placeholder="Upiši broj naloga/ponude ili skeniraj..."
857	                                renderItem={(n) => (
858	                                    <div>
859	                                        <div className="text-xs font-black text-theme-text">{n.id}</div>
860	                                        <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1">{n.kupac_naziv} | <span className="text-amber-400">{n.status}</span></div>
861	                                    </div>
862	                                )}
863	                            />
864	                            
865	                            {rnStavke.length > 0 && (
866	                                <div className="mt-3 space-y-2 border-t border-blue-500/20 pt-3 max-h-[300px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
867	                                    <span className="text-[9px] text-blue-300 uppercase font-black block mb-2 tracking-widest opacity-80">Stavke na nalogu (Klikni za prenos desno):</span>
868	                                    {rnStavke.map(s => {
869	                                        const preostalo = s.naruceno - s.napravljeno;
870	                                        let pM3 = 0, pKom = 0;
871	                                        if (preostalo > 0) {
872	                                            if (s.jm === 'm3') { pM3 = preostalo; pKom = s.vol1kom > 0 ? Math.ceil(preostalo / s.vol1kom) : 0; }
873	                                            else if (s.jm === 'kom') { pKom = preostalo; pM3 = preostalo * s.vol1kom; }
874	                                            else { pM3 = preostalo; }
875	                                        }
876	                                        return (
877	                                        <div key={s.id} onClick={() => {
878	                                            if(!selectedIzlazId) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Nedostaje Paket', poruka: "Prvo desno skeniraj ili upiši broj IZLAZNOG PAKETA!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
879	                                            handleStavkaSelect(s);
880	                                        }} className="flex flex-col p-3 bg-slate-800/80 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:bg-blue-600 transition-all border border-theme-border/50 group">
881	                                            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center">
882	                                                <div>
883	                                                    <div className="text-xs text-theme-text font-black">{s.dimenzije ? `${s.dimenzije} | ` : ''}{s.naziv_proizvoda}</div>
884	                                                    <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1 font-bold">
885	                                                        {s.isFazni ? <span className="text-amber-400 bg-amber-900/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded mr-2">FAZA: {header.masina}</span> : ''}

887	                                                    </div>
888	                                                </div>

890	                                                    <div className={`text-xs font-black ${preostalo > 0 ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-emerald-400'}`}>Preostalo: {preostalo > 0 ? `${pM3.toFixed(3)} m³` : 'GOTOVO ✅'}</div>
891	                                                </div>
892	                                            </div>
893	                                            
894	                                            {s.skica_url && (
