897	                                                        📎 Prikaz Skice / PDF-a
898	                                                    </button>
899	                                                </div>
900	                                            )}
901	                                        </div>
902	                                    )})}
903	                                </div>
904	                            )}
905	                        </div>
906

909	                            <div className="flex bg-theme-panel border border-red-500/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner focus-within:border-red-500 relative z-10">
910	                                <input type="text" value={ulazScan} onChange={e => handleUlazInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>{if(e.key==='Enter') handleUlazInput(ulazScan, true)}} placeholder="UČITAJ PAKET SIROVINE..." className="flex-1 p-5 bg-transparent text-center text-theme-text outline-none uppercase text-lg font-black min-w-0" />
911	                                <button onClick={() => {setScanTarget('ulaz'); setIsScanning(true);}} className="px-6 bg-red-600/30 text-red-400 font-bold hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-theme-text transition-all text-2xl border-l border-red-500/50 shrink-0 backdrop-blur-sm">📷</button>

1065	                                        {activeEditItem ? `✅ SPASI IZMJENE STAVKE` : `➕ DODAJ U ${selectedIzlazId}`}
1066	                                    </button>
1067	                                    
1068	                                    {izlazPackageItems.length > 0 && (
1069	                                        <div className="mt-4 border-t border-theme-border pt-4">
1070	                                            <label className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black block mb-2 tracking-widest">Sadržaj:</label>
1071	                                            <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[150px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
1072	                                                {izlazPackageItems.map(item => {
1073	                                                    const rnStavka = rnStavke.find(rs => rs.naziv_proizvoda === item.naziv_proizvoda);
1074	                                                    let preostaloText = null;
1075	                                                    if (rnStavka && !item.je_nusproizvod) {
1076	                                                        const preostalo = rnStavka.naruceno - rnStavka.napravljeno;
1077	                                                        if (preostalo > 0) {
1078	                                                            let pM3 = 0, pKom = 0;
1079	                                                            if (rnStavka.jm === 'm3') { pM3 = preostalo; pKom = rnStavka.vol1kom > 0 ? Math.ceil(preostalo / rnStavka.vol1kom) : 0; }
1080	                                                            else if (rnStavka.jm === 'kom') { pKom = preostalo; pM3 = preostalo * rnStavka.vol1kom; }
1081	                                                            else { pM3 = preostalo; }
1082	                                                            preostaloText = `${pM3.toFixed(3)} m³`;
1083	                                                        } else preostaloText = '0 (GOTOVO)';
1084	                                                    }
1085	
1086	                                                    return (
1087	                                                    <div key={item.id} onClick={() => { setActiveEditItem(item); setForm({...item, kolicina_ulaz: '' }); setOdabraneOznake(item.oznake || []); }} className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 bg-theme-card border border-theme-border/50 rounded-2xl cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500 transition-all shadow-sm group">
1088	                                                        <div>
1089	                                                            <div className="text-xs uppercase text-theme-text font-black">{item.naziv_proizvoda} {item.je_nusproizvod ? <span className="text-amber-500 text-[9px] ml-2">(Nusproizvod)</span> : ''}</div>
1090	                                                            <div className="text-emerald-500 text-lg font-black tracking-tighter mt-1">{item.debljina}x{item.sirina}x{item.duzina} <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 ml-1">cm</span></div>
1091	                                                            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 items-center mt-2">
1092	                                                                {item.oznake && item.oznake.length > 0 && (<div className="flex gap-1">{item.oznake.map(o => <span key={o} className="text-[8px] bg-amber-900/40 text-amber-400 px-2 py-1 rounded uppercase font-black">{o}</span>)}</div>)}
1093	                                                                {rnStavka && !item.je_nusproizvod && (<div className="text-[9px] bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/30 px-2 py-1 rounded uppercase font-black text-blue-400 shadow-sm">Nalog Preostalo: <span className={preostaloText !== '0 (GOTOVO)' ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-emerald-400'}>{preostaloText}</span></div>)}
1094	                                                            </div>
1095	                                                        </div>
1096	                                                        <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-2">
1097	                                                            <div className="text-right font-black"><div className="text-xl text-theme-text">{item.kolicina_final} <span className="text-emerald-500 text-xs">m³</span></div><div className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 bg-black/40 px-2 py-1 rounded mt-1 inline-block">{item.kolicina_ulaz} {item.jm}</div></div>
1098	                                                            <div className="flex gap-1">
1099	                                                                <button onClick={(e) => obrisiStavkuIzPaketa(item, e)} className="bg-red-900/40 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-black uppercase opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all">🗑️</button>
1100	                                                                <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); printDeklaracijaPaketa(item.paket_id, [item], radniNalog); }} className="bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-600 hover:text-white px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-black uppercase opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all">🖨️</button>
1101	                                                            </div>
1102	                                                        </div>
1103	                                                    </div>
1104	                                                )})}
1105	                                            </div>
1106	                                        </div>
1107	                                    )}
1108	                                </div>
1109	                            )}
1110	                        </div>
1111	                    </div>
1112	                </div>
1113	
1114	            </div>
1115	            
1116	            <SaaS_DnevnikMasine 
1117	                modul="Dorada" 
1118	                header={header} 
1119	                user={user} 
1120	                saas={saas} 
1121	                updatePolje={updatePolje} 
1122	                toggleVelicina={toggleVelicinaPolja} 
1123	                spremiDimenzije={spremiDimenzije}
1124	                handleDragStart={handleDragStart}
1125	                handleDragEnter={handleDragEnter}
1126	                handleDrop={handleDrop}
1127	            />
1128	            
1129	            {isScanning && <ScannerOverlay onScan={(text) => { if(scanTarget==='nalog') handleNalogSelect(text); else if(scanTarget==='ulaz') handleUlazInput(text, true); else handleIzlazInput(text, true); setIsScanning(false); }} onClose={() => setIsScanning(false)} />}
1130	        </div>
1131	    );
1132	}

7	import { Users, CalendarCheck, Clock4, CalendarX2, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Edit3 } from 'lucide-react';
8	
9	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
10	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
11	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
12	
13	const mjeseciBHS = ['Januar', 'Februar', 'Mart', 'April', 'Maj', 'Juni', 'Juli', 'Avgust', 'Septembar', 'Oktobar', 'Novembar', 'Decembar'];
14	
15	const formatLocalISODate = (date) => {
16	    if (!date || isNaN(date.getTime())) return '';
17	    const y = date.getFullYear();
18	    const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
19	    const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
20	    return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
21	};
22	
23	export default function HrDashboardModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
24	    const saas = useSaaS('hr_modul', { boja_kartice: '#1e293b', boja_slova: '#ffffff', boja_akcenta: '#3b82f6' });
25	
26	    const [tab, setTab] = useState('prisutnost');
27	    const [radnici, setRadnici] = useState([]);
28	    const [radniSati, setRadniSati] = useState([]);
29	    const [zahtjevi, setZahtjevi] = useState([]);
30	    const [praznici, setPraznici] = useState([]);
31	
32	    const [pocetakSmjene, setPocetakSmjene] = useState('07:30');
33	    const [krajSmjene, setKrajSmjene] = useState('16:00');
34	
35	    const [odabraniRadnik, setOdabraniRadnik] = useState(null);
36	    const [mjesecPrikaza, setMjesecPrikaza] = useState(formatLocalISODate(new Date()).substring(0, 7)); 
37	    
38	    const [trenutniMjesecKalendara, setTrenutniMjesecKalendara] = useState(new Date());
39	    const [prikazKalendara, setPrikazKalendara] = useState('MJESEC');
40	    const [selektovaniZahtjev, setSelektovaniZahtjev] = useState(null);
41	
42	    const [showRucniUpis, setShowRucniUpis] = useState(false);
43	    const [formaUpis, setFormaUpis] = useState({ tip_odsustva: 'NEOPRAVDANO', datum_od: '', datum_do: '', razlog: '' });
44	    const [formaPraznik, setFormaPraznik] = useState({ datum: '', naziv: '', je_radni_dan: false });
45	
46	    const [datumGenOd, setDatumGenOd] = useState(formatLocalISODate(new Date())); // NOVO: Datum od kojeg vazi pravilo za subote
47	
48	    const [modalUredi, setModalUredi] = useState(null);
49	    const [stvarniSati, setStvarniSati] = useState(0);
50	    const [editSati, setEditSati] = useState('');
51	    const [editPrekovremeno, setEditPrekovremeno] = useState('');
52	    const [editKasnjenje, setEditKasnjenje] = useState('');
53	    const [editRanije, setEditRanije] = useState('');
54	
55	    const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ isOpen: false });
56	    const prikaziDialog = (opcije) => setDialog({ isOpen: true, confirmText: 'POTVRDI', cancelText: 'ZATVORI', ...opcije });
57	    const zatvoriDialog = () => setDialog({ isOpen: false });
58	
59	    useEffect(() => { 
60	        const snimljenPocetak = localStorage.getItem('erp_pocetak_smjene');
61	        const snimljenKraj = localStorage.getItem('erp_kraj_smjene');
62	        if (snimljenPocetak) setPocetakSmjene(snimljenPocetak);
63	        if (snimljenKraj) setKrajSmjene(snimljenKraj);
64	        loadAll(); 
65	    }, [mjesecPrikaza]);
66	
67	    const loadAll = async () => {
68	        const { data: rData } = await supabase.from('radnici').select('*').order('ime_prezime');
69	        setRadnici(rData || []);
70	
71	        const mOd = `${mjesecPrikaza}-01`;
72	        const mDo = `${mjesecPrikaza}-31`;
73	
74	        const { data: sData } = await supabase.from('radni_sati').select('*').gte('datum', mOd).lte('datum', mDo).order('datum', { ascending: false });
75	        setRadniSati(sData || []);
76	
77	        const { data: zData } = await supabase.from('zahtjevi_odsustva').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
78	        setZahtjevi(zData || []);
79	
80	        const { data: pData } = await supabase.from('kalendar_izuzeci').select('*').order('datum');
81	        setPraznici(pData || []);
82	    };
83	
84	    const zapisiU_Log = async (akcija, detalji) => { 
85	        await supabase.from('sistem_audit_log').insert([{ korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat_Admin', akcija, detalji }]); 
86	    };
87	
88	    const spasiPostavkeSmjene = () => {
89	        localStorage.setItem('erp_pocetak_smjene', pocetakSmjene);
90	        localStorage.setItem('erp_kraj_smjene', krajSmjene);
91	        prikaziDialog({ tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Uspješno', poruka: 'Radno vrijeme firme uspješno sačuvano!', onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
92	    };
93	
94	    const izracunajDnevnicu = async (zapis) => {
95	        if (!zapis.vrijeme_dolaska || !zapis.vrijeme_odlaska) {
96	            return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: 'Radnik još uvijek nije odjavljen!', onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
97	        }
98	
99	        const dStart = new Date(zapis.vrijeme_dolaska);
100	        const dEnd = new Date(zapis.vrijeme_odlaska);
101	        
102	        const [hStart, mStart] = pocetakSmjene.split(':');
103	        const [hEnd, mEnd] = krajSmjene.split(':');
104	        
105	        let officialStart = new Date(dStart); officialStart.setHours(parseInt(hStart), parseInt(mStart), 0);
106	        let officialEnd = new Date(dStart); officialEnd.setHours(parseInt(hEnd), parseInt(mEnd), 0);
107	
108	        let kasnjenjeMin = 0; let ranijiIzlazakMin = 0;
109	        let radniSatiDec = 0;
110	
111	        if (dStart >= officialEnd || dEnd <= officialStart) {
112	            radniSatiDec = 0; kasnjenjeMin = 0; ranijiIzlazakMin = 0;
113	        } else {
114	            let obracunskiStart = new Date(dStart); let obracunskiEnd = new Date(dEnd);
115	            if (dStart < officialStart) { obracunskiStart = officialStart; }
116	            else if (dStart > officialStart) { kasnjenjeMin = Math.round((dStart - officialStart) / 60000); }
117	            if (dEnd < officialEnd) { ranijiIzlazakMin = Math.round((officialEnd - dEnd) / 60000); }
118	            else if (dEnd > officialEnd) { obracunskiEnd = officialEnd; }
119	
120	            radniSatiDec = (obracunskiEnd - obracunskiStart) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
121	            if (radniSatiDec < 0) radniSatiDec = 0;
122	        }
123	
124	        await supabase.from('radni_sati').update({ obracunato_sati: radniSatiDec.toFixed(2), kasnjenje_min: kasnjenjeMin, raniji_izlazak_min: ranijiIzlazakMin }).eq('id', zapis.id);
125	        loadAll();
126	        prikaziDialog({ tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Uspješan obračun', poruka: `Sistem je ponovo izračunao sate za radnika ${zapis.radnik_ime}.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
127	    };
128	
129	    const otvoriModalUredi = (zapis) => {
130	        setModalUredi(zapis);
131	        const stvarni = (new Date(zapis.vrijeme_odlaska) - new Date(zapis.vrijeme_dolaska)) / 3600000;
132	        setStvarniSati(stvarni > 0 ? stvarni : 0);
133	        setEditSati(zapis.obracunato_sati || 0); setEditPrekovremeno((zapis.prekovremeno_min || 0) / 60); setEditKasnjenje(zapis.kasnjenje_min || 0); setEditRanije(zapis.raniji_izlazak_min || 0);
134	    };
135	
136	    const sacuvajIzmjeneSati = async () => {
137	        if (!modalUredi) return;
138	        const obracunato = parseFloat(editSati) || 0; const prekovr = parseFloat(editPrekovremeno) || 0; const kasni = parseInt(editKasnjenje) || 0; const ranije = parseInt(editRanije) || 0;
139	
140	        await supabase.from('radni_sati').update({ obracunato_sati: obracunato.toFixed(2), prekovremeno_min: prekovr * 60, kasnjenje_min: kasni, raniji_izlazak_min: ranije }).eq('id', modalUredi.id);
141	        await zapisiU_Log('KOREKCIJA_RADNOG_VREMENA', `Izmijenjeni sati za: ${modalUredi.radnik_ime} (Datum: ${modalUredi.datum})`);
142	        
143	        setModalUredi(null); loadAll();
144	    };
145	
146	    const automatskiSveStandardno = () => { setEditSati(stvarniSati.toFixed(2)); setEditPrekovremeno(0); setEditKasnjenje(0); setEditRanije(0); };
147	    const automatskiSvePrekovremeno = () => { setEditSati(0); setEditPrekovremeno(stvarniSati.toFixed(2)); setEditKasnjenje(0); setEditRanije(0); };
148	
149	    const obrisiZapisSigurno = (zapis) => {
150	        prikaziDialog({
151	            tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Brisanje Radnog Vremena', poruka: `Da li ste sigurni da želite trajno obrisati zapis za radnika ${zapis.radnik_ime}?`,
152	            confirmText: '🗑️ TRAJNO OBRIŠI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
153	            onConfirm: async () => {
154	                await supabase.from('radni_sati').delete().eq('id', zapis.id);
155	                await zapisiU_Log('BRISANJE_RADNOG_VREMENA', `Obrisan zapis za: ${zapis.radnik_ime} (Datum: ${zapis.datum})`);
156	                loadAll(); zatvoriDialog();
157	            },
158	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
159	        });
160	    };
161	
162	    const obradiZahtjevOdmor = async (z, status, inicijativa) => {
163	        let poruka = `Da li ste sigurni da želite postaviti status na ${status}?`;
164	        if (status === 'ODOBRENO' && z.tip_odsustva === 'GODIŠNJI') poruka += `\nKvote će biti skinute radniku na inicijativu: ${inicijativa}.`;
165	
166	        prikaziDialog({
167	            tip: status === 'ODOBRENO' ? 'info' : 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Obrada Zahtjeva', poruka,
168	            confirmText: '✅ POTVRDI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
169	            onConfirm: async () => {
170	                await supabase.from('zahtjevi_odsustva').update({ status, inicijativa, odobrio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime }).eq('id', z.id);
171	                if (status === 'ODOBRENO' && z.tip_odsustva === 'GODIŠNJI') {
172	                    const radnik = radnici.find(r => r.ime_prezime === z.radnik_ime);
173	                    if (radnik) {
174	                        const poljeUpdate = inicijativa === 'RADNIK' ? 'godisnji_iskoristeno_radnik' : 'godisnji_iskoristeno_poslodavac';
175	                        const novaKvota = (radnik[poljeUpdate] || 0) + z.broj_radnih_dana;
176	                        await supabase.from('radnici').update({ [poljeUpdate]: novaKvota }).eq('id', radnik.id);
177	                    }
178	                }
179	                setSelektovaniZahtjev(null); loadAll(); zatvoriDialog();
180	            },
181	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
182	        });
183	    };
184	
185	    const rucniUpisOdsustva = async () => {
186	        if (!formaUpis.datum_od || !formaUpis.datum_do) return alert("Odaberite datume!");
187	        let brojDana = 0;
188	        for (let d = new Date(formaUpis.datum_od); d <= new Date(formaUpis.datum_do); d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
189	            const day = d.getDay(); if (day !== 0 && day !== 6) brojDana++; 
190	        }
191	
192	        const payload = { radnik_ime: odabraniRadnik.ime_prezime, tip_odsustva: formaUpis.tip_odsustva, datum_od: formaUpis.datum_od, datum_do: formaUpis.datum_do, broj_radnih_dana: brojDana, status: 'ODOBRENO', inicijativa: 'POSLODAVAC', razlog: formaUpis.razlog, odobrio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime };
193	        await supabase.from('zahtjevi_odsustva').insert([payload]); setShowRucniUpis(false); loadAll();
194	    };
195	
196	    const dodajPraznik = async () => {
197	        if (!formaPraznik.datum || !formaPraznik.naziv) return alert("Unesite datum i naziv praznika!");
198	        await supabase.from('kalendar_izuzeci').insert([formaPraznik]); setFormaPraznik({ datum: '', naziv: '', je_radni_dan: false }); loadAll();
199	    };
200	
201	    const obrisiPraznik = async (datum) => {
202	        prikaziDialog({
203	            tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Brisanje', poruka: "Da li ste sigurni da želite obrisati ovaj izuzetak u kalendaru?", confirmText: '🗑️ OBRIŠI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
204	            onConfirm: async () => { await supabase.from('kalendar_izuzeci').delete().eq('datum', datum); loadAll(); zatvoriDialog(); }, onCancel: zatvoriDialog
205	        });
206	    };
207	
208	    const obrisiSvePraznike = () => {
209	        prikaziDialog({
210	            tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Brisanje SVIH Izuzetaka', 
211	            poruka: "Da li ste potpuno sigurni da želite obrisati APSOLUTNO SVE praznike i radne subote iz baze? Ovo će očistiti cijeli kalendar izuzetaka.", 
212	            confirmText: '🗑️ OBRIŠI SVE', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
213	            onConfirm: async () => { 
214	                await supabase.from('kalendar_izuzeci').delete().not('datum', 'is', null); 
215	                loadAll(); zatvoriDialog(); 
216	            }, 
217	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
218	        });
219	    };
220	
221	    const generisiSubote = async (tip) => {
222	        if (!datumGenOd) return alert("Odaberite datum od kojeg pravilo važi!");
223	
224	        const startObj = new Date(datumGenOd);
225	        const godina = startObj.getFullYear();
226	        let zaUbaciti = [];
227	
228	        // Idemo od mjeseca u kojem je odabran datum, do kraja godine
229	        for (let m = startObj.getMonth(); m < 12; m++) {
230	            let prvaSubotaNadjen = false; 
231	            let counterSubota = 0;
232	            
233	            for (let d = 1; d <= 31; d++) {
234	                const dateObj = new Date(godina, m, d);
235	                if (dateObj.getMonth() !== m) break; 
236	                
237	                // Preskoči dane koji su prije odabranog datuma
238	                if (dateObj < startObj) continue;
239	
240	                if (dateObj.getDay() === 6) {
241	                    counterSubota++;
242	                    const iso = formatLocalISODate(dateObj); 
243	                    
244	                    if (tip === 'SVE') {
245	                        zaUbaciti.push({ datum: iso, naziv: 'Radna Subota', je_radni_dan: true });
246	                    } 
247	                    else if (tip === 'PRVA' && !prvaSubotaNadjen) { 
248	                        zaUbaciti.push({ datum: iso, naziv: 'Radna Subota (Prva)', je_radni_dan: true }); 
249	                        prvaSubotaNadjen = true; 
250	                    } 
251	                    else if (tip === 'DRUGA' && counterSubota % 2 !== 0) { 
252	                        zaUbaciti.push({ datum: iso, naziv: 'Radna Subota (Svaka druga)', je_radni_dan: true }); 
253	                    }
254	                }
255	            }
256	        }
257	        
258	        prikaziDialog({
259	            tip: 'info', naslov: 'Automatski Kalendar', 
260	            poruka: `Pronađeno je ${zaUbaciti.length} subota od ${new Date(datumGenOd).toLocaleDateString('bs-BA')} do kraja godine.\n\nPAŽNJA: Ovo će izbrisati sve stare automatske subote iz ovog perioda kako se ne bi duplale. Nastaviti?`,
261	            confirmText: '✅ PRIMIJENI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
262	            onConfirm: async () => { 
263	                // 1. Obriši stare subote (duhove) od ovog datuma pa nadalje
264	                await supabase.from('kalendar_izuzeci').delete().gte('datum', datumGenOd).ilike('naziv', '%Subota%');
265	                // 2. Ubaci nove
266	                if(zaUbaciti.length > 0) await supabase.from('kalendar_izuzeci').upsert(zaUbaciti); 
267	                loadAll(); zatvoriDialog(); 
268	            }, 
269	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
270	        });
271	    };
272	
273	    const getDaysInMonth = (year, month) => new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
274	    const getFirstDayOfMonth = (year, month) => { let day = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay(); return day === 0 ? 6 : day - 1; };
275	    const daniUMjesecu = getDaysInMonth(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth());
276	    const praznaPoljaNaPocetku = getFirstDayOfMonth(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth());
277	    const daniNiz = Array.from({length: daniUMjesecu}, (_, i) => i + 1);
278	
279	    const odsustvaZauzetost = useMemo(() => {
280	        let mapa = {};
281	        zahtjevi.filter(z => z.status === 'ODOBRENO').forEach(z => {
282	            let start = new Date(z.datum_od); let end = new Date(z.datum_do);
283	            for (let d = new Date(start); d <= end; d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
284	                let dStr = formatLocalISODate(d);
285	                if(!mapa[dStr]) mapa[dStr] = [];
286	                mapa[dStr].push(z.radnik_ime);
287	            }
288	        });
289	        return mapa;
290	    }, [zahtjevi]);
291	
292	    const prebrojZahtjeveUMjesecu = (godina, mjesec) => {
293	        let odobreno = 0; let naCekanju = 0;
294	        zahtjevi.forEach(z => {
295	            const zOd = new Date(z.datum_od); const zDo = new Date(z.datum_do);
296	            const mOd = new Date(godina, mjesec, 1); const mDo = new Date(godina, mjesec + 1, 0); 
297	            if (zOd <= mDo && zDo >= mOd) {
298	                if (z.status === 'ODOBRENO') odobreno++;
299	                else if (z.status === 'NA ČEKANJU') naCekanju++;
300	            }
301	        });
302	        return { odobreno, naCekanju };
303	    };
304	
305	    const danasStr = formatLocalISODate(new Date());
306	    const prisutniDanas = radniSati.filter(s => s.datum === danasStr);
307	
308	    return (
309	        <div className="p-2 md:p-4 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-4 md:space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in relative" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_slova }}>
310	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-blue-500" user={user} modulIme="hr_modul" saas={saas} hideMasina={true} />
311	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
312	
313	            {modalUredi && (
314	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[10000] bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-md animate-in zoom-in-95">
315	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border-2 border-blue-500 p-6 md:p-8 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] max-w-lg w-full flex flex-col relative max-h-[95vh] overflow-y-auto">
316	                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6 border-b border-theme-border pb-4">
317	                            <div><h2 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white flex items-center gap-2"><Edit3 size={24}/> Uredi Sate</h2><p className="text-slate-400 text-xs mt-1">Radnik: <span className="text-blue-400 font-bold">{modalUredi.radnik_ime}</span></p></div>
318	                            <div className="text-right"><p className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] uppercase">Datum:</p><p className="text-white font-black text-sm">{new Date(modalUredi.datum).toLocaleDateString('bs-BA')}</p></div>
319	                        </div>
320	
321	                        <div className="bg-blue-900/10 border border-blue-500/30 p-4 rounded-xl mb-6 flex justify-between items-center shadow-inner">
322	                            <div><p className="text-[10px] text-blue-400 uppercase font-black tracking-widest mb-1">Stvarno vrijeme na poslu:</p><p className="text-sm text-slate-300">Od: <span className="text-white">{new Date(modalUredi.vrijeme_dolaska).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE')}</span> do <span className="text-white">{new Date(modalUredi.vrijeme_odlaska).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE')}</span></p></div>
323	                            <div className="text-right"><p className="text-2xl text-blue-400 font-black">{stvarniSati.toFixed(2)} <span className="text-xs">h</span></p></div>
324	                        </div>
325	
326	                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">
327	                            <div><label className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Standardni Sati (h)</label><input type="number" step="0.5" value={editSati} onChange={e=>setEditSati(e.target.value)} className="w-full p-3 bg-black border border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-white font-black outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 shadow-inner" /></div>
328	                            <div><label className="text-[9px] text-amber-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Prekovremeno (h)</label><input type="number" step="0.5" value={editPrekovremeno} onChange={e=>setEditPrekovremeno(e.target.value)} className="w-full p-3 bg-amber-900/20 border border-amber-500/50 rounded-xl text-amber-400 font-black outline-none focus:border-amber-400 shadow-inner" /></div>
329	                            <div><label className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Kašnjenje (min)</label><input type="number" value={editKasnjenje} onChange={e=>setEditKasnjenje(e.target.value)} className="w-full p-3 bg-black border border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-white font-black outline-none focus:border-red-500 shadow-inner" /></div>
330	                            <div><label className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Raniji izlazak (min)</label><input type="number" value={editRanije} onChange={e=>setEditRanije(e.target.value)} className="w-full p-3 bg-black border border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-white font-black outline-none focus:border-orange-500 shadow-inner" /></div>
331	                        </div>
332	
333	                        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 mb-6 w-full">
334	                            <button onClick={automatskiSveStandardno} className="w-full py-3 bg-blue-900/30 hover:bg-blue-600 border border-blue-500/50 rounded-xl text-[10px] text-blue-400 hover:text-white font-black uppercase transition-colors">⚡ Upiši sve kao STANDARDNU smjenu ({stvarniSati.toFixed(2)} h)</button>
335	                            <button onClick={automatskiSvePrekovremeno} className="w-full py-3 bg-amber-900/30 hover:bg-amber-600 border border-amber-500/50 rounded-xl text-[10px] text-amber-400 hover:text-white font-black uppercase transition-colors">⚡ Poništi kašnjenja i upiši kao PREKOVREMENO ({stvarniSati.toFixed(2)} h)</button>
336	                        </div>
337	
338	                        <div className="flex gap-3 w-full">
339	                            <button onClick={() => setModalUredi(null)} className="flex-1 py-4 bg-theme-panel border border-slate-600 rounded-xl text-slate-300 font-black uppercase text-xs hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors">✕ OTKAŽI</button>
340	                            <button onClick={sacuvajIzmjeneSati} className="flex-[2] py-4 bg-blue-600 rounded-xl text-white font-black uppercase text-xs hover:bg-blue-500 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.4)]">💾 SAČUVAJ IZMJENE</button>
341	                        </div>
342	                    </div>
343	                </div>
344	            )}
345	
346	            <div className="flex bg-theme-panel p-1.5 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar snap-x">
347	                <button onClick={() => setTab('prisutnost')} className={`flex-1 min-w-[140px] snap-center py-3 md:py-4 px-2 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl text-[9px] md:text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 md:gap-2 whitespace-nowrap ${tab === 'prisutnost' ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800'}`}><Clock4 size={14}/> Prisutnost (Danas)</button>
348	                <button onClick={() => setTab('odobrenja')} className={`flex-1 min-w-[150px] snap-center py-3 md:py-4 px-2 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl text-[9px] md:text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 md:gap-2 whitespace-nowrap ${tab === 'odobrenja' ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800'}`}><CalendarCheck size={14}/> Odobrenja Odmora</button>
349	                <button onClick={() => setTab('profili')} className={`flex-1 min-w-[130px] snap-center py-3 md:py-4 px-2 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl text-[9px] md:text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 md:gap-2 whitespace-nowrap ${tab === 'profili' ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800'}`}><Users size={14}/> Profili Radnika</button>
350	                <button onClick={() => setTab('kalendar')} className={`flex-1 min-w-[150px] snap-center py-3 md:py-4 px-2 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl text-[9px] md:text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 md:gap-2 whitespace-nowrap ${tab === 'kalendar' ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800'}`}><CalendarX2 size={14}/> Praznici / Kalendar</button>
351	            </div>
352	
353	            {/* TAB 1: PRISUTNOST DANAS */}
354	            {tab === 'prisutnost' && (
355	                <div className="bg-theme-card p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl animate-in slide-in-from-left">
356	                    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-center mb-4 md:mb-6 border-b border-theme-border pb-3 md:pb-4 gap-2">
357	                        <h3 className="text-blue-400 font-black uppercase text-xs md:text-sm">📍 TRENUTNO STANJE U POGONU ({prisutniDanas.length} radnika)</h3>
358	                        <p className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold">{new Date().toLocaleDateString('bs-BA')}</p>
359	                    </div>
360	
361	                    <div className="space-y-2 md:space-y-3 max-h-[500px] md:max-h-[600px] overflow-y-auto pr-1 md:pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
362	                        {prisutniDanas.length === 0 && <p className="text-center text-slate-500 py-6 md:py-10 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold border border-dashed border-theme-border rounded-xl">Kiosk nema prijava za danas.</p>}
363	                        {prisutniDanas.map(p => (
364	                            <div key={p.id} className="bg-theme-panel p-3 md:p-4 rounded-xl border border-theme-border flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-center hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-all shadow-sm gap-3">
365	                                <div>
366	                                    <p className="text-theme-text text-sm font-black uppercase">{p.radnik_ime}</p>
367	                                    <p className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">Ulaz: <span className="text-white">{p.vrijeme_dolaska ? new Date(p.vrijeme_dolaska).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE') : '-'}</span> <span className="mx-1 md:mx-2 opacity-50">|</span> Izlaz: <span className="text-white">{p.vrijeme_odlaska ? new Date(p.vrijeme_odlaska).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE') : 'JOŠ UVIJEK TU'}</span></p>
368	                                </div>
369	                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-3 self-end sm:self-auto">
370	                                    <span className={`text-[8px] md:text-[9px] px-2 md:px-3 py-1 md:py-1.5 rounded-lg font-black uppercase tracking-widest ${p.status === 'NA_POSLU' ? 'bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30' : 'bg-slate-800 text-slate-400'}`}>
371	                                        {p.status === 'NA_POSLU' ? '🟢 AKTIVAN' : '⚪ ZAVRŠIO'}
372	                                    </span>
373	                                    {p.status === 'ZAVRŠIO' && (<button onClick={() => izracunajDnevnicu(p)} className="bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 text-white px-2 md:px-3 py-1 md:py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[8px] md:text-[9px] font-black uppercase shadow-lg">⚙️ Obračunaj</button>)}
374	                                </div>
375	                            </div>
376	                        ))}
377	                    </div>
378	                </div>
379	            )}
380	
381	            {/* TAB 2: ODOBRENJA ODMORA */}
382	            {tab === 'odobrenja' && (
383	                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6 animate-in slide-in-from-right">
384	                    <div className="lg:col-span-5 bg-theme-card p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl flex flex-col h-[400px] lg:h-[700px]">
385	                        <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-xs md:text-sm mb-3 md:mb-4 border-b border-theme-border pb-3 md:pb-4">📋 Zahtjevi na čekanju</h3>
386	                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto space-y-2 md:space-y-3 custom-scrollbar pr-1 md:pr-2">
387	                            {zahtjevi.filter(z => z.status === 'NA ČEKANJU').length === 0 && <p className="text-center text-slate-500 py-10 font-bold border border-dashed border-theme-border rounded-xl text-[10px] md:text-xs">Nema novih zahtjeva za odmor.</p>}
388	                            {zahtjevi.filter(z => z.status === 'NA ČEKANJU').map(z => {
389	                                const isSel = selektovaniZahtjev?.id === z.id;
390	                                return (
391	                                    <div key={z.id} onClick={() => {setSelektovaniZahtjev(z); setTrenutniMjesecKalendara(new Date(z.datum_od)); setPrikazKalendara('MJESEC');}} className={`p-3 md:p-4 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl cursor-pointer transition-all border shadow-sm ${isSel ? 'bg-amber-900/10 border-amber-500/50' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border hover:border-amber-500/30'}`}>
392	                                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-1 mb-1">
393	                                            <span className="text-xs font-black text-white uppercase">{z.radnik_ime}</span><span className="text-[8px] md:text-[9px] bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-black w-fit">{z.tip_odsustva}</span>
394	                                        </div>
395	                                        <p className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest mt-1 md:mt-2">{new Date(z.datum_od).toLocaleDateString('bs-BA')} - {new Date(z.datum_do).toLocaleDateString('bs-BA')}</p>
396	                                        
397	                                        {isSel && (
398	                                            <div className="mt-3 md:mt-4 pt-2 md:pt-3 border-t border-theme-border/50">
399	                                                <p className="text-[8px] md:text-[9px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black mb-2">Čija je inicijativa?</p>
400	                                                <div className="flex gap-2 mb-2">
401	                                                    <button onClick={() => obradiZahtjevOdmor(z, 'ODOBRENO', 'RADNIK')} className="flex-1 bg-emerald-900/30 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-emerald-400 hover:text-white px-2 py-1.5 md:py-2 rounded-lg text-[8px] md:text-[9px] font-black uppercase border border-emerald-500/30 transition-all">✅ Radnik</button>
402	                                                    <button onClick={() => obradiZahtjevOdmor(z, 'ODOBRENO', 'POSLODAVAC')} className="flex-1 bg-amber-900/30 hover:bg-amber-600 text-amber-400 hover:text-white px-2 py-1.5 md:py-2 rounded-lg text-[8px] md:text-[9px] font-black uppercase border border-amber-500/30 transition-all">✅ Poslodavac</button>
403	                                                </div>
404	                                                <button onClick={() => obradiZahtjevOdmor(z, 'ODBIJENO', 'N/A')} className="w-full bg-red-900/30 hover:bg-red-600 text-red-400 hover:text-white px-2 py-1.5 md:py-2 rounded-lg text-[8px] md:text-[9px] font-black uppercase border border-red-500/30 transition-all">✕ ODBIJ</button>
405	                                            </div>
406	                                        )}
407	                                    </div>
408	                                )
409	                            })}
410	                        </div>
411	                    </div>
412	
413	                    <div className="lg:col-span-7 bg-theme-card p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl h-[500px] lg:h-[700px] flex flex-col">
414	                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center mb-4 md:mb-6 bg-theme-panel p-2 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl border border-theme-border gap-2 sm:gap-4">
415	                            <div className="flex w-full sm:w-auto bg-black/40 rounded-lg p-1 border border-slate-700">
416	                                <button onClick={() => setPrikazKalendara('MJESEC')} className={`flex-1 sm:flex-none px-3 md:px-4 py-1.5 md:py-2 rounded-md text-[9px] md:text-[10px] font-black uppercase transition-all ${prikazKalendara === 'MJESEC' ? 'bg-amber-600 text-white shadow-md' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white'}`}>Mjesec</button>
417	                                <button onClick={() => setPrikazKalendara('GODINA')} className={`flex-1 sm:flex-none px-3 md:px-4 py-1.5 md:py-2 rounded-md text-[9px] md:text-[10px] font-black uppercase transition-all ${prikazKalendara === 'GODINA' ? 'bg-amber-600 text-white shadow-md' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white'}`}>Godina</button>
418	                            </div>
419	
420	                            {prikazKalendara === 'MJESEC' ? (
421	                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-3 w-full sm:w-auto justify-between sm:justify-end">
422	                                    <button onClick={() => setTrenutniMjesecKalendara(new Date(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth() - 1, 1))} className="p-2 md:p-3 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-amber-600 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl transition-colors"><ChevronLeft size={16}/></button>
423	                                    <h3 className="text-sm md:text-lg font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-amber-500 w-32 md:w-48 text-center truncate">{mjeseciBHS[trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth()]} {trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear()}.</h3>
424	                                    <button onClick={() => setTrenutniMjesecKalendara(new Date(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth() + 1, 1))} className="p-2 md:p-3 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-amber-600 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl transition-colors"><ChevronRight size={16}/></button>
425	                                </div>
426	                            ) : (
427	                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-3 w-full sm:w-auto justify-between sm:justify-end">
428	                                    <button onClick={() => setTrenutniMjesecKalendara(new Date(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear() - 1, trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth(), 1))} className="p-2 md:p-3 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-amber-600 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl transition-colors"><ChevronLeft size={16}/></button>
429	                                    <h3 className="text-sm md:text-lg font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-amber-500 w-32 md:w-48 text-center">{trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear()}.</h3>
430	                                    <button onClick={() => setTrenutniMjesecKalendara(new Date(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear() + 1, trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth(), 1))} className="p-2 md:p-3 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-amber-600 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl transition-colors"><ChevronRight size={16}/></button>
431	                                </div>
432	                            )}
433	                        </div>
434	                        
435	                        {prikazKalendara === 'MJESEC' ? (
436	                            <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-1 md:gap-2 flex-1">
437	                                {['Pon', 'Uto', 'Sri', 'Čet', 'Pet', 'Sub', 'Ned'].map(d => <div key={d} className="text-center text-[8px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-black uppercase pb-1 md:pb-2">{d}</div>)}
438	                                {Array.from({length: praznaPoljaNaPocetku}).map((_, i) => <div key={`empty-${i}`} />)}
439	                                
440	                                {daniNiz.map((dan) => {
441	                                    const dateObj = new Date(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesecKalendara.getMonth(), dan);
442	                                    const iso = formatLocalISODate(dateObj);
443	                                    const zapisiNaOvajDan = odsustvaZauzetost[iso] || [];
444	                                    const jeVikend = dateObj.getDay() === 0 || dateObj.getDay() === 6;
445	                                    const isReqRange = selektovaniZahtjev && dateObj >= new Date(selektovaniZahtjev.datum_od) && dateObj <= new Date(selektovaniZahtjev.datum_do);
446	
447	                                    return (
448	                                        <div key={dan} className={`aspect-square rounded-lg md:rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-start pt-1 md:pt-2 border md:border-2 transition-all relative ${jeVikend ? 'bg-slate-900/50 border-slate-800' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border'} ${isReqRange ? 'ring-2 ring-amber-500 ring-offset-1 md:ring-offset-2 ring-offset-theme-card bg-amber-900/20' : ''}`}>
449	                                            <span className="text-xs md:text-sm font-black text-slate-300">{dan}</span>
450	                                            <div className="w-full flex flex-col gap-0.5 mt-0.5 md:mt-1 px-0.5 md:px-1 overflow-hidden">
451	                                                {zapisiNaOvajDan.map((ime, idx) => (
452	                                                    <div key={idx} className="bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/30 text-red-400 text-[5px] md:text-[6px] uppercase font-black px-0.5 md:px-1 rounded truncate leading-tight w-full" title={ime}>{ime.split(' ')[0]}</div>
453	                                                ))}
454	                                            </div>
455	                                        </div>
456	                                    )
457	                                })}
458	                            </div>
459	                        ) : (
460	                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 md:gap-4 flex-1 content-start overflow-y-auto pr-1 md:pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
461	                                {mjeseciBHS.map((mIme, idx) => {
462	                                    const stats = prebrojZahtjeveUMjesecu(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear(), idx);
463	                                    return (
464	                                        <div key={idx} onClick={() => { setTrenutniMjesecKalendara(new Date(trenutniMjesecKalendara.getFullYear(), idx, 1)); setPrikazKalendara('MJESEC'); }} className="aspect-square bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer hover:border-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-900/20 transition-all shadow-md group">
465	                                            <span className="text-sm md:text-lg font-black uppercase text-slate-300 group-hover:text-amber-500 transition-colors truncate px-1">{mIme.substring(0,3)}</span>
466	                                            <div className="mt-2 md:mt-4 flex flex-col gap-1 items-center w-full px-2">
467	                                                {stats.odobreno > 0 && <span className="text-[7px] md:text-[9px] bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 border border-red-500/30 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase font-bold truncate w-full text-center">{stats.odobreno} Odobr.</span>}
468	                                                {stats.naCekanju > 0 && <span className="text-[7px] md:text-[9px] bg-amber-900/30 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/30 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase font-bold truncate w-full text-center">{stats.naCekanju} Čeka</span>}
469	                                                {stats.odobreno === 0 && stats.naCekanju === 0 && <span className="text-[7px] md:text-[9px] text-slate-600 uppercase font-bold truncate w-full text-center">Prazno</span>}
470	                                            </div>
471	                                        </div>
472	                                    )
473	                                })}
474	                            </div>
475	                        )}
476	                    </div>
477	                </div>
478	            )}
479	
480	            {/* TAB 3: PROFIL RADNIKA */}
481	            {tab === 'profili' && (
482	                <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4 md:gap-6 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom">
483	                    <div className="w-full lg:w-1/3 bg-theme-card p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl h-[30vh] lg:h-[700px] flex flex-col shrink-0">
484	                        <h3 className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-3 md:mb-4 border-b border-theme-border pb-2 md:pb-3 shrink-0">Odaberi Radnika</h3>
485	                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto space-y-2 custom-scrollbar pr-1">
486	                            {radnici.map(r => (
487	                                <button key={r.id} onClick={() => setOdabraniRadnik(r)} className={`w-full text-left p-3 md:p-4 rounded-xl font-black uppercase text-[10px] md:text-xs transition-all border ${odabraniRadnik?.id === r.id ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-400 text-white shadow-lg' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:border-slate-500'}`}>
488	                                    {r.ime_prezime}
489	                                </button>
490	                            ))}
491	                        </div>
492	                    </div>
493	
494	                    <div className="flex-1 bg-theme-card p-4 md:p-8 rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative min-h-[500px]">
495	                        {!odabraniRadnik ? (
496	                            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full opacity-50 py-10 md:py-20">
497	                                <Users size={48} className="mb-4 text-slate-600" />
498	                                <p className="text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-center text-xs md:text-sm">Odaberite radnika za prikaz profila</p>
499	                            </div>
500	                        ) : (() => {
501	                            const mjesecniZapis = radniSati.filter(s => s.radnik_ime === odabraniRadnik.ime_prezime);
502	                            const totalKasnjenje = mjesecniZapis.reduce((s, z) => s + (z.kasnjenje_min || 0), 0);
503	                            const daniKasnjenja = mjesecniZapis.filter(z => (z.kasnjenje_min || 0) > 0).length;
504	                            
505	                            let ukupnoSatiMjesec = 0;
506	                            let ukupnoRadnihDana = 0;
507	                            mjesecniZapis.forEach(z => {
508	                                const h = parseFloat(z.obracunato_sati) || 0;
509	                                const prek = (z.prekovremeno_min || 0) / 60;
510	                                ukupnoSatiMjesec += (h + prek);
511	                                if (h > 0 || prek > 0) ukupnoRadnihDana++;
512	                            });
513	                            
514	                            const kvotaUkupno = odabraniRadnik.godisnji_ukupno || 20;
515	                            const kvotaRadnik = odabraniRadnik.godisnji_iskoristeno_radnik || 0;
516	                            const kvotaFirma = odabraniRadnik.godisnji_iskoristeno_poslodavac || 0;
517	                            const kvotaOstalo = kvotaUkupno - kvotaRadnik - kvotaFirma;
518	
519	                            const svaOdsustva = zahtjevi.filter(z => z.radnik_ime === odabraniRadnik.ime_prezime && z.status === 'ODOBRENO');
520	                            const bolovanja = svaOdsustva.filter(z => z.tip_odsustva === 'BOLOVANJE').reduce((s, z) => s + z.broj_radnih_dana, 0);
521	                            const neopravdani = svaOdsustva.filter(z => z.tip_odsustva === 'NEOPRAVDANO').reduce((s, z) => s + z.broj_radnih_dana, 0);
522	
523	                            return (
524	                                <div className="space-y-4 md:space-y-6 h-full flex flex-col">
525	                                    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-center border-b border-theme-border pb-4 md:pb-6 gap-3 md:gap-4 shrink-0">
526	                                        <div>
527	                                            <h2 className="text-xl md:text-3xl text-white font-black uppercase tracking-tighter truncate">{odabraniRadnik.ime_prezime}</h2>
528	                                            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2">
529	                                                <p className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-theme-panel px-2 md:px-3 py-1 rounded-md md:rounded-lg border border-theme-border">Uloga: {odabraniRadnik.uloga}</p>
530	                                                <p className="text-blue-400 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-blue-900/20 px-2 md:px-3 py-1 rounded-md md:rounded-lg border border-blue-500/30">🗓️ {ukupnoRadnihDana} DANA ({ukupnoSatiMjesec.toFixed(1)} h)</p>
531	                                            </div>
532	                                        </div>
533	                                        <div className="flex gap-2 md:gap-3 items-center w-full sm:w-auto">
534	                                            <button onClick={() => setShowRucniUpis(true)} className="flex-1 sm:flex-none bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white px-3 md:px-4 py-2 md:py-3 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl text-[9px] md:text-[10px] uppercase font-black border border-red-500/30 transition-colors">+ Upis Izostanka</button>
535	                                            <input type="month" value={mjesecPrikaza} onChange={e=>setMjesecPrikaza(e.target.value)} className="w-32 sm:w-auto p-2 md:p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-blue-500/50 rounded-lg md:rounded-xl text-blue-400 outline-none font-black cursor-pointer shadow-inner uppercase text-[10px] md:text-xs" />
