=== app/modules/KioskModule.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import { CalendarDays, CheckCircle2, AlertCircle, ScanLine, X, LogIn, LogOut, UserCircle, ArrowLeft, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
5	import PametniDialog from '../components/PametniDialog';
6	import ScannerOverlay from '../components/ScannerOverlay';
7	
8	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
9	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
10	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
11	
12	const mjeseciBHS = ['Januar', 'Februar', 'Mart', 'April', 'Maj', 'Juni', 'Juli', 'Avgust', 'Septembar', 'Oktobar', 'Novembar', 'Decembar'];
13	
14	const formatLocalISODate = (date) => {
15	    if (!date || isNaN(date.getTime())) return '';
16	    const y = date.getFullYear();
17	    const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
18	    const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
19	    return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
20	};
21	
22	export default function KioskModule() {
23	    const [vrijeme, setVrijeme] = useState(new Date());
24	    const [aktivnaAkcija, setAktivaAkcija] = useState(null); 
25	    
26	    const [sken, setSken] = useState('');
27	    const [poruka, setPoruka] = useState(null);
28	    const [isScanning, setIsScanning] = useState(false);
29	    
30	    const [radniciList, setRadniciList] = useState([]);
31	    const [filteredRadnici, setFilteredRadnici] = useState([]);
32	    const [radnikProfil, setRadnikProfil] = useState(null);
33	
34	    const [showOdmorModal, setShowOdmorModal] = useState(false);
35	    const [formaOdmor, setFormaOdmor] = useState({ radnik_ime: '', tip: 'GODIŠNJI', razlog: '' });
36	    
37	    const [odsustvaZauzetost, setOdsustvaZauzetost] = useState({}); 
38	    const [kalendarIzuzeci, setKalendarIzuzeci] = useState({});
39	
40	    const [trenutniMjesec, setTrenutniMjesec] = useState(new Date());
41	    const [datumOd, setDatumOd] = useState(null);
42	    const [datumDo, setDatumDo] = useState(null);
43	    const [potvrdaModal, setPotvrdaModal] = useState(null); 
44	
45	    const inputRef = useRef(null);
46	    const isProcessingRef = useRef(false);
47	    const porukaTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
48	
49	    useEffect(() => {
50	        const timer = setInterval(() => setVrijeme(new Date()), 1000);
51	        supabase.from('radnici').select('ime_prezime, username, qr_kod').then(({data}) => setRadniciList(data || []));
52	        return () => clearInterval(timer);
53	    }, []);
54	
55	    useEffect(() => {
56	        if (aktivnaAkcija && !isScanning && !radnikProfil && !showOdmorModal && !potvrdaModal) {
57	            setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);
58	        }
59	    }, [aktivnaAkcija, sken, isScanning, radnikProfil, showOdmorModal, potvrdaModal]);
60	
61	    useEffect(() => {
62	        if (!sken) { setFilteredRadnici([]); return; }
63	        const search = sken.toLowerCase();
64	        const results = radniciList.filter(r => 
65	            (r.ime_prezime && r.ime_prezime.toLowerCase().includes(search)) ||
66	            (r.username && r.username.toLowerCase().includes(search)) ||
67	            (r.qr_kod && r.qr_kod.toLowerCase().includes(search))
68	        );
69	        setFilteredRadnici(results);
70	    }, [sken, radniciList]);
71	
72	    const ucitajZauzetostI_Izuzetke = async () => {
73	        try {
74	            const { data: odsustva } = await supabase.from('zahtjevi_odsustva').select('datum_od, datum_do, status').neq('status', 'ODBIJENO');
75	            if (odsustva) {
76	                let mapa = {};
77	                odsustva.forEach(z => {
78	                    let start = new Date(z.datum_od); 
79	                    let end = new Date(z.datum_do);
80	                    
81	                    if (isNaN(start.getTime()) || isNaN(end.getTime())) return; 
82	                    
83	                    start.setHours(0,0,0,0);
84	                    end.setHours(0,0,0,0);
85	
86	                    let d = new Date(start);
87	                    while (d <= end) {
88	                        let dStr = formatLocalISODate(d);
89	                        if(!mapa[dStr]) mapa[dStr] = { odobreno: 0, cekanje: 0 };
90	                        if (z.status === 'ODOBRENO') mapa[dStr].odobreno += 1;
91	                        else mapa[dStr].cekanje += 1;
92	                        
93	                        d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);
94	                    }
95	                });
96	                setOdsustvaZauzetost(mapa);
97	            }
98	
99	            const { data: izuzeci } = await supabase.from('kalendar_izuzeci').select('datum, je_radni_dan');
100	            if (izuzeci) {
101	                let mapaIzuzetaka = {};
102	                izuzeci.forEach(iz => {
103	                    mapaIzuzetaka[iz.datum] = iz.je_radni_dan; 
104	                });
105	                setKalendarIzuzeci(mapaIzuzetaka);
106	            }
107	        } catch (err) {
108	            console.error("Greška pri učitavanju kalendara:", err);
109	        }
110	    };
111	
112	    const prikaziPrivremenuPoruku = (tip, tekst) => {
113	        setPoruka({ tip, tekst });
114	        if (porukaTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(porukaTimeoutRef.current);
115	        porukaTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
116	            setPoruka(null);
117	            if (tip === 'success' && aktivnaAkcija !== 'PROFIL') {
118	                setAktivaAkcija(null);
119	            }
120	        }, 4000);
121	    };
122	
123	    const procesuirajSkenId = async (unos) => {
124	        const unosZaObradu = unos || sken.trim();
125	        if (!unosZaObradu || isProcessingRef.current) return;
126	        
127	        isProcessingRef.current = true; 
128	        setIsScanning(false); 
129	        setSken('');
130	        setFilteredRadnici([]);
131	
132	        try {
133	            const { data: radniciPretraga } = await supabase.from('radnici').select('*')
134	                .or(`username.ilike.${unosZaObradu},ime_prezime.ilike.${unosZaObradu},qr_kod.eq.${unosZaObradu}`)
135	                .limit(1);
136	            
137	            if (!radniciPretraga || radniciPretraga.length === 0) {
138	                prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('error', `Radnik/Kartica "${unosZaObradu}" nije pronađen u bazi.`);
139	                return;
140	            }
141	
142	            const radnik = radniciPretraga[0];
143	            const ime = radnik.ime_prezime;
144	            const danas = formatLocalISODate(new Date()); 
145	            const sada = new Date().toISOString();
146	
147	            if (aktivnaAkcija === 'PRIJAVA') {
148	                const { data: otvoreniZapis } = await supabase.from('radni_sati').select('id').eq('radnik_ime', ime).eq('datum', danas).eq('status', 'NA_POSLU').limit(1);
149	                const { data: zatvoreniZapis } = await supabase.from('radni_sati').select('id').eq('radnik_ime', ime).eq('datum', danas).eq('status', 'ZAVRŠIO').limit(1);
150	                
151	                if (otvoreniZapis && otvoreniZapis.length > 0) {
152	                    prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('error', `⚠️ ${ime}, vi ste već prijavljeni na posao!`);
153	                } else if (zatvoreniZapis && zatvoreniZapis.length > 0) {
154	                    prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('error', `⚠️ ${ime}, vi ste već završili smjenu za danas!`);
155	                } else {
156	                    const { error } = await supabase.from('radni_sati').insert([{ radnik_ime: ime, datum: danas, vrijeme_dolaska: sada, status: 'NA_POSLU' }]);
157	                    if (error) throw error;
158	                    prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('success', `✅ Dobrodošli, ${ime}! Prijava u ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE')}.`);
159	                }
160	            } 
161	            else if (aktivnaAkcija === 'ODJAVA') {
162	                const { data: otvoreniZapisi } = await supabase.from('radni_sati').select('id').eq('radnik_ime', ime).eq('datum', danas).eq('status', 'NA_POSLU');
163	                
164	                if (otvoreniZapisi && otvoreniZapisi.length > 0) {
165	                    for (let z of otvoreniZapisi) {
166	                        await supabase.from('radni_sati').update({ vrijeme_odlaska: sada, status: 'ZAVRŠIO' }).eq('id', z.id);
167	                    }
168	                    prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('success', `👋 Doviđenja, ${ime}! Odjava u ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE')}.`);
169	                } else {
170	                    prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('error', `⚠️ ${ime}, niste prijavljeni na posao za današnji dan!`);
171	                }
172	            }
173	            else if (aktivnaAkcija === 'PROFIL') {
174	                const { data: zahtjevi } = await supabase.from('zahtjevi_odsustva').select('*').eq('radnik_ime', ime).order('created_at', { ascending: false }).limit(3);
175	                setRadnikProfil({ radnik, zahtjevi: zahtjevi || [] });
176	                setAktivaAkcija(null); 
177	            }
178	        } catch (err) {
179	            prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('error', `Sistemska greška: ${err.message}`);
180	        } finally {
181	            setTimeout(() => { isProcessingRef.current = false; }, 2000);
182	        }
183	    };
184	
185	    const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
186	        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
187	            e.preventDefault();
188	            procesuirajSkenId();
189	        }
190	    };
191	
192	    const zatvoriSveModale = () => {
193	        setRadnikProfil(null);
194	        setShowOdmorModal(false);
195	        setPotvrdaModal(null);
196	        setAktivaAkcija(null);
197	        setSken('');
198	        setFilteredRadnici([]);
199	        setIsScanning(false);
200	    };
201	
202	    const pokreniZahtjevIzProfila = () => {
203	        if (!radnikProfil || !radnikProfil.radnik) return;
204	        setFormaOdmor(prev => ({ ...prev, radnik_ime: radnikProfil.radnik.ime_prezime }));
205	        setRadnikProfil(null);
206	        
207	        ucitajZauzetostI_Izuzetke(); 
208	        setTrenutniMjesec(new Date());
209	        setDatumOd(null); 
210	        setDatumDo(null);
211	        
212	        setShowOdmorModal(true); 
213	    };
214	
215	    const getDaysInMonth = (year, month) => new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
216	    const getFirstDayOfMonth = (year, month) => { let day = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay(); return day === 0 ? 6 : day - 1; };
217	    const daniUMjesecu = getDaysInMonth(trenutniMjesec.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesec.getMonth());
218	    const praznaPoljaNaPocetku = getFirstDayOfMonth(trenutniMjesec.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesec.getMonth());
219	    const daniNiz = Array.from({length: daniUMjesecu}, (_, i) => i + 1);
220	    
221	    const handleDatumClick = (dan) => {
222	        const kliknutiDatum = new Date(trenutniMjesec.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesec.getMonth(), dan);
223	        const danasPocetak = new Date(); danasPocetak.setHours(0,0,0,0);
224	        if (kliknutiDatum < danasPocetak) return; 
225	
226	        if (!datumOd || (datumOd && datumDo)) { setDatumOd(kliknutiDatum); setDatumDo(null); } 
227	        else if (datumOd && !datumDo) {
228	            if (kliknutiDatum < datumOd) { setDatumOd(kliknutiDatum); } 
229	            else { setDatumDo(kliknutiDatum); zatraziOdmorInteraktivno(datumOd, kliknutiDatum); }
230	        }
231	    };
232	
233	    const zatraziOdmorJedanDan = () => { if(datumOd && !datumDo) zatraziOdmorInteraktivno(datumOd, datumOd); };
234	
235	    // ISPRAVLJENO: Robusnija provjera za radne subote
236	    const zatraziOdmorInteraktivno = async (startD, endD) => {
237	        let brojDana = 0;
238	        let d = new Date(startD);
239	        d.setHours(0,0,0,0);
240	        let target = new Date(endD);
241	        target.setHours(0,0,0,0);
242	
243	        while (d <= target) {
244	            const isoDatum = formatLocalISODate(d);
245	            const day = d.getDay(); 
246	            
247	            // SIGURNOSNA PROVJERA: Da li je baza sačuvala "true" ili string 'true'
248	            if (kalendarIzuzeci[isoDatum] !== undefined) {
249	                if (kalendarIzuzeci[isoDatum] === true || kalendarIzuzeci[isoDatum] === 'true' || kalendarIzuzeci[isoDatum] === 1) {
250	                    brojDana++;
251	                }
252	            } else {
253	                if (day !== 0 && day !== 6) {
254	                    brojDana++; 
255	                }
256	            }
257	            d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);
258	        }
259	
260	        const pocetakStr = startD.toLocaleDateString('bs-BA');
261	        const krajStr = endD.toLocaleDateString('bs-BA');
262	        const istiDan = pocetakStr === krajStr;
263	        setPotvrdaModal({ radnik: formaOdmor.radnik_ime, tip: formaOdmor.tip, pocetakStr, krajStr, istiDan, brojDana, startD, endD });
264	    };
265	
266	    const posaljiKrajnjiZahtjev = async () => {
267	        const p = potvrdaModal;
268	        const payload = { 
269	            radnik_ime: p.radnik, tip_odsustva: p.tip, 
270	            datum_od: formatLocalISODate(p.startD), 
271	            datum_do: formatLocalISODate(p.endD), 
272	            broj_radnih_dana: p.brojDana, razlog: formaOdmor.razlog, status: 'NA ČEKANJU', inicijativa: 'RADNIK' 
273	        };
274	        const { error } = await supabase.from('zahtjevi_odsustva').insert([payload]);
275	        if (error) { prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('error', error.message); }
276	        else {
277	            zatvoriSveModale();
278	            prikaziPrivremenuPoruku('success', `✅ Zahtjev za odmor uspješno poslan!`);
279	        }
280	    };
281	
282	    return (
283	        <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#090e17] text-white flex flex-col items-center p-4 md:p-6 relative font-sans overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto">
284	            
285	            <div className="relative z-[10010]">
286	                {isScanning && <ScannerOverlay onScan={(text) => { setIsScanning(false); procesuirajSkenId(text); }} onClose={() => setIsScanning(false)} />}
287	            </div>
288	
289	            <div className="fixed top-[-20%] left-[-10%] w-96 h-96 bg-blue-600/20 blur-[120px] rounded-full pointer-events-none"></div>
290	            <div className="fixed bottom-[-20%] right-[-10%] w-96 h-96 bg-emerald-600/20 blur-[120px] rounded-full pointer-events-none"></div>
291	
292	            <div className="text-center z-10 mb-8 md:mb-12 mt-6">
293	                <h1 className="text-6xl md:text-[8vw] font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-slate-500 drop-shadow-2xl">
294	                    {vrijeme.toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
295	                </h1>
296	                <p className="text-lg md:text-3xl text-blue-400 font-bold tracking-widest uppercase mt-2 md:mt-4">
297	                    {vrijeme.toLocaleDateString('bs-BA', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}
298	                </p>
299	            </div>
300	
301	            {!aktivnaAkcija && !radnikProfil && !showOdmorModal && (
302	                <div className="w-full max-w-4xl grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:gap-8 z-10 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95">
303	                    <button onClick={() => setAktivaAkcija('PRIJAVA')} className="bg-emerald-900/40 border-2 border-emerald-500/50 hover:bg-emerald-600 rounded-[2rem] p-8 md:p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 transition-all shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(16,185,129,0.15)] hover:shadow-[0_0_60px_rgba(16,185,129,0.4)] group">
304	                        <LogIn className="w-16 h-16 md:w-24 md:h-24 text-emerald-400 group-hover:text-white transition-colors" />
305	                        <span className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-emerald-100 group-hover:text-white">Prijava na Posao</span>
306	                    </button>
307	                    
308	                    <button onClick={() => setAktivaAkcija('ODJAVA')} className="bg-red-900/40 border-2 border-red-500/50 hover:bg-red-600 rounded-[2rem] p-8 md:p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 transition-all shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(239,68,68,0.15)] hover:shadow-[0_0_60px_rgba(239,68,68,0.4)] group">
309	                        <LogOut className="w-16 h-16 md:w-24 md:h-24 text-red-400 group-hover:text-white transition-colors" />
310	                        <span className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-red-100 group-hover:text-white">Odjava sa Posla</span>
311	                    </button>
312	
313	                    <button onClick={() => setAktivaAkcija('PROFIL')} className="md:col-span-2 bg-blue-900/40 border-2 border-blue-500/50 hover:bg-blue-600 rounded-[2rem] p-6 md:p-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 transition-all shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(59,130,246,0.15)] hover:shadow-[0_0_60px_rgba(59,130,246,0.4)] group">
314	                        <UserCircle className="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 text-blue-400 group-hover:text-white transition-colors" />
315	                        <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-blue-100 group-hover:text-white">Moj Profil / Zahtjev za Odmor</span>
316	                    </button>
317	                </div>
318	            )}
319	
320	            {aktivnaAkcija && !radnikProfil && (
321	                <div className="w-full max-w-2xl bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-2 border-slate-700 p-6 md:p-10 rounded-3xl md:rounded-[3rem] shadow-2xl z-10 flex flex-col items-center animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-8">
322	                    <button onClick={() => {setAktivaAkcija(null); setPoruka(null); setSken(''); setFilteredRadnici([]);}} className="absolute top-6 left-6 text-slate-400 hover:text-white flex items-center gap-2 font-black uppercase text-xs bg-black/40 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl transition-colors">
323	                        <ArrowLeft size={16}/> Nazad
324	                    </button>
325	
326	                    <div className={`w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 mt-8 md:mt-4 border-4 shadow-lg ${aktivnaAkcija === 'PRIJAVA' ? 'bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/50' : (aktivnaAkcija === 'ODJAVA' ? 'bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 border-red-500/50' : 'bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-400 border-blue-500/50')}`}>
327	                        {aktivnaAkcija === 'PRIJAVA' ? <LogIn size={40}/> : (aktivnaAkcija === 'ODJAVA' ? <LogOut size={40}/> : <UserCircle size={40}/>)}
328	                    </div>
329	                    
330	                    <h2 className="text-xl md:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-2 text-center">{aktivnaAkcija}</h2>
331	                    <p className="text-slate-400 text-xs md:text-sm mb-8 text-center">Prislonite ID karticu ili ukucajte ime u polje ispod.</p>
332	
333	                    <div className="w-full max-w-md flex bg-black/80 border-2 border-slate-600 focus-within:border-white rounded-2xl overflow-visible shadow-inner transition-colors relative z-20">
334	                        <div className="flex-1 relative">
335	                            <input 
336	                                ref={inputRef} type="text" value={sken} 
337	                                onChange={(e) => setSken(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
338	                                className="w-full h-full p-5 md:p-6 text-center text-xl md:text-2xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-widest bg-transparent outline-none"
339	                                placeholder="KARTICA / IME" autoFocus
340	                            />
341	                            {sken && filteredRadnici.length > 0 && (
342	                                <div className="absolute top-full mt-2 w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden z-50">
343	                                    {filteredRadnici.map(r => (
344	                                        <div key={r.id} onClick={() => procesuirajSkenId(r.qr_kod || r.username || r.ime_prezime)} className="p-4 border-b border-slate-700 hover:bg-blue-600 cursor-pointer transition-colors text-left">
345	                                            <p className="font-black text-white">{r.ime_prezime}</p>
346	                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400">ID: {r.qr_kod || r.username}</p>
347	                                        </div>
348	                                    ))}
349	                                </div>
350	                            )}
351	                        </div>
352	                        <button onClick={() => setIsScanning(true)} className="w-16 md:w-24 shrink-0 bg-slate-800 text-white hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all flex items-center justify-center border-l border-slate-600 z-10 relative">
353	                            <ScanLine className="w-6 h-6 md:w-8 md:h-8"/>
354	                        </button>
355	                    </div>
356	
357	                    {poruka && (
358	                        <div className={`mt-8 w-full p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center gap-3 animate-in zoom-in font-black text-sm md:text-lg border ${poruka.tip === 'success' ? 'bg-emerald-900/40 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/50' : 'bg-red-900/40 text-red-400 border-red-500/50'}`}>
359	                            {poruka.tip === 'success' ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-6 h-6 shrink-0" /> : <AlertCircle className="w-6 h-6 shrink-0" />}
360	                            <span className="text-center leading-tight">{poruka.tekst}</span>
361	                        </div>
362	                    )}
363	                </div>
364	            )}
365	
366	            {radnikProfil && (
367	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[10020] bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-xl animate-in zoom-in-95">
368	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border-2 border-blue-500 p-6 md:p-10 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_0_80px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] max-w-3xl w-full flex flex-col relative max-h-[95vh] overflow-y-auto">
369	                        <button onClick={zatvoriSveModale} className="absolute top-4 right-4 bg-slate-800 w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-red-500 transition-colors z-50 shadow-lg"><X size={24}/></button>
370	                        
371	                        <div className="text-center border-b border-theme-border pb-6 mb-6 mt-8 md:mt-0">
372	                            <div className="w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 mx-auto rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4 border-4 shadow-lg bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-400 border-blue-500">
373	                                <UserCircle size={48}/>
374	                            </div>
375	                            <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white mb-2">{radnikProfil.radnik.ime_prezime}</h2>
376	                            <p className="text-sm md:text-lg font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Vaš Profil i Evidencija</p>
377	                        </div>
378	
379	                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:gap-6 mb-8">
380	                            <div className="bg-theme-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
381	                                <h4 className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-4">Vaš Godišnji Odmor</h4>
382	                                <div className="space-y-3">
383	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-slate-700 pb-2">
384	                                        <span className="text-sm text-slate-300">Ukupno pripada:</span>
385	                                        <span className="text-base font-black text-white">{radnikProfil.radnik.godisnji_ukupno || 20} d</span>
386	                                    </div>
387	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-slate-700 pb-2">
388	                                        <span className="text-sm text-slate-300">Iskorišteno:</span>
389	                                        <span className="text-base font-black text-amber-400">{(radnikProfil.radnik.godisnji_iskoristeno_radnik || 0) + (radnikProfil.radnik.godisnji_iskoristeno_poslodavac || 0)} d</span>
390	                                    </div>
391	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center pt-2">
392	                                        <span className="text-base font-bold text-slate-300">PREOSTALO:</span>
393	                                        <span className="text-3xl font-black text-emerald-400">
394	                                            {(radnikProfil.radnik.godisnji_ukupno || 20) - ((radnikProfil.radnik.godisnji_iskoristeno_radnik || 0) + (radnikProfil.radnik.godisnji_iskoristeno_poslodavac || 0))} d
395	                                        </span>
396	                                    </div>
397	                                </div>
398	                            </div>
399	
400	                            <div className="bg-theme-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner flex flex-col">
401	                                <h4 className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-4">Status Vaših Zahtjeva</h4>
402	                                <div className="space-y-3 flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pr-1">
403	                                    {radnikProfil.zahtjevi.length === 0 ? (
404	                                        <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 italic mt-4 text-center">Nemate nedavnih zahtjeva.</p>
405	                                    ) : (
406	                                        radnikProfil.zahtjevi.map(z => (
407	                                            <div key={z.id} className="flex justify-between items-center p-3 border-b border-slate-700/50 last:border-0 bg-black/20 rounded-xl mb-2">
408	                                                <div className="flex flex-col">
409	                                                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-white uppercase">{z.tip_odsustva}</span>
410	                                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1">{new Date(z.datum_od).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')} - {new Date(z.datum_do).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}</span>
411	                                                </div>
412	                                                <span className={`text-[10px] font-black uppercase px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg ${z.status === 'ODOBRENO' ? 'bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30' : (z.status === 'ODBIJENO' ? 'bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 border border-red-500/30' : 'bg-amber-900/30 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/30')}`}>
413	                                                    {z.status}
414	                                                </span>
415	                                            </div>
416	                                        ))
417	                                    )}
418	                                </div>
419	                            </div>
420	                        </div>
421	
422	                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 mt-auto">
423	                            <button onClick={pokreniZahtjevIzProfila} className="flex-[2] py-5 md:py-6 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-2xl uppercase font-black text-sm md:text-base transition-all shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(37,99,235,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
424	                                <CalendarDays size={24} /> ZATRAŽI ODMOR / SLOBODNO
425	                            </button>

442	                        </div>

477	                                    {['Pon', 'Uto', 'Sri', 'Čet', 'Pet', 'Sub', 'Ned'].map(d => <div key={d} className="text-center text-[8px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-black uppercase pb-1 md:pb-2">{d}</div>)}

479

481	                                        const dateObj = new Date(trenutniMjesec.getFullYear(), trenutniMjesec.getMonth(), dan);
482	                                        const iso = formatLocalISODate(dateObj);
483	                                        const zauz = odsustvaZauzetost[iso];
484	                                        const danasPocetak = new Date(); danasPocetak.setHours(0,0,0,0);
485	                                        const jeProsli = dateObj < danasPocetak;
486	                                        const jeVikend = dateObj.getDay() === 0 || dateObj.getDay() === 6;
487	                                        
488	                                        const isStart = datumOd && iso === formatLocalISODate(datumOd);
489	                                        const isEnd = datumDo && iso === formatLocalISODate(datumDo);
490	                                        const inRange = datumOd && datumDo && dateObj > datumOd && dateObj < datumDo;
491	                                        
492	                                        let bgClass = jeVikend ? 'bg-slate-900/50 text-slate-500' : 'bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 cursor-pointer';
493	                                        let borderClass = 'border-transparent';
494	                                        
495	                                        if (isStart || isEnd) { bgClass = 'bg-amber-600 text-white shadow-lg'; borderClass = 'border-amber-400'; }
496	                                        else if (inRange) { bgClass = 'bg-amber-900/40 text-amber-200'; borderClass = 'border-amber-500/30'; }
497	                                        else if (jeProsli) { bgClass = 'bg-black text-slate-700 cursor-not-allowed'; }
498	
499	                                        return (
500	                                            <div key={dan} onClick={() => !jeProsli && handleDatumClick(dan)} className={`aspect-square rounded-lg md:rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-center items-center border md:border-2 transition-all relative ${bgClass} ${borderClass}`}>
501	                                                <span className="text-sm md:text-xl font-black">{dan}</span>
502	                                                {zauz && !isStart && !isEnd && !inRange && !jeProsli && (
503	                                                    <div className="absolute bottom-1 md:bottom-2 flex gap-0.5 md:gap-1 justify-center">
504	                                                        {Array.from({length: Math.min(3, zauz.odobreno || 0)}).map((_, i) => <div key={`o${i}`} className="w-1 md:w-1.5 h-1 md:h-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 shadow-[0_0_5px_red]"></div>)}
505	                                                        {Array.from({length: Math.min(3, zauz.cekanje || 0)}).map((_, i) => <div key={`c${i}`} className="w-1 md:w-1.5 h-1 md:h-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-500 shadow-[0_0_5px_orange]"></div>)}
506	                                                    </div>
507	                                                )}
508	                                            </div>
509	                                        )
510	                                    })}
511	                                </div>
512	                                <p className="text-center text-[8px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-500 mt-4 md:mt-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest"><span className="text-red-500 mx-1">●</span> Odobreni odmori (Gužva) <span className="text-amber-500 ml-2 md:ml-4 mx-1">●</span> Na čekanju</p>
513	                            </div>
514	                        </div>
515	                    </div>
516	                </div>
517	            )}
518	
519	            {potvrdaModal && (
520	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[10030] bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-md">
521	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border-2 border-amber-500 p-6 md:p-8 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(245,158,11,0.5)] max-w-md w-full text-center flex flex-col items-center">
522	                        <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-amber-600 text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4"><CalendarDays size={32}/></div>
523	                        <h2 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white mb-2">Potvrda Odsustva</h2>
524	                        
525	                        <div className="bg-theme-panel p-4 rounded-xl border border-theme-border w-full mb-6">
526	                            <p className="text-[10px] md:text-[11px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black mb-1">Zatražiti <span className="text-amber-500">{potvrdaModal.tip}</span> za period:</p>
527	                            <p className="text-base md:text-lg font-black text-white mt-2">
528	                                {potvrdaModal.istiDan ? potvrdaModal.pocetakStr : `od ${potvrdaModal.pocetakStr} do ${potvrdaModal.krajStr}`}
529	                            </p>
530	                            <p className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-bold mt-3">(Okvirno radnih dana: {potvrdaModal.brojDana})</p>
531	                        </div>
532	
533	                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 w-full mt-2">
534	                            <button onClick={() => { setPotvrdaModal(null); setDatumOd(null); setDatumDo(null); }} className="flex-1 py-4 bg-theme-panel border border-slate-600 rounded-xl text-white font-black uppercase text-xs hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all">✕ OTKAŽI</button>
535	                            <button onClick={posaljiKrajnjiZahtjev} className="flex-[2] py-4 bg-amber-600 rounded-xl text-white font-black uppercase text-xs hover:bg-amber-500 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.5)]">✅ POŠALJI UPRAVI</button>
536	                        </div>
537	                    </div>
538	                </div>
539	            )}
540	        </div>
541	    );
542	}

=== app/modules/KontrolniToranjModule.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import MasterHeader from '../components/MasterHeader';
5	import MasterSearch from '../components/MasterSearch';
6	import PametniDialog from '../components/PametniDialog';
7	import { useSaaS } from '../utils/useSaaS';
8	import { AlertTriangle, ArrowRight, History, ShieldAlert } from 'lucide-react';
9	
10	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
11	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
12	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);

14	const formatirajTacanDatum = (d1, d2, d3) => {
15	    const moguciDatumi = [d1, d2, d3].filter(Boolean);
16	    for (let dt of moguciDatumi) {
17	        try {
18	            const d = new Date(dt);
19	            if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) {
20	                const dd = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
21	                const mm = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
22	                const yyyy = d.getFullYear();
23	                const hh = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
24	                const min = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
25	                return `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd} ${hh}:${min}`;
26	            }
27	        } catch(e) {}
28	    }
29	    return 'N/A';
30	};
31	
32	const getSortableTime = (d1, d2, d3) => {
33	    const moguciDatumi = [d1, d2, d3].filter(Boolean);
34	    for (let dt of moguciDatumi) {
35	        try { const d = new Date(dt); if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) return d.getTime(); } catch(e) {}
36	    }
37	    return 0;
38	};
39	
40	// Handle JSON values format safely
41	const siguranString = (val) => {
42	    if (val === null || val === undefined) return 'prazno';
43	    if (typeof val === 'object') return JSON.stringify(val);
44	    return String(val);
45	};
46	
47	// 🟢 APSOLUTNA INTIMNA FORENZIKA
48	const renderStavkeDiff = (stareRaw, noveRaw) => {
49	    let stare = []; let nove = [];
50	    try { stare = typeof stareRaw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(stareRaw) : (stareRaw || []); } catch(e) { stare = stareRaw && typeof stareRaw === 'object' ? [stareRaw] : []; }
51	    try { nove = typeof noveRaw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(noveRaw) : (noveRaw || []); } catch(e) { nove = noveRaw && typeof noveRaw === 'object' ? [noveRaw] : []; }
52	    
53	    if (!Array.isArray(stare)) stare = [stare];
54	    if (!Array.isArray(nove)) nove = [nove];
55	
56	    let subDiffs = [];
57	    const unikatniKljuceviStavki = Array.from(new Set([
58	        ...stare.map((s, idx) => s.id || s.sifra || s.paket_id || `red_${idx}`),
59	        ...nove.map((n, idx) => n.id || n.sifra || n.paket_id || `red_${idx}`)
60	    ]));
61	
62	    unikatniKljuceviStavki.forEach((kljuc) => {
63	        const o = stare.find((s, idx) => (s.id || s.sifra || s.paket_id || `red_${idx}`) === kljuc);
64	        const n = nove.find((item, idx) => (item.id || item.sifra || item.paket_id || `red_${idx}`) === kljuc);
65	        const nazivArtikla = n?.naziv || n?.naziv_proizvoda || o?.naziv || o?.naziv_proizvoda || kljuc;
66	
67	        if (!o && n) {
68	            subDiffs.push(
69	                <div key={`add-${kljuc}`} className="text-emerald-400 font-bold bg-emerald-950/30 p-2 rounded border border-emerald-500/20 text-[10px] my-1">
70	                    ➕ DODANA STAVKA: <span className="text-white uppercase">{nazivArtikla}</span> ➔ {JSON.stringify(n)}
71	                </div>
72	            );
73	        } else if (o && !n) {
74	            subDiffs.push(
75	                <div key={`rem-${kljuc}`} className="text-red-400 font-bold bg-red-950/30 p-2 rounded border border-red-500/20 text-[10px] my-1">
76	                    ❌ UKLONJENA STAVKA: <span className="text-slate-400 line-through uppercase">{nazivArtikla}</span> ➔ {JSON.stringify(o)}
77	                </div>
78	            );
79	        } else {
80	            const unutrašnjePromjene = [];
81	            const unutrašnjiKljučevi = Array.from(new Set([...Object.keys(o), ...Object.keys(n)]));
82	            
83	            unutrašnjiKljučevi.forEach(sk => {
84	                if (JSON.stringify(o[sk]) !== JSON.stringify(n[sk])) {
85	                    unutrašnjePromjene.push(
86	                        <div key={sk} className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center gap-1 text-[10px] ml-4 border-b border-slate-800 pb-1 last:border-0">
87	                            <span className="text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase w-24 shrink-0">• {sk}:</span>
88	                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap">
89	                                <span className="text-red-400 line-through bg-red-950/40 px-1 rounded font-mono">{siguranString(o[sk])}</span>
90	                                <span className="text-slate-500">➔</span>
91	                                <span className="text-emerald-400 font-black bg-emerald-900/40 px-1 rounded font-mono">{siguranString(n[sk])}</span>
92	                            </div>
93	                        </div>
94	                    );
95	                }
96	            });
97	
98	            if (unutrašnjePromjene.length > 0) {
99	                subDiffs.push(
100	                    <div key={`mod-${kljuc}`} className="bg-slate-900/60 p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-800 text-[10px] my-1">
101	                        <span className="text-amber-400 font-black uppercase block mb-1.5">✏️ Izmjena unutar stavke: {nazivArtikla}</span>
102	                        <div className="space-y-1">{unutrašnjePromjene}</div>
103	                    </div>
104	                );
105	            }
106	        }
107	    });
108	
109	    return subDiffs.length > 0 ? <div className="space-y-2 mt-2">{subDiffs}</div> : null;
110	};
111	
112	const PrikazIzmjena = ({ log }) => {
113	    const stari = log.stari_podaci || {};
114	    const novi = log.novi_podaci || {};
115	
116	    const svaPoljaZaAnalizu = Array.from(new Set([...Object.keys(stari), ...Object.keys(novi)]));
117	    let ispisSvihIzmjena = [];
118	
119	    svaPoljaZaAnalizu.forEach(k => {
120	        const staroVal = stari[k];
121	        const novoVal = novi[k];
122	
123	        if (JSON.stringify(staroVal) === JSON.stringify(novoVal)) return;
124	
125	        if (typeof novoVal === 'object' || typeof staroVal === 'object' || k.includes('jsonb') || k.includes('ids') || Array.isArray(novoVal)) {
126	            const listaDiff = renderStavkeDiff(staroVal, novoVal);
127	            if (listaDiff) {
128	                ispisSvihIzmjena.push(
129	                    <div key={k} className="mb-3 bg-slate-950/60 p-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-800 shadow-inner animate-in fade-in">
130	                        <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase mb-2 block border-b border-slate-800/80 pb-1.5 tracking-wider">📦 Izmjena u strukturi liste polja: {k.toUpperCase()}</span>
131	                        {listaDiff}
132	                    </div>
133	                );
134	            }
135	            return;
136	        }
137	
138	        ispisSvihIzmjena.push(
139	            <div key={k} className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center gap-2 text-[11px] py-2 border-b border-theme-border/30 last:border-0 hover:bg-theme-panel/40 px-2 rounded transition-all">
140	                <span className="text-slate-400 uppercase w-32 shrink-0 font-bold">• {k.replace(/_/g, ' ')}:</span>
141	                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 min-w-0">
142	                    <span className="text-red-400 line-through bg-red-950/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-mono truncate max-w-[45%]">{siguranString(staroVal)}</span>
143	                    <span className="text-slate-600 font-black shrink-0">➔</span>
144	                    <span className="text-emerald-400 font-black bg-emerald-900/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-mono truncate flex-1 shadow-sm">{siguranString(novoVal)}</span>
145	                </div>
146	            </div>
147	        );
148	    });
149	
150	    if (ispisSvihIzmjena.length === 0) {
151	        return (
152	            <div className="mt-2 p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
153	                <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-300 leading-relaxed italic">{log.detalji}</p>
154	            </div>
155	        );
156	    }
157	    
158	    return <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">{ispisSvihIzmjena}</div>;
159	};
