161	export default function KontrolniToranjModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
162	    const saas = useSaaS('forenzika_toranj', { boja_kartice: '#1e293b', boja_naslova: 'text-indigo-400' });
163	
164	    const [sken, setSken] = useState('');
165	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
166	    const [forenzika, setForenzika] = useState(null);
167	    const [sviDokumenti, setSviDokumenti] = useState([]);
168	    const [showDropdown, setShowDropdown] = useState(false);
169	    const [otvoreniLogovi, setOtvoreniLogovi] = useState(new Set());
170	
171	    const [reklamacijskiAlarmi, setReklamacijskiAlarmi] = useState([]);
172	    const [istorijaKrojenjaMajke, setIstorijaKrojenjaMajke] = useState(null);
173	    const [katalog, setKatalog] = useState([]);
174	
175	    const toggleLog = (id) => {
176	        const newSet = new Set(otvoreniLogovi);
177	        if (newSet.has(id)) newSet.delete(id); else newSet.add(id);
178	        setOtvoreniLogovi(newSet);
179	    };
180	
181	    // 🟢 DEEP LINKING LOGIKA ZA AUTOMATSKO OTVARANJE
182	    useEffect(() => {
183	        const ucitajSveReference = async () => {
184	            const [pon, rn, otp, rac, pak, trup, kat] = await Promise.all([
185	                supabase.from('ponude').select('id, kupac_naziv, status'),
186	                supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('id, kupac_naziv, status'),
187	                supabase.from('otpremnice').select('id, kupac_naziv, status'),
188	                supabase.from('racuni').select('id, kupac_naziv, status'),
189	                supabase.from('paketi').select('paket_id, naziv_proizvoda, closed_at, otpremnica_id'),
190	                supabase.from('trupci').select('id, vrsta, status'),
191	                supabase.from('katalog_proizvoda').select('*')
192	            ]);
193	            
194	            if(kat.data) setKatalog(kat.data);
195	
196	            const unikatniPaks = []; const pakSet = new Set();
197	            if (pak.data) {
198	                pak.data.forEach(p => {
199	                    if(!pakSet.has(p.paket_id)) {
200	                        pakSet.add(p.paket_id);
201	                        let st = p.otpremnica_id ? 'ISPORUČENO' : (p.closed_at ? 'NA STANJU' : 'U PROIZVODNJI');
202	                        unikatniPaks.push({ id: p.paket_id, meta: p.naziv_proizvoda, tip: 'Paket', status: st, active: p.otpremnica_id ? 0 : 1 });
203	                    }
204	                });
205	            }
206	
207	            setSviDokumenti([
208	                ...unikatniPaks,
209	                ...(pon.data || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, meta: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Ponuda', status: d.status, active: d.status.includes('REALIZ') ? 0 : 1 })),
210	                ...(rn.data || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, meta: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Radni Nalog', status: d.status, active: d.status === 'ZAVRŠENO' ? 0 : 1 })),
211	                ...(otp.data || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, meta: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Otpremnica', status: d.status, active: d.status === 'ISPORUČENO' ? 0 : 1 })),
212	                ...(rac.data || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, meta: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Račun', status: d.status, active: d.status === 'NAPLAĆENO' ? 0 : 1 })),
213	                ...(trup.data || []).map(d => ({ id: String(d.id), meta: d.vrsta || 'Trupac', tip: 'Trupac', status: d.status?.toUpperCase(), active: d.status === 'prorezano' ? 0 : 1 }))
214	            ]);
215	        };
216	        ucitajSveReference();
217	
218	        // Čitanje namjere (intent) sa početnog ekrana
219	        const autoOpenId = localStorage.getItem('erp_auto_open_id');
220	        if (autoOpenId) {
221	            setSken(autoOpenId);
222	            analizirajSve(autoOpenId);
223	            localStorage.removeItem('erp_auto_open_id'); // Očisti nakon upotrebe da ne smeta sljedeći put
224	        }
225	
226	    }, []);
227	
228	    const preporuke = useMemo(() => {
229	        if (!sken) return [];
230	        const pojam = sken.toUpperCase();
231	        return sviDokumenti.filter(d => d.id.toUpperCase().includes(pojam)).slice(0, 15);
232	    }, [sken, sviDokumenti]);
233	
234	    const analizirajSve = async (tačanBroj) => {
235	        const val = tačanBroj.toUpperCase().trim();
236	        if (!val) return;
237	        setLoading(true); setForenzika(null); setShowDropdown(false); setOtvoreniLogovi(new Set());
238	        setReklamacijskiAlarmi([]); setIstorijaKrojenjaMajke(null);
239	
240	        const { data: rekPodaci } = await supabase.from('reklamacije').select('*').or(`paket_id.eq.${val},broj_otpremnice.eq.${val}`);
241	        if (rekPodaci && rekPodaci.length > 0) setReklamacijskiAlarmi(rekPodaci);
242	
243	        const { data: trupacBaza } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').eq('id', val).maybeSingle();
244	        if (trupacBaza && trupacBaza.parent_id) {
245	            const { data: majkaBaza } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').eq('id', trupacBaza.parent_id).maybeSingle();
246	            if (majkaBaza) setIstorijaKrojenjaMajke({ dijete: trupacBaza, majka: majkaBaza });
247	        }
248	
249	        let nalogIdZaLanac = null; let otpremnicaIdZaLanac = null; let racunIdZaLanac = null; let ponudaIdZaLanac = null;
250	
251	        if (val.startsWith('RN-')) nalogIdZaLanac = val;
252	        else if (val.startsWith('OTP-')) otpremnicaIdZaLanac = val;
253	        else if (val.startsWith('RAC-')) racunIdZaLanac = val;
254	        else if (val.startsWith('PON-')) ponudaIdZaLanac = val;
255	        else {
256	            const { data: pData } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('broj_veze, otpremnica_id').eq('paket_id', val).limit(1).maybeSingle();
257	            if (pData) {
258	                if (pData.broj_veze && pData.broj_veze.startsWith('RN-')) nalogIdZaLanac = pData.broj_veze;
259	                if (pData.otpremnica_id) otpremnicaIdZaLanac = pData.otpremnica_id;
260	            }
261	        }
262	
263	        if (otpremnicaIdZaLanac && !nalogIdZaLanac) {
264	            const { data: otpDb } = await supabase.from('otpremnice').select('broj_veze').eq('id', otpremnicaIdZaLanac).maybeSingle();
265	            if (otpDb && otpDb.broj_veze?.startsWith('RN-')) nalogIdZaLanac = otpDb.broj_veze;
266	        }
267	
268	        if (nalogIdZaLanac) {
269	            const { data: rnDb } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('broj_ponude').eq('id', nalogIdZaLanac).maybeSingle();
270	            if (rnDb?.broj_ponude) ponudaIdZaLanac = rnDb.broj_ponude;
271	            if (!otpremnicaIdZaLanac) {
272	                const { data: otpDb } = await supabase.from('otpremnice').select('id').eq('broj_veze', nalogIdZaLanac).maybeSingle();
273	                if (otpDb) otpremnicaIdZaLanac = otpDb.id;
274	            }
275	        }
276	
277	        if (otpremnicaIdZaLanac && !racunIdZaLanac) {
278	            const { data: racDb } = await supabase.from('racuni').select('id').eq('broj_veze', otpremnicaIdZaLanac).maybeSingle();
279	            if (racDb) racunIdZaLanac = racDb.id;
280	        }
281	
282	        const cistiIdovi = [val, nalogIdZaLanac, otpremnicaIdZaLanac, racunIdZaLanac, ponudaIdZaLanac].filter(Boolean);
283	
284	        const [naloziDB, ponudeDB, otpremniceDB, racuniDB, paketiDB] = await Promise.all([
285	            supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('*').in('id', cistiIdovi),
286	            supabase.from('ponude').select('*').in('id', cistiIdovi),
287	            supabase.from('otpremnice').select('*').in('id', cistiIdovi),
288	            supabase.from('racuni').select('*').in('id', cistiIdovi),
289	            supabase.from('paketi').select('*').or(`paket_id.eq.${val},broj_veze.eq.${nalogIdZaLanac}`).order('created_at', { ascending: true })
290	        ]);
291	
292	        let dataChain = {
293	            paketHistory: paketiDB.data?.filter(p => p.paket_id === val) || [], paketSadrzaj: [], paketUkupnoM3: 0, 
294	            nalozi: naloziDB.data || [], ponuda: (ponudeDB.data && ponudeDB.data.length > 0) ? ponudeDB.data[0] : null, 
295	            otpremnice: otpremniceDB.data || [], racuni: racuniDB.data || [],
296	            kupac: null, logovi: [], finansijska_analiza: [], ulazniTrupci: [], ulazniPaketi: [], izlazniPaketi: []
297	        };
298	
299	        let glavniPaketId = paketiDB.data?.find(p => p.paket_id.includes(val))?.paket_id || (paketiDB.data && paketiDB.data.length > 0 ? paketiDB.data[0].paket_id : null);
300	        
301	        if (glavniPaketId) {
302	            const fokusiraniPaketi = paketiDB.data.filter(p => p.paket_id === glavniPaketId);
303	            dataChain.paketHistory = fokusiraniPaketi;
304	            
305	            const agregacija = {}; let ukupnoM3 = 0;
306	            fokusiraniPaketi.forEach(p => {
307	                const kljuc = p.naziv_proizvoda + '_' + p.debljina + '_' + p.sirina + '_' + p.duzina;
308	                if (!agregacija[kljuc]) { agregacija[kljuc] = { naziv: p.naziv_proizvoda, debljina: p.debljina, sirina: p.sirina, duzina: p.duzina, kolicina_final: 0, jm: p.jm || 'kom', oznake: new Set(p.oznake || []) }; }
309	                const finalDodato = parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0);
310	                agregacija[kljuc].kolicina_final += finalDodato;
311	                if (p.oznake) p.oznake.forEach(o => agregacija[kljuc].oznake.add(o));
312	                ukupnoM3 += finalDodato;
313	            });
314	            dataChain.paketSadrzaj = Object.values(agregacija).map(s => ({...s, oznake: [...s.oznake]}));
315	            dataChain.paketUkupnoM3 = ukupnoM3;
316	
317	            let trupciIds = []; let paketiIds = [];
318	            fokusiraniPaketi.forEach(p => {
319	                if (p.ulaz_trupci_ids) trupciIds.push(...(Array.isArray(p.ulaz_trupci_ids) ? p.ulaz_trupci_ids : [p.ulaz_trupci_ids]));
320	                if (p.ai_sirovina_ids) paketiIds.push(...(Array.isArray(p.ai_sirovina_ids) ? p.ai_sirovina_ids : [p.ai_sirovina_ids]));
321	            });
322	            if (trupciIds.length > 0) {
323	                const { data } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').in('id', [...new Set(trupciIds)]);
324	                if (data) dataChain.ulazniTrupci = data;
325	            }
326	            if (paketiIds.length > 0) {
327	                const { data } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('paket_id, naziv_proizvoda, kolicina_final, masina').in('paket_id', [...new Set(paketiIds)]);
328	                if (data) dataChain.ulazniPaketi = [...new Map(data.map(i => [i.paket_id, i])).values()];
329	            }
330	            const { data: forward } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('paket_id, naziv_proizvoda, kolicina_final, masina').ilike('ai_sirovina_ids', `%${val}%`);
331	            if (forward) dataChain.izlazniPaketi = [...new Map(forward.map(i => [i.paket_id, i])).values()];
332	        }
333	
334	        let targetKupacIme = dataChain.ponuda?.kupac_naziv || dataChain.nalozi[0]?.kupac_naziv || dataChain.racuni[0]?.kupac_naziv || dataChain.otpremnice[0]?.kupac_naziv;
335	        if (targetKupacIme) {
336	            const { data: kupacPodaci } = await supabase.from('kupci').select('*').eq('naziv', targetKupacIme).limit(1);
337	            if (kupacPodaci && kupacPodaci.length > 0) dataChain.kupac = kupacPodaci[0];
338	        }
339	
340	        if (dataChain.ponuda && dataChain.kupac) {
341	            const sistemskiRabati = dataChain.kupac.rabati_jsonb || {};
342	            const stavkePonude = dataChain.ponuda.stavke_jsonb || [];
343	            dataChain.finansijska_analiza = stavkePonude.map(st => {
344	                let defaultRabat = 0;
345	                if (sistemskiRabati.proizvodi && sistemskiRabati.proizvodi[st.sifra]) defaultRabat = parseFloat(sistemskiRabati.proizvodi[st.sifra]);
346	                else if (sistemskiRabati.ukupni) defaultRabat = parseFloat(sistemskiRabati.ukupni);
347	                const primijenjeniRabat = parseFloat(st.rabat_procenat || 0);
348	                const odstupanje = primijenjeniRabat - defaultRabat;
349	                return {
350	                    sifra: st.sifra, naziv: st.naziv, kolicina: st.kolicina_obracun, cijena_baza: st.cijena_baza,
351	                    sistemski_rabat: defaultRabat, primijenjeni_rabat: primijenjeniRabat, odstupanje: odstupanje,
352	                    upozorenje: odstupanje > 0 ? `⚠️ Ručno povećan rabat za ${odstupanje}%!` : `U skladu sa bazom`
353	                };
354	            });
355	        }
356	
357	        let sysLogsRaw = [];
358	        const orConditions = cistiIdovi.map(id => `detalji.ilike.%${id}%,akcija.ilike.%${id}%`).join(',');
359	        
360	        const { data: sLogs } = await (orConditions ? supabase.from('sistem_audit_log').select('*').or(orConditions) : { data: [] });
361	        if (sLogs) sysLogsRaw = sLogs;
362	
363	        const reklamacijskiLogovi = (rekPodaci || []).map(r => ({
364	            id: 'rek_log_' + r.id, created_at: new Date(r.created_at).getTime(), datum_prikaz: formatirajTacanDatum(r.created_at),
365	            korisnik: r.snimio_korisnik, akcija: `⚠️ STATUS REKLAMACIJE: [${r.status}]`,
366	            detalji: `Zahtjev za povrat/otpis. Količina: ${r.kolicina} m³. Razlog: ${r.razlog}. ${r.napomena || '-'}`
367	        }));
368	
369	        const sviLogovi = [
370	            ...sysLogsRaw.map(l => ({ id: 'sys_' + l.id, created_at: getSortableTime(l.created_at, l.vrijeme, l.datum), datum_prikaz: formatirajTacanDatum(l.created_at, l.vrijeme, l.datum), korisnik: l.korisnik, akcija: l.akcija, detalji: l.detalji || 'Zapis sistema.', stari_podaci: l.stari_podaci || null, novi_podaci: l.novi_podaci || null })),
371	            ...reklamacijskiLogovi
372	        ];
373	
374	        dataChain.logovi = Array.from(new Map(sviLogovi.map(item => [item.id, item])).values()).filter(l => l.created_at > 0).sort((a, b) => a.created_at - b.created_at);
375	        setForenzika(dataChain); setLoading(false); setSken(val); 
376	    };
377	
378	    return (
379	        <div className="p-4 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_pozadine }}>
380	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-indigo-500" user={user} hideMasina={true} modulIme="forenzika" saas={saas} />
381	
382	            <div className="p-6 rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl text-center bg-theme-card relative z-50">
383	                <h3 className={`${saas.ui.boja_naslova || 'text-indigo-400'} font-black uppercase text-xs mb-4 tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2`}><span>🕵️‍♂️ FORENZIČKI SKENER / X-RAY DOKUMENTA</span></h3>
384	                <div className="flex gap-2 max-w-2xl mx-auto relative">
385	                    <div className="flex-1 relative">
386	                        <input type="text" value={sken} onChange={(e) => { setSken(e.target.value.toUpperCase()); setShowDropdown(true); }} onKeyDown={e => e.key === 'Enter' && analizirajSve(sken)} onFocus={()=>setShowDropdown(true)} placeholder="UPIŠI ID ILI SKENIRAJ..." className="w-full p-5 bg-theme-panel rounded-2xl text-center font-black text-2xl text-theme-text border-2 border-indigo-500/50 uppercase outline-none focus:border-indigo-400 shadow-inner tracking-widest relative z-10" />
387	                        {showDropdown && sken && preporuke.length > 0 && (
388	                            <div className="absolute top-full left-0 right-0 mt-2 bg-theme-panel border border-slate-600 rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden z-[100] text-left max-h-60 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
389	                                {preporuke.map(p => (
390	                                    <div key={p.id} onClick={() => { setSken(p.id); analizirajSve(p.id); }} className="p-4 border-b border-theme-border hover:bg-slate-700 cursor-pointer flex justify-between items-center group">
391	                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3"><span className="text-theme-text font-black">{p.id}</span> <span className="text-[9px] text-indigo-400 uppercase font-bold border border-indigo-500/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-indigo-900/20">{p.tip}</span></div>
392	                                        <div className="text-right"><div className="text-slate-300 text-xs font-bold">{p.meta}</div><div className="text-[9px] text-emerald-400 font-bold uppercase mt-1">{p.status}</div></div>
393	                                    </div>
394	                                ))}
395	                            </div>
396	                        )}
397	                    </div>
398	                    <button onClick={() => { analizirajSve(sken); setShowDropdown(false); }} className="bg-indigo-600 px-8 rounded-2xl text-theme-text font-black hover:bg-indigo-500 shadow-xl text-xl flex items-center justify-center">📷</button>
399	                </div>
400	            </div>
401	
402	            {reklamacijskiAlarmi.length > 0 && (
403	                <div className="bg-red-950/40 border-2 border-red-500 p-6 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(239,68,68,0.25)] space-y-4 animate-in zoom-in-95">
404	                    <h3 className="text-red-400 font-black uppercase text-xs md:text-sm tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2"><AlertTriangle className="animate-pulse"/> DETEKTOVAN ALARM: PREDMET REKLAMACIJE KUPCA</h3>
405	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
406	                        {reklamacijskiAlarmi.map(rek => {
407	                            const kat = katalog.find(k => k.naziv === rek.naziv_proizvoda || k.sifra === rek.naziv_proizvoda);
408	                            let jedinicaDim = 'mm';
409	                            if (kat && parseFloat(kat.duzina) < 1000 && parseFloat(kat.duzina) > 0) jedinicaDim = 'cm';
410	                            const dimStr = kat ? `${kat.visina}x${kat.sirina}x${kat.duzina} ${jedinicaDim}` : 'N/A';
411	                            const originalniUnosUtaknut = rek.napomena?.match(/\[Unos:\s*\d+\s*\w+\]/i)?.[0] || 'N/A';
412	
413	                            return (
414	                                <div key={rek.id} className="p-4 bg-black/40 rounded-xl border border-red-500/20 text-xs text-slate-300 space-y-2">
415	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-red-500/20 pb-2">
416	                                        <span className="text-white font-black uppercase text-sm">Paket: {rek.paket_id}</span>
417	                                        <span className="bg-red-900/40 text-red-400 border border-red-500/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-black uppercase">{rek.status}</span>
418	                                    </div>
419	                                    <p className="font-bold text-white uppercase">Kupac: <span className="text-red-400">{rek.kupac_naziv}</span></p>
420	                                    <p className="font-medium text-slate-200">Artikal: {rek.naziv_proizvoda}</p>
421	                                    {kat && <p className="text-emerald-400 font-mono font-black text-[11px]">📏 DIMENZIJE ARTIKLA: {dimStr}</p>}
422	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-red-950/20 p-2 rounded border border-red-500/10 font-bold text-[11px]">
423	                                        <span>Zapremina: <b className="text-red-400">{rek.kolicina} m³</b></span>
424	                                        <span className="text-blue-400">Izvorni Unos: <b className="text-white">{originalniUnosUtaknut.replace(/[\[\]]/g, '')}</b></span>
425	                                    </div>
426	                                    <p className="text-amber-400 font-black">Razlog: {rek.razlog}</p>
427	                                    {rek.napomena && <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 italic">Opis: "{rek.napomena.replace(/\[Unos:\s*\d+\s*\w+\]/i, '').trim()}"</p>}
428	                                </div>
429	                            );
430	                        })}
431	                    </div>
432	                </div>
433	            )}
434	
435	            {istorijaKrojenjaMajke && (
436	                <div className="bg-amber-950/30 border-2 border-amber-500/50 p-6 rounded-[2rem] shadow-xl space-y-3 animate-in slide-in-from-top-4">
437	                    <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-xs tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2"><History size={16}/> LANAC KROJENJA TRUPACA (Sljedivost sirovine)</h3>
438	                    <div className="p-4 bg-black/30 rounded-xl border border-theme-border flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4 text-xs">
439	                        <div>
440	                            <p className="text-white font-black text-sm">Trupac <span className="text-amber-400">{istorijaKrojenjaMajke.dijete.id}</span></p>
441	                            <p className="text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase">Ovaj komad je nastao fizičkim prekrajanjem/krojenjem na placu.</p>
442	                        </div>
443	                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-amber-900/10 border border-amber-500/20 p-3 rounded-xl shrink-0">
444	                            <span className="text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase text-[10px]">Izvorna Majka:</span>
445	                            <span className="text-white font-black font-mono text-base">{istorijaKrojenjaMajke.majka.id}</span>
446	                            <span className="text-slate-500">|</span>
447	                            <span className="text-emerald-400 font-black">{istorijaKrojenjaMajke.majka.zapremina} m³</span>
448	                        </div>
449	                    </div>
450	                </div>
451	            )}
452	
453	            {loading && <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 animate-pulse text-indigo-400 font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest">Skeniram bazu poslova...</div>}
454	
455	            {forenzika && !loading && (
456	                <div className="space-y-6 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom">
457	                    {/* LANAC MAKRO PREGLEDA */}
458	                    <div className="p-6 bg-theme-card rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden">
459	                        <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-2 h-full bg-indigo-500"></div>
460	                        <h2 className="text-indigo-400 font-black uppercase text-xs mb-6 ml-4 tracking-widest">1. Hronološki lanac sljedivosti posla</h2>
461	                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 ml-4">
462	                            <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-center flex flex-col justify-center ${forenzika.ponuda ? 'border-pink-500 bg-pink-900/10' : 'border-slate-800 text-slate-600 bg-black/10'}`}>
463	                                <span className="text-[9px] uppercase font-black mb-1">Korijen (Ponuda)</span>
464	                                {forenzika.ponuda ? <b className="text-white text-base">{forenzika.ponuda.id}</b> : <span>Nema</span>}
465	                            </div>
466	                            <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-center flex flex-col justify-center ${forenzika.nalozi.length > 0 ? 'border-purple-500 bg-purple-900/10' : 'border-slate-800 text-slate-600 bg-black/10'}`}>
467	                                <span className="text-[9px] uppercase font-black mb-1">Proizvodnja (Nalozi)</span>
468	                                {forenzika.nalozi.map(n => <b key={n.id} className="text-white text-xs block">{n.id} ({n.status})</b>)}
469	                            </div>
470	                            <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-center flex flex-col justify-center ${forenzika.otpremnice.length > 0 ? 'border-orange-500 bg-orange-900/10' : 'border-slate-800 text-slate-600 bg-black/10'}`}>
471	                                <span className="text-[9px] uppercase font-black mb-1">Logistika (Utovar)</span>
472	                                {forenzika.otpremnice.map(o => <b key={o.id} className="text-white text-xs block">{o.id}</b>)}
473	                            </div>
474	                            <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-center flex flex-col justify-center ${forenzika.racuni.length > 0 ? 'border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-900/10' : 'border-slate-800 text-slate-600 bg-black/10'}`}>
475	                                <span className="text-[9px] uppercase font-black mb-1">Finansije (Fakture)</span>
476	                                {forenzika.racuni.map(r => <b key={r.id} className="text-emerald-400 text-xs block">{r.id}</b>)}
477	                            </div>
478	                        </div>
479	
480	                        {forenzika.paketSadrzaj.length > 0 && (
481	                            <div className="mt-6 p-5 bg-theme-panel border border-indigo-500/20 rounded-2xl ml-4">
482	                                <p className="text-[10px] text-indigo-400 uppercase font-black mb-3">Trenutni sadržaj i zapremina u paketu:</p>
483	                                {forenzika.paketSadrzaj.map((p, i) => (
484	                                    <div key={i} className="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-black/20 border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-xs mb-2">
485	                                        <div><p className="text-white font-black uppercase">{p.naziv}</p><p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono mt-0.5">{p.debljina}x{p.sirina}x{p.duzina} mm</p></div>
486	                                        <b className="text-emerald-400 text-base font-mono">{p.kolicina_final.toFixed(3)} m³</b>
487	                                    </div>
488	                                ))}
489	                            </div>
490	                        )}
491	                    </div>
492	
493	                    <div className="p-6 bg-theme-card rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl">
494	                        <h3 className="text-blue-400 font-black uppercase text-xs mb-4">🌳 Sljedivost materijala i procesa paketa</h3>
495	                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
496	                            <div className="p-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl border border-slate-700">
497	                                <h4 className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase mb-2">⬅️ Ulazne Sirovine paketa:</h4>
498	                                {forenzika.ulazniTrupci.map(t => <p key={t.id} className="text-xs text-emerald-400 font-mono">• Trupac ID: {t.id} ({t.zapremina} m³)</p>)}
499	                                {forenzika.ulazniPaketi.map(p => <p key={p.paket_id} className="text-xs text-blue-400 font-mono">• Iz paketa: {p.paket_id} ({p.kolicina_final} m³)</p>)}
500	                                {forenzika.ulazniTrupci.length === 0 && forenzika.ulazniPaketi.length === 0 && <p className="text-xs italic text-slate-500">Nema evidentirane ulazne sirovine.</p>}
501	                            </div>
502	                            <div className="p-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl border border-slate-700">
503	                                <h4 className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase mb-2">➡️ Izvedeni proizvodi (Dalja Prerada):</h4>
504	                                {forenzika.izlazniPaketi.map(izv => <p key={izv.paket_id} className="text-xs text-purple-400 font-mono">• Prerađen u paket: {izv.paket_id} ({izv.kolicina_final} m³)</p>)}
505	                                {forenzika.izlazniPaketi.length === 0 && <p className="text-xs italic text-slate-500">Paket nije dalje prerađivan.</p>}
506	                            </div>
507	                        </div>
508	                    </div>
509	
510	                    {forenzika.finansijska_analiza.length > 0 && (
511	                        <div className="p-6 bg-theme-card rounded-[2rem] border border-emerald-500/30 shadow-2xl">
512	                            <h3 className="text-emerald-400 font-black uppercase text-xs mb-4">💸 Finansijska Kontrola Cijena i Rabata</h3>
513	                            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
514	                                <table className="w-full text-left text-xs">
515	                                    <thead className="bg-black/40 text-slate-400 uppercase font-black">
516	                                        <tr><th className="p-3">Proizvod</th><th className="p-3 text-center">Količina</th><th className="p-3 text-right">Cijena Baza</th><th className="p-3 text-center">Sistemski Rabat</th><th className="p-3 text-center">Ukucani Rabat</th><th className="p-3">Status Kontrole</th></tr>
517	                                    </thead>
518	                                    <tbody className="text-white font-bold">
519	                                        {forenzika.finansijska_analiza.map((f, i) => (
520	                                            <tr key={i} className="border-b border-theme-border hover:bg-white/5">
521	                                                <td className="p-3">{f.sifra} - {f.naziv}</td>
522	                                                <td className="p-3 text-center">{f.kolicina}</td>
523	                                                <td className="p-3 text-right">{f.cijena_baza} KM</td>
524	                                                <td className="p-3 text-center text-slate-400">{f.sistemski_rabat}%</td>
525	                                                <td className="p-3 text-center text-amber-400">{f.primijenjeni_rabat}%</td>
526	                                                <td className={`p-3 text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${f.odstupanje > 0 ? 'text-red-400 bg-red-950/20' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>{f.upozorenje}</td>
527	                                            </tr>
528	                                        ))}
529	                                    </tbody>
530	                                </table>
531	                            </div>
532	                        </div>
533	                    )}
534	
535	                    {/* DNEVNIK LOGOVA I HISTORIJE IZMJENA */}
536	                    <div className="p-6 bg-theme-card rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl relative">
537	                        <h2 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-xs mb-6 tracking-widest">3. Skala Izmjena i hronologija događaja (Uključujući Reklamacije)</h2>
538	                        <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar relative pl-10 before:absolute before:left-[19px] before:top-2 before:bottom-2 before:w-[2px] before:bg-slate-800 z-0">
539	                            {forenzika.logovi.map(log => {
540	                                const jeOtvoren = otvoreniLogovi.has(log.id);
541	                                const jeReklamacija = log.id.startsWith('rek_log_');
542	
543	                                return (
544	                                    <div key={log.id} className="relative z-10">
545	                                        <div onClick={() => toggleLog(log.id)} className={`p-4 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition-all ${jeOtvoren ? 'bg-theme-card border-amber-500/40' : 'bg-theme-panel border-theme-border hover:border-slate-700'} ${jeReklamacija ? 'border-red-500/40 bg-red-950/10' : ''}`}>
546	                                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-xs border-b border-theme-border/60 pb-2 mb-2">
547	                                                <span className={`font-black uppercase tracking-wider ${jeReklamacija ? 'text-red-400 animate-pulse' : 'text-white'}`}>{log.akcija}</span>
548	                                                <span className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] font-mono bg-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded">{log.datum_prikaz} by {log.korisnik}</span>
549	                                            </div>
550	                                            {jeReklamacija ? (
551	                                                <p className="text-slate-200 font-mono text-[11px] leading-relaxed border-l-2 border-red-500 pl-2 mt-1">{log.detalji}</p>
552	                                            ) : (
553	                                                <PrikazIzmjena log={log} />
554	                                            )}
555	                                        </div>
556	                                    </div>
557	                                );
558	                            })}
559	                        </div>
560	                    </div>
561	                </div>
562	            )}
563	        </div>
564	    );
565	}

=== app/modules/LagerPaketaModule.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import MasterHeader from '../components/MasterHeader';
5	import MasterSearch from '../components/MasterSearch';
6	import PametniDialog from '../components/PametniDialog';
7	import ScannerOverlay from '../components/ScannerOverlay';
8	import { printDeklaracijaPaketa } from '../utils/printHelpers';
9	import { useSaaS } from '../utils/useSaaS';
10	
11	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co';
12	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
13	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
14	
15	export default function LagerPaketaModule({ onExit, user, header, setHeader }) {
16	    const saas = useSaaS('lager_modul', {
17	        boja_kartice: '#1e293b',
18	        boja_slova: '#ffffff',
19	        velicina_naslova: '16',
20	        boja_teksta: '#3b82f6'
21	    });
22	
23	    const [glavniTab, setGlavniTab] = useState('paketi');
24	    const [subTabPaketi, setSubTabPaketi] = useState('NA STANJU');
25	
26	    const [paketi, setPaketi] = useState([]);
27	    const [trupci, setTrupci] = useState([]);
28	    const [aktivniNalozi, setAktivniNalozi] = useState([]);
29	    const [katalog, setKatalog] = useState([]);
30	    const [rnDetalji, setRnDetalji] = useState(null);
31	
32	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
33	    const [pretraga, setPretraga] = useState('');
34	    const [isScanning, setIsScanning] = useState(false);
35	
36	    const [selektovaniPaket, setSelektovaniPaket] = useState(null);
37	    const [historija, setHistorija] = useState([]);
38	    const [izvedeniPaketi, setIzvedeniPaketi] = useState([]);
39	    const [isPrinting, setIsPrinting] = useState(false);
40	
41	    const [fPaket, setFPaket] = useState({ rn: '', debljinaOd: '', debljinaDo: '', sirinaOd: '', sirinaDo: '', duzinaOd: '', duzinaDo: '' });
42	
43	    const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ isOpen: false });
44	    const prikaziDialog = (opcije) => setDialog({ isOpen: true, confirmText: 'POTVRDI', cancelText: 'ZATVORI', ...opcije });
45	    const zatvoriDialog = () => setDialog({ isOpen: false });
46	
47	    const normalizujDimenzije = (p) => {
48	        let d = parseFloat(p.debljina) || 0;
49	        let s = parseFloat(p.sirina) || 0;
50	        let l = parseFloat(p.duzina) || 0;
51	
52	        const katArtikal = katalog.find(k => k.sifra === p.naziv_proizvoda || k.naziv === p.naziv_proizvoda);
53	        const jedinica = (katArtikal?.jm_unos || p.jm || 'kom').toLowerCase();
54	
55	        if (jedinica === 'cm') { d = d * 10; s = s * 10; l = l * 10; }
56	        else if (jedinica === 'm') { d = d * 1000; s = s * 1000; l = l * 1000; }
57	
58	        return { debljina: d, sirina: s, duzina: l };
59	    };
60	
61	    useEffect(() => {
62	        loadData();
63	        const channel = supabase.channel(`lager_realtime_channel_${Math.random()}`)
64	            .on('postgres_changes', { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'paketi' }, () => loadData())
65	            .on('postgres_changes', { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'trupci' }, () => loadData())
66	            .subscribe();
67	        return () => { supabase.removeChannel(channel); };
68	    }, [glavniTab, subTabPaketi]);
69	
70	    const loadData = async () => {
71	        if (paketi.length === 0 && trupci.length === 0) setLoading(true);
72	        supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('id, kupac_naziv, status, stavke_jsonb').order('datum', {ascending: false}).then(({data}) => setAktivniNalozi(data || []));
73	        supabase.from('katalog_proizvoda').select('*').then(({data}) => setKatalog(data || []));
74	
75	        if (glavniTab === 'paketi') {
76	            const { data } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
77	            if (data) {
78	                let filtriraniPoTabu = [];
79	                if (subTabPaketi === 'U PROIZVODNJI') filtriraniPoTabu = data.filter(p => p.closed_at === null);
80	                else if (subTabPaketi === 'NA STANJU') filtriraniPoTabu = data.filter(p => p.closed_at !== null && p.otpremnica_id === null);
81	                else if (subTabPaketi === 'OTPREMLJENO') filtriraniPoTabu = data.filter(p => p.otpremnica_id !== null);
82	
83	                const grupisaniPaketi = [];
84	                const iskoristeniIDovi = new Set();
85	                for (let p of filtriraniPoTabu) {
86	                    if (!iskoristeniIDovi.has(p.id)) { iskoristeniIDovi.add(p.id); grupisaniPaketi.push(p); }
87	                }
88	                setPaketi(grupisaniPaketi);
89	            }
90	        } else {
91	            const { data, error } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').eq('zakljucen_prijem', true).eq('status', 'na_lageru').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
92	            if (error) console.error("Greška pri učitavanju lagera trupaca:", error);
93	            setTrupci(data || []);
94	        }
95	        setLoading(false);
96	    };
97	
98	    const ucitajRnDetalje = async (rnId) => {
99	        if (!rnId) { setRnDetalji(null); return; }
100	        const nalog = aktivniNalozi.find(n => n.id === rnId.toUpperCase());
101	        if (!nalog) { setRnDetalji(null); return; }
102	
103	        const { data: rnPaketi } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('*').eq('broj_veze', nalog.id);
104	        const realizacija = (nalog.stavke_jsonb || []).map(stavka => {
105	            const proizvedeniPaketi = (rnPaketi || []).filter(p => p.naziv_proizvoda === stavka.naziv);
106	            const napravljenoKom = proizvedeniPaketi.reduce((s, p) => s + parseFloat(p.kolicina_ulaz || 0), 0);
107	            const napravljenoM3 = proizvedeniPaketi.reduce((s, p) => s + parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0), 0);
108	            return {
109	                ...stavka,
110	                napravljenoKom,
111	                napravljenoM3,
112	                faliKom: parseFloat(stavka.kolicina_unos) - napravljenoKom,
113	                faliM3: parseFloat(stavka.kolicina_obracun) - napravljenoM3
114	            };
115	        });
116	        setRnDetalji({ kupac: nalog.kupac_naziv, status: nalog.status, stavke: realizacija });
117	    };
118	
119	    useEffect(() => { ucitajRnDetalje(fPaket.rn); }, [fPaket.rn, aktivniNalozi]);
120	
121	    const ucitajHistoriju = async (paket) => {
122	        setSelektovaniPaket(paket);
123	        setHistorija('load'); setIzvedeniPaketi([]);
124	        const sid = paket.paket_id;
125	
126	        const { data: auditData } = await supabase.from('audit_log').select('*').eq('zapis_id', sid).order('vrijeme', { ascending: true });
127	        let dogadjaji = auditData ? auditData.map(a => {
128	            let detaljanOpis = "Izmjena unutrašnjih parametara paketa.";
129	            if (a.akcija === 'DODAVANJE') detaljanOpis = `Kreiran paket na mašini: ${paket.masina || 'N/A'}. Količina: ${paket.kolicina_ulaz} kom (${paket.kolicina_final} m³).`;
130	            if (a.stari_podaci && a.novi_podaci) {
131	                try {
132	                    const s = typeof a.stari_podaci === 'string' ? JSON.parse(a.stari_podaci) : a.stari_podaci;
133	                    const n = typeof a.novi_podaci === 'string' ? JSON.parse(a.novi_podaci) : a.novi_podaci;
134	                    const promjene = [];
135	                    Object.keys(n).forEach(k => {
136	                        if (JSON.stringify(s[k]) !== JSON.stringify(n[k]) && !['created_at', 'vrijeme_tekst', 'id'].includes(k)) {
137	                            promjene.push(`${k.toUpperCase()}: ${s[k] || 'prazno'} ➔ ${n[k]}`);
138	                        }
139	                    });
140	                    if (promjene.length > 0) detaljanOpis = promjene.join(' | ');
141	                } catch(e) {}
142	            }
143	            return { vrijeme: a.vrijeme, naslov: a.akcija, opis: detaljanOpis, korisnik: a.korisnik || 'Sistem' };
144	        }) : [];
145	
146	        const { data: forwardData } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('paket_id, naziv_proizvoda, kolicina_final, masina').ilike('ai_sirovina_ids', `%${sid}%`);
147	        if (forwardData && forwardData.length > 0) {
148	            setIzvedeniPaketi([...new Map(forwardData.map(item => [item.paket_id, item])).values()]);
149	        }
150	
151	        const { data: sveStavkePaketa } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('ulaz_trupci_ids, ai_sirovina_ids').eq('paket_id', sid);
152	        if (sveStavkePaketa && sveStavkePaketa.length > 0) {
153	            let sviTrupciId = [];
154	            sveStavkePaketa.forEach(red => { if (red.ulaz_trupci_ids && Array.isArray(red.ulaz_trupci_ids)) sviTrupciId = [...sviTrupciId, ...red.ulaz_trupci_ids]; });
155	            const unikatniTrupci = [...new Set(sviTrupciId)]; 
156	
157	            if (unikatniTrupci.length > 0) {
158	                const { data: trupciPodaci } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').in('id', unikatniTrupci);
159	                if (trupciPodaci && trupciPodaci.length > 0) {
160	                    const totalV = trupciPodaci.reduce((s, t) => s + parseFloat(t.zapremina || 0), 0);
161	                    const sumarijeMap = {};
162	                    trupciPodaci.forEach(t => { const s = t.sumarija || 'Nepoznato'; sumarijeMap[s] = (sumarijeMap[s] || 0) + parseFloat(t.zapremina || 0); });
163	                    const infoText = Object.keys(sumarijeMap).map(k => `${k}: ${((sumarijeMap[k]/totalV)*100).toFixed(1)}%`).join(' | ');
164	                    dogadjaji.push({ vrijeme: paket.created_at, naslov: 'SASTAV SIROVINE (TRUPCI)', opis: `Povezano sa ${unikatniTrupci.length} trupaca iz šume.\nUdio šumarija:\n${infoText}`, korisnik: 'Sistem' });
165	                }
166	            }
167	        }
168	        setHistorija(dogadjaji.length > 0 ? dogadjaji.sort((a,b) => new Date(a.vrijeme) - new Date(b.vrijeme)) : 'none');
169	    };
170	
171	    const isprintajAutomatski = async (paket) => {
172	        setIsPrinting(true);
173	        let vezniDokument = paket.broj_veze; 
174	        if (vezniDokument && vezniDokument.startsWith('RN-')) {
175	            const nalog = aktivniNalozi.find(n => n.id === vezniDokument);
176	            if (nalog && nalog.broj_ponude) vezniDokument = nalog.broj_ponude;
177	        }
178	        printDeklaracijaPaketa(paket.paket_id, [paket], vezniDokument || '');
179	        setIsPrinting(false);
180	    };
181	
182	    const filtriraniPaketi = useMemo(() => {
183	        return paketi.filter(p => {
184	            const norm = normalizujDimenzije(p);
185	            const matchSearch = String(p.paket_id || '').toUpperCase().includes(pretraga.toUpperCase()) || String(p.naziv_proizvoda || '').toUpperCase().includes(pretraga.toUpperCase());
186	            const matchRN = fPaket.rn === '' || (p.broj_veze && p.broj_veze.includes(fPaket.rn.toUpperCase()));
187	            const matchDeb = (fPaket.debljinaOd === '' || norm.debljina >= parseFloat(fPaket.debljinaOd)) && (fPaket.debljinaDo === '' || norm.debljina <= parseFloat(fPaket.debljinaDo));
188	            const matchSir = (fPaket.sirinaOd === '' || norm.sirina >= parseFloat(fPaket.sirinaOd)) && (fPaket.sirinaDo === '' || norm.sirina <= parseFloat(fPaket.sirinaDo));
189	            const matchDuz = (fPaket.duzinaOd === '' || norm.duzina >= parseFloat(fPaket.duzinaOd)) && (fPaket.duzinaDo === '' || norm.duzina <= parseFloat(fPaket.duzinaDo));
190	            return matchSearch && matchRN && matchDeb && matchSir && matchDuz;
191	        });
192	    }, [paketi, pretraga, fPaket, katalog]);
193	
194	    const filtriraniTrupci = useMemo(() => {
195	        return trupci.filter(t => {
196	            const searchStr = pretraga.toUpperCase();
197	            return String(t.id || '').toUpperCase().includes(searchStr) || 
198	                   String(t.sumarija || '').toUpperCase().includes(searchStr) ||
199	                   String(t.otpremnica_broj || '').toUpperCase().includes(searchStr) ||
200	                   String(t.vrsta || '').toUpperCase().includes(searchStr);
201	        });
202	    }, [trupci, pretraga]);
203	
204	    const stats = useMemo(() => {
205	        const m3 = glavniTab === 'paketi' ? filtriraniPaketi.reduce((s, p) => s + parseFloat(p.kolicina_final || 0), 0) : filtriraniTrupci.reduce((s, t) => s + parseFloat(t.zapremina || 0), 0);
206	        return { count: glavniTab === 'paketi' ? filtriraniPaketi.length : filtriraniTrupci.length, m3: m3.toFixed(3) };
207	    }, [filtriraniPaketi, filtriraniTrupci, glavniTab]);
208	
209	    return (
210	        <div className="p-4 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_slova }}>
211	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
212	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-blue-500" user={user} modulIme="lager" saas={saas} />
213	
214	            <div className="flex bg-theme-panel p-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
215	                <button onClick={() => setGlavniTab('paketi')} className={`flex-1 py-4 rounded-xl text-xs uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${glavniTab === 'paketi' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-white'}`}>📦 Lager Gotovih Paketa</button>
216	                <button onClick={() => setGlavniTab('trupci')} className={`flex-1 py-4 rounded-xl text-xs uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${glavniTab === 'trupci' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-white'}`}>🪵 Lager Trupaca na Placu</button>
217	            </div>
218	
219	            <div className="bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-box border border-theme-border shadow-2xl space-y-5 relative z-40" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
220	                <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4">
221	                    <div className="flex-1 relative">
222	                        <input value={pretraga} onChange={e => setPretraga(e.target.value.toUpperCase())} placeholder={glavniTab === 'paketi' ? "Brza pretraga po ID-u ili Nazivu..." : "Pretraga po ID-u, Šumariji, Otpremnici, Vrsti..."} className="w-full p-4 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-2xl text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-blue-500 font-black uppercase shadow-inner" />

362	                            historija === 'none' ? <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Nema zapisa o izmjenama.</p> : (
363	                                <div className="space-y-4">

366	                                            <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-slate-500">
367	                                                <span>⏳ {new Date(h.vrijeme).toLocaleString('bs-BA')}</span>
368	                                                <span className="uppercase font-black text-amber-500">Korisnik: {h.korisnik}</span>
369	                                            </div>
370	                                            <p className="text-blue-300 uppercase font-black text-[10px] mt-1">Akcija: {h.naslov}</p>
371	                                            <p className="text-slate-200 font-mono text-[11px] leading-relaxed border-l-2 border-blue-500 pl-2 mt-1 whitespace-pre-wrap">{h.opis}</p>
372	                                        </div>
373	                                    ))}
374	                                </div>
375	                            )}
376	                        </div>
377	
378	                        <button onClick={() => isprintajAutomatski(selektovaniPaket)} disabled={isPrinting} className="w-full py-5 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-black rounded-2xl uppercase shadow-lg text-xs tracking-widest">🖨️ Isprintaj deklaraciju (Auto QR + mm)</button>
379	                    </div>
380	                </div>
381	            )}
382	            
383	            {isScanning && <ScannerOverlay onScan={(text) => { setPretraga(text.toUpperCase()); setIsScanning(false); }} onClose={() => setIsScanning(false)} />}
384	        </div>
385	    );
386	}

31	    const dragItem = useRef(null); const dragOverItem = useRef(null);
32	    const handleDragStart = (e, index) => { dragItem.current = index; }; const handleDragEnter = (e, index) => { dragOverItem.current = index; };
33	    const handleDrop = () => { if(dragItem.current === null || dragOverItem.current === null) return; const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; const premjesteniItem = novaLista[dragItem.current]; novaLista.splice(dragItem.current, 1); novaLista.splice(dragOverItem.current, 0, premjesteniItem); dragItem.current = null; dragOverItem.current = null; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); };
34	    const updatePolje = (index, key, val) => { const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; novaLista[index][key] = val; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); };
35	    const toggleVelicinaPolja = (index) => { const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; const trenutno = novaLista[index].span; novaLista[index].span = trenutno === 'col-span-1' ? 'col-span-2' : (trenutno === 'col-span-2' ? 'col-span-4' : 'col-span-1'); saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); };
36	    const spremiDimenzije = (e, index) => { if (!saas.isEditMode) return; const w = e.currentTarget.style.width; const h = e.currentTarget.style.height; if (w || h) { const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; if (w) novaLista[index].customWidth = w; if (h) novaLista[index].customHeight = h; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); } };
