1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import MasterHeader from '../components/MasterHeader';
5	import PametniDialog from '../components/PametniDialog';
6	import { useSaaS } from '../utils/useSaaS';
7	import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, X, CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react';
8	
9	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co';
10	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
11	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
12	
13	export default function PlaniranjeModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
14	    const saas = useSaaS('planiranje_modul', {
15	        boja_kartice: '#1e293b', boja_slova: '#ffffff', boja_akcenta: '#f59e0b'
16	    });
17	
18	    const danasnjiDatum = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
19	    const isReadOnly = user?.uloga !== 'admin' && user?.uloga !== 'superadmin' && !(user?.dozvole || []).includes('Planiranje Proizvodnje');
20	
21	    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
22	    const [masine, setMasine] = useState([]);
23	    const [odabranaMasina, setOdabranaMasina] = useState('');
24	    const [kapacitetMasine, setKapacitetMasine] = useState(30);
25	    const [katalog, setKatalog] = useState([]);
26	
27	    const [nerasporedjeniNalozi, setNerasporedjeniNalozi] = useState([]);
28	    const [raspored, setRaspored] = useState([]);
29	    const [sviPlanoviGlobal, setSviPlanoviGlobal] = useState([]); 
30	    
31	    const [pocetakSedmice, setPocetakSedmice] = useState(getStartOfWeek(new Date()));
32	    const [highlightedRN, setHighlightedRN] = useState(null);
33	    const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ isOpen: false });
34	    const prikaziDialog = (opcije) => setDialog({ isOpen: true, confirmText: 'POTVRDI', cancelText: 'ZATVORI', ...opcije });
35	    const zatvoriDialog = () => setDialog({ isOpen: false });
36	
37	    const [pregledNaloga, setPregledNaloga] = useState(null); 
38	    const [planiranjeModal, setPlaniranjeModal] = useState(null); 
39	    const [stavkeZaPlaniranje, setStavkeZaPlaniranje] = useState([]); 
40	
41	    useEffect(() => {
42	        const autoId = localStorage.getItem('erp_auto_open_id');
43	        const autoAction = localStorage.getItem('erp_auto_action');
44	        
45	        if (autoId && autoAction === 'planiraj' && nerasporedjeniNalozi.length > 0) {
46	            setHighlightedRN(autoId);
47	            
48	            const nToPlan = nerasporedjeniNalozi.find(n => n.id === autoId);
49	            if (nToPlan) {
50	                otvoriPlaniranjeModal(nToPlan);
51	            }
52	            
53	            localStorage.removeItem('erp_auto_open_id');
54	            localStorage.removeItem('erp_auto_action');
55	            
56	            setTimeout(() => {
57	                const el = document.getElementById(`rn_card_${autoId}`);
58	                if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
59	            }, 300);
60	
61	            setTimeout(() => { setHighlightedRN(null); }, 4000);
62	        }
63	    }, [nerasporedjeniNalozi]);
64	
65	    useEffect(() => { loadInitialData(); }, []);
66	    useEffect(() => { if (odabranaMasina && katalog.length > 0) loadRaspored(); }, [odabranaMasina, pocetakSedmice, katalog]);
67	
68	    function getStartOfWeek(date) {
69	        const d = new Date(date);
70	        const day = d.getDay();
71	        const diff = d.getDate() - day + (day === 0 ? -6 : 1);
72	        return new Date(d.setDate(diff));
73	    }
74	
75	    const shiftWeek = (smjer) => {
76	        const d = new Date(pocetakSedmice);
77	        d.setDate(d.getDate() + (smjer * 7));
78	        setPocetakSedmice(d);
79	    };
80	
81	    const loadInitialData = async () => {
82	        const { data: mData } = await supabase.from('masine').select('naziv, dnevni_kapacitet_m3, dozvoljeni_moduli').order('naziv');
83	        if (mData) {
84	            setMasine(mData);
85	            if (mData.length > 0) {
86	                setOdabranaMasina(mData[0].naziv);
87	                setKapacitetMasine(parseFloat(mData[0].dnevni_kapacitet_m3) || 30);
88	            }
89	        }
90	        const { data: kData } = await supabase.from('katalog_proizvoda').select('*');
91	        if (kData) setKatalog(kData);
92	    };
93	
94	    const loadRaspored = async () => {
95	        setLoading(true);
96	        const krajSedmice = new Date(pocetakSedmice);
97	        krajSedmice.setDate(krajSedmice.getDate() + 6);
98	        const dOd = pocetakSedmice.toISOString().split('T')[0];
99	        const dDo = krajSedmice.toISOString().split('T')[0];
100	
101	        const { data: raspData } = await supabase.from('raspored_proizvodnje')
102	            .select('*').eq('masina', odabranaMasina).gte('datum_plana', dOd).lte('datum_plana', dDo);
103	        setRaspored(raspData || []);
104	
105	        const { data: sviPlanovi } = await supabase.from('raspored_proizvodnje').select('*').eq('masina', odabranaMasina);
106	        setSviPlanoviGlobal(sviPlanovi || []);
107	
108	        const { data: rnData } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('*').neq('status', 'ZAVRŠENO');
109	        
110	        let naloziZaLijevuStranu = [];
111	
112	        (rnData || []).forEach(rn => {
113	            let imaNerasporedjeno = false;
114	            let stavkeZaMasinu = [];
115	
116	            (rn.stavke_jsonb || []).forEach(st => {
117	                let ukupnoZaUraditi = 0;
118	                let jm_unos = st.jm_unos || 'kom';
119	                let originalKol = parseFloat(st.kolicina_unos || 0);
120	
121	                if (rn.tip_naloga === 'FAZNI') {
122	                    const faza = (rn.tehnologija_jsonb?.[st.id] || []).find(f => f.masina === odabranaMasina);
123	                    if (faza) {
124	                        ukupnoZaUraditi = parseFloat(faza.kolicina || 0);
125	                        originalKol = ukupnoZaUraditi; 
126	                        jm_unos = faza.jm || jm_unos;
127	                    }
128	                } else {
129	                    ukupnoZaUraditi = parseFloat(st.kolicina_obracun || 0);
130	                }
131	
132	                if (ukupnoZaUraditi > 0) {
133	                    const vecZauzetoIliGotovo = (sviPlanovi || []).filter(p => p.rn_id === rn.id && p.stavka_id === st.id).reduce((s, p) => s + parseFloat(p.planirano_m3 || 0) + parseFloat(p.proizvedeno_m3 || 0), 0);
134	                    const preostalo = ukupnoZaUraditi - vecZauzetoIliGotovo;
135	
136	                    if (preostalo > 0.001) {
137	                        imaNerasporedjeno = true;
138	                        const ratio = preostalo / ukupnoZaUraditi;
139	                        const preostaloOriginal = (originalKol * ratio).toFixed(2);
140	                        const dim = st.dimenzije || (st.visina ? `${st.visina}x${st.sirina}x${st.duzina}` : '') || (st.debljina ? `${st.debljina}x${st.sirina}x${st.duzina}` : 'BEZ DIMENZIJE');
141	
142	                        // OVDJE JE KLJUČNA PROMJENA ZA M3 U PLANIRANJU
143	                        const katItem = katalog.find(k => k.sifra === st.sifra) || {};
144	                        const v = parseFloat(katItem.visina) || 0; 
145	                        const sir = parseFloat(katItem.sirina) || 0; 
146	                        const d = parseFloat(katItem.duzina) || 0;
147	                        const vol1kom = (v > 0 && sir > 0 && d > 0) ? (v/1000) * (sir/1000) * (d/1000) : 0;
148	
149	                        stavkeZaMasinu.push({ 
150	                            ...st, 
151	                            preostalo: preostalo.toFixed(4), 
152	                            preostaloOriginal,
153	                            jm_unos, 
154	                            dimenzije_prikaz: dim,
155	                            ukupnoZaUraditi,
156	                            vol1kom
157	                        });
158	                    }
159	                }
160	            });
161	
162	            if (imaNerasporedjeno) {
163	                naloziZaLijevuStranu.push({ ...rn, stavkeZaPlaniranje: stavkeZaMasinu });
164	            }
165	        });
166	
167	        setNerasporedjeniNalozi(naloziZaLijevuStranu.sort((a,b) => new Date(a.rok_isporuke) - new Date(b.rok_isporuke)));
168	        setLoading(false);
169	    };
170	
171	    const izracunajPreporuku = (rok_isporuke) => {
172	        const rokDate = new Date(rok_isporuke);
173	        const preporukaDate = new Date(rokDate);
174	        preporukaDate.setDate(preporukaDate.getDate() - 2);
175	        const danas = new Date(danasnjiDatum);
176	        return preporukaDate < danas ? danas : preporukaDate;
177	    };
178	
179	    const handleDragStart = (e, nalog) => { e.dataTransfer.setData('nalogId', nalog.id); };
180	    const handleDragOver = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.currentTarget.classList.add('bg-white/5'); };
181	    const handleDragLeave = (e) => { e.currentTarget.classList.remove('bg-white/5'); };
182	
183	    const handleDrop = (e, ciljniDatum) => {
184	        e.preventDefault();
185	        e.currentTarget.classList.remove('bg-white/5');
186	        const nalogId = e.dataTransfer.getData('nalogId');
187	        if (!nalogId) return;
188	        const nalog = nerasporedjeniNalozi.find(n => n.id === nalogId);
189	        if(!nalog) return;
190	        otvoriPlaniranjeModal(nalog, ciljniDatum);
191	    };
192	
193	    const otvoriPlaniranjeModal = (nalog, datum = '') => {
194	        if(isReadOnly) return;
195	        const pocetnoStanjeStavki = nalog.stavkeZaPlaniranje.map(st => ({
196	            id: st.id, naziv: st.naziv, dimenzije: st.dimenzije_prikaz, sifra: st.sifra, jm_unos: st.jm_unos, 
197	            maxKolicina: st.preostalo, 
198	            preostaloOriginal: st.preostaloOriginal, 
199	            kolicinaZaUnos: st.preostaloOriginal, 
200	            kolicinaM3: st.preostalo, 
201	            vol1kom: st.vol1kom,
202	            checked: true 
203	        }));
204	        let finalniDatum = datum;
205	        if (!finalniDatum) { finalniDatum = izracunajPreporuku(nalog.rok_isporuke).toISOString().split('T')[0]; }
206	        setStavkeZaPlaniranje(pocetnoStanjeStavki);
207	        setPlaniranjeModal({ nalog, datum: finalniDatum });
208	    };
209	
210	    const toggleStavkaPlaniranje = (id) => { setStavkeZaPlaniranje(prev => prev.map(s => s.id === id ? { ...s, checked: !s.checked } : s)); };
211	    
212	    // 🟢 MATEMATIKA PLANIRANJA
213	    const promjeniKolicinuPlaniranja = (id, novaKolOriginal) => { 
214	        setStavkeZaPlaniranje(prev => prev.map(s => {
215	            if (s.id === id) {
216	                let novim3 = 0;
217	                if (s.jm_unos === 'kom' && s.vol1kom > 0) {
218	                    novim3 = (parseFloat(novaKolOriginal) * s.vol1kom).toFixed(4);
219	                } else {
220	                    const ratio = parseFloat(novaKolOriginal) / parseFloat(s.preostaloOriginal);
221	                    novim3 = (parseFloat(s.maxKolicina) * ratio).toFixed(4);
222	                }
223	                return { ...s, kolicinaZaUnos: novaKolOriginal, kolicinaM3: isNaN(novim3) ? 0 : novim3 };
224	            }
225	            return s;
226	        })); 
227	    };
228	
229	    const potvrdiPlaniranje = async () => {
230	        const stavkeZaBazu = stavkeZaPlaniranje.filter(s => s.checked);
231	        if (stavkeZaBazu.length === 0) return alert("Morate odabrati bar jednu stavku za planiranje!");
232	        if (!planiranjeModal.datum) return alert("Morate odabrati datum!");
233	        if (planiranjeModal.datum < danasnjiDatum) return alert("⛔ Greška: Ne možete planirati proizvodnju za datum koji je već prošao!");
234	
235	        let validno = true; let ukupnoNovihKubika = 0;
236	        stavkeZaBazu.forEach(s => {
237	            const kol = parseFloat(s.kolicinaZaUnos);
238	            const m3ZaDodati = parseFloat(s.kolicinaM3);
239	            if (isNaN(kol) || kol <= 0) { alert(`Količina za ${s.naziv} nije ispravna!`); validno = false; }
240	            if (kol > parseFloat(s.preostaloOriginal)) { if(!window.confirm(`Stavka ${s.naziv}:\nUnijeli ste više nego što je preostalo u nalogu. Sigurno želite nastaviti?`)) validno = false; }
241	            ukupnoNovihKubika += m3ZaDodati;
242	        });
243	        if(!validno) return;
244	
245	        const danStr = planiranjeModal.datum;
246	        const trenutnoPlaniranoNaDan = raspored.filter(r => r.datum_plana === danStr).reduce((s, r) => s + parseFloat(r.planirano_m3 || 0), 0);
247	        
248	        if (trenutnoPlaniranoNaDan + ukupnoNovihKubika > kapacitetMasine) {
249	            if(!window.confirm(`⚠️ KAPACITET PREMAŠEN!\nNa dan ${danStr} je već planirano ${trenutnoPlaniranoNaDan.toFixed(2)} m³.\nSa ovim dodajete još ${ukupnoNovihKubika.toFixed(2)} m³ čime prelazite dnevni limit od ${kapacitetMasine} m³.\n\nDa li ste sigurni da želite preopteretiti smjenu?`)) return;
250	        }
251	
252	        const payload = stavkeZaBazu.map(s => ({
253	            rn_id: planiranjeModal.nalog.id, stavka_id: s.id, proizvod_naziv: s.naziv, dimenzije: s.dimenzije,
254	            masina: odabranaMasina, datum_plana: planiranjeModal.datum, 
255	            planirano_m3: parseFloat(s.kolicinaM3), proizvedeno_m3: 0, status: 'ZAKAZANO', snimio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat'
256	        }));
257	
258	        await supabase.from('raspored_proizvodnje').insert(payload);
259	        setPlaniranjeModal(null); loadRaspored(); 
260	    };
261	
262	    const obrisiIzPlana = async (id, e) => {
263	        e.stopPropagation();
264	        if(window.confirm("Ukloniti ovu stavku iz rasporeda? Ona će se vratiti nazad na listu neraspoređenih.")) {
265	            await supabase.from('raspored_proizvodnje').delete().eq('id', id); loadRaspored();
266	        }
267	    };
268	
269	    const DaniUSedmici = useMemo(() => {
270	        const dani = []; const imena = ['PONEDJELJAK', 'UTORAK', 'SRIJEDA', 'ČETVRTAK', 'PETAK', 'SUBOTA', 'NEDJELJA'];
271	        for(let i=0; i<7; i++) {
272	            const d = new Date(pocetakSedmice); d.setDate(d.getDate() + i);
273	            dani.push({ datum: d, ime: imena[i], iso: d.toISOString().split('T')[0] });
274	        }
275	        return dani;
276	    }, [pocetakSedmice]);
277	
278	    const isNalogDijeljen = (rn_id) => {
279	        const jedinstveniDani = new Set(sviPlanoviGlobal.filter(p => p.rn_id === rn_id).map(p => p.datum_plana));
280	        return jedinstveniDani.size > 1;
281	    };
282	    const imenaDanaBHS = ['Nedjelja', 'Ponedjeljak', 'Utorak', 'Srijeda', 'Četvrtak', 'Petak', 'Subota'];
283	
284	    return (
285	        <div className="p-2 md:p-4 max-w-[1800px] mx-auto space-y-4 md:space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_slova }}>
286	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-amber-500" user={user} modulIme="planiranje" saas={saas} hideMasina={true} />
287	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
288	
289	            {isReadOnly && (
290	                <div className="bg-blue-900/30 border border-blue-500/50 p-3 md:p-4 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center gap-3 shrink-0">
291	                    <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl">👁️</span>
292	                    <p className="text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] md:text-xs font-black text-center">Nalazite se u "Samo Pregled" načinu rada.</p>
293	                </div>
294	            )}
295	
296	            {pregledNaloga && (
297	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[10000] bg-[#090e17]/95 flex items-center justify-center p-2 md:p-4 backdrop-blur-md animate-in zoom-in-95">
298	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border-2 border-blue-500 p-4 md:p-8 rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[95vh] md:max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col relative mt-10 md:mt-0">
299	                        <button onClick={() => setPregledNaloga(null)} className="absolute top-2 right-2 md:top-4 md:right-4 bg-slate-800 w-8 h-8 md:w-10 md:h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-red-500 transition-colors z-50"><X size={18}/></button>
300	                        
301	                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-start border-b border-theme-border pb-4 mb-4 gap-2">
302	                            <div>
303	                                <h3 className="text-blue-400 font-black uppercase text-[10px] md:text-xs tracking-widest mb-1">Detalji Radnog Naloga</h3>
304	                                <p className="text-theme-text text-xl md:text-3xl font-black mt-1">{pregledNaloga.id}</p>
305	                                <p className="text-slate-300 text-xs md:text-sm font-bold bg-theme-panel inline-block px-2 md:px-3 py-1 md:py-1.5 rounded-lg mt-2 border border-theme-border">{pregledNaloga.kupac_naziv}</p>
306	                            </div>
307	                            <div className="sm:text-right sm:pt-6">
308	                                <span className={`text-[9px] md:text-[10px] px-2 md:px-3 py-1 md:py-1.5 rounded-lg font-black uppercase tracking-widest ${new Date(pregledNaloga.rok_isporuke) <= new Date(DaniUSedmici[6].datum) ? 'bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 border border-red-500/30' : 'bg-slate-800 text-slate-300'}`}>Rok: {new Date(pregledNaloga.rok_isporuke).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}</span>
309	                            </div>
310	                        </div>
311	                        
312	                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto pr-1 md:pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
313	                            <p className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black mb-3">Stavke na čekanju za mašinu: <span className="text-amber-400">{odabranaMasina}</span></p>
314	                            <div className="space-y-2 md:space-y-3">
315	                                {pregledNaloga.stavkeZaPlaniranje.map((st, idx) => (
316	                                    <div key={idx} className="bg-theme-panel p-3 md:p-4 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl border border-theme-border flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-center shadow-md gap-3">
317	                                        <div>
318	                                            <p className="text-theme-text text-sm md:text-lg font-black uppercase leading-tight">
319	                                                <span className="text-amber-500">{st.dimenzije_prikaz || 'N/A'}</span> <span className="opacity-50 mx-1">|</span> {st.naziv}
320	                                            </p>
321	                                            <p className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">Šifra: <span className="text-white">{st.sifra}</span></p>
322	                                        </div>
323	                                        <div className="sm:text-right bg-black/20 p-2 rounded-lg sm:bg-transparent sm:p-0">
324	                                            <p className="text-emerald-400 font-black text-xl md:text-3xl">{st.preostalo} <span className="text-xs md:text-sm">m³</span></p>
325	                                            <p className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase mt-1 font-bold">~ {st.preostaloOriginal} {st.jm_unos}</p>
326	                                        </div>
327	                                    </div>
328	                                ))}
329	                            </div>
330	                            {pregledNaloga.napomena && (
331	                                <div className="mt-4 p-3 md:p-4 bg-amber-900/10 border border-amber-500/20 rounded-xl">
332	                                    <p className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black mb-1">Napomena na nalogu:</p>
333	                                    <p className="text-[10px] md:text-xs text-slate-300 leading-relaxed">{pregledNaloga.napomena}</p>
334	                                </div>
335	                            )}
336	                        </div>
337	
338	                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2 mt-4 md:mt-6 border-t border-theme-border pt-4">
339	                            <button onClick={() => setPregledNaloga(null)} className="flex-1 py-3 md:py-4 bg-theme-panel hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 rounded-xl uppercase font-black transition-all border border-slate-600 text-xs">✕ ZATVORI</button>
340	                            {!isReadOnly && <button onClick={() => { setPregledNaloga(null); otvoriPlaniranjeModal(pregledNaloga); }} className="flex-1 py-3 md:py-4 bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 text-white rounded-xl uppercase font-black transition-all shadow-lg text-xs">📅 ZAKAŽI ODMAH</button>}
341	                        </div>
342	                    </div>
343	                </div>
344	            )}
345	
346	            {planiranjeModal && !isReadOnly && (
347	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] bg-[#090e17]/90 flex items-center justify-center p-2 md:p-4 backdrop-blur-md animate-in zoom-in-95">
348	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border-2 border-amber-500 p-4 md:p-8 rounded-2xl md:rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)] max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[95vh] md:max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col mt-10 md:mt-0 relative">
349	                        <button onClick={() => setPlaniranjeModal(null)} className="absolute top-2 right-2 md:hidden bg-slate-800 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-red-500 z-50"><X size={16}/></button>
350	
351	                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-start border-b border-theme-border pb-4 mb-4 gap-4">
352	                            <div>
353	                                <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-[10px] md:text-xs mb-1 tracking-widest">Planiranje Naloga</h3>
354	                                <p onClick={() => setPregledNaloga(planiranjeModal.nalog)} className="text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300 cursor-pointer transition-colors text-xl md:text-3xl font-black mb-1 underline decoration-blue-500/50 underline-offset-4" title="Klikni za detaljan pregled naloga">{planiranjeModal.nalog.id}</p>
355	                                <p className="text-slate-300 text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold uppercase bg-theme-panel inline-block px-2 py-1 rounded border border-theme-border mt-1 shadow-inner">{planiranjeModal.nalog.kupac_naziv}</p>
356	                            </div>
357	                            <div className="w-full sm:w-auto bg-amber-900/10 border border-amber-500/30 p-2 md:p-3 rounded-xl shadow-inner">
358	                                <label className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black block mb-1 md:mb-2">Odaberi Datum</label>
359	                                <input type="date" min={danasnjiDatum} value={planiranjeModal.datum} onChange={e => setPlaniranjeModal({...planiranjeModal, datum: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 md:p-3 bg-black text-amber-400 rounded-lg outline-none border border-amber-500/50 focus:border-amber-400 font-black text-xs md:text-sm uppercase cursor-pointer" />
360	                            </div>
361	                        </div>
362	                        
363	                        <p className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black mb-2 md:mb-3 border-b border-theme-border/50 pb-2">Stavke za mašinu (odčekirajte šta nećete):</p>
364	                        
365	                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto pr-1 md:pr-2 custom-scrollbar space-y-2 md:space-y-3 mb-4 md:mb-6">
366	                            {stavkeZaPlaniranje.map(st => (
367	                                <div key={st.id} className={`p-3 md:p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center gap-3 shadow-sm ${st.checked ? 'bg-theme-panel border-amber-500/50' : 'bg-black/40 border-slate-800 opacity-50'}`}>
368	                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
369	                                        <input type="checkbox" checked={st.checked} onChange={() => toggleStavkaPlaniranje(st.id)} className="w-5 h-5 md:w-6 md:h-6 accent-amber-500 cursor-pointer shrink-0" />
370	                                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
371	                                            <p className="text-xs md:text-sm text-theme-text font-black uppercase truncate leading-tight" title={st.naziv}>
372	                                                <span className="text-amber-500">{st.dimenzije}</span> <span className="opacity-50 mx-1">|</span> {st.naziv}
373	                                            </p>
374	                                            <p className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] text-emerald-400 font-bold uppercase mt-1 tracking-widest">
375	                                                Na čekanju: <span className="text-white bg-emerald-900/40 px-1 md:px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-emerald-500/30">{st.preostaloOriginal} {st.jm_unos}</span> <span className="text-slate-500 ml-1">(~ {st.maxKolicina} m³)</span>
376	                                            </p>
377	                                        </div>
378	                                    </div>
379	                                    <div className="w-full sm:w-32 shrink-0 bg-black/30 p-2 rounded-lg sm:bg-transparent sm:p-0">
380	                                        <label className="text-[7px] md:text-[8px] text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1 text-center font-bold">Količina ({st.jm_unos})</label>
381	                                        <input type="number" disabled={!st.checked} value={st.kolicinaZaUnos} onChange={(e) => promjeniKolicinuPlaniranja(st.id, e.target.value)} className="w-full p-2 md:p-3 bg-black border border-theme-border rounded-lg text-center font-black text-amber-400 outline-none focus:border-amber-500 disabled:opacity-50 text-base md:text-xl shadow-inner" />
382	                                        <div className="text-center text-[9px] text-slate-500 mt-1 font-mono">Preračunato: <b className="text-amber-300">~ {st.kolicinaM3} m³</b></div>
383	                                    </div>
384	                                </div>
385	                            ))}
386	                        </div>
387	
388	                        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2 md:gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-theme-border">
389	                            <button onClick={() => setPlaniranjeModal(null)} className="flex-1 bg-theme-panel text-slate-300 py-3 md:py-4 rounded-xl uppercase text-[10px] font-black hover:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 transition-colors">Odustani</button>
390	                            <button onClick={potvrdiPlaniranje} className="flex-[2] bg-amber-600 text-white py-3 md:py-4 rounded-xl uppercase text-[10px] font-black hover:bg-amber-500 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.5)] transition-all">✅ ZAKAŽI ODABRANO</button>
391	                        </div>
392	                    </div>

409	                        {masine.map(m => <option key={m.naziv} value={m.naziv}>{m.naziv} (Kapacitet: {m.dnevni_kapacitet_m3}m³)</option>)}

412	            </div>

415	                
416	                <div className="w-full lg:w-[350px] max-h-[40vh] lg:max-h-none bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] border border-theme-border rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl flex flex-col shadow-2xl shrink-0">
417	                    <div className="p-3 md:p-4 border-b border-theme-border bg-theme-card/90 sticky top-0 z-10">

448	                                    </div>

450

478	                        const procenat = Math.min(100, (ukupnoDanas / kapacitetMasine) * 100);

483	                                onDragOver={!isReadOnly ? handleDragOver : undefined}

486	                                className={`flex-1 min-w-[260px] md:min-w-[240px] border-r border-theme-border last:border-0 flex flex-col transition-colors snap-center ${dan.iso === danasnjiDatum ? 'bg-blue-900/10' : ''}`}
487	                            >
488	                                <div className="p-2 md:p-3 border-b border-theme-border/50 text-center shrink-0 bg-theme-panel/50 sticky top-0 z-10 backdrop-blur-md">
489	                                    <h4 className="text-[9px] md:text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black tracking-widest">{dan.ime}</h4>
490	                                    <h3 className={`text-sm md:text-base font-black mt-0.5 md:mt-1 ${dan.iso === danasnjiDatum ? 'text-blue-400' : 'text-theme-text'}`}>{dan.datum.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {day:'2-digit', month:'2-digit'})}</h3>

495	                                            <span className="text-slate-500">MAX {kapacitetMasine}</span>
496	                                        </div>
497	                                        <div className="w-full h-1.5 md:h-2 bg-black rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-slate-700">
498	                                            <div className={`h-full transition-all ${isPrekoKapaciteta ? 'bg-red-500' : (procenat > 85 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-emerald-500')}`} style={{ width: `${procenat}%` }}></div>
499	                                        </div>
500	                                    </div>
501	                                </div>
502	
503	                                <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-2 space-y-2 custom-scrollbar">

506	                                        const dijeljen = isNalogDijeljen(st.rn_id);
507	                                        const plan = parseFloat(st.planirano_m3 || 0);
508	                                        const proizvedeno = parseFloat(st.proizvedeno_m3 || 0);
509	                                        const ukupniBlok = plan + proizvedeno;
510	                                        const procenatBloka = ukupniBlok > 0 ? Math.round((proizvedeno / ukupniBlok) * 100) : 0;
511	                                        
512	                                        const jeZavrseno = st.status === 'ZAVRŠENO' || procenatBloka >= 100;
513	
514	                                        return (
515	                                            <div key={st.id} className={`bg-theme-panel p-2 md:p-3 rounded-xl border ${jeZavrseno ? 'border-emerald-500/50 bg-emerald-900/20' : 'border-slate-700 hover:border-amber-500/50'} shadow-md group transition-all`}>
516	                                                <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-2 md:mb-3">
517	                                                    <span className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] text-blue-300 uppercase font-black bg-blue-900/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-blue-500/30 truncate max-w-[80%]">{st.rn_id}</span>
518	                                                    {!isReadOnly && <button onClick={(e) => obrisiIzPlana(st.id, e)} className="text-red-500 bg-red-900/30 w-5 h-5 md:w-6 md:h-6 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md md:rounded-lg text-[9px] md:text-[10px] opacity-100 lg:opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity font-black hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white shrink-0">✕</button>}
519	                                                </div>
520	                                                
521	                                                {dijeljen && <span className="text-[7px] md:text-[8px] bg-amber-900/40 text-amber-400 px-1.5 md:px-2 py-0.5 rounded uppercase font-black border border-amber-500/30 mb-1 md:mb-2 inline-block">✂️ DIJELJEN NALOG</span>}
522	                                                
523	                                                <p className="text-[10px] md:text-[11px] text-theme-text font-black uppercase leading-tight truncate mb-1" title={st.proizvod_naziv}>
524	                                                    <span className="text-amber-500">{st.dimenzije || 'N/A'}</span> <span className="opacity-50 mx-1">|</span> {st.proizvod_naziv}
525	                                                </p>
526	                                                
527	                                                <div className="mt-3 bg-black/40 p-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-700/50">
528	                                                    <div className="flex justify-between text-[7px] md:text-[8px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black mb-1">
529	                                                        <span>{proizvedeno.toFixed(2)} m³ ODRADIO</span>
530	                                                        <span className={jeZavrseno ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-amber-400'}>{procenatBloka}%</span>
531	                                                    </div>
532	                                                    <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
533	                                                        <div className="h-full bg-emerald-500 transition-all duration-700" style={{ width: `${procenatBloka}%` }}></div>
534	                                                    </div>
535	                                                </div>
536	
537	                                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2 md:mt-3 pt-2 md:pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/50">
538	                                                    <span className={`text-[7px] md:text-[8px] uppercase font-black px-1.5 md:px-2 py-0.5 md:py-1 rounded flex items-center gap-1 ${jeZavrseno ? 'bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400' : 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400'}`}>
539	                                                        {jeZavrseno && <CheckCircle2 size={10} />}
540	                                                        {jeZavrseno ? 'ZAVRŠENO' : 'ZAKAZANO'}
541	                                                    </span>
542	                                                    <span className="text-xs md:text-sm text-slate-300 font-black px-2 py-0.5">Ostatak: <span className="text-amber-400">{plan.toFixed(2)}</span> <span className="text-[8px] md:text-[9px] text-slate-500">m³</span></span>
543	                                                </div>
544	                                            </div>
545	                                        )
546	                                    })}
547	                                </div>
548	                            </div>
549	                        )
550	                    })}
551	                </div>
552	            </div>
553	        </div>
554	    );
555	}

3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';

11	const supabase = createClient('https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY');
