102	
103	    const calcVol = (l, d) => {
104	        if (!l || !d) return 0;
105	        const r = parseFloat(d) / 200;
106	        return (r * r * Math.PI * parseFloat(l));
107	    };
108	
109	    const trenutnaDjecaVolume = useMemo(() => {
110	        return djecaTrupci.reduce((sum, dj) => sum + calcVol(dj.duzina, dj.promjer), 0);
111	    }, [djecaTrupci]);
112	
113	    const kaloVolume = useMemo(() => {
114	        if (!majkaTrupac) return 0;
115	        const vol = parseFloat(majkaTrupac.zapremina || 0) - trenutnaDjecaVolume;
116	        return vol > 0 ? vol : 0;
117	    }, [majkaTrupac, trenutnaDjecaVolume]);
118	
119	    useEffect(() => {
120	        const channel = supabase.channel(`prijem_live_sync_${Math.random()}`)
121	            .on('postgres_changes', { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'trupci' }, () => {
122	                loadPrijemList();
123	            }).subscribe();
124	
125	        return () => { supabase.removeChannel(channel); };
126	    }, [pHeader.otpremnica_broj]);
127	
128	    useEffect(() => {
129	        // 🟢 ALGORITAM ZA NAJKORIŠTENIJE VRIJEDNOSTI
130	        const fetchMostUsed = async () => {
131	            const { data } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('sumarija, podruznica, prevoznik').order('created_at', { ascending: false }).limit(100);
132	            if (data && data.length > 0) {
133	                const sCounts = {}; const pCounts = {}; const prvCounts = {};
134	                data.forEach(d => {
135	                    if (d.sumarija) sCounts[d.sumarija] = (sCounts[d.sumarija] || 0) + 1;
136	                    if (d.podruznica) pCounts[d.podruznica] = (pCounts[d.podruznica] || 0) + 1;
137	                    if (d.prevoznik) prvCounts[d.prevoznik] = (prvCounts[d.prevoznik] || 0) + 1;
138	                });
139	                
140	                const topSumarija = Object.keys(sCounts).sort((a,b) => sCounts[b] - sCounts[a])[0];
141	                const topPodruznica = Object.keys(pCounts).sort((a,b) => pCounts[b] - pCounts[a])[0];
142	                const topPrevoznik = Object.keys(prvCounts).sort((a,b) => prvCounts[b] - prvCounts[a])[0];
143	
144	                setPHeader(prev => {
145	                    let hasChanges = false;
146	                    const newHeader = { ...prev };
147	                    if (!prev.sumarija && topSumarija) { newHeader.sumarija = topSumarija; hasChanges = true; }
148	                    if (!prev.podruznica && topPodruznica) { newHeader.podruznica = topPodruznica; hasChanges = true; }
149	                    if (!prev.prevoznik && topPrevoznik) { newHeader.prevoznik = topPrevoznik; hasChanges = true; }
150	                    return hasChanges ? newHeader : prev;
151	                });
152	            }
153	        };
154	
155	        supabase.from('sumarije').select('naziv').then(({data}) => { if(data) setSumarijeList(data.map(d=>({naziv: d.naziv}))); });
156	        supabase.from('prevoznici').select('naziv').then(({data}) => { if(data) setPrevozniciList(data.map(d=>({naziv: d.naziv}))); });
157	        supabase.from('trupci').select('odjel').neq('odjel', null).then(({data}) => { if(data) setOdjeliList([...new Set(data.map(d => d.odjel).filter(Boolean))].map(o=>({naziv: o}))); });
158	        supabase.from('vrste_drveta').select('naziv').then(({data}) => { if(data && data.length > 0) { setVrsteList(data.map(d=>d.naziv)); setForm(f => ({...f, vrsta: data[0].naziv})); } });
159	        supabase.from('klase_trupaca').select('naziv').then(({data}) => { if(data && data.length > 0) { setKlaseList(data.map(d=>d.naziv)); setForm(f => ({...f, klasa: data[0].naziv})); } });
160	        supabase.from('cjenovnik_trupaca').select(`cijena_po_m3, sumarije(naziv), vrste_drveta(naziv), klase_trupaca(naziv)`).then(({data}) => setCjenovnikBaza(data || []));
161	        
162	        fetchMostUsed();
163	    }, []);
164	
165	    useEffect(() => { loadPrijemList(); }, [pHeader.otpremnica_broj]);
166	    
167	    useEffect(() => { 
168	        if(pHeader.sumarija) {
169	            supabase.from('podruznice').select('*').eq('sumarija_naziv', pHeader.sumarija).then(({data}) => {
170	                const list = data || [];
171	                setPodruzniceBaza(list); 
172	                setPodruzniceList(list.map(d=>({naziv: d.naziv})));
173	            });
174	        }
175	    }, [pHeader.sumarija]);
176	
177	    const loadPrijemList = async () => {
178	        if(!pHeader.otpremnica_broj) return;
179	        const cleanBroj = pHeader.otpremnica_broj.trim();
180	        const { data } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').eq('otpremnica_broj', cleanBroj).eq('zakljucen_prijem', false).order('created_at', { ascending: false });
181	        setListaPrijema(data || []);
182	    };
183	
184	    const updateHeader = (key, val) => {
185	        const updated = { ...pHeader, [key]: val };
186	        setPHeader(updated); 
187	        localStorage.setItem(`pr_${key}`, val);
188	    };
189	
190	    const calculatedZapremina = useMemo(() => {
191	        if(!form.duzina || !form.promjer) return "0.00";
192	        return calcVol(form.duzina, form.promjer).toFixed(2);
193	    }, [form.duzina, form.promjer]);
194	
195	    const calculatedKontrolnaZapremina = useMemo(() => {
196	        if(!form.kontrolna_duzina || !form.kontrolni_promjer) return "0.00";
197	        return calcVol(form.kontrolna_duzina, form.kontrolni_promjer).toFixed(2);
198	    }, [form.kontrolna_duzina, form.kontrolni_promjer]);
199	
200	    const handleScanInput = (val, isEnter = false) => {
201	        setScan(val);
202	        if (scanTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(scanTimerRef.current);
203	        if (!val) return;
204	        
205	        // 🟢 AUTOMATSKI PRELAZAK NA DUŽINU NAKON SKENIRANJA
206	        if (isEnter) {
207	            refs.duzina.current?.focus();
208	        } else if (val.length >= 3) {
209	            scanTimerRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {
210	                const id = val.toUpperCase();
211	                const { data: existing } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('id, status, otpremnica_broj').eq('id', id).maybeSingle();
212	                if(existing) {
213	                    prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Iskorišten Kod', poruka: `QR KOD JE VEĆ ISKORIŠTEN!\nTrenutni status: ${existing.status}\nOtpremnica: ${existing.otpremnica_broj}\nSkenirajte drugu pločicu.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
214	                    setScan(''); 
215	                } else {
216	                    refs.duzina.current?.focus(); // Automatski fokusiraj dužinu nakon validnog skeniranja
217	                }
218	            }, 1000); 
219	        }
220	    };
221	
222	    const handleKrojenjeScanInput = (val, isEnter = false) => {
223	        setKrojenjeScan(val);
224	        if (scanTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(scanTimerRef.current);
225	        if (!val) return;
226	        
227	        if (isEnter) ucitajMajkuTrupac(val);
228	        else scanTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => ucitajMajkuTrupac(val), 1500);
229	    };
230	
231	    const ucitajMajkuTrupac = async (val) => {
232	        const id = val.toUpperCase().trim();
233	        const { data } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').eq('id', id).maybeSingle();
234	        if (data) {
235	            if (data.status === 'PREKROJENO') return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Već Prekrojen', poruka: `Trupac ${id} je već ranije prekrojen!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
236	            if (data.status === 'PROREZANO') return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Već na brenti', poruka: `Trupac ${id} je izrezan na brenti i ne može se krojiti!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
237	            setMajkaTrupac(data);
238	            setKrojenjeScan('');
239	        } else {
240	            prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Nepoznat trupac', poruka: `Trupac ${id} ne postoji u bazi.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
241	            setKrojenjeScan('');
242	        }
243	    };
244	
245	    const snimiTrupac = async () => {
246	        if (scanTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(scanTimerRef.current);
247	        if(!pHeader.otpremnica_broj || !pHeader.sumarija) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fale podaci', poruka: "Popunite Šumariju i Broj Otpremnice u Zaglavlju!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
248	        if(!scan || !form.duzina || !form.promjer) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fale podaci', poruka: "Skeniraj QR, unesi dužinu i prečnik.", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
249	        
250	        if (form.isKontrola && (!form.kontrolna_duzina || !form.kontrolni_promjer)) {
251	            return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fale kontrolni podaci', poruka: "Uključili ste kontrolno mjerenje. Morate unijeti stvarnu dužinu i prečnik!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
252	        }
253	
254	        const trupacID = scan.toUpperCase();
255	        const zapreminaZaObracun = form.isKontrola ? parseFloat(calculatedKontrolnaZapremina) : parseFloat(calculatedZapremina);
256	        const podrObj = podruzniceBaza.find(p => p.naziv === pHeader.podruznica && p.sumarija_naziv === pHeader.sumarija);
257	        const prevozPoKubiku = podrObj ? parseFloat(podrObj.cijena_prevoza_po_m3 || 0) : 0;
258	        const cjenObj = cjenovnikBaza.find(c => c.sumarije?.naziv === pHeader.sumarija && c.vrste_drveta?.naziv === form.vrsta && c.klase_trupaca?.naziv === form.klasa);
259	        const cijenaTrupcaPoKubiku = cjenObj ? parseFloat(cjenObj.cijena_po_m3 || 0) : 0;
260	        const konacna_nabavna_vrijednost = (cijenaTrupcaPoKubiku + prevozPoKubiku) * zapreminaZaObracun;
261	
262	        const trupacData = {
263	            id: trupacID, broj_plocice: form.broj_plocice || null, redni_broj: form.redni_broj || null, 
264	            vrsta: form.vrsta, klasa: form.klasa, duzina: parseFloat(form.duzina), promjer: parseFloat(form.promjer), 
265	            zapremina: parseFloat(calculatedZapremina), kontrolna_duzina: form.isKontrola ? parseFloat(form.kontrolna_duzina) : null,
266	            kontrolni_promjer: form.isKontrola ? parseFloat(form.kontrolni_promjer) : null, kontrolna_zapremina: form.isKontrola ? parseFloat(calculatedKontrolnaZapremina) : null,
267	            sumarija: pHeader.sumarija, podruznica: pHeader.podruznica || null, otpremnica_broj: pHeader.otpremnica_broj.trim(),
268	            otpremnica_datum: pHeader.otpremnica_datum, prevoznik: pHeader.prevoznik || null, odjel: pHeader.odjel || null,         
269	            snimio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat', datum_prijema: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], 
270	            zakljucen_prijem: false, status: 'na_lageru', nabavna_vrijednost: konacna_nabavna_vrijednost
271	        };
272	
273	        const { error } = await supabase.from('trupci').upsert([trupacData]);
274	        if (error) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Baza Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
275	
276	        if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.navigator.vibrate) window.navigator.vibrate(100); 
277	        setScan(''); setForm({ broj_plocice: '', redni_broj: '', vrsta: vrsteList[0] || '', klasa: klaseList[0] || '', duzina: '', promjer: '', isKontrola: false, kontrolna_duzina: '', kontrolni_promjer: '' }); 
278	        await loadPrijemList();
279	        
280	        // Vrati fokus nazad na skener za sljedeći trupac
281	        refs.scan.current?.focus();
282	    };
283	
284	    const izvrsiKrojenje = async () => {
285	        if (!majkaTrupac) return;
286	        
287	        for (let i = 0; i < djecaTrupci.length; i++) {
288	            const dj = djecaTrupci[i];
289	            if (!dj.id || !dj.duzina || !dj.promjer) {
290	                return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Nepotpuni podaci', poruka: `Molimo popunite QR KOD (ID), Dužinu i Prečnik za trupac broj ${i+1}!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
291	            }
292	        }
293	        if (dodajKaloKaoTrupac && (!kaloPlocica || kaloPlocica.trim() === '')) {
294	            return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Nepotpuni podaci', poruka: `Odabrali ste da zadužite kalo kao trupac. Skenirajte QR pločicu za kalo!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
295	        }
296	
297	        const sviIdjevi = djecaTrupci.map(d => d.id.toUpperCase());
298	        if (dodajKaloKaoTrupac) sviIdjevi.push(kaloPlocica.toUpperCase());
299	        if (new Set(sviIdjevi).size !== sviIdjevi.length) {
300	            return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Dupli Kodovi', poruka: "Imate iste QR kodove unutar ove forme za krojenje. Skenirajte različite pločice!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
301	        }
302	
303	        prikaziDialog({
304	            tip: 'info', naslov: 'Potvrdi Krojenje',
305	            poruka: `Da li ste sigurni da želite prekrati trupac ${majkaTrupac.id} na ${brojDjece} komada?\n(Kalo/otpad je ${kaloVolume.toFixed(2)} m³)\n\nOva akcija će arhivirati majku i zadužiti nove komade na lager.`,
306	            confirmText: '✅ PREKROJI I ZADUŽI', cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
307	            onConfirm: async () => {
308	                const ukupnaNovaKubikaza = trenutnaDjecaVolume + (dodajKaloKaoTrupac ? kaloVolume : 0);
309	                const majkaVrijednost = parseFloat(majkaTrupac.nabavna_vrijednost || 0);
310	
311	                const noviTrupciPayload = [];
312	
313	                djecaTrupci.forEach(dj => {
314	                    const vol = calcVol(dj.duzina, dj.promjer);
315	                    const cijena = ukupnaNovaKubikaza > 0 ? (vol / ukupnaNovaKubikaza) * majkaVrijednost : 0;
316	                    
317	                    noviTrupciPayload.push({
318	                        id: dj.id.toUpperCase(), parent_id: majkaTrupac.id, vrsta: majkaTrupac.vrsta, klasa: majkaTrupac.klasa,
319	                        duzina: parseFloat(dj.duzina), promjer: parseFloat(dj.promjer), zapremina: parseFloat(vol.toFixed(3)),
320	                        sumarija: majkaTrupac.sumarija, podruznica: majkaTrupac.podruznica, otpremnica_broj: majkaTrupac.otpremnica_broj,
321	                        otpremnica_datum: majkaTrupac.otpremnica_datum, prevoznik: majkaTrupac.prevoznik, odjel: majkaTrupac.odjel,
322	                        snimio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat', datum_prijema: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
323	                        zakljucen_prijem: true, status: 'na_lageru', nabavna_vrijednost: parseFloat(cijena.toFixed(2)),
324	                        broj_plocice: 'PREKROJENO', redni_broj: 'IZVEDENO'
325	                    });
326	                });
327	
328	                if (dodajKaloKaoTrupac && kaloVolume > 0) {
329	                    const cijenaKalo = ukupnaNovaKubikaza > 0 ? (kaloVolume / ukupnaNovaKubikaza) * majkaVrijednost : 0;
330	                    noviTrupciPayload.push({
331	                        id: kaloPlocica.toUpperCase(), parent_id: majkaTrupac.id, vrsta: majkaTrupac.vrsta, klasa: 'KALO/OGRJEV',
332	                        duzina: 0, promjer: 0, zapremina: parseFloat(kaloVolume.toFixed(3)),
333	                        sumarija: majkaTrupac.sumarija, podruznica: majkaTrupac.podruznica, otpremnica_broj: majkaTrupac.otpremnica_broj,
334	                        otpremnica_datum: majkaTrupac.otpremnica_datum, prevoznik: majkaTrupac.prevoznik, odjel: majkaTrupac.odjel,
335	                        snimio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat', datum_prijema: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
336	                        zakljucen_prijem: true, status: 'na_lageru', nabavna_vrijednost: parseFloat(cijenaKalo.toFixed(2)),
337	                        broj_plocice: 'KALO', redni_broj: 'OSTATAK'
338	                    });
339	                }
340	
341	                const { error: err1 } = await supabase.from('trupci').update({ status: 'PREKROJENO' }).eq('id', majkaTrupac.id);
342	                if (err1) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: err1.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
343	
344	                const { error: err2 } = await supabase.from('trupci').insert(noviTrupciPayload);
345	                if (err2) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška kod snimanja novih komada', poruka: err2.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
346	
347	                setMajkaTrupac(null); setBrojDjece(2); setDjecaTrupci([]); setDodajKaloKaoTrupac(false); setKaloPlocica('');
348	                zatvoriDialog();
349	                prikaziDialog({ tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Uspješno Prekrojeno', poruka: `Trupac je uspješno razdužen i pretvoren u ${noviTrupciPayload.length} novih komada na lageru.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
350	            },
351	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
352	        });
353	    };
354	
355	    const zakljuciOtpremnicu = async () => {
356	        if(listaPrijema.length === 0) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Prazno', poruka: "Nema trupaca na listi za zaključavanje.", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
357	        prikaziDialog({
358	            tip: 'info',
359	            naslov: 'Zaključi Otpremnicu?',
360	            poruka: `Da li ste sigurni da želite ZAKLJUČITI OTPREMNICU ${pHeader.otpremnica_broj}?\nOvo će trajno potvrditi sve dodane trupce.`,
361	            confirmText: '✅ ZAKLJUČI',
362	            cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
363	            onConfirm: async () => {
364	                for(let trupac of listaPrijema) await supabase.from('trupci').update({ zakljucen_prijem: true }).eq('id', trupac.id);
365	                ['pr_sumarija', 'pr_podruznica', 'pr_prevoznik', 'pr_odjel', 'pr_otpr_broj'].forEach(k => localStorage.removeItem(k));
366	                setPHeader({...pHeader, sumarija: '', podruznica: '', prevoznik: '', odjel: '', otpremnica_broj: ''});
367	                setListaPrijema([]);
368	                zatvoriDialog();
369	                prikaziDialog({ tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Zaključeno', poruka: "Otpremnica je uspješno zaključena i trupci su evidentirani.", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
370	            },
371	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
372	        });
373	    };
374	
375	    const renderPolje = (polje, formData, setFormData) => {
376	        const actualId = polje.id === 'datum' ? 'otpremnica_datum' : (polje.id === 'broj' ? 'otpremnica_broj' : polje.id);
377	        const val = formData[actualId] || '';
378	        const setVal = (v) => setFormData(actualId, v);
379	
380	        // 🟢 MAPIRANJE REFOVA ZA KONTROLU TOKA (FOCUS PATH)
381	        const nextMap = {
382	            'sumarija': refs.podruznica,
383	            'podruznica': refs.prevoznik,
384	            'prevoznik': refs.odjel,
385	            'odjel': refs.otpremnica_datum,
386	            'otpremnica_datum': refs.otpremnica_broj,
387	            'otpremnica_broj': refs.scan,
388	            'duzina': refs.promjer,
389	            'promjer': refs.btn_dodaj
390	        };
391	
392	        if (['sumarija', 'podruznica', 'prevoznik', 'odjel'].includes(actualId)) {
393	            let listToUse = [];
394	            if(actualId === 'sumarija') listToUse = sumarijeList;
395	            if(actualId === 'podruznica') listToUse = podruzniceList;
396	            if(actualId === 'prevoznik') listToUse = prevozniciList;
397	            if(actualId === 'odjel') listToUse = odjeliList;
398	
399	            return (
400	                <div className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px]">
401	                    <select ref={refs[actualId]} value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => handleEnter(e, nextMap[actualId])} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] px-3 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent cursor-pointer uppercase font-black shadow-inner">
402	                        <option value="">-- Odaberi --</option>
403	                        {listToUse.map(s => <option key={s.naziv} value={s.naziv}>{s.naziv}</option>)}
404	                    </select>
405	                </div>
406	            );
407	        }
408	        
409	        if (actualId === 'otpremnica_datum') return (
410	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl p-1 focus-within:border-theme-accent h-full w-full shadow-inner">
411	                <button type="button" onClick={() => setVal(shiftDateString(val, -1))} className="w-8 h-8 bg-black/20 rounded hover:bg-theme-accent text-theme-text font-black shrink-0 transition-colors">-</button>
412	                <input ref={refs.otpremnica_datum} type="date" value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => handleEnter(e, nextMap[actualId])} className="flex-1 w-full bg-transparent text-xs text-theme-text outline-none text-center uppercase [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:invert font-black" />
413	                <button type="button" onClick={() => setVal(shiftDateString(val, 1))} className="w-8 h-8 bg-black/20 rounded hover:bg-theme-accent text-theme-text font-black shrink-0 transition-colors">+</button>
414	            </div>
415	        );
416	        if (actualId === 'otpremnica_broj') return <input ref={refs.otpremnica_broj} type="text" value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value.toUpperCase())} onKeyDown={e => handleEnter(e, nextMap[actualId])} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent shadow-inner uppercase font-black" placeholder="Unesi broj..." />;
417	        
418	        // 🟢 INFORMATIVNA POLJA IMAJU tabIndex="-1" KAKO BI IH ENTER PRESKOČIO
419	        if (actualId === 'plocica') return <input tabIndex="-1" ref={refs.plocica} type="text" value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent text-center text-sm font-black shadow-inner" placeholder="12345" />;
420	        if (actualId === 'redni') return <input tabIndex="-1" ref={refs.redni} type="text" value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent text-center text-sm shadow-inner" placeholder="npr. 1" />;
421	        if (actualId === 'vrsta') return <select tabIndex="-1" ref={refs.vrsta} value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] px-3 py-0 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none uppercase text-center text-sm font-black shadow-inner cursor-pointer">{vrsteList.map(v => <option key={v} value={v} className="bg-slate-800 text-white">{v}</option>)}</select>;
422	        if (actualId === 'klasa') return <select tabIndex="-1" ref={refs.klasa} value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] px-3 py-0 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none uppercase text-center text-sm font-black shadow-inner cursor-pointer">{klaseList.map(k => <option key={k} value={k} className="bg-slate-800 text-white">{k}</option>)}</select>;
423	        
424	        if (actualId === 'duzina') return <input ref={refs.duzina} type="number" value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => handleEnter(e, nextMap[actualId])} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent text-center text-xl font-black shadow-inner [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none" placeholder="0" />;
425	        if (actualId === 'promjer') return <input ref={refs.promjer} type="number" value={val} onChange={e => setVal(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => handleEnter(e, nextMap[actualId])} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none focus:border-theme-accent text-center text-xl font-black shadow-inner [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none" placeholder="0" />;
426	        
427	        return null;
428	    };
429	
430	    return (
431	        <div className="p-4 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6 font-sans animate-in fade-in pb-24 overflow-visible" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_slova }}>
432	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
433	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} user={user} hideMasina={true} modulIme="prijem" saas={saas} />
434	
435	            {/* Oznaka da je sistem povezan UŽIVO na server */}
436	            <div className="absolute top-4 left-4 z-[9999] pointer-events-none flex items-center gap-2">
437	                <span className="relative flex h-3 w-3"><span className="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-emerald-400 opacity-75"></span><span className="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-3 w-3 bg-emerald-500"></span></span>
438	                <span className="text-[8px] text-emerald-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest hidden md:block">LIVE SYNC</span>
439	            </div>
440	
441	            {saas.isEditMode && (
442	                <div className="bg-black/60 p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-amber-500/50 mb-6 shadow-2xl">
443	                    <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-sm mb-4">God Mode - Kontrole Dizajna</h3>
444	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
445	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja Pozadine (Kartice): <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_kartice} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_kartice: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
446	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja SVIH slova: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_slova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_slova: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
447	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Veličina naslova (px): <input type="number" value={saas.ui.velicina_naslova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, velicina_naslova: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 font-mono rounded" /></label>
448	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black md:col-span-1">Naslov Zaglavlja: <input type="text" value={saas.ui.naslov_zaglavlja} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, naslov_zaglavlja: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 rounded" /></label>
449	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black md:col-span-2">Naslov Skenera: <input type="text" value={saas.ui.naslov_skenera} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, naslov_skenera: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 rounded" /></label>
450	                    </div>
451	                </div>
452	            )}
453	
454	            <div className="text-center mb-6">
455	                <h2 className="text-theme-accent font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-xl md:text-2xl drop-shadow-md flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
456	                    🌳 PRIJEM TRUPACA (Lager)
457	                </h2>
458	            </div>
459	
460	            <div className="flex bg-theme-panel p-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner mb-6 mx-auto max-w-xl">
461	                <button onClick={() => setTab('prijem')} className={`flex-1 py-3 md:py-4 rounded-xl text-[10px] md:text-xs uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${tab === 'prijem' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800'}`}>📥 STANDARDNI PRIJEM</button>
462	                <button onClick={() => setTab('krojenje')} className={`flex-1 py-3 md:py-4 rounded-xl text-[10px] md:text-xs uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${tab === 'krojenje' ? 'bg-amber-600 text-white shadow-lg border border-amber-500' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800'}`}>✂️ KROJENJE TRUPACA</button>
463	            </div>
464	
465	            {/* TAB: STANDARDNI PRIJEM */}
466	            {tab === 'prijem' && (
467	                <div className="animate-in fade-in space-y-6">
468	
469	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 overflow-visible">
470	                        <div className="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6 overflow-visible">
471	                            <div className="p-6 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] shadow-2xl transition-all border border-theme-border backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] relative overflow-visible" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
472	                                <div className="text-center font-black relative mb-6 border-b border-theme-border pb-4">
473	                                    <span className="text-theme-accent uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2" style={{ fontSize: `${saas.ui.velicina_naslova}px` }}><span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-theme-accent"></span> {saas.ui.naslov_zaglavlja}</span>
474	                                </div>
475	                                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 relative overflow-visible">
476	                                    {aktivnaPoljaZaglavlja.map((polje, index) => (
477	                                        <div key={polje.id} className={`relative ${polje.span} transition-all overflow-visible`} style={{ zIndex: 50 - index }}>
478	                                            {polje.label && <label className="text-[9px] text-theme-muted uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest">{polje.label}</label>}
479	                                            <div className="h-12 w-full overflow-visible">{renderPolje(polje, pHeader, updateHeader)}</div>
480	                                        </div>
481	                                    ))}
482	                                </div>
483	                            </div>
484	                        </div>
485	
486	                        <div className="lg:col-span-7 space-y-6 overflow-visible">
487	                            <div className={`p-8 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] border backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] relative overflow-visible group border-theme-accent/40`} style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
488	                                <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-theme-accent to-transparent opacity-50"></div>
489	                                <label className="uppercase text-theme-accent block mb-4 font-black tracking-widest text-center" style={{ fontSize: `${saas.ui.velicina_naslova}px` }}>{saas.ui.naslov_skenera}</label>
490	                                <div className="flex bg-theme-panel border-2 border-theme-accent/40 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner focus-within:border-theme-accent transition-all h-20 mb-6">
491	                                    <input ref={refs.scan} value={scan} onChange={e => handleScanInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => { if(e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); refs.duzina.current?.focus(); } }} className="flex-1 px-6 bg-transparent text-xl md:text-2xl text-center text-theme-text outline-none uppercase placeholder:text-theme-muted/30 font-black tracking-widest" placeholder="ČEKAM SKEN..." />
492	                                    <button onClick={() => {setScanTarget('unos'); setIsScanning(true);}} className="px-8 bg-theme-accent text-white font-black hover:opacity-80 transition-colors text-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">📷</button>
493	                                </div>
494	                                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 relative mb-6 overflow-visible">
495	                                    {aktivnaPoljaUnosa.map((polje, index) => (
496	                                        <div key={polje.id} className={`relative ${polje.span} transition-all overflow-visible`} style={{ zIndex: 50 - index }}>
497	                                            {polje.label && <label className="text-[9px] text-theme-muted uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest text-center">{polje.label}</label>}
498	                                            <div className="h-14 w-full overflow-visible">{renderPolje(polje, form, (key, val) => setForm({...form, [key]: val}))}</div>
499	                                        </div>
500	                                    ))}
501	                                </div>
502	                                
503	                                {/* DEKLARISANO (PAPIR) */}
504	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-theme-panel p-5 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner mb-4">
505	                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black tracking-widest">Deklarisano (Papir):</span>
506	                                    <span className="text-3xl text-theme-accent font-black drop-shadow-md">{calculatedZapremina} <span className="text-lg">m³</span></span>
507	                                </div>
508	
509	                                {/* PREKIDAČ I POLJA ZA KONTROLNO MJERENJE */}
510	                                <div className="mb-6">
511	                                    <button 
512	                                        onClick={() => setForm({...form, isKontrola: !form.isKontrola})}
513	                                        className={`w-full py-3 rounded-xl uppercase text-[10px] font-black tracking-widest border transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${form.isKontrola ? 'bg-amber-600 border-amber-500 text-white shadow-lg' : 'bg-transparent border-theme-border text-theme-muted hover:text-white hover:border-theme-accent'}`}
514	                                    >
515	                                        ⚖️ {form.isKontrola ? 'Poništi kontrolno mjerenje' : 'Unesi kontrolno mjerenje'}
516	                                    </button>
517	
518	                                    {form.isKontrola && (
519	                                        <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-amber-900/10 border border-amber-500/30 rounded-2xl animate-in slide-in-from-top-2">
520	                                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
521	                                                <div>
522	                                                    <label className="text-[9px] text-amber-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest text-center">Stvarna Dužina (M)</label>
523	                                                    <input type="number" value={form.kontrolna_duzina} onChange={e => setForm({...form, kontrolna_duzina: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-12 p-3 bg-black border border-amber-500/30 rounded-xl text-amber-400 outline-none focus:border-amber-400 text-center text-lg font-black shadow-inner [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none" placeholder="0" />
524	                                                </div>
525	                                                <div>
526	                                                    <label className="text-[9px] text-amber-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest text-center">Stvarni Prečnik (CM)</label>
527	                                                    <input type="number" value={form.kontrolni_promjer} onChange={e => setForm({...form, kontrolni_promjer: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-12 p-3 bg-black border border-amber-500/30 rounded-xl text-amber-400 outline-none focus:border-amber-400 text-center text-lg font-black shadow-inner [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none" placeholder="0" />
528	                                                </div>
529	                                            </div>
530	                                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-black/40 p-4 rounded-xl border border-amber-500/20 shadow-inner">
531	                                                <span className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest">Stvarno (Kontrola):</span>
532	                                                <span className="text-2xl text-amber-400 font-black drop-shadow-md">{calculatedKontrolnaZapremina} <span className="text-sm">m³</span></span>
533	                                            </div>
534	                                        </div>
535	                                    )}
536	                                </div>
537	
538	                                <button ref={refs.btn_dodaj} onClick={snimiTrupac} className="w-full py-6 bg-theme-accent text-white font-black rounded-2xl uppercase shadow-xl hover:opacity-90 transition-all text-sm tracking-widest">➕ DODAJ NA OTPREMNICU</button>
539	                            </div>
540	                        </div>
541	                    </div>
542	
543	                    {/* VRAĆENI LISTA BLOK TAKO DA SE UVIJEK VIDI KAD JE UPISANA OTPREMNICA */}
544	                    {pHeader.otpremnica_broj && (
545	                        <div className="bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] border border-theme-border shadow-xl animate-in fade-in" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
546	                            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center mb-6 px-2 border-b border-theme-border pb-4 gap-4">
547	                                <div>
548	                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black tracking-widest block">Otpremnica: <span className="text-theme-accent text-sm">{pHeader.otpremnica_broj}</span></span>
549	                                    <span className="text-xs text-theme-text font-black mt-1 block">Ukupno trupaca: {listaPrijema.length} kom ({listaPrijema.reduce((s,t) => s + parseFloat(t.kontrolna_zapremina || t.zapremina || 0), 0).toFixed(2)} m³)</span>
550	                                </div>
551	                                <button onClick={zakljuciOtpremnicu} disabled={listaPrijema.length === 0} className={`w-full md:w-auto px-8 py-4 text-white font-black rounded-xl text-xs uppercase shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(var(--theme-accent-rgb),0.5)] transition-all ${listaPrijema.length === 0 ? 'bg-slate-600 opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : 'bg-theme-accent hover:opacity-80'}`}>🏁 ZAKLJUČI OTPREMNICU</button>
552	                            </div>
553	
554	                            <div className="space-y-3 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto mb-4 custom-scrollbar pr-2">
555	                                {listaPrijema.length === 0 && <div className="text-center p-8 border-2 border-dashed border-theme-border rounded-2xl text-slate-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-xs bg-theme-panel/50">Nema skeniranih trupaca za ovu otpremnicu.</div>}
556	                                {listaPrijema.map(t => (
557	                                    <div key={t.id} className={`flex flex-col p-5 bg-theme-panel border rounded-2xl shadow-md transition-all hover:scale-[1.01] border-theme-border hover:border-theme-accent/50 ${t.kontrolna_zapremina ? 'border-amber-500/50 bg-amber-900/10' : ''}`}>
558	                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
559	                                            <div>
560	                                                <div className="text-sm text-theme-text font-black flex items-center gap-3">
561	                                                    <span className="text-theme-accent text-lg drop-shadow-md">{t.id}</span> 
562	                                                    <span className="text-theme-text text-[10px] bg-theme-card px-3 py-1 rounded-lg border border-theme-border shadow-inner">Pločica: {t.broj_plocice || '-'}</span>
563	                                                    {t.kontrolna_zapremina && <span className="text-[8px] bg-amber-600 text-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded uppercase font-black tracking-widest">Kontrola</span>}
564	                                                </div>
565	                                                <div className="text-[10px] text-theme-muted uppercase mt-2 font-bold tracking-widest">
566	                                                    {t.vrsta} | Klasa {t.klasa} | Papir: L:{t.duzina}m Ø:{t.promjer}cm
567	                                                    {t.kontrolna_duzina && <span className="text-amber-500 ml-2 block sm:inline mt-1 sm:mt-0">| Stvarno: L:{t.kontrolna_duzina}m Ø:{t.kontrolni_promjer}cm</span>}
568	                                                </div>
569	                                            </div>
570	                                            <div className="text-right flex flex-col items-end">
571	                                                <div className="text-2xl text-theme-text font-black drop-shadow-md">{t.kontrolna_zapremina ? t.kontrolna_zapremina : t.zapremina} <span className="text-sm text-theme-accent">m³</span></div>
572	                                                <button onClick={async () => { if(window.confirm("Brisati trupac?")) { await supabase.from('trupci').delete().eq('id', t.id); loadPrijemList(); } }} className="text-[10px] text-red-400 uppercase font-black hover:text-white bg-red-900/20 hover:bg-red-600 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg mt-2 transition-all shadow-sm">Obriši ×</button>
573	                                            </div>
574	                                        </div>
575	                                    </div>
576	                                ))}
577	                            </div>
578	                        </div>
579	                    )}
580	                </div>
581	            )}
582	
583	            {/* TAB 2: KROJENJE TRUPACA */}
584	            {tab === 'krojenje' && (
585	                <div className="animate-in slide-in-from-right space-y-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto">
586	                    
587	                    <div className="bg-theme-card p-6 md:p-8 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] border-2 border-amber-500/50 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(217,119,6,0.15)]" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
588	                        <div className="text-center font-black relative mb-6 border-b border-theme-border pb-4">
589	                            <span className="text-amber-500 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-xl"><span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500"></span> 1. SKENIRAJ ORIGINALNI TRUPAC (MAJKU)</span>
590	                        </div>
591

593	                            <input value={krojenjeScan} onChange={e => handleKrojenjeScanInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => { if(e.key === 'Enter') handleKrojenjeScanInput(krojenjeScan, true) }} className="flex-1 px-6 bg-transparent text-xl md:text-2xl text-center text-amber-400 outline-none uppercase placeholder:text-slate-600 font-black tracking-widest" placeholder="SKENIRAJ ILI UKUCAJ ID..." />
594	                            <button onClick={() => {setScanTarget('krojenje_majka'); setIsScanning(true);}} className="px-8 bg-amber-600/20 text-amber-500 font-black hover:bg-amber-500 hover:text-white transition-colors text-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg border-l border-amber-500/30">📷</button>
595	                        </div>
596	
597	                        {majkaTrupac && (
598	                            <div className="bg-black/30 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner relative overflow-hidden animate-in zoom-in-95">

600	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-start border-b border-theme-border pb-3 mb-3 relative z-10">
601	                                    <div><span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest block mb-1">Pronađen Trupac</span><h3 className="text-2xl text-white font-black drop-shadow-md">{majkaTrupac.id}</h3></div>
602	                                    <div className="text-right"><span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest block mb-1">Izvorna Zapremina</span><h3 className="text-2xl text-emerald-400 font-black drop-shadow-md">{majkaTrupac.zapremina} <span className="text-xs">m³</span></h3></div>
603	                                </div>
604	                                <div className="flex gap-4 text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest relative z-10">
605	                                    <span>{majkaTrupac.vrsta}</span> | <span>Klasa: {majkaTrupac.klasa}</span> | <span>L: {majkaTrupac.duzina}m</span> | <span>Ø {majkaTrupac.promjer}cm</span>
606	                                </div>
607	                            </div>
608	                        )}
609	                    </div>
610	
611	                    {majkaTrupac && (
612	                        <div className="bg-theme-card p-6 md:p-8 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] border border-theme-border shadow-2xl animate-in slide-in-from-bottom" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
613	                            <div className="text-center font-black relative mb-6 border-b border-theme-border pb-4 flex justify-between items-center">
614	                                <span className="text-amber-500 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2 text-lg"><span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500"></span> 2. KROJENJE (NOVI KOMADI)</span>
615	                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
616	                                    <label className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Na koliko komada siječeš?</label>
617	                                    <select value={brojDjece} onChange={e => setBrojDjece(parseInt(e.target.value))} className="bg-black text-amber-500 font-black text-lg px-3 py-1 rounded-xl outline-none border border-theme-border cursor-pointer shadow-inner">
618	                                        {[2,3,4,5,6].map(n => <option key={n} value={n}>{n}</option>)}
619	                                    </select>
620	                                </div>
621	                            </div>
622	
623	                            <div className="space-y-4 mb-6">
624	                                {djecaTrupci.map((dj, idx) => (
625	                                    <div key={idx} className="bg-theme-panel p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-md flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center">
626	                                        <div className="bg-amber-900/40 text-amber-500 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-black text-xs shrink-0 border border-amber-500/30">{idx+1}</div>
627	                                        <div className="flex-1 w-full relative">
628	                                            <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest ml-1">QR KOD (Nova Pločica)</label>
629	                                            <input type="text" value={dj.id} onChange={e => { const arr = [...djecaTrupci]; arr[idx].id = e.target.value.toUpperCase(); setDjecaTrupci(arr); }} className="w-full p-3 bg-black border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-white font-black outline-none focus:border-amber-500 text-center uppercase shadow-inner" placeholder="SKENIRAJ ILI UKUCAJ..." />
630	                                        </div>
631	                                        <div className="w-full md:w-32 relative">
632	                                            <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest ml-1">Dužina (m)</label>
633	                                            <input type="number" value={dj.duzina} onChange={e => { const arr = [...djecaTrupci]; arr[idx].duzina = e.target.value; setDjecaTrupci(arr); }} className="w-full p-3 bg-black border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-amber-400 font-black outline-none focus:border-amber-500 text-center text-lg shadow-inner [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none" placeholder="0" />
634	                                        </div>
635	                                        <div className="w-full md:w-32 relative">
636	                                            <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-black tracking-widest ml-1">Prečnik (cm)</label>
637	                                            <input type="number" value={dj.promjer} onChange={e => { const arr = [...djecaTrupci]; arr[idx].promjer = e.target.value; setDjecaTrupci(arr); }} className="w-full p-3 bg-black border border-theme-border rounded-xl text-amber-400 font-black outline-none focus:border-amber-500 text-center text-lg shadow-inner [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none" placeholder="0" />
638	                                        </div>
639	                                        <div className="w-full md:w-24 text-center bg-black/40 p-2 rounded-xl border border-theme-border/50">
640	                                            <span className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-0.5 font-black">Zapremina</span>
641	                                            <span className="text-sm font-black text-emerald-400">{calcVol(dj.duzina, dj.promjer).toFixed(3)}</span>
642	                                        </div>
643	                                    </div>
644	                                ))}
645	                            </div>
646	
647	                            <div className="bg-black/50 p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed border-theme-border mb-6">
648	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
649	                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
650	                                        <span className="text-3xl">🪚</span>
651	                                        <div>
652	                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black tracking-widest">Kalo / Ostatak Prilikom Rezanja</p>
653	                                            <p className={`text-2xl font-black mt-1 drop-shadow-md ${kaloVolume > 0 ? 'text-orange-500' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>{kaloVolume.toFixed(3)} <span className="text-xs">m³</span></p>
654	                                        </div>
655	                                    </div>
656	                                    
657	                                    {kaloVolume > 0 && (
658	                                        <div className="bg-theme-panel p-3 rounded-xl border border-theme-border flex items-center gap-3">
659	                                            <label className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black tracking-widest cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2">
660	                                                <input type="checkbox" checked={dodajKaloKaoTrupac} onChange={e => setDodajKaloKaoTrupac(e.target.checked)} className="w-4 h-4 accent-orange-500" />
661	                                                Zaduži ostatak na lager
662	                                            </label>
663	                                            {dodajKaloKaoTrupac && (
664	                                                <input type="text" value={kaloPlocica} onChange={e => setKaloPlocica(e.target.value.toUpperCase())} className="w-32 p-2 bg-black border border-orange-500/50 rounded-lg text-orange-400 text-xs text-center uppercase font-black outline-none shadow-inner" placeholder="QR ZA KALO..." />
665	                                            )}
666	                                        </div>
667	                                    )}
668	                                </div>
669	                                <p className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest text-center">Ukupna vrijednost "Majke" bit će prenesena na novonastale komade srazmjerno njihovoj kubikaži.</p>
670	                            </div>
671	
672	                            <div className="flex gap-4">
673	                                <button onClick={() => {setMajkaTrupac(null); setBrojDjece(2); setDjecaTrupci([]);}} className="flex-1 py-4 bg-theme-panel text-slate-400 font-black rounded-xl uppercase hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all border border-theme-border text-xs tracking-widest">✕ ODUSTANI</button>
674	                                <button onClick={izvrsiKrojenje} className="flex-[2] py-4 bg-amber-600 text-white font-black rounded-xl uppercase shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(217,119,6,0.3)] hover:bg-amber-500 transition-all text-xs tracking-widest hover:scale-[1.02] border border-amber-400">✂️ ZAVRŠI KROJENJE I ZADUŽI</button>
675	                            </div>
676	                        </div>
677	                    )}
678	                </div>
679	            )}
680	
681	            {isScanning && <ScannerOverlay onScan={(text) => { 
682	                if(scanTarget === 'krojenje_majka') handleKrojenjeScanInput(text, true); 
683	                else handleScanInput(text, true); 
684	                setIsScanning(false); 
685	            }} onClose={() => setIsScanning(false)} />}
686	        </div>
687	    );
688	}

10	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co';
11	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';

14	function SaaS_DnevnikMasine({ modul, header, user, saas, updatePolje, toggleVelicina, spremiDimenzije, handleDragStart, handleDragEnter, handleDrop }) {
15	    const [logovi, setLogovi] = useState([]);
16	    const t = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
17	    const [form, setForm] = useState({ vrijeme_od: t, vrijeme_do: '', zastoj_min: '', napomena: '' });
18	
19	    useEffect(() => { loadLogove(); }, [header]);
20	    const loadLogove = async () => {
21	        if(!header || !header.datum || !header.masina) return;
22	        const { data } = await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').select('*').eq('datum', header.datum).eq('masina', header.masina).eq('modul', modul).order('vrijeme_od', { ascending: false });
23	        if (data) setLogovi(data);
24	    };
25	    const snimiZastojIliRad = async () => {
26	        if (!form.vrijeme_od) return alert("Vrijeme početka je obavezno!");
27	        const payload = { datum: header.datum, masina: header.masina, modul: modul, vrijeme_od: form.vrijeme_od, vrijeme_do: form.vrijeme_do || null, zastoj_min: parseInt(form.zastoj_min) || 0, napomena: form.napomena, snimio: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat' };
28	        await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').insert([payload]);
29	        setForm({ vrijeme_od: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }), vrijeme_do: '', zastoj_min: '', napomena: '' });
30	        loadLogove();
31	    };
32	
33	    const obrisiLog = async (id) => { if(window.confirm("Obrisati ovaj zapis?")) { await supabase.from('dnevnik_masine').delete().eq('id', id); loadLogove(); } };
34	    const renderDnevnikPolje = (polje) => {
35	        if (polje.id === 'pocetak') return <input type="time" value={form.vrijeme_od} onChange={e => setForm({...form, vrijeme_od: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-red-500" />;
36	        if (polje.id === 'kraj') return <input type="time" value={form.vrijeme_do} onChange={e => setForm({...form, vrijeme_do: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-red-500" />;
37	        if (polje.id === 'zastoj') return <input type="number" value={form.zastoj_min} onChange={e => setForm({...form, zastoj_min: e.target.value})} placeholder="0" className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-red-900/20 rounded-xl text-xs text-red-400 font-black border border-red-500/50 outline-none" />;
38	        if (polje.id === 'napomena') return <input type="text" value={form.napomena} onChange={e => setForm({...form, napomena: e.target.value})} placeholder="Održavanje, kvar..." className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-red-500" />;
39	        return null;
40	    };
41	
42	    return (
43	        <div className={`bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] border shadow-2xl space-y-4 transition-all ${saas.isEditMode ? 'ring-2 ring-amber-500 border-amber-500/50' : 'border-theme-border'}`}>
44	            <h3 className="text-red-500 font-black uppercase text-xs">⚙️ EVIDENCIJA RADA I ZASTOJA MAŠINE</h3>
45	            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 bg-theme-panel p-4 rounded-2xl border border-red-500/20 items-start shadow-inner">
46	                {(saas.ui.polja_dnevnik || []).map((polje, index) => (
47	                    <div key={polje.id} className={`relative flex flex-col ${polje.span} transition-all ${saas.isEditMode ? 'border-2 border-dashed border-amber-500 p-2 rounded-xl bg-black/20 resize overflow-auto' : ''}`} style={{ maxWidth: '100%', ...(saas.isEditMode ? { minWidth: '100px', minHeight: '80px' } : {}), width: polje.customWidth || undefined, height: polje.customHeight || undefined }} draggable={saas.isEditMode} onDragStart={(e) => handleDragStart(e, index, 'polja_dnevnik')} onDragEnter={(e) => handleDragEnter(e, index)} onDragEnd={() => handleDrop('polja_dnevnik')} onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()} onMouseUp={(e) => spremiDimenzije(e, index, 'polja_dnevnik')}>
48	                        {saas.isEditMode && (<div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 shrink-0"><span className="text-[9px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black cursor-move">☰</span><button onClick={() => toggleVelicina(index, 'polja_dnevnik')} className="text-[8px] text-amber-500 font-black bg-amber-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded">ŠIRINA: {polje.span==='col-span-4'?'100%':polje.span==='col-span-2'?'50%':'25%'}</button></div>)}
49	                        {saas.isEditMode ? (<input value={polje.label} onChange={(e) => updatePolje(index, 'label', e.target.value, 'polja_dnevnik')} className="w-full bg-theme-card text-amber-400 p-1 mb-1 rounded border border-amber-500/50 text-[8px] uppercase font-black text-center shrink-0" placeholder="Ostavite prazno za bez naslova" />) : (polje.label && <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1 shrink-0">{polje.label}</label>)}
50	                        <div className={`flex-1 ${saas.isEditMode ? 'opacity-50 pointer-events-none' : ''}`}>{renderDnevnikPolje(polje)}</div>
51	                    </div>
52	                ))}
53	                <button onClick={snimiZastojIliRad} className={`w-full py-3 bg-red-600 text-theme-text font-black rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase shadow-lg hover:bg-red-500 ${saas.isEditMode ? 'opacity-50 pointer-events-none col-span-4' : 'col-span-4 md:col-span-4 mt-2'}`}>➕ Dodaj Zapis</button>
54	            </div>
55	            
56	            <div className="space-y-2 mt-4 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">
57	                {logovi.length === 0 && <p className="text-center text-slate-500 text-[10px] uppercase">Nema unesenih zastoja za danas.</p>}
58	                {logovi.map(l => (
59	                    <div key={l.id} className="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-slate-800 border border-theme-border rounded-xl">
60	                        <div>
61	                            <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black"><span className="text-emerald-400">{l.vrijeme_od}</span> - {l.vrijeme_do ? <span className="text-amber-400">{l.vrijeme_do}</span> : <span className="text-slate-500">...</span>}</p>
62	                            <p className="text-theme-text text-xs font-bold mt-1">{l.napomena || 'Nema napomene'}</p>
63	                        </div>
64	                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
65	                            {l.zastoj_min > 0 && <span className="text-red-400 text-xs font-black bg-red-900/30 px-2 py-1 rounded border border-red-500/30">Zastoj: {l.zastoj_min} min</span>}
66	                            <button onClick={() => obrisiLog(l.id)} className="text-red-500 font-black hover:bg-slate-700 p-2 rounded">✕</button>
67	                        </div>
68	                    </div>
69	                ))}
70	            </div>
71	        </div>
72	    );
73	}

75	export default function ProrezModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
76	    
77	    // PAMETNA SELEKCIJA MAŠINE
78	    useEffect(() => {
79	        const postaviMasinu = async () => {
80	            const { data } = await supabase.from('masine').select('naziv').ilike('dozvoljeni_moduli', '%Prorez%');
81	            const dozvoljene = data ? data.map(m => m.naziv) : [];
82	            const zadnja = localStorage.getItem('zadnja_masina_prorez');
83	
84	            if (!header?.masina || !dozvoljene.includes(header.masina)) {
85	                const nova = (zadnja && dozvoljene.includes(zadnja)) ? zadnja : (dozvoljene[0] || 'BRENTA 1');
86	                setHeader(prev => ({ ...prev, masina: nova }));
87	                localStorage.setItem('zadnja_masina_prorez', nova);
88	            } else if (header.masina && dozvoljene.includes(header.masina)) {
89	                localStorage.setItem('zadnja_masina_prorez', header.masina);
90	            }
91	        };
92	        postaviMasinu();
93	    }, [header?.masina]);
94	    
95	    const saas = useSaaS('prorez_modul', {
96	        boja_kartice: '#1e293b', boja_slova: '#ffffff', velicina_naslova: '16', naslov_skenera: 'SKENIRAJ TRUPAC NA BRENTI',
97	        polja_radnici: [ 
98	            { id: 'brentista', label: '👨‍🔧 BRENTISTA (GLAVNI)', span: 'col-span-1' }, 
99	            { id: 'viljuskarista', label: '🚜 VILJUŠKARISTA', span: 'col-span-1' }
100	        ],
101	        polja_dnevnik: [ { id: 'pocetak', label: 'POČETAK', span: 'col-span-1' }, { id: 'kraj', label: 'ZAVRŠETAK', span: 'col-span-1' }, { id: 'zastoj', label: 'ZASTOJ (MINUTA)', span: 'col-span-1' }, { id: 'napomena', label: 'NAPOMENA / RAZLOG', span: 'col-span-1', customWidth: '100%', span: 'col-span-4' } ]
102	    });
103	
104	    const dragItem = useRef(null);
105	    const dragOverItem = useRef(null);
106	    const handleDragStart = (e, index, lista) => { dragItem.current = { index, lista }; };
107	    const handleDragEnter = (e, index) => { dragOverItem.current = index; };
108	    const handleDrop = (listaIme) => { if(!dragItem.current || dragOverItem.current === null || dragItem.current.lista !== listaIme) return;
109	    const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme]; const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista]; const premjesteniItem = novaLista[dragItem.current.index]; novaLista.splice(dragItem.current.index, 1);
110	    novaLista.splice(dragOverItem.current, 0, premjesteniItem); dragItem.current = null; dragOverItem.current = null; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista}); };
111	    const updatePolje = (index, key, val, listaIme) => { const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme];
112	    const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista]; novaLista[index][key] = val; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista}); };
113	    const toggleVelicinaPolja = (index, listaIme) => { const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme];
114	    const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista]; const trenutno = novaLista[index].span; novaLista[index].span = trenutno === 'col-span-1' ?
115	    'col-span-2' : (trenutno === 'col-span-2' ? 'col-span-4' : 'col-span-1'); saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista}); };
116	    const spremiDimenzije = (e, index, listaIme) => { if (!saas.isEditMode) return; const w = e.currentTarget.style.width; const h = e.currentTarget.style.height;
117	    if (w || h) { const aktuelnaLista = saas.ui[listaIme]?.length > 0 ? saas.ui[listaIme] : saas.defaultConfig[listaIme]; const novaLista = [...aktuelnaLista];
118	    if (w) novaLista[index].customWidth = w; if (h) novaLista[index].customHeight = h; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, [listaIme]: novaLista}); } };
119	
120	    const [scan, setScan] = useState('');
121	    const [trupac, setTrupac] = useState(null);
122	    const [isScanning, setIsScanning] = useState(false);
123	    const [prorezaniLista, setProrezaniLista] = useState([]);
124	    const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ isOpen: false });
125	    const prikaziDialog = (opcije) => setDialog({ isOpen: true, confirmText: 'POTVRDI', cancelText: 'ZATVORI', ...opcije });
126	    const zatvoriDialog = () => setDialog({ isOpen: false });
127	
128	    const scanTimerRef = useRef(null); 
129	    const inputRef = useRef(null); 
130	    const btnPotvrdiRef = useRef(null); 
131	
132	    const [brentista, setBrentista] = useState('');
133	    const [viljuskarista, setViljuskarista] = useState('');
134	    const [radniciList, setRadniciList] = useState([]);
135	
136	    // 🟢 CENTRALNI TRAGAČ SVIH AKTIVNOSTI
137	    const zapisiU_Log = async (akcija, detalji) => {
138	        await supabase.from('sistem_audit_log').insert([{ 
139	            korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat', 
140	            akcija: akcija, 
141	            detalji: detalji 
142	        }]);
143	    };
144	
145	    const emitRadniciUpdate = (b, v) => {
146	        window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('radnici_updated', {
147	            detail: { brentista: b, viljuskarista: v }
148	        }));
149	    };
150	
151	    const handleBrentistaChange = async (novoIme) => {
152	        if (header?.masina) {
153	            await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).eq('uloga', 'brentista').is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
154	            if (novoIme) await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').insert([{ radnik_ime: novoIme, masina_naziv: header.masina, vrijeme_prijave: new Date().toISOString(), uloga: 'brentista' }]);
155	            setBrentista(novoIme); localStorage.setItem('zajednicki_brentista', novoIme);
156	            emitRadniciUpdate(novoIme, viljuskarista);
157	        }
158	    };
159	
160	    const handleViljuskaristaChange = async (novoIme) => {
161	        if (header?.masina) {
162	            await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).eq('uloga', 'viljuskarista').is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
163	            if (novoIme) await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').insert([{ radnik_ime: novoIme, masina_naziv: header.masina, vrijeme_prijave: new Date().toISOString(), uloga: 'viljuskarista' }]);
164	            setViljuskarista(novoIme); localStorage.setItem('zajednicki_viljuskarista', novoIme);
165	            emitRadniciUpdate(brentista, novoIme);
166	        }
167	    };
168	
169	    useEffect(() => {
170	        supabase.from('radnici').select('ime_prezime').then(({data}) => setRadniciList(data ? data.map(r=>({naziv: r.ime_prezime})) : []));
171	        if (header?.masina && header?.datum) loadProrezani();
172	
173	        const ucitajDezurneRadnike = async () => {
174	            if (!header?.masina) return;
175	            const { data } = await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').select('radnik_ime, uloga').eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
176	            
177	            let locB = localStorage.getItem('zajednicki_brentista') || '';
178	            let locV = localStorage.getItem('zajednicki_viljuskarista') || '';
179	
180	            if (data && data.length > 0) {
181	                const b = data.find(r => r.uloga === 'brentista');
182	                const v = data.find(r => r.uloga === 'viljuskarista');
183	                if (b) { locB = b.radnik_ime; localStorage.setItem('zajednicki_brentista', b.radnik_ime); }
184	                if (v) { locV = v.radnik_ime; localStorage.setItem('zajednicki_viljuskarista', v.radnik_ime); }
185	            }
186	            
187	            setBrentista(locB); setViljuskarista(locV);
188	            emitRadniciUpdate(locB, locV);
189	        };
190	        ucitajDezurneRadnike();
191	
192	        const handleRadniciUpdate = (event) => { 
193	            if (event.detail) {
194	                setBrentista(event.detail.brentista); setViljuskarista(event.detail.viljuskarista);
195	            } else { ucitajDezurneRadnike(); }
196	        };
197	        window.addEventListener('radnici_updated', handleRadniciUpdate);
198	        return () => window.removeEventListener('radnici_updated', handleRadniciUpdate);
199	    }, [header?.masina, header?.datum]);
200	
201	    // 🟢 LOAD PROREZANI - SA PAMETNIM FILTRIRANJEM PO SESIJI SMJENE
202	    const loadProrezani = async () => {
203	        if(!header?.masina) return;
204	        
205	        const { data, error } = await supabase.from('prorez_log')
206	            .select('*')
207	            .eq('masina', header.masina)
208	            .order('id', { ascending: false })
209	            .limit(200);
210	            
211	        if (error) {
212	            console.error("Greška pri povlačenju liste prorezanih:", error);
213	            return;
214	        }
215	
216	        if (data) {
217	            const odabraniDatum = header.datum || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
218	            const filtriranoZaDanas = data.filter(log => {
219	                if (log.datum) return log.datum === odabraniDatum;
220	                const logDate = new Date(log.created_at);
221	                const y = logDate.getFullYear();
222	                const m = String(logDate.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
223	                const d = String(logDate.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
224	                const logLokalniString = `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
225	                return logLokalniString === odabraniDatum;
226	            });
227	            
228	            // FILTRIRANJE SESIJE: Sakrij logove ako je smjena nedavno završena
229	            const sessionTime = localStorage.getItem('prorez_session_start_' + header.masina);
230	            if (sessionTime) {
231	                const sessionDate = new Date(sessionTime);
232	                const filteredBySession = filtriranoZaDanas.filter(log => new Date(log.created_at) >= sessionDate);
233	                setProrezaniLista(filteredBySession);
234	            } else {
235	                setProrezaniLista(filtriranoZaDanas);
236	            }
237	        }
238	    };
239	
240	    useEffect(() => {
241	        const channel = supabase.channel(`prorez_live_${Math.random()}`)
242	            .on('postgres_changes', { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'prorez_log' }, () => {
243	                loadProrezani();
244	            }).subscribe();
245	        return () => { supabase.removeChannel(channel); };
246	    }, [header?.masina, header?.datum]);
247	
248	    const handleScanInput = (val, isEnter = false) => {
249	        setScan(val);
250	        if (scanTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(scanTimerRef.current);
251	        if (!val.trim()) return;
252	        
253	        if (isEnter) {
254	            processTrupacScan(val);
255	        } else {
256	            scanTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => processTrupacScan(val), 1000);
257	        }
258	    };
259	
260	    const processTrupacScan = async (val) => {
261	        const id = val.toUpperCase().trim();
262	        // 🟢 DOZVOLJEN UNOS QR KODA OD 1 KARAKTERA
263	        if (id.length < 1) return; 
264	        
265	        const { data } = await supabase.from('trupci').select('*').eq('id', id).maybeSingle();
266	        if (data) {
267	            if(data.status === 'prorezano' || data.status === 'PREKROJENO') {
268	                return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Iskorišten Trupac', poruka: `Trupac ${id} je VEĆ PROREZAN!\nSkenirajte drugi.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
269	            }
270	            
271	            setTrupac(data); 
272	            setScan('');
273	            if (window.navigator && window.navigator.vibrate) window.navigator.vibrate(50);
274	            
275	            setTimeout(() => { btnPotvrdiRef.current?.focus(); }, 100);
276	        } else {
277	            prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Nepoznat Trupac', poruka: `Trupac sa ID kodom "${id}" ne postoji na lageru!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
278	            setScan('');
279	        }
280	    };
281	
282	    // 🟢 OPTIMISTIC UI + LOGIKA ZA NASTAVLJANJE PREKINUTE SMJENE
283	    const zavrsiProrez = async () => {
284	        if(!trupac) return;
285	        
286	        if(!brentista) {
287	            // PROVJERA: Da li danas već imamo izrezanih trupaca na ovoj mašini?
288	            const odabraniDatum = header.datum || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
289	            const { data: zadnjiLog } = await supabase.from('prorez_log')
290	                .select('*')
291	                .eq('masina', header.masina)
292	                .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
293	                .limit(1);
294	
295	            // Ako imamo zadnji log i on je od danas, pitaj korisnika za nastavak smjene
296	            if (zadnjiLog && zadnjiLog.length > 0 && zadnjiLog[0].datum === odabraniDatum) {
297	                const zadnji = zadnjiLog[0];
298	                return prikaziDialog({
299	                    tip: 'info',
300	                    naslov: 'Započeta Smjena',
301	                    poruka: `Pronađen je započet prorez za danas (Brentista: ${zadnji.brentista}).\n\nŽelite li nastaviti tu smjenu i učitati prethodnu listu, ili započeti novu smjenu od nule?`,
302	                    confirmText: '▶️ NASTAVI SMJENU',
303	                    cancelText: '🆕 NOVA SMJENA',
304	                    onConfirm: async () => {
305	                        localStorage.removeItem('prorez_session_start_' + header.masina);
306	                        await handleBrentistaChange(zadnji.brentista);
307	                        if (zadnji.viljuskarista) await handleViljuskaristaChange(zadnji.viljuskarista);
308	                        await loadProrezani(); 
309	                        zatvoriDialog();
310	                        // Triggere actual save after confirming!
311	                        zavrsiProrezPravi(zadnji.brentista, zadnji.viljuskarista); 
312	                    },
313	                    onCancel: () => {
314	                        zatvoriDialog();
315	                        setTimeout(() => {
316	                            prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Novi Brentista', poruka: "Započinjete novu smjenu. Molimo odaberite Brentistu iz padajućeg menija da biste potvrdili rezanje!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
317	                        }, 300);
318	                    }
319	                });
320	            } else {
321	                return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Obavezno Polje', poruka: "ZABRANJENO:\nMorate odabrati Brentistu kako bi se prorez evidentirao!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
322	            }
323	        }
324	        
325	        zavrsiProrezPravi(brentista, viljuskarista);
326	    };
327	
328	    const zavrsiProrezPravi = async (brentistaZaSpasiti, viljuskaristaZaSpasiti) => {
329	        const sviRadniciProrez = [brentistaZaSpasiti, viljuskaristaZaSpasiti].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
330	        
331	        const logPayload = {
332	            trupac_id: trupac.id, 
333	            zapremina: trupac.zapremina,
334	            mjesto: header.mjesto, 
335	            masina: header.masina,
336	            datum: header.datum || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], 
337	            brentista: brentistaZaSpasiti, 
338	            viljuskarista: viljuskaristaZaSpasiti, 
339	            svi_radnici_imena: sviRadniciProrez,
340	            snimio_korisnik: user?.ime_prezime || 'Sistem', 
341	            vrsta_drveta: trupac.vrsta || 'N/A'
342	        };
343	
344	        const tempId = Date.now();
345	        const optimisticLog = { ...logPayload, id: tempId, created_at: new Date().toISOString() };
346	        setProrezaniLista(prev => [optimisticLog, ...prev]);
347	        
348	        setTrupac(null);
349	        setScan(''); 
350	        setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);
351	
352	        await supabase.from('trupci').update({ status: 'prorezano' }).eq('id', logPayload.trupac_id);
353	        
354	        const { data: insertedData, error: errInsert } = await supabase.from('prorez_log').insert([logPayload]).select().single();
355	        
356	        if (errInsert) {
357	            setProrezaniLista(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== tempId));
358	            prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška baze', poruka: errInsert.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
359	        } else if (insertedData) {
360	            setProrezaniLista(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === tempId ? insertedData : p));
361	            zapisiU_Log('PROREZ_EVIDENTIRAN', `Izrezan trupac ${logPayload.trupac_id} (${logPayload.zapremina} m³). Brentista: ${brentistaZaSpasiti}`);
362	        }
363	    };
364	
365	    // 🟢 POPRAVLJENO: Pametni Dialog za vraćanje na stanje
366	    const vratiNaStanje = async (p) => {
367	        prikaziDialog({
368	            tip: 'upozorenje',
369	            naslov: 'Vraćanje na zalihe',
370	            poruka: `Da li ste sigurni da želite poništiti prorez za trupac ${p.trupac_id} i vratiti ga na lager?`,
371	            confirmText: '✅ DA, VRATI NA STANJE',
372	            cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
373	            onConfirm: async () => {
374	                setProrezaniLista(prev => prev.filter(item => item.id !== p.id));
375	                await supabase.from('prorez_log').delete().eq('id', p.id);
376	                await supabase.from('trupci').update({ status: 'na_lageru' }).eq('id', p.trupac_id);
377	                zapisiU_Log('STORNO_PROREZA', `Korisnik je poništio prorez za trupac ${p.trupac_id}. Trupac je vraćen nazad na zalihe.`);
378	                zatvoriDialog();
379	                setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);
380	            },
381	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
382	        });
383	    };
384	
385	    // 🟢 NOVA FUNKCIJA: ZAVRŠI SMJENU (Odjava radnika i čišćenje ekrana)
386	    const zavrsiSmjenu = async () => {
387	        if(prorezaniLista.length === 0) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Prazno', poruka: "Nema izrezanih trupaca u trenutnoj smjeni.", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
388	        
389	        prikaziDialog({
390	            tip: 'info',
391	            naslov: 'Završi Smjenu?',
392	            poruka: `U ovoj smjeni je izrezano: ${totalIzrezanoM3.toFixed(3)} m³ (${prorezaniLista.length} trupaca).\n\nDa li želite završiti smjenu i odjaviti radnike sa mašine? Lista će biti obrisana sa ekrana.`,
393	            confirmText: '🏁 ZAVRŠI SMJENU',
