394	            cancelText: '✕ ODUSTANI',
395	            onConfirm: async () => {
396	                const now = new Date().toISOString();
397	                await supabase.from('aktivni_radnici').update({ vrijeme_odjave: now })
398	                    .eq('masina_naziv', header.masina).is('vrijeme_odjave', null);
399	                
400	                setBrentista('');
401	                setViljuskarista('');
402	                localStorage.removeItem('zajednicki_brentista');
403	                localStorage.removeItem('zajednicki_viljuskarista');
404	                emitRadniciUpdate('', '');
405	                
406	                // 🟢 Označi novu sesiju od trenutka klika kako bi se sakrili prethodni rezovi
407	                localStorage.setItem('prorez_session_start_' + header.masina, now);
408	                loadProrezani(); 
409	                
410	                zatvoriDialog();
411	                prikaziDialog({ tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Smjena Završena', poruka: 'Radnici su odjavljeni i lista je očišćena za sljedeću smjenu.', onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
412	            },
413	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
414	        });
415	    };
416	
417	    const totalIzrezanoM3 = useMemo(() => prorezaniLista.reduce((s, p) => s + parseFloat(p.zapremina||0), 0), [prorezaniLista]);
418	
419	    const renderRadnikPolje = (polje) => {
420	        if (polje.id === 'brentista') return <div className="h-full w-full min-w-0 bg-transparent text-theme-text font-black text-sm uppercase px-2 py-1 outline-none overflow-visible"><MasterSearch data={radniciList} poljaZaPretragu={['naziv']} value={brentista} onSelect={r => handleBrentistaChange(r.naziv)} placeholder="Odaberi..." /></div>;
421	        if (polje.id === 'viljuskarista') return <div className="h-full w-full min-w-0 bg-transparent text-theme-text font-black text-sm uppercase px-2 py-1 outline-none overflow-visible"><MasterSearch data={radniciList} poljaZaPretragu={['naziv']} value={viljuskarista} onSelect={r => handleViljuskaristaChange(r.naziv)} placeholder="Odaberi..." /></div>;
422	        return null;
423	    };
424	
425	    if (!header?.masina) {
426	        return (
427	            <div className="p-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in">
428	                <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-red-500" user={user} saas={saas} />
429	                <div className="bg-red-900/30 border-2 border-red-500 p-10 rounded-[2.5rem] text-center shadow-2xl mt-10 backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)]">
430	                    <span className="text-6xl block mb-4 animate-bounce">⚠️</span>
431	                    <h2 className="text-2xl text-red-400 font-black uppercase tracking-widest">Mašina nije odabrana!</h2>
432	                </div>
433	            </div>
434	        );
435	    }
436	
437	    return (
438	        <div className="p-4 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6 animate-in fade-in font-sans pb-24 overflow-visible" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_slova }}>
439	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
440	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-red-500" user={user} modulIme="prorez" saas={saas} />
441	
442	            {saas.isEditMode && (
443	                <div className="bg-black/60 p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-amber-500/50 mb-6 shadow-2xl">
444	                    <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-sm mb-4">God Mode - Kontrole Dizajna</h3>
445	                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
446	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja Pozadine (Kartice): <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_kartice} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_kartice: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
447	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Boja SVIH slova: <input type="color" value={saas.ui.boja_slova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, boja_slova: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-10 mt-1 cursor-pointer rounded bg-transparent" /></label>
448	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black">Veličina naslova (px): <input type="number" value={saas.ui.velicina_naslova} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, velicina_naslova: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 font-mono rounded" /></label>
449	                        <label className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black md:col-span-3">Naslov Skenera: <input type="text" value={saas.ui.naslov_skenera} onChange={e => saas.setUi({...saas.ui, naslov_skenera: e.target.value})} className="w-full p-2 mt-1 bg-black text-amber-400 rounded" /></label>
450	                    </div>
451	                </div>
452	            )}
453	
454	            <h2 className="text-red-500 text-center font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-xl md:text-2xl mt-2 mb-6 drop-shadow-md">🪚 PROREZ TRUPACA</h2>
455	            
456	            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 bg-theme-card/60 backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-4 rounded-[2rem] border border-red-500/20 items-center justify-between shadow-lg relative z-[50]" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
457	                <div className="flex gap-4 w-full md:w-auto flex-1 flex-wrap overflow-visible">
458	                    {(saas.ui.polja_radnici || []).map((polje, index) => (
459	                        <div key={polje.id} className={`relative flex-1 min-w-[200px] flex items-center bg-black/40 rounded-xl border border-slate-800/50 p-2 overflow-visible transition-all ${saas.isEditMode ? 'border-dashed border-amber-500 bg-amber-900/20' : ''}`} draggable={saas.isEditMode} onDragStart={(e) => handleDragStart(e, index, 'polja_radnici')} onDragEnter={(e) => handleDragEnter(e, index)} onDragEnd={() => handleDrop('polja_radnici')} onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}>
460	                            {saas.isEditMode && (<div className="absolute -top-3 -right-2 z-[60] flex gap-1"><span className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 bg-theme-card px-2 py-1 rounded-box cursor-move border border-amber-500/50 shadow-lg">☰ POMICANJE</span></div>)}
461	                            <div className="flex-1 flex items-center overflow-visible">
462	                                {saas.isEditMode ? (<input value={polje.label} onChange={(e) => updatePolje(index, 'label', e.target.value, 'polja_radnici')} className="w-24 bg-theme-card text-amber-400 p-1 rounded border border-amber-500/50 text-[8px] uppercase font-black shrink-0 mr-2" placeholder="Naslov..." />) : (polje.label && <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase mx-2 whitespace-nowrap shrink-0 w-24 overflow-hidden text-ellipsis">{polje.label}</label>)}
463	                                <div className="flex-1 border-l border-theme-border/50 pl-2 relative overflow-visible z-[100]">{renderRadnikPolje(polje)}</div>
464	                            </div>
465	                        </div>
466	                    ))}
467	                </div>
468	            </div>
469	
470	            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 relative z-10">
471	                
472	                <div className="lg:col-span-7 space-y-6">
473	                    <div className="bg-theme-card/80 backdrop-blur-md p-8 rounded-[2.5rem] border border-red-500/30 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(239,68,68,0.1)] relative group overflow-hidden" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
474	                        <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-red-500 to-transparent opacity-50"></div>
475	                        <label className="text-[9px] text-theme-muted uppercase block mb-4 font-black tracking-widest text-center" style={{ color: saas.ui.boja_teksta, fontSize: `${saas.ui.velicina_naslova}px` }}>{saas.ui.naslov_skenera}</label>
476	                        <div className={`flex bg-theme-panel border-2 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner transition-all h-20 mb-8 ${saas.isEditMode ? 'border-amber-500/50 opacity-50 pointer-events-none' : 'border-red-500/50 focus-within:border-red-500'}`}>
477	                            
478	                            <input 
479	                                ref={inputRef}
480	                                value={scan} 
481	                                onChange={e => handleScanInput(e.target.value)} 
482	                                onKeyDown={e => { if(e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); handleScanInput(scan, true); } }} 
483	                                className="flex-1 min-w-0 px-6 bg-transparent text-xl md:text-2xl text-center text-theme-text outline-none uppercase font-black placeholder:text-theme-muted/30 tracking-widest" 
484	                                placeholder="ČEKAM SKEN..." 
485	                            />
486	                            
487	                            <button onClick={() => setIsScanning(true)} className="shrink-0 px-8 bg-red-600/30 text-red-500 font-bold hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white transition-all text-3xl border-l border-red-500/50">📷</button>
488	                        </div>
489	
490	                        {trupac ? (
491	                            <div className="bg-theme-panel p-6 rounded-3xl border border-red-500/50 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden animate-in zoom-in-95">
492	                                <div className="absolute -right-10 -top-10 text-9xl opacity-5">🪵</div>
493	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-6 border-b border-theme-border/50 pb-4 relative z-10">
494	                                    <div><span className="text-[10px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black tracking-widest block mb-1">ID Trupca (Pločica)</span><h3 className="text-3xl text-theme-text font-black drop-shadow-md">{trupac.id}</h3></div>
495	                                    <div className="text-right"><span className="text-[10px] text-theme-muted uppercase font-black tracking-widest block mb-1">Zapremina</span><h3 className="text-4xl text-red-500 font-black drop-shadow-lg">{parseFloat(trupac.zapremina || 0).toFixed(3)} <span className="text-lg text-red-700">m³</span></h3></div>
496	                                </div>
497	                                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8 relative z-10">
498	                                    <div className="bg-black/30 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border/30 text-center"><span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Vrsta</span><span className="text-sm font-black text-theme-text uppercase tracking-widest">{trupac.vrsta || 'N/A'}</span></div>
499	                                    <div className="bg-black/30 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border/30 text-center"><span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Klasa</span><span className="text-sm font-black text-theme-text uppercase tracking-widest">{trupac.klasa || '-'}</span></div>
500	                                    <div className="bg-black/30 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border/30 text-center"><span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Dužina</span><span className="text-sm font-black text-theme-text uppercase tracking-widest">{trupac.duzina} m</span></div>
501	                                    <div className="bg-black/30 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border/30 text-center"><span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase block mb-1 font-bold">Prečnik</span><span className="text-sm font-black text-theme-text uppercase tracking-widest">Ø {trupac.promjer} cm</span></div>
502	                                </div>
503	                                <div className="flex gap-4 relative z-10">
504	                                    <button onClick={() => {setTrupac(null); setScan(''); setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);}} className="flex-1 py-5 bg-theme-card text-slate-400 font-black rounded-2xl uppercase hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all border border-theme-border text-sm">✕ Otkazivanje</button>
505	                                    <button 
506	                                        ref={btnPotvrdiRef}
507	                                        onClick={zavrsiProrez} 
508	                                        className="flex-[2] py-5 bg-red-600 text-white font-black rounded-2xl uppercase shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(220,38,38,0.4)] hover:bg-red-500 transition-all text-sm tracking-widest hover:scale-[1.02] focus:ring-4 ring-red-400 outline-none"
509	                                    >
510	                                        ✅ POTVRDI KAO IZREZANO
511	                                    </button>
512	                                </div>
513	                            </div>
514	                        ) : (
515	                            <div className="border-2 border-dashed border-theme-border p-10 rounded-3xl text-center text-slate-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black/10">
516	                                <span className="text-5xl mb-4 opacity-50">🪵</span>
517	                                <p className="font-bold text-sm uppercase tracking-widest">Čekam skeniranje sljedećeg trupca...</p>
518	                            </div>
519	                        )}
520	                    </div>
521	                </div>
522	
523	                <div className="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
524	                    <div className="bg-theme-card/80 backdrop-blur-md p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] border border-theme-border shadow-xl flex flex-col h-full" style={{ backgroundColor: saas.ui.boja_kartice }}>
525	                        <div className="flex justify-between items-end border-b border-theme-border pb-4 mb-4">
526	                            <div>
527	                                <h3 className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Dnevni Učinak (Izrezano)</h3>
528	                                <p className="text-3xl font-black text-red-500 drop-shadow-md">{totalIzrezanoM3.toFixed(3)} <span className="text-sm text-red-700">m³</span></p>
529	                            </div>
530	                            <div className="text-right flex flex-col items-end gap-2">
531	                                <div>
532	                                    <p className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest mb-1">Broj Trupaca</p>
533	                                    <p className="text-xl font-black text-theme-text">{prorezaniLista.length} <span className="text-xs text-slate-500">kom</span></p>
534	                                </div>
535	                                <button onClick={zavrsiSmjenu} className="bg-slate-800 hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white text-slate-300 border border-slate-600 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-black uppercase transition-all shadow-md">
536	                                    🏁 Završi Smjenu
537	                                </button>
538	                            </div>
539	                        </div>
540	                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar space-y-3 max-h-[500px]">
541	                            {prorezaniLista.length === 0 && <div className="text-center text-xs text-slate-500 py-10 italic">Nema izrezanih trupaca u trenutnoj smjeni.</div>}
542	                            {prorezaniLista.map((p, i) => (
543	                                <div key={p.id} className="bg-theme-panel p-4 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border/50 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between md:items-center hover:border-red-500/50 transition-colors shadow-sm gap-3">
544	                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
545	                                        <div className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-500 w-4">{prorezaniLista.length - i}.</div>
546	                                        <div>
547	                                            <p className="text-theme-text text-sm font-black">{p.trupac_id}</p>
548	                                            <p className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">
549	                                                {p.created_at ? new Date(p.created_at).toLocaleTimeString('de-DE') : new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE')} | {p.vrsta_drveta}
550	                                            </p>
551	                                        </div>
552	                                    </div>
553	                                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between md:justify-end gap-4 border-t md:border-none border-theme-border pt-3 md:pt-0">
554	                                        <div className="text-right"><p className="text-red-400 font-black text-lg">{parseFloat(p.zapremina||0).toFixed(3)}</p><p className="text-[8px] text-red-700 uppercase font-black">m³</p></div>
555	                                        
556	                                        <button onClick={() => vratiNaStanje(p)} className="text-amber-500 font-black px-4 py-3 bg-amber-900/20 rounded-xl hover:bg-amber-500 hover:text-black transition-all text-[10px] uppercase shadow-sm flex items-center gap-2">
557	                                            ↩ Vrati na stanje
558	                                        </button>
559	                                    </div>
560	                                </div>
561	                            ))}
562	                        </div>
563	                    </div>
564	                </div>
565	            </div>
566	            
567	            <SaaS_DnevnikMasine modul="Prorez" header={header} user={user} saas={saas} updatePolje={updatePolje} toggleVelicina={toggleVelicinaPolja} spremiDimenzije={spremiDimenzije} handleDragStart={handleDragStart} handleDragEnter={handleDragEnter} handleDrop={handleDrop} />
568	            {isScanning && <ScannerOverlay onScan={(text) => { handleScanInput(text, true); setIsScanning(false); }} onClose={() => setIsScanning(false)} />}
569	        </div>
570	    );
571	}

=== app/modules/RacuniModule.jsx ===
1	"use client";
2	import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	import MasterHeader from '../components/MasterHeader';
5	import MasterSearch from '../components/MasterSearch';
6	import PametniDialog from '../components/PametniDialog';
7	import SettingsModule from './SettingsModule';
8	import { printDokument } from '../utils/printHelpers';
9	import { useSaaS } from '../utils/useSaaS';
10	
11	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
12	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
13	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
14	
15	export default function RacuniModule({ user, header, setHeader, onExit }) {
16	    const loggedUser = JSON.parse(typeof window !== 'undefined' ? localStorage.getItem('smart_timber_user') || '{}' : '{}');
17	    const currentUser = user?.ime_prezime ? user : loggedUser;
18	    const hasKupacEdit = currentUser.uloga === 'admin' || currentUser.uloga === 'superadmin' || (currentUser.dozvole && currentUser.dozvole.includes('Baza Kupaca (Edit)'));
19	    const hasKatalogEdit = currentUser.uloga === 'admin' || currentUser.uloga === 'superadmin' || (currentUser.dozvole && currentUser.dozvole.includes('Katalog Proizvoda (Edit)'));
20	
21	    const saas = useSaaS('racuni_zaglavlje', {
22	        boja_kartice: '#1e293b', boja_naslova: 'text-red-500',
23	        polja: [
24	            { id: 'veza', label: 'Vezni Dokument (Istorija)', span: 'col-span-2' }, { id: 'broj', label: 'BROJ RAČUNA', span: 'col-span-2' },
25	            { id: 'kupac', label: '* KUPAC', span: 'col-span-2' }, { id: 'datum', label: 'Datum izdavanja', span: 'col-span-1' },
26	            { id: 'rok', label: 'Rok plaćanja', span: 'col-span-1' }, { id: 'placanje', label: 'Način Plaćanja', span: 'col-span-1' },
27	            { id: 'valuta', label: 'Valuta', span: 'col-span-1' }, { id: 'status', label: 'Status Računa', span: 'col-span-2' }
28	        ]
29	    });
30	
31	    const aktivnaPolja = saas.ui.polja?.length > 0 ? saas.ui.polja : saas.defaultConfig.polja;
32	    const dragItem = useRef(null); const dragOverItem = useRef(null);
33	    const handleDragStart = (e, index) => { dragItem.current = index; }; const handleDragEnter = (e, index) => { dragOverItem.current = index; };
34	    const handleDrop = () => { if(dragItem.current === null || dragOverItem.current === null) return; const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; const premjesteniItem = novaLista[dragItem.current]; novaLista.splice(dragItem.current, 1); novaLista.splice(dragOverItem.current, 0, premjesteniItem); dragItem.current = null; dragOverItem.current = null; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); };
35	    const updatePolje = (index, key, val) => { const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; novaLista[index][key] = val; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); };
36	    const toggleVelicinaPolja = (index) => { const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; const trenutno = novaLista[index].span; novaLista[index].span = trenutno === 'col-span-1' ? 'col-span-2' : (trenutno === 'col-span-2' ? 'col-span-4' : 'col-span-1'); saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); };
37	    const spremiDimenzije = (e, index) => { if (!saas.isEditMode) return; const w = e.currentTarget.style.width; const h = e.currentTarget.style.height; if (w || h) { const novaLista = [...aktivnaPolja]; if (w) novaLista[index].customWidth = w; if (h) novaLista[index].customHeight = h; saas.setUi({...saas.ui, polja: novaLista}); } };
38	
39	    const [tab, setTab] = useState('novi');
40	    const [kupci, setKupci] = useState([]);
41	    const [katalog, setKatalog] = useState([]);
42	    const [racuni, setRacuni] = useState([]);
43	    
44	    // --- PAMETNI DIJALOZI ---
45	    const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ isOpen: false });
46	    const prikaziDialog = (opcije) => setDialog({ isOpen: true, confirmText: 'POTVRDI', cancelText: 'ZATVORI', ...opcije });
47	    const zatvoriDialog = () => setDialog({ isOpen: false });
48	
49	    const generisiID = () => `RAC-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000)}`;
50	    const formatirajDatum = (isoString) => { if(!isoString) return ''; if(isoString.includes('.')) return isoString; const [y, m, d] = isoString.split('T')[0].split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`; };
51	
52	    const [form, setForm] = useState({
53	        id: generisiID(), broj_veze: '', kupac_naziv: '', datum: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], rok_placanja: new Date(new Date().setDate(new Date().getDate() + 15)).toISOString().split('T')[0],
54	        nacin_placanja: 'Virmanski', valuta: 'KM', napomena: '', status: 'NENAPLAĆENO', originalna_ponuda: null, ukljuciPDV: true
55	    });
56	    
57	    const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
58	    const [odabraniKupac, setOdabraniKupac] = useState(null);
59	    const [stavke, setStavke] = useState([]);
60	    const [showBrziKupac, setShowBrziKupac] = useState(false);
61	    const [showBrziKatalog, setShowBrziKatalog] = useState(false);
62	    const [dostupniDokumenti, setDostupniDokumenti] = useState([]);
63	    
64	    const [stavkaForm, setStavkaForm] = useState({ id: null, sifra_unos: '', kolicina_unos: '', jm_unos: 'kom', kolicina_obracun: '', jm_obracun: 'm3', sistemski_rabat: 0, konacni_rabat: '', fiksna_cijena: '' });
65	    const [trenutniProizvod, setTrenutniProizvod] = useState(null);
66	
67	  // 🟢 PREMIUM DEEP LINKING: Skakanje na tab otvorenih dugovanja
68	  useEffect(() => {
69	    setTimeout(() => {
70	        const autoAction = localStorage.getItem('erp_auto_action');
71	        if (autoAction === 'otvoreni') {
72	            setTab('otvoreni');
73	            localStorage.removeItem('erp_auto_action');
74	        }
75	    }, 150);
76	}, []);
77	
78	// 🟢 LIVE SYNC REALTIME KANAL
79	useEffect(() => {
80	    load();
81	    const channel = supabase.channel(`racuni_realtime_${Math.random()}`)
82	        .on('postgres_changes', { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'racuni' }, () => {
83	            supabase.from('racuni').select('*').order('datum', { ascending: false }).then(({data}) => setRacuni(data||[]));
84	        })
85	        .subscribe();
86	
87	    return () => {
88	        supabase.removeChannel(channel);
89	    };
90	}, []);
91	
92	    const load = async () => {
93	        const {data: k} = await supabase.from('kupci').select('*').order('naziv'); setKupci(k||[]);
94	        const {data: cat} = await supabase.from('katalog_proizvoda').select('*').order('sifra'); setKatalog(cat||[]);
95	        const {data: r} = await supabase.from('racuni').select('*').order('datum', { ascending: false }); setRacuni(r||[]);
96	        const { data: rn } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('id, kupac_naziv, status').neq('status', 'ZAVRŠENO');
97	        const { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('id, kupac_naziv, status').in('status', ['POTVRĐENA', 'REALIZOVANA ✅']);
98	        const { data: otp } = await supabase.from('otpremnice').select('id, kupac_naziv, status');
99	        setDostupniDokumenti([...(otp || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, kupac: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Otpremnica' })), ...(rn || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, kupac: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Radni Nalog' })), ...(pon || []).map(d => ({ id: d.id, kupac: d.kupac_naziv, tip: 'Ponuda' }))]);
100	    };
101	
102	    const zapisiU_Log = async (akcija, detalji) => { await supabase.from('sistem_audit_log').insert([{ korisnik: currentUser.ime_prezime || 'Nepoznat', akcija, detalji }]); };
103	
104	    const sinhronizujKasu = async (racunId, status, nacinPlacanja, kupacNaziv, ukupnoZaNaplatu) => {
105	        const { data: transakcije } = await supabase.from('blagajna').select('*').eq('racun_id', racunId);
106	        const uplate = (transakcije || []).filter(t => t.tip === 'ULAZ').reduce((acc, t) => acc + parseFloat(t.iznos), 0);
107	        const storna = (transakcije || []).filter(t => t.tip === 'IZLAZ' && t.kategorija === 'Storno Naplate').reduce((acc, t) => acc + parseFloat(t.iznos), 0);
108	        const netoUplaceno = uplate - storna;
109	        if (status === 'NAPLAĆENO' && nacinPlacanja === 'Gotovina') {
110	            const zaUplatu = ukupnoZaNaplatu - netoUplaceno;
111	            if (zaUplatu > 0) {
112	                await supabase.from('blagajna').insert([{ id: `KASA-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000)}`, tip: 'ULAZ', kategorija: 'Naplata Računa', iznos: parseFloat(zaUplatu.toFixed(2)), opis: `Automatska gotovinska naplata računa: ${racunId} (${kupacNaziv})`, racun_id: racunId, datum: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], vrijeme_tekst: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE'), snimio_korisnik: currentUser.ime_prezime || 'Sistem' }]);
113	                await zapisiU_Log('KASA_AUTO_UNOS', `Automatska gotovinska naplata za račun ${racunId}`);
114	            }
115	        } else {
116	            if (netoUplaceno > 0) {
117	                await supabase.from('blagajna').insert([{ id: `KASA-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000)}`, tip: 'IZLAZ', kategorija: 'Storno Naplate', iznos: parseFloat(netoUplaceno.toFixed(2)), opis: `STORNO: Poništena/Izmijenjena naplata računa: ${racunId} (${kupacNaziv})`, racun_id: racunId, datum: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], vrijeme_tekst: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('de-DE'), snimio_korisnik: currentUser.ime_prezime || 'Sistem' }]);
118	                await zapisiU_Log('KASA_STORNO', `Automatski storno u blagajni za račun ${racunId} (Stornirano: ${netoUplaceno} KM)`);
119	            }
120	        }
121	    };
122	
123	    const izracunajRabat = (proizvod, kupac) => {
124	        if(!kupac || !kupac.rabati_jsonb) return 0; const rabati = kupac.rabati_jsonb;
125	        if (rabati.proizvodi && rabati.proizvodi[proizvod.sifra]) return parseFloat(rabati.proizvodi[proizvod.sifra]);
126	        if (rabati.kategorije && rabati.kategorije[proizvod.kategorija]) return parseFloat(rabati.kategorije[proizvod.kategorija]);
127	        if (rabati.ukupni) return parseFloat(rabati.ukupni); return 0;
128	    };
129	
130	    const izracunajDinamickuCijenu = (proizvod, jm_cilj) => {
131	        if (!proizvod) return 0;
132	        const p_baza = parseFloat(proizvod.cijena) || 0; const jm_baza = (proizvod.default_jedinica || 'm3').toLowerCase(); const cilj = (jm_cilj || 'm3').toLowerCase();
133	        if (jm_baza === cilj) return p_baza;
134	        const v = (parseFloat(proizvod.visina) || 1) / 100; const s = (parseFloat(proizvod.sirina) || 1) / 100; const d = (parseFloat(proizvod.duzina) || 1) / 100;
135	        let faktor_baza = 1; if (jm_baza === 'm3') faktor_baza = v * s * d; else if (jm_baza === 'm2') faktor_baza = s * d; else if (jm_baza === 'm1') faktor_baza = d;
136	        const cijena_komad = p_baza * faktor_baza;
137	        let faktor_cilj = 1; if (cilj === 'm3') faktor_cilj = v * s * d; else if (cilj === 'm2') faktor_cilj = s * d; else if (cilj === 'm1') faktor_cilj = d;
138	        return cijena_komad / (faktor_cilj || 1);
139	    };
140	
141	    const izvrsiUcitavanjeDokumenta = async (dokument, broj, baznaPonuda, napomenaTekst) => {
142	        const kupacIzBaze = kupci.find(k => k.naziv === dokument.kupac_naziv); setOdabraniKupac(kupacIzBaze || null);
143	        const stavkeKolicine = dokument.stavke_jsonb || []; const stavkeFinansije = baznaPonuda ? (baznaPonuda.stavke_jsonb || []) : [];
144	        const konacneStavke = stavkeKolicine.map(sk => {
145	            const proizvod = katalog.find(k => k.sifra === sk.sifra);
146	            let cijena_baza = proizvod ? izracunajDinamickuCijenu(proizvod, sk.jm_obracun) : (sk.cijena_baza || 0);
147	            let rabat_procenat = proizvod && kupacIzBaze ? izracunajRabat(proizvod, kupacIzBaze) : 0;
148	            const nadjenoUPonudi = stavkeFinansije.find(sf => sf.sifra === sk.sifra);
149	            if (nadjenoUPonudi) { cijena_baza = nadjenoUPonudi.cijena_baza; rabat_procenat = nadjenoUPonudi.rabat_procenat; }
150	            const kolicina = sk.kolicina_obracun || sk.kolicina || 0;
151	            const ukupno_bez_rabata = kolicina * cijena_baza;
152	            const fiksna_cijena = cijena_baza - (cijena_baza * (rabat_procenat / 100));
153	            const ukupno = kolicina * fiksna_cijena;
154	            return { id: Math.random().toString(), sifra: sk.sifra, naziv: sk.naziv, kolicina_unos: sk.kolicina_unos || kolicina, jm_unos: sk.jm_unos || sk.jm_obracun || 'kom', kolicina_obracun: kolicina, jm_obracun: sk.jm_obracun || sk.jm || 'kom', cijena_baza, rabat_procenat, fiksna_cijena: fiksna_cijena.toFixed(2), iznos_rabata: ukupno_bez_rabata - ukupno, ukupno };
155	        });
156	        setForm({ ...form, kupac_naziv: dokument.kupac_naziv, broj_veze: broj, napomena: napomenaTekst, originalna_ponuda: baznaPonuda ? baznaPonuda.id : null }); setStavke(konacneStavke);
157	    };
158	
159	    const skenirajVezu = async (trazeniBroj) => {
160	        const broj = trazeniBroj.toUpperCase().trim(); if(!broj) return;
161	
162	        const { data: postojeciRacun } = await supabase.from('racuni').select('*').eq('broj_veze', broj).limit(1);
163	        if (postojeciRacun && postojeciRacun.length > 0) {
164	            prikaziDialog({
165	                tip: 'upozorenje',
166	                naslov: 'Račun već postoji!',
167	                poruka: `Za ovaj dokument je već izdat račun ${postojeciRacun[0].id}. Šta želite uraditi?`,
168	                confirmText: '🖨️ Isprintaj Kopiju',
169	                cancelText: '✏️ Uredi Račun',
170	                onConfirm: () => { 
171	                    setForm(postojeciRacun[0]); setStavke(postojeciRacun[0].stavke_jsonb); 
172	                    setTimeout(() => kreirajPDFPrivremeni(postojeciRacun[0], postojeciRacun[0].stavke_jsonb, parseFloat(postojeciRacun[0].ukupno_sa_pdv) > parseFloat(postojeciRacun[0].ukupno_bez_pdv)), 300); 
173	                    zatvoriDialog(); 
174	                },
175	                onCancel: () => { pokreniIzmjenu(postojeciRacun[0]); zatvoriDialog(); }
176	            });
177	            return;
178	        }
179	
180	        let dokument = null; let baznaPonuda = null; let napomenaTekst = `Povezano sa: ${broj}`;
181	        let { data: otp } = await supabase.from('otpremnice').select('*').eq('id', broj).maybeSingle();
182	        
183	        if (otp) {
184	            if (otp.status !== 'ISPORUČENO') { 
185	                return prikaziDialog({
186	                    tip: 'upozorenje',
187	                    naslov: 'Roba Nije Isporučena',
188	                    poruka: `Otpremnica ${broj} je u statusu "${otp.status}". Roba još uvijek nije fizički isporučena kupcu!\n\nDa li ste sigurni da želite unaprijed napraviti račun?`,
189	                    confirmText: '✅ Da, Napravi Račun',
190	                    cancelText: '✕ Prekini',
191	                    onConfirm: async () => { zatvoriDialog(); await obradiPovezaniDokument(otp, broj, true); },
192	                    onCancel: zatvoriDialog
193	                });
194	            } else {
195	                await obradiPovezaniDokument(otp, broj, true);
196	                return;
197	            }
198	        }
199	        
200	        if (!dokument) { let { data: rn } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('*').eq('id', broj).maybeSingle(); if (rn) { await obradiPovezaniDokument(rn, broj, false); return; } }
201	        if (!dokument) { let { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('*').eq('id', broj).maybeSingle(); if (pon) { dokument = pon; baznaPonuda = pon; await izvrsiUcitavanjeDokumenta(dokument, broj, baznaPonuda, napomenaTekst); return; } }
202	        
203	        if(!dokument) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: `Dokument ${broj} nije pronađen nigdje u bazi!`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
204	    };
205	
206	    const obradiPovezaniDokument = async (dok, broj, isOtp) => {
207	        let baznaPonuda = null; let napomenaTekst = `Povezano sa: ${broj}`;
208	        if (isOtp && dok.broj_veze) {
209	            let { data: rn } = await supabase.from('radni_nalozi').select('*').eq('id', dok.broj_veze).maybeSingle();
210	            if (rn) { napomenaTekst += ` -> ${dok.broj_veze}`; if (rn.broj_ponude) { let { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('*').eq('id', rn.broj_ponude).maybeSingle(); baznaPonuda = pon; napomenaTekst += ` -> ${rn.broj_ponude}`; } } 
211	            else { let { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('*').eq('id', dok.broj_veze).maybeSingle(); if(pon) { baznaPonuda = pon; napomenaTekst += ` -> ${dok.broj_veze}`; } }
212	        } else if (!isOtp && dok.broj_ponude) {
213	            let { data: pon } = await supabase.from('ponude').select('*').eq('id', dok.broj_ponude).maybeSingle(); baznaPonuda = pon; napomenaTekst += ` -> ${dok.broj_ponude}`;
214	        }
215	        await izvrsiUcitavanjeDokumenta(dok, broj, baznaPonuda, napomenaTekst);
216	        prikaziDialog({ tip: 'uspjeh', naslov: 'Učitano', poruka: `✅ Uspješno preuzeti podaci iz: ${broj}`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
217	    };
218	
219	    const dinamickaCijena = trenutniProizvod ? izracunajDinamickuCijenu(trenutniProizvod, stavkaForm.jm_obracun) : 0;
220	
221	    const handleProizvodSelect = (nadjeni) => {
222	        setTrenutniProizvod(nadjeni || null);
223	        if (nadjeni) {
224	            const tekstZaPolje = `${nadjeni.sifra} | ${nadjeni.naziv}`;
225	            const predlozeniRabat = izracunajRabat(nadjeni, odabraniKupac);
226	            const bazna = izracunajDinamickuCijenu(nadjeni, nadjeni.default_jedinica || 'm3');
227	            const predlozenaFiksna = bazna - (bazna * (predlozeniRabat / 100));
228	            setStavkaForm({ ...stavkaForm, id: null, sifra_unos: tekstZaPolje, jm_unos: 'kom', jm_obracun: nadjeni.default_jedinica || 'm3', sistemski_rabat: predlozeniRabat, konacni_rabat: predlozeniRabat, fiksna_cijena: predlozenaFiksna.toFixed(2) });
229	        }
230	    };
231	
232	    useEffect(() => {
233	        if(trenutniProizvod) {
234	            const rabat = parseFloat(stavkaForm.konacni_rabat) || 0;
235	            const novaFiksna = dinamickaCijena - (dinamickaCijena * (rabat/100));
236	            setStavkaForm(prev => ({...prev, fiksna_cijena: novaFiksna.toFixed(2)}));
237	        }
238	    }, [stavkaForm.jm_obracun]);
239	
240	    useEffect(() => {
241	        if(!trenutniProizvod || !stavkaForm.kolicina_unos) return;
242	        const kol = parseFloat(stavkaForm.kolicina_unos); let obracun = kol;
243	        if (stavkaForm.jm_unos === 'kom' && stavkaForm.jm_obracun !== 'kom') {
244	            const v = parseFloat(trenutniProizvod.visina) || 1; const s = parseFloat(trenutniProizvod.sirina) || 1; const d = parseFloat(trenutniProizvod.duzina) || 1;
245	            if (stavkaForm.jm_obracun === 'm3') obracun = kol * (v/100) * (s/100) * (d/100);
246	            if (stavkaForm.jm_obracun === 'm2') obracun = kol * (s/100) * (d/100);
247	            if (stavkaForm.jm_obracun === 'm1') obracun = kol * (d/100);
248	        }
249	        setStavkaForm(prev => ({...prev, kolicina_obracun: obracun > 0 ? obracun.toFixed(4) : kol}));
250	    }, [stavkaForm.kolicina_unos, stavkaForm.jm_unos, stavkaForm.jm_obracun, trenutniProizvod]);
251	
252	    const dodajStavku = async () => {
253	        if(!trenutniProizvod || !stavkaForm.kolicina_obracun) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fale podaci', poruka: "Odaberite proizvod i unesite količinu!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
254	        if(!odabraniKupac) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Fale podaci', poruka: "Prvo odaberite kupca!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
255	        
256	        const kolicina = parseFloat(stavkaForm.kolicina_obracun);
257	        const fiksna_cijena = parseFloat(stavkaForm.fiksna_cijena) || dinamickaCijena;
258	        const ukupno_bez_rabata = kolicina * dinamickaCijena;
259	        const ukupno_sa_rabatom = kolicina * fiksna_cijena;
260	        const iznos_rabata = ukupno_bez_rabata - ukupno_sa_rabatom;
261	        const rabat_konacni = dinamickaCijena > 0 ? ((dinamickaCijena - fiksna_cijena) / dinamickaCijena) * 100 : 0;
262	
263	        const novaStavka = {
264	            id: stavkaForm.id || Math.random().toString(), sifra: trenutniProizvod.sifra, naziv: trenutniProizvod.naziv,
265	            kolicina_unos: parseFloat(stavkaForm.kolicina_unos), jm_unos: stavkaForm.jm_unos, kolicina_obracun: kolicina, jm_obracun: stavkaForm.jm_obracun,
266	            cijena_baza: dinamickaCijena, rabat_procenat: rabat_konacni.toFixed(2), fiksna_cijena: fiksna_cijena.toFixed(2), iznos_rabata, ukupno: ukupno_sa_rabatom
267	        };
268	        if (stavkaForm.id) setStavke(supabase => stavke.map(s => s.id === stavkaForm.id ? novaStavka : s)); else setStavke([...stavke, novaStavka]);
269	        setStavkaForm({ id: null, sifra_unos: '', kolicina_unos: '', jm_unos: 'kom', kolicina_obracun: '', jm_obracun: 'm3', sistemski_rabat: 0, konacni_rabat: '', fiksna_cijena: '' }); setTrenutniProizvod(null);
270	    };
271	
272	    const urediStavku = (stavka) => {
273	        const nadjeni = katalog.find(k => k.sifra === stavka.sifra); setTrenutniProizvod(nadjeni || null);
274	        const tekstZaPolje = nadjeni ? `${nadjeni.sifra} | ${nadjeni.naziv}` : stavka.sifra;
275	        setStavkaForm({ id: stavka.id, sifra_unos: tekstZaPolje, kolicina_unos: stavka.kolicina_unos, jm_unos: stavka.jm_unos, kolicina_obracun: stavka.kolicina_obracun, jm_obracun: stavka.jm_obracun, sistemski_rabat: izracunajRabat(nadjeni, odabraniKupac), konacni_rabat: stavka.rabat_procenat, fiksna_cijena: stavka.fiksna_cijena });
276	    };
277	
278	    const ukloniStavku = (id) => setStavke(stavke.filter(s => s.id !== id));
279	
280	    const totals = useMemo(() => {
281	        let suma_bez_rabata = 0, suma_rabata = 0, suma_krajnja = 0;
282	        stavke.forEach(s => { suma_bez_rabata += (s.kolicina_obracun * s.cijena_baza); suma_rabata += s.iznos_rabata; suma_krajnja += s.ukupno; });
283	        const pdv = form.ukljuciPDV ? suma_krajnja * 0.17 : 0;
284	        return { bez_rabata: suma_bez_rabata.toFixed(2), rabat: suma_rabata.toFixed(2), osnovica: suma_krajnja.toFixed(2), pdv: pdv.toFixed(2), za_naplatu: (suma_krajnja + pdv).toFixed(2) };
285	    }, [stavke, form.ukljuciPDV]);
286	
287	    const snimiRacun = async () => {
288	        if(!form.kupac_naziv) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Kupac je obavezan', poruka: "Morate odabrati kupca da biste snimili račun.", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
289	        if(stavke.length === 0) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'upozorenje', naslov: 'Nema stavki', poruka: "Račun mora imati barem jednu stavku!", onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
290	
291	        if (!isEditing && form.broj_veze) {
292	            const { data: postojece } = await supabase.from('racuni').select('id').eq('broj_veze', form.broj_veze).limit(1);
293	            if (postojece && postojece.length > 0) {
294	                return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Duplikat', poruka: `Za dokument ${form.broj_veze} je VEĆ KREIRAN RAČUN (${postojece[0].id})!\nNije dozvoljeno kreiranje duplih računa.`, onCancel: zatvoriDialog });
295	            }
296	        }
297	
298	        const payload = {
299	            id: form.id.toUpperCase(), broj_veze: form.broj_veze, kupac_naziv: form.kupac_naziv, datum: form.datum, rok_placanja: form.rok_placanja, nacin_placanja: form.nacin_placanja, valuta: form.valuta, napomena: form.napomena, stavke_jsonb: stavke, status: form.status,
300	            ukupno_bez_pdv: parseFloat(totals.osnovica), ukupno_rabat: parseFloat(totals.rabat), ukupno_sa_pdv: parseFloat(totals.za_naplatu), snimio_korisnik: currentUser.ime_prezime
301	        };
302	        
303	        if (isEditing) {
304	            const { error } = await supabase.from('racuni').update(payload).eq('id', form.id);
305	            if(error) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog }); 
306	            await zapisiU_Log('IZMJENA_RACUNA', `Ažuriran račun ${form.id}`); 
307	        } else {
308	            const { error } = await supabase.from('racuni').insert([payload]);
309	            if(error) return prikaziDialog({ tip: 'greska', naslov: 'Greška', poruka: error.message, onCancel: zatvoriDialog }); 
310	            
311	            if (form.originalna_ponuda) { await supabase.from('ponude').update({ status: 'REALIZOVANA ✅' }).eq('id', form.originalna_ponuda); await zapisiU_Log('ZATVARANJE_PONUDE', `Ponuda ${form.originalna_ponuda} zatvorena kreiranjem računa ${form.id}`); }
312	            await zapisiU_Log('KREIRAN_RACUN', `Račun ${form.id} za ${form.kupac_naziv}`); 
313	        }
314	        await sinhronizujKasu(form.id, form.status, form.nacin_placanja, form.kupac_naziv, parseFloat(totals.za_naplatu));
315	        
316	        resetFormu(); load(); setTab('otvoreni');
317	
318	        prikaziDialog({
319	            tip: 'uspjeh',
320	            naslov: isEditing ? "Ažurirano!" : "Račun Kreiran!",
321	            poruka: "Račun je uspješno pohranjen u bazu. Želite li isprintati PDF?",
322	            confirmText: '🖨️ DA, ISPRINTAJ PDF',
323	            cancelText: '✕ ZATVORI',
324	            onConfirm: () => { kreirajPDFPrivremeni(payload, payload.stavke_jsonb, parseFloat(payload.ukupno_sa_pdv) > parseFloat(payload.ukupno_bez_pdv)); zatvoriDialog(); },
325	            onCancel: zatvoriDialog
326	        });
327	    };
328	
329	    const kreirajPDF = async () => { await kreirajPDFPrivremeni(form, stavke, form.ukljuciPDV); };
330	
331	    const kreirajPDFPrivremeni = async (podaci, stavkeZaPrint, imaPDV) => {
332	        let parentId = podaci.broj_veze || podaci.id;
333	        
334	        if (parentId && parentId.startsWith('OTP-')) {
335	            const {data: otp} = await supabase.from('otpremnice').select('broj_veze').eq('id', parentId).maybeSingle();
336	            if (otp && otp.broj_veze) {
337	                parentId = otp.broj_veze;
338	                if (parentId.startsWith('IZD-')) {
339	                    const {data: izd} = await supabase.from('izdatnice').select('izvor_id').eq('broj_izdatnice', parentId).maybeSingle();
340	                    if (izd && izd.izvor_id) parentId = izd.izvor_id;
341	                }
342	            }
343	        }
344	
345	        const { data: paks } = await supabase.from('paketi').select('paket_id, naziv_proizvoda').eq('broj_veze', parentId);
346	        let paketiPrikaz = {};
347	        if (paks) {
348	            paks.forEach(p => {
349	                if (!paketiPrikaz[p.naziv_proizvoda]) paketiPrikaz[p.naziv_proizvoda] = [];
350	                paketiPrikaz[p.naziv_proizvoda].push(p.paket_id);
351	            });
352	        }
353	
354	        const odabraniKupac = kupci.find(k => k.naziv === podaci.kupac_naziv) || null;
355	        let redovi = stavkeZaPrint.map((s, i) => {
356	            const kat = katalog.find(k => k.sifra === s.sifra);
357	            const dimenzije = kat ? `${kat.visina}x${kat.sirina}x${kat.duzina}` : '';
358	            const paketiStr = paketiPrikaz[s.naziv] && paketiPrikaz[s.naziv].length > 0 ? `<br/><span style="color: #3b82f6; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold;">📦 Sadrži pakete: ${paketiPrikaz[s.naziv].join(', ')}</span>` : '';
359	            
360	            return `
361	            <tr>
362	                <td style="font-weight: bold; color: #64748b; text-align: center;">${i+1}.</td>
363	                <td><b style="color: #0f172a; font-size: 13px;">${dimenzije ? `${dimenzije} | ` : ''}${s.naziv}</b><br/><span style="color: #64748b; font-size: 11px;">Šifra: ${s.sifra}</span>${paketiStr}</td>
364	                <td style="text-align: center; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">${s.kolicina_obracun} <span style="color: #64748b; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;">${s.jm_obracun}</span></td>
365	                <td style="text-align: right; font-weight: 600;">${s.cijena_baza.toFixed(2)}</td>
366	                <td style="text-align: right; color: #ec4899; font-weight: 800;">${s.rabat_procenat > 0 ? s.rabat_procenat + '%' : '-'}</td>
367	                <td style="text-align: right; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; font-size: 13px;">${s.ukupno.toFixed(2)}</td>
368	            </tr>
369	        `}).join('');
370	
371	        const htmlSadrzajTabela = `
372	            <div class="info-grid">
373	                <div class="info-col">
374	                    <h4>Kupac / Primalac usluge</h4>
375	                    <p style="font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 5px;">${podaci.kupac_naziv}</p>
376	                    <p style="font-weight: 400; color: #475569;">${odabraniKupac?.adresa || ''}</p>
377	                    <p style="font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 6px;">PDV / ID: ${odabraniKupac?.pdv_broj || 'N/A'}</p>
378	                </div>
379	                <div class="info-col" style="text-align: right;">
380	                    <h4>Detalji Računa</h4>
381	                    <p>Vezni Dokument: <span style="font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a;">${podaci.broj_veze || '-'}</span></p>
382	                    <p>Plaćanje: <span style="font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a;">${podaci.nacin_placanja}</span></p>
383	                    <p style="color: #ef4444; margin-top: 8px; font-weight: 800;">Rok plaćanja: ${formatirajDatum(podaci.rok_placanja)}</p>
384	                </div>
385	            </div>
386	            <table>
387	                <thead><tr><th style="width: 5%; text-align: center;">R.B.</th><th>Dimenzija i Naziv Proizvoda</th><th style="text-align:center;">Količina</th><th style="text-align:right;">Cijena</th><th style="text-align:right;">Rabat</th><th style="text-align:right;">Ukupno (${podaci.valuta})</th></tr></thead>
388	                <tbody>${redovi}</tbody>
389	            </table>
390	            <div class="summary-box">
391	                <div class="summary-row"><span>Iznos bez rabata:</span> <b>${podaci.ukupno_bez_pdv}</b></div>
392	                ${parseFloat(podaci.ukupno_rabat) > 0 ? `<div class="summary-row"><span style="color: #ec4899; font-weight: bold;">Uračunati rabat:</span> <b style="color: #ec4899;">- ${podaci.ukupno_rabat}</b></div>` : ''}
393	                ${imaPDV ? `
394	                <div class="summary-row"><span>Osnovica za PDV:</span> <b>${podaci.ukupno_bez_pdv}</b></div>
395	                <div class="summary-row"><span>PDV iznos (17%):</span> <b>${(parseFloat(podaci.ukupno_sa_pdv) - parseFloat(podaci.ukupno_bez_pdv)).toFixed(2)}</b></div>
396	                <div class="summary-total"><span style="font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 1px; padding-top:4px;">ZA NAPLATU SA PDV:</span><span>${podaci.ukupno_sa_pdv} ${podaci.valuta}</span></div>
397	                ` : `
398	                <div class="summary-total"><span style="font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 1px; padding-top:4px;">UKUPNO ZA NAPLATU:</span><span>${podaci.ukupno_sa_pdv} ${podaci.valuta}</span></div>
399	                `}
400	            </div>
401	            <div class="footer"><div style="width: 100%;"><b style="color: #0f172a;">Napomena uz račun:</b><br/>${podaci.napomena || 'Zahvaljujemo se na povjerenju.'}</div></div>
402	        `;
403	        printDokument('RAČUN', podaci.id, formatirajDatum(podaci.datum), htmlSadrzajTabela, '#ef4444');
404	    };
405	
406	    const resetFormu = () => { setForm({ id: generisiID(), broj_veze: '', kupac_naziv: '', datum: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], rok_placanja: new Date(new Date().setDate(new Date().getDate() + 15)).toISOString().split('T')[0], nacin_placanja: 'Virmanski', valuta: 'KM', napomena: '', status: 'NENAPLAĆENO', originalna_ponuda: null, ukljuciPDV: true }); setStavke([]); setIsEditing(false); setOdabraniKupac(null); setStavkaForm({ id: null, sifra_unos: '', kolicina_unos: '', jm_unos: 'kom', kolicina_obracun: '', jm_obracun: 'm3', sistemski_rabat: 0, konacni_rabat: '', fiksna_cijena: '' }); };
407	    
408	    const pokreniIzmjenu = (r) => { 
409	        const ukljuciPDV = parseFloat(r.ukupno_sa_pdv) > parseFloat(r.ukupno_bez_pdv);
410	        setForm({ id: r.id, broj_veze: r.broj_veze || '', kupac_naziv: r.kupac_naziv, datum: r.datum, rok_placanja: r.rok_placanja || '', nacin_placanja: r.nacin_placanja || 'Virmanski', valuta: r.valuta || 'KM', napomena: r.napomena || '', status: r.status || 'NENAPLAĆENO', originalna_ponuda: null, ukljuciPDV }); setStavke(r.stavke_jsonb || []); setOdabraniKupac(kupci.find(k => k.naziv === r.kupac_naziv) || null); setIsEditing(true); setTab('novi'); window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); 
411	    };
412	    const promijeniStatusBrzo = async (r, noviStatus) => { await supabase.from('racuni').update({ status: noviStatus }).eq('id', r.id); await zapisiU_Log('STATUS_RACUNA', `Račun ${r.id} prebačen u ${noviStatus}`); await sinhronizujKasu(r.id, noviStatus, r.nacin_placanja, r.kupac_naziv, r.ukupno_sa_pdv); load(); };
413	    
414	    const neplaceni = racuni.filter(r => r.status === 'NENAPLAĆENO'); const placeni = racuni.filter(r => r.status === 'NAPLAĆENO');
415	
416	    const renderPoljeHeader = (polje) => {
417	        if (polje.id === 'veza') return <input value={form.broj_veze} onChange={e=>setForm({...form, broj_veze:e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-4 bg-theme-card rounded-xl text-theme-text outline-none border border-theme-border uppercase focus:border-red-500 shadow-inner" placeholder="Nema veze" />;
418	        if (polje.id === 'broj') return <input value={form.id} disabled className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-theme-text border border-theme-border font-black disabled:opacity-50" />;
419	        if (polje.id === 'kupac') return (
420	            <div className="flex gap-2 items-center w-full h-full">
421	                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 h-full">
422	                    <MasterSearch data={kupci} poljaZaPretragu={['naziv']} value={form.kupac_naziv} onSelect={k => {setForm({...form, kupac_naziv: k.naziv}); setOdabraniKupac(k);}} placeholder="Odaberi kupca..." />
423	                </div>
424	                {hasKupacEdit && <button onClick={() => setShowBrziKupac(true)} className="bg-theme-accent hover:opacity-80 text-theme-text px-3 h-full min-h-[45px] rounded-xl shadow-lg shrink-0 text-[10px] font-black">➕ NOVI</button>}
425	            </div>
426	        );
427	        if (polje.id === 'datum') return <input type="date" value={form.datum} onChange={e=>setForm({...form, datum:e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-red-500 shadow-inner" />;
428	        if (polje.id === 'rok') return <input type="date" value={form.rok_placanja} onChange={e=>setForm({...form, rok_placanja:e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text border border-theme-border outline-none focus:border-red-500 shadow-inner" />;
429	        if (polje.id === 'valuta') return <select value={form.valuta} onChange={e=>setForm({...form, valuta:e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-4 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text outline-none border border-theme-border focus:border-red-500 shadow-inner"><option value="KM">KM</option><option value="EUR">EUR</option></select>;
430	        if (polje.id === 'status') return <select value={form.status} onChange={e=>setForm({...form, status:e.target.value})} className="w-full h-full min-h-[45px] p-4 bg-red-900/20 rounded-xl text-xs text-red-400 font-black border border-red-500/50 outline-none"><option value="NENAPLAĆENO">Nenaplaćeno</option><option value="NAPLAĆENO">NAPLAĆENO</option></select>;
431	        if (polje.id === 'placanje') return (
432	            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 h-full">
433	                <select value={form.nacin_placanja} onChange={e => { const val = e.target.value; setForm({...form, nacin_placanja: val, ukljuciPDV: val === 'Virmanski'}); }} className="w-full p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text outline-none border border-theme-border focus:border-red-500 shadow-inner cursor-pointer">
434	                    <option value="Virmanski">Virmanski (Uključuje PDV)</option><option value="Gotovina">Gotovina (BEZ PDV-a)</option><option value="Kartica">Kartica</option>
435	                </select>
436	                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-[10px] uppercase font-black text-slate-400 pl-1">
437	                    <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer hover:text-white"><input type="radio" name="pdv_racun" checked={form.ukljuciPDV} onChange={() => setForm({...form, ukljuciPDV: true})} /> + Obračunaj PDV</label>
438	                    <label className="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer hover:text-white"><input type="radio" name="pdv_racun" checked={!form.ukljuciPDV} onChange={() => setForm({...form, ukljuciPDV: false})} /> Bez PDV-a</label>
439	                </div>
440	            </div>
441	        );
442	        return null;
443	    };
444	
445	    return (
446	        <div className="p-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto space-y-6 font-bold animate-in fade-in">
447	            <MasterHeader header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={onExit} color="text-red-500" user={user} modulIme="računi" saas={saas} />
448	            
449	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
450	
451	            <div className="flex bg-theme-panel p-1.5 rounded-2xl border border-theme-border shadow-inner">
452	                <button onClick={() => {setTab('novi'); if(!isEditing) resetFormu();}} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all ${tab === 'novi' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-theme-text'}`}>{isEditing ? '✏️ Ažuriranje Računa' : '➕ Kreiraj Račun'}</button>
453	                <button onClick={() => setTab('otvoreni')} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${tab === 'otvoreni' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-theme-text'}`}>⏳ Otvoreni Računi <span className="bg-black/30 text-white px-2 rounded-box">{neplaceni.length}</span></button>
454	                <button onClick={() => setTab('arhiva')} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase font-black transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${tab === 'arhiva' ? 'bg-theme-accent text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-theme-muted hover:bg-theme-card hover:text-theme-text'}`}>🔐 Arhiva (Naplaćeno) <span className="bg-black/30 text-white px-2 rounded-box">{placeni.length}</span></button>
455	            </div>
456	            
457	            {tab === 'novi' ? (
458	                <div className="space-y-4 animate-in slide-in-from-left max-w-4xl mx-auto">
459	                    {showBrziKupac && (<div className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] bg-[#090e17]/95 flex flex-col p-4 overflow-y-auto backdrop-blur-md animate-in fade-in"><SettingsModule onExit={() => { setShowBrziKupac(false); load(); }} lockedTab="kupci" /></div>)}
460	                    {showBrziKatalog && (<div className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] bg-[#090e17]/95 flex flex-col p-4 overflow-y-auto backdrop-blur-md animate-in fade-in"><SettingsModule onExit={() => { setShowBrziKatalog(false); load(); }} lockedTab="katalog" /></div>)}
461	                    
462	                    {!isEditing && (
463	                        <div className="bg-theme-card border border-red-500/50 p-6 rounded-box shadow-2xl relative z-[60]">
464	                            <label className="text-[10px] text-red-400 uppercase font-black block mb-2 ml-2">Pametni unos (Skeniraj OTP, RN ili PON)</label>
465	                            <MasterSearch 
466	                                data={dostupniDokumenti} 
467	                                poljaZaPretragu={['id', 'kupac']} 
468	                                onSelect={(d) => skenirajVezu(d.id)} 
469	                                placeholder="Skeniraj ili ukucaj broj (npr. OTP-123)..."
470	                                renderItem={(item) => (
471	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center w-full">
472	                                        <div><span className="text-theme-text font-black">{item.id}</span> <span className="text-[10px] text-red-300 ml-2 font-bold">{item.tip}</span></div>
473	                                        <div className="text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold">{item.kupac}</div>
474	                                    </div>
475	                                )}
476	                            />
477	                        </div>
478	                    )}
479	
480	                    <div className={`p-6 rounded-box border-2 shadow-2xl space-y-4 transition-all relative z-[40] ${saas.isEditMode ? 'border-dashed border-amber-500 bg-black/20' : (isEditing ? 'border-amber-500/50 bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)]' : 'border-red-500/30 bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)]')}`} >
481	                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
482	                            <h3 className={`${isEditing ? 'text-amber-500' : saas.ui.boja_naslova} font-black uppercase text-xs`}>1. Parametri Računa</h3>
483	                            {isEditing && <button onClick={resetFormu} className="text-[10px] bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 px-3 py-1 rounded-xl uppercase hover:bg-red-900/50 transition-all">Odustani od izmjena ✕</button>}
484	                        </div>
485	                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 border-b border-theme-border pb-4 items-start">
486	                            {aktivnaPolja.map((polje, index) => (
487	                                <div key={polje.id} className={`relative flex flex-col ${polje.span} transition-all ${saas.isEditMode ? 'border-2 border-dashed border-amber-500 p-2 rounded-xl bg-black/20 resize overflow-auto' : ''}`} style={{ maxWidth: '100%', ...(saas.isEditMode ? { minWidth: '100px', minHeight: '80px' } : {}), width: polje.customWidth || undefined, height: polje.customHeight || undefined }} draggable={saas.isEditMode} onDragStart={(e) => handleDragStart(e, index)} onDragEnter={(e) => handleDragEnter(e, index)} onDragEnd={handleDrop} onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()} onMouseUp={(e) => spremiDimenzije(e, index)}>
488	                                    {saas.isEditMode && (<div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 shrink-0"><span className="text-[9px] text-amber-500 uppercase font-black cursor-move">☰</span><button onClick={() => toggleVelicinaPolja(index)} className="text-[8px] text-amber-500 font-black bg-amber-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded">ŠIRINA: {polje.span==='col-span-4'?'100%':polje.span==='col-span-2'?'50%':'25%'}</button></div>)}
489	                                    {saas.isEditMode ? (<input value={polje.label} onChange={(e) => updatePolje(index, 'label', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-theme-card text-amber-400 p-1 mb-1 rounded border border-amber-500/50 text-[8px] uppercase font-black text-center shrink-0" placeholder="Naslov polja" />) : (polje.label && <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1 shrink-0">{polje.label}</label>)}
490	                                    <div className={`flex-1 ${saas.isEditMode ? 'opacity-50 pointer-events-none' : ''}`}>{renderPoljeHeader(polje)}</div>
491	                                </div>
492	                            ))}
493	                        </div>
494	                    </div>
495	
496	                    <div className="bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-box border border-theme-border shadow-2xl space-y-4 relative z-[30]">
497	                        <h3 className="text-blue-500 font-black uppercase text-xs mb-4">2. Dinamički dodaj / uredi stavke</h3>
498	                        <div className="relative z-40 mb-3">
499	                            <label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1">Pronađi proizvod za dodavanje</label>
500	                            <div className="flex gap-2 items-center w-full">
501	                                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
502	                                    <MasterSearch 
503	                                        data={katalog} 
504	                                        poljaZaPretragu={['sifra', 'naziv']} 
505	                                        value={stavkaForm.sifra_unos}
506	                                        onSelect={handleProizvodSelect} 
507	                                        placeholder="Pronađi proizvod..."
508	                                        renderItem={(k) => (
509	                                            <div>
510	                                                <div className="text-theme-text text-xs font-black">{k.visina}x{k.sirina}x{k.duzina} | {k.naziv} <span className="text-red-400 ml-2">(Šifra: {k.sifra})</span></div>
511	                                                <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase">Kat: {k.kategorija} | Baza: {k.default_jedinica}</div>
512	                                            </div>
513	                                        )}
514	                                    />
515	                                </div>
516	                                {hasKatalogEdit && <button onClick={() => setShowBrziKatalog(true)} className="bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 text-theme-text px-3 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg shrink-0 text-[10px] font-black">➕ NOVI</button>}
517	                            </div>
518	                        </div>
519	
520	                        {trenutniProizvod && (
521	                            <div className="p-4 bg-blue-900/10 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-2xl animate-in zoom-in-95 space-y-4 shadow-inner">
522	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-theme-border pb-3">
523	                                    <div><p className="text-theme-text text-sm font-black">{trenutniProizvod.visina}x{trenutniProizvod.sirina}x{trenutniProizvod.duzina} | {trenutniProizvod.naziv}</p><p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400">Šifra: {trenutniProizvod.sifra}</p></div>
524	                                    <div className="text-right"><p className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase">Cijena po {stavkaForm.jm_obracun}</p><p className="text-red-400 font-black text-lg">{dinamickaCijena.toFixed(2)} {form.valuta}</p></div>
525	                                </div>
526	                                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 items-end">
527	                                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
528	                                        <div className="col-span-2"><label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1">Količina i Jedinica (Unos)</label><div className="flex gap-1"><input type="number" value={stavkaForm.kolicina_unos} onChange={e=>setStavkaForm({...stavkaForm, kolicina_unos:e.target.value})} placeholder="0" className="flex-1 p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-sm text-theme-text font-black text-center outline-none border border-red-500/50 shadow-inner" /><select value={stavkaForm.jm_unos} onChange={e=>setStavkaForm({...stavkaForm, jm_unos:e.target.value})} className="w-20 p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text outline-none border border-theme-border shadow-inner uppercase cursor-pointer"><option value="kom">kom</option><option value="m3">m³</option><option value="m2">m²</option><option value="m1">m1</option></select></div></div>
529	                                        <div className="col-span-2"><label className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1">Količina (Obračun po)</label><div className="flex gap-1"><input type="number" value={stavkaForm.kolicina_obracun} readOnly className="flex-1 p-3 bg-theme-panel/50 rounded-xl text-sm text-slate-400 font-black text-center border border-theme-border outline-none cursor-not-allowed" /><select value={stavkaForm.jm_obracun} onChange={e=>setStavkaForm({...stavkaForm, jm_obracun:e.target.value})} className="w-20 p-3 bg-theme-panel rounded-xl text-xs text-theme-text outline-none border border-theme-border shadow-inner uppercase cursor-pointer"><option value="m3">m³</option><option value="m2">m²</option><option value="m1">m1</option><option value="kom">kom</option></select></div></div>
530	                                    </div>
531	                                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 bg-black/20 p-3 rounded-xl border border-theme-border">
532	                                        <div>
533	                                            <label className="text-[8px] text-emerald-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1 font-black">Konačna Cijena</label>
534	                                            <input type="number" value={stavkaForm.fiksna_cijena} onChange={e => { const val = e.target.value; const cijena = parseFloat(val) || 0; const rabat = dinamickaCijena > 0 ? ((dinamickaCijena - cijena) / dinamickaCijena) * 100 : 0; setStavkaForm({...stavkaForm, fiksna_cijena: val, konacni_rabat: rabat.toFixed(2)}); }} className="w-full p-3 bg-emerald-900/20 rounded-xl text-sm text-emerald-400 font-black text-center outline-none border border-emerald-500/50 shadow-inner" />
535	                                        </div>
536	                                        <div>
537	                                            <label className="text-[8px] text-pink-500 uppercase ml-2 block mb-1 font-black">Ili Popust %</label>
538	                                            <input type="number" value={stavkaForm.konacni_rabat} onChange={e => { const val = e.target.value; const rabat = parseFloat(val) || 0; const cijena = dinamickaCijena - (dinamickaCijena * (rabat / 100)); setStavkaForm({...stavkaForm, konacni_rabat: val, fiksna_cijena: cijena.toFixed(2)}); }} className="w-full p-3 bg-pink-900/20 rounded-xl text-sm text-pink-400 font-black text-center outline-none border border-pink-500/50 shadow-inner" />
539	                                        </div>
540	                                    </div>
541	                                </div>
542	                                <button onClick={dodajStavku} className={`w-full py-4 text-theme-text font-black rounded-xl text-xs shadow-lg uppercase mt-2 transition-all ${stavkaForm.id ? 'bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500'}`}>{stavkaForm.id ? '✅ Ažuriraj ovu stavku' : '➕ Dodaj stavku na račun'}</button>
543	                            </div>
544	                        )}
545	                    </div>
546	
547	                    {stavke.length > 0 && (

Konačni obračun</h3><button onClick={kreirajPDF} className="bg-theme-panel text-theme-text px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-[10px] uppercase font-black border border-slate-600 hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all shadow-md">🖨️ Kreiraj PDF</button></div>
550	                            <div className="space-y-2 mb-6">
551	                                {stavke.map((s, i) => {

553	                                    const dim = katItem ? `${katItem.visina}x${katItem.sirina}x${katItem.duzina}` : '';
554	                                    return (

556	                                        {s.rabat_procenat > 0 && <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 h-full w-1 bg-pink-500"></div>}
557	                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3"><div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-box bg-theme-panel text-slate-400 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-black">{i+1}</div><div><p className="text-theme-text text-xs font-black">{dim ? `${dim} | ` : ''}{s.naziv}</p><p className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase mt-1">Šifra: {s.sifra} <span className="mx-2">|</span> Kol: <b className="text-theme-text">{s.kolicina_obracun} {s.jm_obracun}</b> x {s.fiksna_cijena} {form.valuta}</p></div></div>
558	                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4"><div className="text-right">{s.rabat_procenat > 0 && <p className="text-[9px] text-pink-500 font-bold line-through">{(s.kolicina_obracun * s.cijena_baza).toFixed(2)}</p>}<p className="text-red-400 font-black text-sm">{s.ukupno.toFixed(2)} {form.valuta} {s.rabat_procenat > 0 && <span className="text-pink-500 text-[8px] ml-1">(-{s.rabat_procenat}%)</span>}</p></div><button onClick={(e)=>{e.stopPropagation(); ukloniStavku(s.id);}} className="text-red-500 font-black p-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-red-500/20 rounded-lg transition-all">✕</button></div>
559	                                    </div>
560	                                )})}
561	                            </div>

'bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.4)]' : 'bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500'}`}>{isEditing ? '✅ Snimi izmjene računa' : '🏁 ZAKLJUČI I KREIRAJ RAČUN'}</button>
575	                        </div>
576	                    )}
577	                </div>
578	            ) : (
579	                <div className="animate-in slide-in-from-right max-w-5xl mx-auto">
580	                    {tab === 'otvoreni' && (
581	                        <div className="bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-box border border-red-500/30 shadow-2xl w-full">

583	                            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 max-h-[600px] overflow-y-auto pr-2">
584	                                {neplaceni.length === 0 && <p className="text-center text-slate-500 text-xs col-span-full py-10 border-2 border-dashed border-theme-border rounded-box">Nema otvorenih računa.</p>}

588	                                            <div><p className="text-theme-text text-base font-black">{r.id}</p><p className="text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold mt-1 uppercase">{r.kupac_naziv}</p></div>

590	                                        </div>
591	                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2">
592	                                            <button onClick={()=>promijeniStatusBrzo(r, 'NAPLAĆENO')} className="text-[9px] text-theme-text font-black bg-emerald-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-all shadow-md">Označi kao naplaćeno 💰</button>
593	                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">

'bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30' : 'bg-blue-900/30 text-theme-accent border border-blue-500/30'}`}>{r.nacin_placanja}</span>
595	                                                <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 font-bold">Veza: {r.broj_veze || '-'}</span>
596	                                            </div>
597	                                        </div>
598	                                    </div>
599	                                ))}
600	                            </div>
601	                        </div>
602	                    )}
603	                    {tab === 'arhiva' && (
604	                        <div className="bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] p-6 rounded-box border border-emerald-500/30 shadow-2xl w-full">
605	                            <h3 className="text-emerald-500 font-black uppercase text-xs mb-4 flex justify-between"><span>✅ NAPLAĆENO (ARHIVA)</span></h3>

608	                                {placeni.map(r => (
609	                                    <div key={r.id} className="p-5 bg-theme-card border border-emerald-500/20 rounded-box cursor-pointer hover:border-emerald-500 transition-all shadow-lg group">

611	                                            <div><p className="text-theme-text text-base font-black">{r.id}</p><p className="text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold mt-1 uppercase">{r.kupac_naziv}</p></div>
612	                                            <div className="text-right"><p className="text-emerald-400 font-black text-lg">{r.ukupno_sa_pdv} {r.valuta}</p><p className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 uppercase mt-1">Izdano: {formatirajDatum(r.datum)}</p></div>
613	                                        </div>
614	                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2">
615	                                            <button onClick={()=>promijeniStatusBrzo(r, 'NENAPLAĆENO')} className="text-[9px] text-slate-400 bg-theme-panel px-4 py-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-red-900/50 hover:text-red-400 transition-all border border-theme-border">Vrati u dugovanje ↩</button>
616	                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
617	                                                <span className={`text-[9px] font-black uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded-lg bg-emerald-900/40 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30`}>{r.nacin_placanja}</span>
618	                                                <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 font-bold">Veza: {r.broj_veze || '-'}</span>
619	                                            </div>
620	                                        </div>
621	                                    </div>
622	                                ))}
623	                            </div>
624	                        </div>
625	                    )}
626	                </div>
627	            )}
628	        </div>
629	    );
630	}
