                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">Width mm</span></div><div class="box">${item.sirina}</div></div>
                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">Length mm</span></div><div class="box">${item.duzina * 10}</div></div>
                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">PCS</span></div><div class="box">${pcs}</div></div>
                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">Volume (m³)</span></div><div class="box">${item.kolicina_final}</div></div>
            </div>
        `;
    }).join('');

    const html = `
        <html>
        <head>
            <title>Deklaracija ${paketId}</title>
            <style>
                @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;700;900&display=swap');
                @page { size: 210mm 148mm landscape; margin: 0; }
                html, body { 
                    margin: 0 !important; 
                    padding: 0 !important; 
                    background: #fff; 
                    width: 210mm; 
                    height: 148mm; 
                    overflow: hidden; 
                    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
                }
                .page-container { 
                    width: 210mm; 
                    height: 148mm; 
                    padding: 8mm; 
                    box-sizing: border-box; 
                    display: flex; 
                    flex-direction: column; 
                    justify-content: space-between; 
                }
                .header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
                .logo img { max-width: 250px; max-height: 45px; object-fit: contain; }
                .logo h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 900; color: #1e3a8a; }
                .header-info { text-align: right; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; }
                .info-row { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 2px; gap: 8px;}
                .info-lbl { border: 1px dotted #666; padding: 2px 4px; font-weight: normal;}
                .info-val { border: 1px dotted #666; padding: 2px 8px; min-width: 100px; text-align: center; }
                .pkg-row { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 6px; margin-bottom: 2px;}
                .pkg-val { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 900;}
                .content-area { flex: 1; margin-top: 5px;}
                .row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; width: 100%; margin-top: 4px;}
                .col { flex: 1; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column;}
                .lbl { font-size: 10px; border-bottom: 1px dotted #000; padding-bottom: 2px; }
                .box { border: 2px solid #000; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 28px; }
                .qr-area { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; padding-top: 5px;}
                .qr-left-text { writing-mode: vertical-rl; transform: rotate(180deg); font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold;}
                .qr-img-small { width: 70px; height: 70px; } 
                .qr-img-large { width: 80px; height: 80px; }
                .qr-number { font-family: monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-align:center;}
                .footer { border-top: 3px solid #000; padding-top: 4px; margin-top: 6px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.3; }
            </style>
        </head>
        <body>
            <div class="page-container">
                <div class="header">
                    <div class="logo">
                        ${logoUrl ? `<img src="${logoUrl}" />` : `<h1>${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</h1>`}
                    </div>
                    <div class="header-info">
                        <div class="info-row"><span class="info-lbl">DATE:</span><span class="info-val">${datum}</span></div>
                        <div class="pkg-row"><span class="info-lbl">Package:</span><span class="pkg-val">${paketId}</span></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="content-area">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">Wood Type</span><div class="box">${woodType}</div></div>
                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">MC</span><div class="box">8-11%</div></div>
                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">Quality</span><div class="box">A/B</div></div>
                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">Total Length</span><div class="box">${Math.round(totalLengthM)}</div></div>
                    </div>
                    ${redoviStavki}
                </div>
                <div class="qr-area">
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
                        ${vezniDokument ? `<img src="${qrVeza}" class="qr-img-small" /><span class="qr-left-text">${vezniDokument}</span>` : ''}
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <img src="${qrPaket}" class="qr-img-large" />
                        <div class="qr-number">${paketId}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="footer">
                    <div>
                        <b>${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</b><br>
                        ${firmaInfo.adresa}<br>
                        Tel: ${firmaInfo.telefon}
                    </div>
                    <div style="text-align:right">
                        E-mail: ${firmaInfo.email}<br>
                        ${firmaInfo.footer_tekst}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            ${decodeURIComponent('%3Cscript%3Ewindow.onload%3Dfunction()%7BsetTimeout(function()%7Bwindow.print()%3B%7D%2C2000)%3B%7D%3B%3C%2Fscript%3E')}
        </body>
        </html>
    `;

    iframe.contentWindow.document.open(); 
    iframe.contentWindow.document.write(html); 
    iframe.contentWindow.document.close();
    
    setTimeout(() => { document.title = originalTitle; }, 3000);
    setTimeout(() => { if (document.body.contains(iframe)) document.body.removeChild(iframe); }, 60000);
};

// ==========================================
// 3. FAZNA (WIP) A5 DEKLARACIJA PAKETA
// ==========================================
export const printFaznaDeklaracijaPaketa = async (paketId, stavke, rn, masina, tehnologija) => {
    const stariNaslov = document.title;
    document.title = `FAZA_${paketId}`;

    const { brending, firmaInfo } = await fetchPrintSettings();
    let logoUrl = '';
    const logoObj = brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Svi PDF Dokumenti')) || brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Glavni Meni (Dashboard Vrh)'));
    if (logoObj && logoObj.url_slike) logoUrl = logoObj.url_slike;

    const qrPaket = `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=120x120&data=${paketId}`;
    const formatDatumTacke = (iso) => { if(!iso) return ''; const [y, m, d] = iso.split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`; };
    const datum = stavke[0]?.datum_yyyy_mm ? formatDatumTacke(stavke[0].datum_yyyy_mm) : formatDatumTacke(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);

    let redovi = stavke.map((s, i) => `
        <tr>
            <td style="font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px;">${i+1}.</td>
            <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px;"><b style="font-size: 16px;">${s.sifra_proizvoda || s.naziv_proizvoda}</b></td>
            <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; font-weight: 900; font-size: 20px;">${s.debljina}x${s.sirina}x${s.duzina}</td>
            <td style="text-align: right; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900; color: #d97706;">${s.kolicina_final} <span style="font-size: 14px; color: #475569;">m³</span></td>
        </tr>
    `).join('');

    let tehnologijaHtml = '<p style="font-size: 12px; color: #64748b;">Nema definisanih faza.</p>';
    if (tehnologija && tehnologija.length > 0) {
        tehnologijaHtml = tehnologija.map((f, i) => {
            const isTrenutna = f.masina.toUpperCase() === masina.toUpperCase();
            return `
                <div style="padding: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; border-left: 4px solid ${isTrenutna ? '#d97706' : '#cbd5e1'}; background: ${isTrenutna ? '#fffbeb' : 'transparent'};">
                    <b style="color: ${isTrenutna ? '#d97706' : '#475569'}; font-size: 12px;">${i+1}. ${f.masina} ${isTrenutna ? '(TRENUTNI KORAK)' : ''}</b><br/>
                    <span style="font-size: 10px;">Cilj: ${f.dimenzija} | Faktor: ${f.kolicina} ${f.jm}</span>
                </div>
            `;
        }).join('');
    }

    const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
    iframe.style.display = 'none';
    document.body.appendChild(iframe);

    const html = `
        <html>
        <head>
            <title>Fazna Deklaracija ${paketId}</title>
            <style>
                @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;700;900&display=swap');
                @page { size: 210mm 148mm landscape; margin: 0; }
                html, body { margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; background: #fff; width: 210mm; height: 148mm; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;}
                .page-container { width: 210mm; height: 148mm; padding: 8mm 10mm; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; }
                .header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 3px solid #d97706; padding-bottom: 5px;}
                .logo img { max-width: 200px; max-height: 40px; object-fit: contain; }
                .header-info { text-align: right; }
                .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; flex: 1; }
                .left-pane { flex: 2; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
                .right-pane { flex: 1; border-left: 2px dashed #cbd5e1; padding-left: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
                table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 10px; }
                th { background: #f8fafc; color: #475569; font-size: 11px; text-align: left; padding: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1;}
                .qr-area { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-top: auto;}
                .qr-img { width: 100px; height: 100px; }
                .footer { border-top: 3px solid #d97706; padding-top: 4px; margin-top: 5px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.3; }
            </style>
        </head>
        <body>
            <div class="page-container">
                <div class="header">
                    <div>
                        <h2 style="color: #d97706; margin: 0; font-size: 28px; text-transform: uppercase;">⚠️ FAZNI PAKET</h2>
                        <p style="margin: 2px 0 0 0; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; color: #0f172a;">NE IDE NA LAGER GOTOVE ROBE!</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="header-info">
                        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 12px; color: #475569;">Radni Nalog:</p>
                        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900;">${rn || 'Interno'}</p>
                        <p style="margin: 4px 0 0 0; font-size: 10px;">Datum: ${datum}</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="main-content">
                    <div class="left-pane">
                        <table>
                            <thead>
                                <tr><th>#</th><th>Proizvod</th><th>Radna Dimenzija</th><th style="text-align: right;">Količina</th></tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>${redovi}</tbody>
                        </table>
                        <div class="qr-area">
                            <div>${logoUrl ? `<img src="${logoUrl}" class="logo" />` : `<h3 style="margin:0;">${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</h3>`}</div>
                            <div style="text-align:center;">
                                <img src="${qrPaket}" class="qr-img" />
                                <div style="font-family:monospace; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; letter-spacing: 2px;">${paketId}</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="right-pane">
                        <h4 style="margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 14px; color: #0f172a; text-transform: uppercase;">Procesi obrade:</h4>
                        ${tehnologijaHtml}
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="footer">
                    <div><b>${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</b><br>${firmaInfo.adresa}<br>Tel: ${firmaInfo.telefon}</div>
                    <div style="text-align:right">E-mail: ${firmaInfo.email}<br>${firmaInfo.footer_tekst}</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            ${decodeURIComponent('%3Cscript%3Ewindow.onload%3Dfunction()%7BsetTimeout(function()%7Bwindow.print()%3B%7D%2C2000)%3B%7D%3B%3C%2Fscript%3E')}
        </body>
        </html>
    `;

    iframe.contentWindow.document.open(); 
    iframe.contentWindow.document.write(html); 
    iframe.contentWindow.document.close();
    
    setTimeout(() => { document.title = originalTitle; }, 3000);
    setTimeout(() => { if (document.body.contains(iframe)) document.body.removeChild(iframe); }, 60000);
};

// ==========================================
// 4. RADNI NALOG ZA SPECIFIČNU MAŠINU (WIP)
// ==========================================
export const printRadniNalogZaMasinu = async (rn, masina) => {
    const stariNaslov = document.title; 
    document.title = `RN_${rn.id}_${masina}`;
    
    const stavkeZaMasinu = rn.stavke_jsonb.map((s, i) => {
        const faza = (rn.tehnologija_jsonb[s.id] || []).find(f => f.masina === masina); 
        if (!faza) return null;
        return `
            <tr>
                <td style="font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; vertical-align: top;">${i+1}.</td>
                <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; vertical-align: top;">
                    <span class="prod-sifra">${s.sifra}</span>
                    <span class="prod-naziv">${s.naziv}</span>
                </td>
                <td style="text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; font-weight: 800; font-size: 13px; color: #d97706; vertical-align: top;">${faza.dimenzija}</td>
                <td style="text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; font-weight: 800; font-size: 13px; vertical-align: top;">${faza.kolicina} <span style="font-size: 10px; color: #64748b;">${faza.jm}</span></td>
                <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; font-size: 10px; vertical-align: top; color: #475569;">
                    <b>${faza.oznake?.join(', ') || ''}</b><br/> 
                    <i>${faza.napomena || ''}</i>
                </td>
            </tr>
        `;
    }).filter(s => s !== null).join('');
    
    if (!stavkeZaMasinu) return alert(`Nema definisanih zadataka za mašinu: ${masina}`);
    
    const htmlSadrzaj = `
        <div class="info-grid">
            <div class="info-col-left">
                <h4>Kupac / Klijent</h4>
                <h2>${rn.kupac_naziv}</h2>
                <p>Detalji nisu uneseni</p>
            </div>
            <div class="info-col-right">
                <p>Rok Isporuke: <b>${new Date(rn.rok_isporuke).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}</b></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th style="width: 5%;">#</th>
                    <th style="width: 45%;">Proizvod za Obradu</th>
                    <th style="text-align: center;">Radna Dimenzija</th>
                    <th style="text-align: center;">Količina</th>
                    <th>Zadatak / Oznake</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>${stavkeZaMasinu}</tbody>
        </table>
    `;
    
    await printDokument(`PROIZVODNI NALOG: ${masina}`, rn.id, new Date(rn.datum).toLocaleDateString('de-DE'), htmlSadrzaj, '#0f172a');
    setTimeout(() => { document.title = stariNaslov; }, 2000);
};

// ==========================================
// 5. RADNI NALOG KOMPLETNA RAZRADA (SVE FAZE)
// ==========================================
export const printRadniNalogSveFaze = async (rn) => {
    const stariNaslov = document.title; 
    document.title = `RN_SVE_FAZE_${rn.id}`;
    
    let redovi = rn.stavke_jsonb.map((s, i) => {
        const faze = rn.tehnologija_jsonb[s.id] || [];
        const fazeHtml = faze.map((f, fi) => `
            <div style="font-size: 9px; border-left: 2px solid #d97706; padding-left: 5px; margin-bottom: 3px; color: #475569;">
                <b style="color: #0f172a;">${fi+1}. ${f.masina}</b> &mdash; Dimenzija: <b>${f.dimenzija}</b> | Target: <b>${f.kolicina} ${f.jm}</b>
            </div>
        `).join('');
        
        return `
            <tr>
                <td style="font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; vertical-align: top;">${i+1}.</td>
                <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; vertical-align: top;">
                    <span class="prod-sifra">${s.sifra}</span>
                    <span class="prod-naziv">${s.naziv}</span>
                    <div style="margin-top: 6px; background: #f8fafc; padding: 6px; border-radius: 4px;">
                        <span style="display: block; font-size: 8px; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 800;">Tehnološki proces (BOM):</span>
                        ${fazeHtml}
                    </div>
                </td>
                <td class="num" style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; vertical-align: top; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; color: #a855f7; padding: 6px;">
                    ${s.kolicina_obracun} <span style="font-size: 10px; color: #64748b;">${s.jm_obracun}</span>
                </td>
            </tr>
        `;
    }).join('');
    
    const htmlSadrzaj = `
        <div class="info-grid" style="border-left-color: #a855f7;">
            <div class="info-col-left">
                <h4>Naručilac Projekta</h4>
                <h2>${rn.kupac_naziv}</h2>
            </div>
            <div class="info-col-right">
                <p>Tip naloga: <b>FAZNI (VIŠE MAŠINA)</b></p>
                <p>Rok Isporuke: <b>${new Date(rn.rok_isporuke).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}</b></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th style="background: #a855f7; width: 5%;">#</th>
                    <th style="background: #a855f7; width: 70%;">Proizvod i Planirani Procesi (BOM)</th>
                    <th class="num" style="background: #a855f7;">Ukupna Ciljna Količina</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>${redovi}</tbody>
        </table>
    `;
    
    await printDokument('GLAVNI RADNI NALOG', rn.id, new Date(rn.datum).toLocaleDateString('de-DE'), htmlSadrzaj, '#a855f7');
    setTimeout(() => { document.title = stariNaslov; }, 2000);

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';

const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);

export function useSaaS(modulIme, defaultPostavke) {
    const [ui, setUi] = useState(defaultPostavke);
    const [isEditMode, setIsEditMode] = useState(false);
    const [backup, setBackup] = useState(null);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!modulIme) return;
        const load = async () => {
            const { data } = await supabase.from('ui_postavke').select('postavke_jsonb').eq('modul_ime', modulIme).maybeSingle();
            if (data && data.postavke_jsonb) {
                setUi({ ...defaultPostavke, ...data.postavke_jsonb });
            }
        };
        load();
    }, [modulIme]);

    const pokreniEdit = () => { 
        setBackup(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ui))); 
        setIsEditMode(true); 
    };
    
    const odustani = () => { 
        if (backup) setUi(backup); 
        setIsEditMode(false); 
    };

    const spasiDizajn = async () => {
        const { error } = await supabase.from('ui_postavke').upsert([{ modul_ime: modulIme, postavke_jsonb: ui }], { onConflict: 'modul_ime' });
        if (error) {
            alert("Greška pri snimanju dizajna: " + error.message);
        } else {
            alert(`Dizajn modula '${modulIme}' je uspješno spašen!`);
            setIsEditMode(false);
            setBackup(null);
        }
    };

    // 🟢 POPRAVLJENO: Vraćena ključna riječ defaultConfig!
    return { ui, setUi, isEditMode, pokreniEdit, odustani, spasiDizajn, defaultConfig: defaultPostavke };

404	                                <div key={n.id} onClick={() => setKontekstniMeni({ id: n.id, title: 'Spremno za Otpremu', subtitle: n.kupac, actions: [{ label: '🚚 Kreiraj Otpremnicu', module: 'otpremnice', action: 'nova' }, { label: '📦 Pregledaj Lager', module: 'lager', action: 'lager' }, { label: '🕵️ X-Ray Forenzika', module: 'toranj', action: 'skeniraj' }]})} className="bg-emerald-900/10 p-3 rounded-lg border border-emerald-500/20 flex justify-between items-center shadow-sm hover:border-emerald-500/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors group">

416	                        <div className="flex-1 min-h-[150px]">
417	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
418	                                <BarChart data={dashboardData.topDuznici} layout="vertical" margin={{ top: 0, right: 20, left: 20, bottom: 0 }} onClick={(data) => { if(data?.activeLabel) handleDeepLink('racuni', null,'otvoreni'); }}>
419	                                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#334155" horizontal={false} />
420	                                    <XAxis type="number" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
421	                                    <YAxis dataKey="name" type="category" stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} width={80} style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }} />
422	                                    <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border:'none', borderRadius:'10px'}} formatter={(value) => `${value.toLocaleString('bs-BA')} KM`} cursor={{fill: '#1e293b'}} />
423	                                    <Bar dataKey="dug" fill="#ef4444" radius={[0, 4, 4, 0]} barSize={15} style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }} />
424	                                </BarChart>
425	                            </ResponsiveContainer>
426	                        </div>
427	                    </div>
428	                );
429	            case 'trend_proizvodnje':
430	                return (
431	                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full cursor-pointer hover:bg-theme-panel/50 rounded-xl transition-colors p-2 -m-2" onClick={() => handleDeepLink('analitika', null)}>
432	                        <h3 className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-black uppercase mb-4 tracking-widest pl-2">📈 Trend Proizvodnje (Zadnjih 7 dana)</h3>
433	                        <div className="flex-1 min-h-[150px]">
434	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
435	                                <AreaChart data={dashboardData.trend} margin={{ top: 5, right: 0, left: -25, bottom: 0 }}>
436	                                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="#334155" />
437	                                    <XAxis dataKey="dan" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
438	                                    <YAxis stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
439	                                    <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border:'none', borderRadius:'12px', color:'#fff'}} cursor={{fill: '#1e293b'}} />
440	                                    <Area type="monotone" dataKey="m3" stroke="#3b82f6" fill="#3b82f6" fillOpacity={0.2} strokeWidth={3} isAnimationActive={false} />
441	                                </AreaChart>
442	                            </ResponsiveContainer>
443	                        </div>
444	                    </div>
445	                );
446	            case 'stanje_trupaca':
447	                return (
448	                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full cursor-pointer hover:bg-theme-panel/50 rounded-xl transition-colors p-2 -m-2" onClick={() => handleDeepLink('lager', null)}>
449	                        <h3 className="text-[10px] text-emerald-500 font-black uppercase mb-4 tracking-widest pl-2">🪵 Trupci na stanju (po dužinama)</h3>
450	                        <div className="flex-1 min-h-[150px]">
451	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
452	                                <BarChart data={dashboardData.trupciChart} margin={{ top: 5, right: 0, left: -25, bottom: 0 }}>
453	                                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="#334155" />
454	                                    <XAxis dataKey="duzina" stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
455	                                    <YAxis stroke="#64748b" fontSize={9} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
456	                                    <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border:'none', borderRadius:'12px', color:'#fff'}} cursor={{fill: '#1e293b'}} formatter={(v) => `${v} m³`} />
457	                                    <Bar isAnimationActive={false} dataKey="m3" fill="#10b981" radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} barSize={25} />
458	                                </BarChart>
459	                            </ResponsiveContainer>
460	                        </div>
461	                    </div>
462	                );
463	            case 'stanje_daske':
464	                return (
465	                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full cursor-pointer hover:bg-theme-panel/50 rounded-xl transition-colors p-2 -m-2" onClick={() => handleDeepLink('lager', null)}>
466	                        <h3 className="text-[10px] text-blue-500 font-black uppercase mb-4 tracking-widest pl-2">📦 Gotova roba na stanju (Udio)</h3>
467	                        <div className="flex-1 min-h-[150px]">
468	                            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
469	                                <PieChart>
470	                                    <Pie isAnimationActive={false} data={dashboardData.paketiChart} innerRadius="50%" outerRadius="80%" paddingAngle={2} dataKey="m3" stroke="none">
471	                                        {dashboardData.paketiChart.map((e, i) => <Cell key={`c-${i}`} fill={PALETA[i % PALETA.length]} />)}
472	                                    </Pie>
473	                                    <RechartsTooltip contentStyle={{backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border:'none', borderRadius:'12px', color:'#fff'}} formatter={(v) => `${v} m³`} />
474	                                    <Legend wrapperStyle={{fontSize:'9px', fontWeight:'bold', color: '#cbd5e1'}} />
475	                                </PieChart>
476	                            </ResponsiveContainer>
477	                        </div>
478	                    </div>
479	                );
480	            case 'live_feed':
481	                return (
482	                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
483	                        <h3 className="text-[10px] text-theme-accent font-black uppercase mb-4 tracking-widest flex justify-between items-center">
484	                            <span>⚡ Live Feed Pogon</span> <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse"></span>
485	                        </h3>
486	                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar space-y-3">
487	                            {dashboardData.feed.length === 0 && <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 italic">Sistem miruje.</p>}
488	                            {dashboardData.feed.map(log => (
489	                                <div key={log.id} className="bg-theme-panel p-3 rounded-xl border border-theme-border/50 text-xs shadow-sm">
490	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1">
491	                                        <span className="font-black text-white">{log.korisnik}</span>
492	                                        <span className="text-[8px] text-slate-500 font-mono">{new Date(log.vrijeme).toLocaleTimeString('bs-BA')}</span>
493	                                    </div>
494	                                    <p className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] leading-tight line-clamp-2">{log.akcija}</p>
495	                                </div>
496	                            ))}
497	                        </div>
498	                    </div>
499	                );
500	            case 'brzi_moduli':
501	                if (layout === 'sidebar' && !isEditMode) return null;
502	                return (
503	                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full border-t border-theme-border pt-4">
504	                        <h3 className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-black uppercase mb-4 tracking-widest">🚀 Brze Prečice</h3>
505	                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4">
506	                            {(uiPostavke.moduli || []).map((modul, modIndex) => {
507	                                const imaDozvolu = hasPermission(modul.id);
508	                                if (!imaDozvolu && !isEditMode) return null; 
509	
510	                                return (
511	                                    <div 
512	                                        key={`${modul.id}_${modIndex}`}
513	                                        draggable={isEditMode}
514	                                        onDragStart={(e) => handleDragStart(e, modIndex)}
515	                                        onDragEnter={(e) => handleDragEnter(e, modIndex)}
516	                                        onDragEnd={handleDrop}
517	                                        onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
518	                                        className={`relative ${isEditMode ? 'cursor-move animate-in zoom-in duration-200' : ''}`}
519	                                    >
520	                                        {isEditMode ? (
521	                                            <div className="bg-theme-card border-2 border-amber-500 border-dashed p-4 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-2 opacity-95 hover:opacity-100 transition-all shadow-xl relative">
522	                                                <button onClick={() => obrisiModulPotpuno(modIndex)} className="absolute -top-3 -right-3 w-8 h-8 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-black shadow-lg hover:bg-red-500 transition-colors z-50">✕</button>
523	                                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
524	                                                    <span className="text-amber-500 font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-1">☰ <span className="text-slate-400 hidden lg:inline">Pomicaj</span></span>
525	                                                    <span className="text-slate-500 text-[9px] uppercase font-bold truncate ml-1">{modul.id}</span>
526	                                                </div>
527	                                                <input value={modul.naziv} onChange={(e) => updateModul(modIndex, 'naziv', e.target.value)} className="p-2 bg-theme-main text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg border border-slate-700 outline-none focus:border-amber-500 text-center" placeholder="Naziv" />
528	                                            </div>
529	                                        ) : (
530	                                            <div 
531	                                                onClick={() => setActiveModule(modul.id)}
532	                                                className="p-5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-lg h-28 relative overflow-hidden group border border-white/10"
533	                                                style={{ backgroundColor: modul.hex_boja || '#1e293b' }}
534	                                            >
535	                                                <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/20 via-transparent to-black/50 pointer-events-none"></div>
536	                                                <div className="relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
537	                                                    <span className="text-2xl drop-shadow-xl">{modul.ikona}</span>
538	                                                    <h3 className="text-white font-black tracking-widest text-[10px] uppercase drop-shadow-md text-center leading-tight">{modul.naziv}</h3>
539	                                                </div>
540	                                            </div>
541	                                        )}
542	                                    </div>
543	                                );
544	                            })}
545	                        </div>
546	                    </div>
547	                );
548	            default:
549	                return <div className="text-slate-500 text-xs text-center p-4">Nepoznat widget format.</div>;
550	        }
551	    };
552	
553	    if (authLoading) return <div className="min-h-screen bg-theme-main" />;
554	
555	    if (!loggedUser) {
556	        return (
557	            <div className="min-h-screen bg-theme-main flex items-center justify-center p-6 font-bold relative z-50">
558	                <form onSubmit={handleLogin} className="w-full max-w-sm bg-theme-card p-10 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-700 shadow-2xl space-y-6">
559	                    <div className="text-center mb-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2">
560	                        <img src="/logo.png" alt="Logo" className="max-h-24 object-contain mb-2" />
561	                        <h1 className="text-4xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter">Smart<span className="text-blue-500">Timber</span></h1>
562	                    </div>
563	                    <div className="space-y-4">
564	                        <input name="user" placeholder="Username" required className="w-full p-4 bg-theme-main border border-slate-700 rounded-2xl text-white outline-none text-center" />
565	                        <input name="pass" type="password" placeholder="Password" required className="w-full p-4 bg-theme-main border border-slate-700 rounded-2xl text-white outline-none text-center" />
566	                        <button type="submit" className="w-full py-5 bg-blue-600 text-white font-black rounded-2xl uppercase shadow-lg hover:opacity-90 transition-all">Pristupi sistemu</button>
567	                    </div>
568	                </form>
569	            </div>
570	        );
571	    }
572	
573	    const aktivniModulKonfig = (uiPostavke.moduli || []).find(m => m.id === activeModule);
574	    const modulBoja = aktivniModulKonfig?.hex_boja || ''; 
575	
576	    const finalniModuliZaMeni = defaultModuli.map(dm => {
577	        const override = (uiPostavke.moduli || []).find(m => m.id === dm.id);
578	        return override ? { ...dm, ...override } : dm;
579	    });
580	
581	    return (
582	        <AppShell user={loggedUser} activeModule={activeModule} onModuleChange={setActiveModule} accentColor={modulBoja} dynamicModules={finalniModuliZaMeni}>
583	            <PametniDialog {...dialog} />
584	            
585	            {/* 🟢 ACTION HUB / KONTEKSTNI MENI MODAL */}
586	            {kontekstniMeni && (
587	                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[99999] bg-black/80 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-sm animate-in fade-in">
588	                    <div className="bg-theme-card border-2 border-theme-accent p-6 md:p-8 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(var(--theme-accent-rgb),0.3)] max-w-sm w-full relative">
589	                        <button onClick={() => setKontekstniMeni(null)} className="absolute top-4 right-4 text-slate-400 hover:text-white bg-slate-800 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-colors">✕</button>
590	                        <h3 className="text-theme-accent font-black uppercase text-[10px] tracking-widest mb-1">{kontekstniMeni.title}</h3>
591	                        <p className="text-2xl text-white font-black">{kontekstniMeni.id}</p>
592	                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 font-bold mb-6">{kontekstniMeni.subtitle}</p>
593	
594	                        <div className="space-y-3">
595	                            {kontekstniMeni.actions.map(akcija => {
596	                                // Provjeravamo da li korisnik ima dozvolu za modul prije nego sto mu ponudimo dugme
597	                                if (!hasPermission(akcija.module)) return null;
598	                                return (
599	                                    <button 
600	                                        key={akcija.module} 
601	                                        onClick={() => handleDeepLink(akcija.module, kontekstniMeni.id)} 
602	                                        className="w-full py-4 bg-theme-panel hover:bg-theme-accent hover:text-white border border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-xs font-black uppercase transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-sm"
603	                                    >
604	                                        {akcija.label}
605	                                    </button>
606	                                );
607	                            })}
608	                            <button onClick={() => { navigator.clipboard.writeText(kontekstniMeni.id); toast.success("Kopirano!"); setKontekstniMeni(null); }} className="w-full py-3 bg-transparent text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase transition-all mt-2">📋 Kopiraj ID</button>
609	                        </div>
610	                    </div>
611	                </div>
612	            )}
613	
614	            <div className="w-full min-h-full transition-colors duration-700 font-sans">
615	                {activeModule === 'home' ? (
616	                    <div className="p-4 md:p-8 selection:bg-emerald-500/30 w-full animate-in fade-in">
617	                        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6">
618	                            
619	                            <div className={`border border-theme-border p-6 md:p-8 rounded-[var(--radius-box)] flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 justify-between items-center shadow-2xl transition-colors duration-500 bg-theme-card backdrop-blur-[var(--glass-blur)] ${isEditMode ? 'ring-4 ring-amber-500' : ''}`}>
620	                                <div className="w-full md:w-auto text-center md:text-left">
621	                                    {isEditMode ? (
622	                                        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
623	                                            <input value={uiPostavke.glavni_naslov} onChange={e => setUiPostavke({...uiPostavke, glavni_naslov: e.target.value})} className="bg-black/30 text-blue-400 text-xs uppercase font-black tracking-widest p-2 rounded outline-none w-full border border-slate-700 focus:border-amber-500" />
624	                                            <input value={uiPostavke.pozdravna_poruka} onChange={e => setUiPostavke({...uiPostavke, pozdravna_poruka: e.target.value})} className="bg-black/30 text-slate-300 text-sm p-2 rounded outline-none w-full border border-slate-700 focus:border-amber-500" />
625	                                        </div>
626	                                    ) : (
627	                                        <>
628	                                            <p className="text-theme-muted text-[10px] uppercase font-black tracking-widest mb-1">{uiPostavke.glavni_naslov}</p>
629	                                            <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl text-theme-text font-black">Zdravo, {loggedUser?.ime_prezime || 'Korisnik'}</h1>
630	                                            <p className="text-theme-muted text-sm mt-2">{uiPostavke.pozdravna_poruka}</p>
631	                                        </>
632	                                    )}
633	                                </div>
634	                                <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 items-center w-full md:w-auto justify-end">
635	                                    <div className="bg-theme-panel border border-theme-border px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-center md:text-right hidden md:block shadow-inner">
636	                                        <p className="text-[10px] uppercase font-black text-slate-500">Današnji Datum</p>
637	                                        <p className="text-theme-text font-black text-sm">{new Date().toLocaleDateString('bs-BA')}</p>
638	                                    </div>
639	                                    {(loggedUser?.uloga === 'superadmin' || loggedUser?.uloga === 'admin') && (
640	                                        isEditMode ? (
641	                                            <div className="flex gap-2 w-full sm:w-auto">
642	                                                <button onClick={odustaniOdEdita} className="flex-1 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 font-black text-[10px] uppercase hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg border border-red-500/30">✕ ODUSTANI</button>
643	                                                <button onClick={spasiDizajn} className="flex-[2] px-6 py-3 rounded-xl bg-emerald-600 text-white font-black text-[10px] uppercase hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)]">💾 SPASI EKRAN</button>
644	                                            </div>
645	                                        ) : (
646	                                            <button onClick={pokreniEdit} className="w-full sm:w-auto px-4 py-3 rounded-xl bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 font-black text-[10px] uppercase border border-amber-500/30 hover:bg-amber-500 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg">✏️ UREDI EKRAN</button>
647	                                        )
648	                                    )}
649	                                </div>
650	                            </div>
651	
652	                            {isEditMode && (
653	                                <div className="bg-amber-950/20 border-2 border-amber-500/50 p-6 rounded-[2rem] shadow-2xl space-y-6">
654	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-amber-500/20 pb-4">
655	                                        <h3 className="text-amber-500 font-black uppercase text-xs">🛠️ Enterprise Dashboard Builder</h3>
656	                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
657	                                            <select id="newWidgetSelect" className="bg-black text-amber-400 p-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black uppercase outline-none border border-amber-500/50 cursor-pointer">
658	                                                <option value="">-- Odaberi novi Widget --</option>
659	                                                {DOSTUPNI_WIDGETI.map(w => <option key={w.type} value={w.type}>{w.name}</option>)}
660	                                            </select>
661	                                            <button onClick={() => { const sel = document.getElementById('newWidgetSelect').value; if(sel) addWidget(sel); }} className="bg-amber-600 text-black px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black uppercase shadow-lg hover:bg-amber-500 transition-colors">➕ DODAJ</button>
662	                                        </div>
663	                                    </div>
664	                                    <p className="text-[10px] text-amber-500/70 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-center">Prevucite blokove (☰) ispod da biste im promijenili redoslijed na ekranu.</p>
665	                                </div>
666	                            )}
667	
668	                            <div className="grid grid-cols-12 gap-6 relative z-10 items-stretch">
669	                                {(uiPostavke.widget_layout || []).map((widget, index) => {
670	                                    if (!isEditMode && loggedUser.uloga !== 'superadmin' && loggedUser.uloga !== 'admin') {
671	                                        if (!widget.allowedRoles?.includes(loggedUser.uloga)) return null;
672	                                    }
673	
674	                                    const content = renderWidgetContent(widget, index);
675	                                    if (!content && !isEditMode) return null;
676	
677	                                    return (
678	                                        <div 
679	                                            key={widget.id} 
680	                                            className={`${widget.span} relative flex flex-col h-full min-h-[150px] transition-all duration-300 ${isEditMode ? 'border-2 border-dashed border-amber-500 p-3 bg-black/20 rounded-[2rem]' : 'bg-theme-card rounded-[2rem] border border-theme-border shadow-xl overflow-hidden'} ${isDraggingWidget && widgetDragItem.current === index ? 'opacity-40 scale-95' : ''}`}
681	                                            draggable={isEditMode}
682	                                            onDragStart={(e) => handleWidgetDragStart(e, index)}
683	                                            onDragEnter={(e) => handleWidgetDragEnter(e, index)}
684	                                            onDragEnd={handleWidgetDrop}
685	                                            onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
686	                                        >
687	                                            {isEditMode && (
688	    <div className="absolute top-2 right-2 left-2 flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between sm:items-center gap-2 z-[100] bg-black/80 p-2 sm:p-3 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-md border border-amber-500/50 shadow-xl">
689	        <span className="text-[10px] text-amber-500 font-black cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing flex items-center gap-1 uppercase tracking-widest px-2 py-1 hover:bg-amber-900/50 rounded transition-colors self-start sm:self-auto">
690	            <Move size={12}/> Pomicaj
691	        </span>
692	        
693	        <div className="flex flex-wrap sm:flex-nowrap gap-2 items-center justify-between w-full sm:w-auto">
694	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 sm:gap-2 sm:border-r border-slate-700 sm:pr-3 sm:mr-1 flex-1 sm:flex-none justify-center">
695	                <span className="text-[8px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-black hidden sm:block"><Eye size={10} className="inline mr-1"/> Vide:</span>
696	                {['superadmin', 'admin', 'manager', 'operater'].map(uloga => (
697	                    <label key={uloga} className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[7px] sm:text-[8px] text-slate-300 font-bold cursor-pointer hover:text-white transition-colors">
698	                        <input 
699	                            type="checkbox" 
700	                            checked={(widget.allowedRoles || []).includes(uloga) || uloga === 'superadmin' || uloga === 'admin'} 
701	                            onChange={() => toggleWidgetRole(index, uloga)} 
702	                            className="w-2.5 h-2.5 sm:w-3 sm:h-3 accent-amber-500" 
703	                            disabled={uloga === 'superadmin' || uloga === 'admin'} 
704	                        />
705	                        {uloga.substring(0,3).toUpperCase()}
706	                    </label>
707	                ))}
708	            </div>
709	            
710	            <div className="flex gap-1.5 items-center shrink-0">
711	                <button onClick={() => updateWidgetSpan(index)} className="bg-theme-panel text-amber-400 px-2 sm:px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-[7px] sm:text-[8px] font-black uppercase border border-amber-500/50 hover:bg-amber-500 hover:text-black transition-colors shadow-sm">
712	                    ŠIRINA: {widget.span.includes('col-span-4') ? '1/3' : (widget.span.includes('col-span-6') ? '1/2' : 'FULL')}
713	                </button>
714	                <button onClick={() => deleteWidget(index)} className="bg-red-900/50 text-red-500 w-6 h-6 sm:w-7 sm:h-7 rounded flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white transition-colors border border-red-500/30">
715	                    <X size={12}/>
716	                </button>
717	            </div>
718	        </div>
719	    </div>
720	)}
721	                                            <div className={`flex-1 h-full w-full relative ${isEditMode ? 'mt-12 pointer-events-none opacity-50' : 'p-6'}`}>
722	                                                {content}
723	                                            </div>
724	                                        </div>
725	                                    );
726	                                })}
727	                            </div>
728	                        </div>
729	                    </div>
730	                ) : activeModule === 'prijem' ? <PrijemModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
731	                : activeModule === 'prorez' ? <ProrezModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
732	                : activeModule === 'pilana' ? <PilanaModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
733	                : activeModule === 'dorada' ? <DoradaModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
734	                : activeModule === 'planiranje' ? <PlaniranjeModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
735	                : activeModule === 'lager' ? <LagerPaketaModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
736	                : activeModule === 'ponude' ? <PonudeModule user={loggedUser} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
737	                : activeModule === 'radni_nalozi' ? <RadniNaloziModule user={loggedUser} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
738	                : activeModule === 'otpremnice' ? <OtpremniceModule user={loggedUser} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
739	                : activeModule === 'racuni' ? <RacuniModule user={loggedUser} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
740	                : activeModule === 'blagajna' ? <BlagajnaModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
741	                : activeModule === 'toranj' ? <KontrolniToranjModule user={loggedUser} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
742	                : (activeModule === 'analitika' || activeModule === 'dashboard') ? <AnalitikaModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
743	                : activeModule === 'kiosk' ? <KioskModule />
744	                : activeModule === 'hr' ? <HrDashboardModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
745	                : activeModule === 'reklamacije' ? <ReklamacijeModule user={loggedUser} header={header} setHeader={setHeader} onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
746	                : activeModule === 'podesavanja' ? <SettingsModule onExit={() => setActiveModule('home')} />
747	                : null}
748	            </div>
749	        </AppShell>
750	    );
751	}

=== app/store/useAppStore.js ===
1	import { create } from 'zustand';
2	
3	export const useAppStore = create((set, get) => ({
4	  currentUser: null,
5	  theme: 'industrial', // 'industrial', 'light', 'aurora', 'executive'
6	  layout: 'kiosk',     // 'kiosk', 'sidebar', 'bento', 'topnav'
7	
8	  // Ova funkcija se poziva kada se radnik (npr. Edin) prijavi u sistem
9	  initSettings: (username) => {
10	    if (!username) return;
11	    
12	    // Tražimo postavke u memoriji ovog specifičnog uređaja za ovog radnika
13	    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`ERP_SETTINGS_${username}`);
14	    
15	    if (saved) {
16	      const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
17	      set({ 
18	        currentUser: username, 
19	        theme: parsed.theme || 'industrial', 
20	        layout: parsed.layout || 'kiosk' 
21	      });
22	      // Odmah oblačimo HTML tag u odabranu temu
23	      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', parsed.theme || 'industrial');
24	    } else {
25	      // Ako se prijavio prvi put na ovom uređaju, dajemo mu standardni dizajn
26	      set({ currentUser: username, theme: 'industrial', layout: 'kiosk' });
27	      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'industrial');
28	    }
29	  },
30	
31	  // Funkcija za promjenu teme (klikom na dugme)
32	  setTheme: (newTheme) => {
33	    set({ theme: newTheme });
34	    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', newTheme);
35	    
36	    // Odmah spašavamo novu temu u uređaj, samo za trenutnog radnika
37	    const { currentUser, layout } = get();
38	    if (currentUser) {
39	      localStorage.setItem(`ERP_SETTINGS_${currentUser}`, JSON.stringify({ theme: newTheme, layout }));
40	    }
41	  },
42	
43	  // Funkcija za promjenu rasporeda (školjke)
44	  setLayout: (newLayout) => {
45	    set({ layout: newLayout });
46	    
47	    // Spašavamo novi raspored u uređaj
48	    const { currentUser, theme } = get();
49	    if (currentUser) {
50	      localStorage.setItem(`ERP_SETTINGS_${currentUser}`, JSON.stringify({ theme, layout: newLayout }));
51	    }
52	  }
53	}));

1	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';

3	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
4	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
5	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);

7	export const POSTAVKE = {
8	    imeAplikacije: "TTM DOO ERP",
9	    imeFirme: "TTM d.o.o.",
10	    bojaFirme: "#3b82f6" 
11	};

13	// Pomoćna funkcija za centralno preuzimanje iz baze u trenutku printa
14	const fetchPrintSettings = async () => {
15	    let brending = [];
16	    let firmaInfo = { adresa: '', telefon: '', email: '', footer_tekst: '', footer_boja: '#64748b', footer_velicina: '10' };
17	    
18	    try {
19	        const [bRes, fRes] = await Promise.all([
20	            supabase.from('brending').select('*'),
21	            supabase.from('postavke_firme').select('*').eq('id', 1).maybeSingle()
22	        ]);
23	        if (bRes.data) brending = bRes.data;
24	        if (fRes.data) firmaInfo = fRes.data;
25	    } catch(e) {
26	        console.log("Greška pri učitavanju postavki za print", e);
27	    }
28	    
29	    return { brending, firmaInfo };
30	};

35	export const printDokument = async (tipDokumenta, brojDokumenta, datum, htmlSadrzajTabela, themeColor = '#3b82f6', totaliHtml = null) => {
36	    const originalTitle = document.title;
37	    const nazivFajla = `${datum} ${tipDokumenta} ${brojDokumenta}`;
38	    document.title = nazivFajla; 
39	
40	    let trazenaLokacija = 'Svi PDF Dokumenti';
41	    if (tipDokumenta === 'PONUDA') trazenaLokacija = 'PDF Ponuda';
42	    else if (tipDokumenta === 'RADNI NALOG') trazenaLokacija = 'PDF Radni Nalog';
43	    else if (tipDokumenta === 'OTPREMNICA') trazenaLokacija = 'PDF Otpremnica';
44	    else if (tipDokumenta === 'RAČUN') trazenaLokacija = 'PDF Račun';
45	    else if (tipDokumenta.includes('POTVRDA')) trazenaLokacija = 'PDF Blagajna';

51

53	                    brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Svi PDF Dokumenti'));
54	    
55	    if (logoObj && logoObj.url_slike) {
56	        if (logoObj.full_width) {

103	                    position: relative;
104	                }

106	                    position: absolute;
107	                    top: 0;
108	                    left: 0;
109	                    height: 12px;

111	                    width: 100%; 
112	                }
113	                .full-width-banner {
114	                    width: 100%;
115	                    margin-bottom: 8mm;
116	                    text-align: center;
117	                }
118	                .full-width-banner img {
119	                    width: 100%;
120	                    max-height: 120px;
121	                    object-fit: contain;
122	                }

124	                    display: flex;

284	        </html>
285	    `;
286

288	    iframe.contentWindow.document.write(html); 
289	    iframe.contentWindow.document.close();
290	    
291	    setTimeout(() => { document.title = originalTitle; }, 3000);
292	    setTimeout(() => { if (document.body.contains(iframe)) document.body.removeChild(iframe); }, 300000);
293	};

295	// ==========================================
296	// 2. STANDARDNA A5 DEKLARACIJA PAKETA
297	// ==========================================
298	export const printDeklaracijaPaketa = async (paketId, items, vezniDokument = '') => {
299	    if (!items || items.length === 0) return;
300	
301	    const originalTitle = document.title;
302	    document.title = `Deklaracija_${paketId}`;
303	
304	    const { brending, firmaInfo } = await fetchPrintSettings();
305	
306	    let logoUrl = '';
307	    const logoObj = brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Svi PDF Dokumenti')) || 
308	                    brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Glavni Meni (Dashboard Vrh)'));
309	    
310	    if (logoObj && logoObj.url_slike) {
311	        logoUrl = logoObj.url_slike;
312	    }
313	
314	    const qrPaket = `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=100x100&data=${paketId}`;
315	    const qrVeza = vezniDokument ? `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=100x100&data=${vezniDokument}` : '';
316	
317	    const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
318	    iframe.style.display = 'none';
319	    document.body.appendChild(iframe);
320	
321	    const formatDatumTacke = (iso) => {
322	        if(!iso) return '';
323	        const [y, m, d] = iso.split('-');
324	        return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`;
325	    };
326	    
327	    const datum = items[0].datum_yyyy_mm ? formatDatumTacke(items[0].datum_yyyy_mm) : formatDatumTacke(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
328	    const woodType = items[0].naziv_proizvoda.split(' ')[0] || 'Rezana'; 
329	    let totalLengthM = 0;
330	
331	    const redoviStavki = items.map(item => {
332	        let pcs = parseFloat(item.kolicina_ulaz || 0);
333	        const v = parseFloat(item.debljina)||1; 
334	        const s = parseFloat(item.sirina)||1; 
335	        const d = parseFloat(item.duzina)||1;
336	        
337	        if (item.jm === 'm3') {
338	            pcs = Math.round(pcs / ((v/100)*(s/100)*(d/100)));
339	        }
340	        
341	        totalLengthM += (pcs * (d/100));
342	
343	        return `
344	            <div class="row">
345	                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">Tickness mm</span></div><div class="box">${item.debljina}</div></div>
346	                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">Width mm</span></div><div class="box">${item.sirina}</div></div>
347	                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">Length mm</span></div><div class="box">${item.duzina * 10}</div></div>
348	                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">PCS</span></div><div class="box">${pcs}</div></div>
349	                <div class="col"><div class="lbl-wrap"><span class="lbl">Volume (m³)</span></div><div class="box">${item.kolicina_final}</div></div>
350	            </div>
351	        `;
352	    }).join('');
353	
354	    const html = `
355	        <html>
356	        <head>
357	            <title>Deklaracija ${paketId}</title>
358	            <style>
359	                @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;700;900&display=swap');
360	                @page { size: 210mm 148mm landscape; margin: 0; }
361	                html, body { 
362	                    margin: 0 !important; 
363	                    padding: 0 !important; 
364	                    background: #fff; 
365	                    width: 210mm; 
366	                    height: 148mm; 
367	                    overflow: hidden; 
368	                    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
369	                }
370	                .page-container { 
371	                    width: 210mm; 
372	                    height: 148mm; 
373	                    padding: 8mm; 
374	                    box-sizing: border-box; 
375	                    display: flex; 
376	                    flex-direction: column; 
377	                    justify-content: space-between; 
378	                }
379	                .header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
380	                .logo img { max-width: 250px; max-height: 45px; object-fit: contain; }
381	                .logo h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 900; color: #1e3a8a; }
382	                .header-info { text-align: right; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; }
383	                .info-row { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 2px; gap: 8px;}
384	                .info-lbl { border: 1px dotted #666; padding: 2px 4px; font-weight: normal;}
385	                .info-val { border: 1px dotted #666; padding: 2px 8px; min-width: 100px; text-align: center; }
386	                .pkg-row { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 6px; margin-bottom: 2px;}
387	                .pkg-val { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 900;}
388	                .content-area { flex: 1; margin-top: 5px;}
389	                .row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; width: 100%; margin-top: 4px;}
390	                .col { flex: 1; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column;}
391	                .lbl { font-size: 10px; border-bottom: 1px dotted #000; padding-bottom: 2px; }
392	                .box { border: 2px solid #000; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 28px; }
393	                .qr-area { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; padding-top: 5px;}
394	                .qr-left-text { writing-mode: vertical-rl; transform: rotate(180deg); font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold;}
395	                .qr-img-small { width: 70px; height: 70px; } 
396	                .qr-img-large { width: 80px; height: 80px; }
397	                .qr-number { font-family: monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-align:center;}
398	                .footer { border-top: 3px solid #000; padding-top: 4px; margin-top: 6px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.3; }
399	            </style>
400	        </head>
401	        <body>
402	            <div class="page-container">
403	                <div class="header">
404	                    <div class="logo">
405	                        ${logoUrl ? `<img src="${logoUrl}" />` : `<h1>${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</h1>`}
406	                    </div>
407	                    <div class="header-info">
408	                        <div class="info-row"><span class="info-lbl">DATE:</span><span class="info-val">${datum}</span></div>
409	                        <div class="pkg-row"><span class="info-lbl">Package:</span><span class="pkg-val">${paketId}</span></div>
410	                    </div>
411	                </div>
412	                <div class="content-area">
413	                    <div class="row">
414	                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">Wood Type</span><div class="box">${woodType}</div></div>
415	                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">MC</span><div class="box">8-11%</div></div>
416	                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">Quality</span><div class="box">A/B</div></div>
417	                        <div class="col"><span class="lbl">Total Length</span><div class="box">${Math.round(totalLengthM)}</div></div>
418	                    </div>
419	                    ${redoviStavki}
420	                </div>
421	                <div class="qr-area">
422	                    <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
423	                        ${vezniDokument ? `<img src="${qrVeza}" class="qr-img-small" /><span class="qr-left-text">${vezniDokument}</span>` : ''}
424	                    </div>
425	                    <div>
426	                        <img src="${qrPaket}" class="qr-img-large" />
427	                        <div class="qr-number">${paketId}</div>
428	                    </div>
429	                </div>
430	                <div class="footer">
431	                    <div>
432	                        <b>${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</b><br>
433	                        ${firmaInfo.adresa}<br>
434	                        Tel: ${firmaInfo.telefon}
435	                    </div>
436	                    <div style="text-align:right">
437	                        E-mail: ${firmaInfo.email}<br>
438	                        ${firmaInfo.footer_tekst}
439	                    </div>
440	                </div>
441	            </div>
442	            ${decodeURIComponent('%3Cscript%3Ewindow.onload%3Dfunction()%7BsetTimeout(function()%7Bwindow.print()%3B%7D%2C2000)%3B%7D%3B%3C%2Fscript%3E')}
443	        </body>
444	        </html>
445	    `;
446	
447	    iframe.contentWindow.document.open(); 
448	    iframe.contentWindow.document.write(html); 
449	    iframe.contentWindow.document.close();
450	    
451	    setTimeout(() => { document.title = originalTitle; }, 3000);
452	    setTimeout(() => { if (document.body.contains(iframe)) document.body.removeChild(iframe); }, 60000);
453	};

455	// ==========================================
456	// 3. FAZNA A5 DEKLARACIJA PAKETA (SA NAREDNIM KORACIMA)
457	// ==========================================
458	export const printFaznaDeklaracijaPaketa = async (paketId, stavke, rn, masina, tehnologija) => {
459	    const stariNaslov = document.title;
460	    document.title = `FAZA_${paketId}`;
461	
462	    const { brending, firmaInfo } = await fetchPrintSettings();
463	    let logoUrl = '';
464	    const logoObj = brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Svi PDF Dokumenti')) || brending.find(b => (b.lokacije_jsonb || []).includes('Glavni Meni (Dashboard Vrh)'));
465	    if (logoObj && logoObj.url_slike) logoUrl = logoObj.url_slike;
466	
467	    const qrPaket = `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=120x120&data=${paketId}`;
468	    const formatDatumTacke = (iso) => { if(!iso) return ''; const [y, m, d] = iso.split('-'); return `${d}.${m}.${y}.`; };
469	    const datum = stavke[0]?.datum_yyyy_mm ? formatDatumTacke(stavke[0].datum_yyyy_mm) : formatDatumTacke(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
470	
471	    let redovi = stavke.map((s, i) => `
472	        <tr>
473	            <td style="font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px;">${i+1}.</td>
474	            <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px;"><b style="font-size: 16px;">${s.sifra_proizvoda || s.naziv_proizvoda}</b></td>
475	            <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; font-weight: 900; font-size: 20px;">${s.debljina}x${s.sirina}x${s.duzina}</td>
476	            <td style="text-align: right; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900; color: #d97706;">${s.kolicina_final} <span style="font-size: 14px; color: #475569;">m³</span></td>
477	        </tr>
478	    `).join('');
479	
480	    let tehnologijaHtml = '<p style="font-size: 12px; color: #64748b;">Nema definisanih faza.</p>';
481	    if (tehnologija && tehnologija.length > 0) {
482	        const fazaIndex = tehnologija.findIndex(f => f.masina.toUpperCase() === masina.toUpperCase());
483	        
484	        tehnologijaHtml = tehnologija.map((f, i) => {
485	            const isTrenutna = i === fazaIndex;
486	            const isBuduca = i > fazaIndex;
487	            const isProsla = i < fazaIndex;
488	            
489	            let boja = '#cbd5e1';
490	            let bg = 'transparent';
491	            let dodatak = '';
492	            
493	            if (isTrenutna) { boja = '#d97706'; bg = '#fffbeb'; dodatak = '(TRENUTNI KORAK)'; }
494	            else if (isBuduca) { boja = '#3b82f6'; dodatak = '(SLJEDEĆA FAZA)'; }
495	            else if (isProsla) { boja = '#10b981'; dodatak = '(ZAVRŠENO)'; }
496	
497	            return `
498	                <div style="padding: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; border-left: 4px solid ${boja}; background: ${bg}; opacity: ${isProsla ? '0.6' : '1'};">
499	                    <b style="color: ${boja}; font-size: 12px;">${i+1}. ${f.masina} <span style="font-size: 9px; margin-left: 4px;">${dodatak}</span></b><br/>
500	                    <span style="font-size: 10px;">Cilj: ${f.dimenzija} | ${f.kolicina} ${f.jm}</span>
501	                </div>
502	            `;
503	        }).join('');
504	    }
505	
506	    const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
507	    iframe.style.display = 'none';
508	    document.body.appendChild(iframe);
509	
510	    const html = `
511	        <html>
512	        <head>
513	            <title>Fazna Deklaracija ${paketId}</title>
514	            <style>
515	                @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;700;900&display=swap');
516	                @page { size: 210mm 148mm landscape; margin: 0; }
517	                html, body { margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; background: #fff; width: 210mm; height: 148mm; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;}
518	                .page-container { width: 210mm; height: 148mm; padding: 8mm 10mm; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; }
519	                .header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 3px solid #d97706; padding-bottom: 5px;}
520	                .logo img { max-width: 200px; max-height: 40px; object-fit: contain; }
521	                .header-info { text-align: right; }
522	                .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; flex: 1; }
523	                .left-pane { flex: 2; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
524	                .right-pane { flex: 1; border-left: 2px dashed #cbd5e1; padding-left: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
525	                table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 10px; }
526	                th { background: #f8fafc; color: #475569; font-size: 11px; text-align: left; padding: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1;}
527	                .qr-area { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-top: auto;}
528	                .qr-img { width: 100px; height: 100px; }
529	                .footer { border-top: 3px solid #d97706; padding-top: 4px; margin-top: 5px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.3; }
530	            </style>
531	        </head>
532	        <body>
533	            <div class="page-container">
534	                <div class="header">
535	                    <div>
536	                        <h2 style="color: #d97706; margin: 0; font-size: 28px; text-transform: uppercase;">⚠️ FAZNI PAKET</h2>
537	                        <p style="margin: 2px 0 0 0; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; color: #0f172a;">OVO NIJE GOTOVA ROBA ZA KUPCA!</p>
538	                    </div>
539	                    <div class="header-info">
540	                        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 12px; color: #475569;">Radni Nalog:</p>
541	                        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900;">${rn || 'Interno'}</p>
542	                        <p style="margin: 4px 0 0 0; font-size: 10px;">Datum: ${datum}</p>
543	                    </div>
544	                </div>
545	                
546	                <div class="main-content">
547	                    <div class="left-pane">
548	                        <table>
549	                            <thead>
550	                                <tr><th>#</th><th>Proizvod</th><th>Radna Dimenzija</th><th style="text-align: right;">Količina</th></tr>
551	                            </thead>
552	                            <tbody>${redovi}</tbody>
553	                        </table>
554	                        <div class="qr-area">
555	                            <div>${logoUrl ? `<img src="${logoUrl}" class="logo" />` : `<h3 style="margin:0;">${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</h3>`}</div>
556	                            <div style="text-align:center;">
557	                                <img src="${qrPaket}" class="qr-img" />
558	                                <div style="font-family:monospace; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; letter-spacing: 2px;">${paketId}</div>
559	                            </div>
560	                        </div>
561	                    </div>
562	                    <div class="right-pane">
563	                        <h4 style="margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 14px; color: #0f172a; text-transform: uppercase;">Hronologija obrade:</h4>
564	                        ${tehnologijaHtml}
565	                    </div>
566	                </div>
567	                
568	                <div class="footer">
569	                    <div><b>${POSTAVKE.imeFirme}</b><br>${firmaInfo.adresa}<br>Tel: ${firmaInfo.telefon}</div>
570	                    <div style="text-align:right">E-mail: ${firmaInfo.email}<br>${firmaInfo.footer_tekst}</div>
571	                </div>
572	            </div>
573	            ${decodeURIComponent('%3Cscript%3Ewindow.onload%3Dfunction()%7BsetTimeout(function()%7Bwindow.print()%3B%7D%2C2000)%3B%7D%3B%3C%2Fscript%3E')}
574	        </body>
575	        </html>
576	    `;
577	
578	    iframe.contentWindow.document.open(); 
579	    iframe.contentWindow.document.write(html); 
580	    iframe.contentWindow.document.close();
581	    
582	    setTimeout(() => { document.title = originalTitle; }, 3000);
583	    setTimeout(() => { if (document.body.contains(iframe)) document.body.removeChild(iframe); }, 60000);
584	};

586	// ==========================================
587	// 4. RADNI NALOG ZA SPECIFIČNU MAŠINU (WIP)
588	// ==========================================
589	export const printRadniNalogZaMasinu = async (rn, masina) => {
590	    const stariNaslov = document.title; 
591	    document.title = `RN_${rn.id}_${masina}`;
592	    
593	    const stavkeZaMasinu = rn.stavke_jsonb.map((s, i) => {
594	        const faza = (rn.tehnologija_jsonb[s.id] || []).find(f => f.masina === masina); 
595	        if (!faza) return null;
596	        return `
597	            <tr>
598	                <td style="font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; vertical-align: top;">${i+1}.</td>
599	                <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; vertical-align: top;">
600	                    <span class="prod-sifra">${s.sifra}</span>
601	                    <span class="prod-naziv">${s.naziv}</span>
602	                </td>
603	                <td style="text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; font-weight: 800; font-size: 13px; color: #d97706; vertical-align: top;">${faza.dimenzija}</td>
604	                <td style="text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; font-weight: 800; font-size: 13px; vertical-align: top;">${faza.kolicina} <span style="font-size: 10px; color: #64748b;">${faza.jm}</span></td>
605	                <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; font-size: 10px; vertical-align: top; color: #475569;">
606	                    <b>${faza.oznake?.join(', ') || ''}</b><br/> 
607	                    <i>${faza.napomena || ''}</i>
608	                </td>
609	            </tr>
610	        `;
611	    }).filter(s => s !== null).join('');
612	    
613	    if (!stavkeZaMasinu) return alert(`Nema definisanih zadataka za mašinu: ${masina}`);
614	    
615	    const htmlSadrzaj = `
616	        <div class="info-grid">
617	            <div class="info-col-left">
618	                <h4>Kupac / Klijent</h4>
619	                <h2>${rn.kupac_naziv}</h2>
620	                <p>Detalji nisu uneseni</p>
621	            </div>
622	            <div class="info-col-right">
623	                <p>Rok Isporuke: <b>${new Date(rn.rok_isporuke).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}</b></p>
624	            </div>
625	        </div>
626	
627	        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
628	            <thead>
629	                <tr>
630	                    <th style="width: 5%;">#</th>
631	                    <th style="width: 45%;">Proizvod za Obradu</th>
632	                    <th style="text-align: center;">Radna Dimenzija</th>
633	                    <th style="text-align: center;">Količina</th>
634	                    <th>Zadatak / Oznake</th>
635	                </tr>
636	            </thead>
637	            <tbody>${stavkeZaMasinu}</tbody>
638	        </table>
639	    `;
640	    
641	    await printDokument(`PROIZVODNI NALOG: ${masina}`, rn.id, new Date(rn.datum).toLocaleDateString('de-DE'), htmlSadrzaj, '#0f172a');
642	    setTimeout(() => { document.title = stariNaslov; }, 2000);
643	};
