646	// 5. RADNI NALOG KOMPLETNA RAZRADA (SVE FAZE)
647	// ==========================================
648	export const printRadniNalogSveFaze = async (rn) => {
649	    const stariNaslov = document.title; 
650	    document.title = `RN_SVE_FAZE_${rn.id}`;
651	    
652	    let redovi = rn.stavke_jsonb.map((s, i) => {
653	        const faze = rn.tehnologija_jsonb[s.id] || [];
654	        const fazeHtml = faze.map((f, fi) => `
655	            <div style="font-size: 9px; border-left: 2px solid #d97706; padding-left: 5px; margin-bottom: 3px; color: #475569;">
656	                <b style="color: #0f172a;">${fi+1}. ${f.masina}</b> &mdash; Dimenzija: <b>${f.dimenzija}</b> | Target: <b>${f.kolicina} ${f.jm}</b>
657	            </div>
658	        `).join('');
659	        
660	        return `
661	            <tr>
662	                <td style="font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; vertical-align: top;">${i+1}.</td>
663	                <td style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding: 6px; vertical-align: top;">
664	                    <span class="prod-sifra">${s.sifra}</span>
665	                    <span class="prod-naziv">${s.naziv}</span>
666	                    <div style="margin-top: 6px; background: #f8fafc; padding: 6px; border-radius: 4px;">
667	                        <span style="display: block; font-size: 8px; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 800;">Tehnološki proces (BOM):</span>
668	                        ${fazeHtml}
669	                    </div>
670	                </td>
671	                <td class="num" style="border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; vertical-align: top; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; color: #a855f7; padding: 6px;">
672	                    ${s.kolicina_obracun} <span style="font-size: 10px; color: #64748b;">${s.jm_obracun}</span>
673	                </td>
674	            </tr>
675	        `;
676	    }).join('');
677	    
678	    const htmlSadrzaj = `
679	        <div class="info-grid" style="border-left-color: #a855f7;">
680	            <div class="info-col-left">
681	                <h4>Naručilac Projekta</h4>
682	                <h2>${rn.kupac_naziv}</h2>
683	            </div>
684	            <div class="info-col-right">
685	                <p>Tip naloga: <b>FAZNI (VIŠE MAŠINA)</b></p>
686	                <p>Rok Isporuke: <b>${new Date(rn.rok_isporuke).toLocaleDateString('de-DE')}</b></p>
687	            </div>
688	        </div>
689	
690	        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
691	            <thead>
692	                <tr>
693	                    <th style="background: #a855f7; width: 5%;">#</th>
694	                    <th style="background: #a855f7; width: 70%;">Proizvod i Planirani Procesi (BOM)</th>
695	                    <th class="num" style="background: #a855f7;">Ukupna Ciljna Količina</th>
696	                </tr>
697	            </thead>
698	            <tbody>${redovi}</tbody>
699	        </table>
700	    `;
701	    
702	    await printDokument('GLAVNI RADNI NALOG', rn.id, new Date(rn.datum).toLocaleDateString('de-DE'), htmlSadrzaj, '#a855f7');
703	    setTimeout(() => { document.title = stariNaslov; }, 2000);
704	};

=== app/utils/useSaaS.js ===
1	"use client";
2	import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
3	import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
4	
5	const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://awaxwejrhmjeqohrgidm.supabase.co'; 
6	const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImF3YXh3ZWpyaG1qZXFvaHJnaWRtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NjI1NDcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDQzODU0N30.gOBhZkUQfKvUFBzk329zl4KEgZTl5y10Cnsp989y8hY';
7	const supabase = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
8	
9	export function useSaaS(modulIme, defaultPostavke) {
10	    const [ui, setUi] = useState(defaultPostavke);
11	    const [isEditMode, setIsEditMode] = useState(false);
12	    const [backup, setBackup] = useState(null);
13	
14	    useEffect(() => {
15	        if (!modulIme) return;
16	        const load = async () => {
17	            const { data } = await supabase.from('ui_postavke').select('postavke_jsonb').eq('modul_ime', modulIme).maybeSingle();
18	            if (data && data.postavke_jsonb) {
19	                setUi({ ...defaultPostavke, ...data.postavke_jsonb });
20	            }
21	        };
22	        load();
23	    }, [modulIme]);
24	
25	    const pokreniEdit = () => { 
26	        setBackup(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ui))); 
27	        setIsEditMode(true); 
28	    };
29	    
30	    const odustani = () => { 
31	        if (backup) setUi(backup); 
32	        setIsEditMode(false); 
33	    };
34	
35	    const spasiDizajn = async () => {
36	        const { error } = await supabase.from('ui_postavke').upsert([{ modul_ime: modulIme, postavke_jsonb: ui }], { onConflict: 'modul_ime' });
37	        if (error) {
38	            alert("Greška pri snimanju dizajna: " + error.message);
39	        } else {
40	            alert(`Dizajn modula '${modulIme}' je uspješno spašen!`);
41	            setIsEditMode(false);
42	            setBackup(null);
43	        }
44	    };
45	
46	    // 🟢 POPRAVLJENO: Vraćena ključna riječ defaultConfig!
47	    return { ui, setUi, isEditMode, pokreniEdit, odustani, spasiDizajn, defaultConfig: defaultPostavke };
48	}
